Set UE's request class to *deprioritizedVoip and move UE to the right position according to the request class and the sub-priority in the pre-scheduler candidate set.*
 Else
o If the UE has at least one deprioritized GBR DRB or deprioritized DC-GBR DRB**with non-empty buffer that belongs to a configured** RG with nonzero weight ([image-1][image\_desc]The image contains the text "rrmRGWeighti ≠ 0". The text is in a light color against a white background. The font is italicized and appears to be a sans-serif font. The characters are slightly blurred, but the text is still legible.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_12958.001.png[/image\_path][/image-1]).***\*
Set UE's request class to* deprioritizedGbr and move UE to the right position according to the request class and the sub-priority in the pre-scheduler candidate set.*o Else
Remove the UE from pre-scheduler candidate set.
 If NRBTS.actSliceAwareScheduler = 1 and current class is* deprioritizedGbr* If the UE has no* deprioritizedGbr DRB (includes deprioritized DC-GBR DRBs) with nonempty buffer that belongs to a configured** RG with nonzero weight ([image-2][image\_desc]The image contains the text "rrmRGWeighti ≠ 0". The text is in a light color against a white background. The font is italicized and appears to be a sans-serif font. The characters are slightly blurred, but the text is still legible.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_12958.001.png[/image\_path][/image-2]).***Remove the UE from pre-scheduler candidate set.
 If short PUCCH is configured and no PUCCH token is available for DL scheduling (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4217\_replaced([11174808](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kueYVPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), UE will not be put in CS1.
 If UE's beam cannot be scheduled in the slot due to the beam constraints of the already allocated PUCCH resources in slot n+k1 (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26785\_replaced([11174828](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kueYWPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), UE shall not be included in CS1.
 In FR2, When NRBTS/NRCELLGRP/actHighNumberOfUes = TRUE and rdActEnhBeamSelection = TRUE (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_27553\_replaced([11193947](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvxY0_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), if beam is already selected in the slot, namely selectedBeam (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_27549\_replaced([11174585](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kudKOvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the UE shall be added to CS1 only if UE's beam is same as selected beam. 
 In FR2, if NACK flood is active(refer to [11129535: OLLA correction - Flood NACK](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq8jN_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), the UE shall be included in the CS1 list only when a re-transmission is pending.
 if the number of UEs in this class <= (rdMaxNumUeTdDl - number of UEs already in CS1), all UEs of this class shall be put in CS1.
 else choose (rdMaxNumUeTdDl - number of UEs already in CS1) UEs from this class. For the DRB class or the dtxOptimizedDrbTraffic request class, UEs are chosen in a round robin manner. In FR2, if rdCS1CandidateUeNumCoeff [5G\_UP\_ALG\_23553\_replaced([11193808](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvvjtfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))] > 0, the Round-Robin start point shall keep unchanged until new PUCCH resource become available in the associated UL slot. when updating, the RR start point shall be advanced by the max number of drbTraffic class UEs in each slot in current bundle window. The round-robin selection within drbTraffic request class shall be based on below order: {
           1) Select UEs in NBR category.
           2) Select UEs in pairing group categories. Under this category, the number of UEs can be added into CS1 list and number of UEs can be boosted with higher priority is decided by the bucket algorithm defined in [12447143: Bucket algorithm for selecting DL pairing groups](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_EGVwwAmBEfCT35inaBGo7g?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
           3) Select UEs in Large buffer non-GBR Category.
            3.1) Select all the friends if applicable for each selected user from the above category. See [13341713](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_c_z-gNylEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) for the selection procedure. 
           4) Select UEs in normal non-GBR category.
            4.1) Select all the friends if applicable for each selected user from the above category. See [13341713](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_c_z-gNylEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) for the selection procedure.
      Note: The friends for each user shall be picked from the FLs at the top i.e only the friends from the most-recent FL shall be allowed for the current slot. If, for a user there are no friends from the recent most FLs, then friends from the next most recent FL shall be picked and so on.
      }
-     If NRCELL.actLargeBufferUe is equal to DL or ULAndDL, if not all UEs can be added to the CS1, then gNB shall apply round robin mechanism for up to maxNumUeToAddLargeBuffer UEs from "Large buffer non-GBR Category" (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4178\_replaced([11174242](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuaG5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) in "drbTraffic class" (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4178\_replaced([11174242](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuaG5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), and then apply the round-robin mechanism for the normal non-GBR queue,
where maxNumUeToAddLargeBuffer = min(max(rdMaxNumLargeBufferUesPerSlotDl, round(numUesLargeBuffer / (numUesNonGbr + numUesLargeBuffer) \* numAvailableSeats)), numUesLargeBuffe),
-  numUesLargeBuffer is the number of UEs present in the large-buffer UE queue,
-  numUesNonGbr is the number of UEs present in the normal non-GBR queue and DTX-optimized queues,
-  numAvailableSeats is equal to (maximum size of CS1 after overload control - number of UEs already added to CS1),
-  rdMaxNumLargeBufferUesPerSlotDl is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_33204\_replaced([11194173](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvzOBvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
If the number of UEs with normal non-GBR traffic is greater than 0, and the calculated maxNumUeToAddLargeBuffer is greater than 1 and equal to numAvailableSeats, reduce maxNumUeToAddLargeBuffer by one to allow at least one normal non-GBR UE to be added to CS1. The maxNumUeToAddLargeBuffer shall be less than or equal to numUesLargeBuffer.
Note: If NRBTS/NRCELL.bestNK.actBestKList and NRBTS/NRCELL.actTdHighBufUePrio are enabled, then NRCELL.actLargeBufferUe shall be disabled.
 In FR2, if rdCs1CandidateUeNumCoeff (5G\_UP\_ALG\_23553\_replaced([11193808](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvvjtfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) > 0 and rdCs1CandidateUeNumCoeff \* CS1Size UEs have been inspected, then UE pre-selection for target slot ends.
 If UE uses Distributed PUCCH Allocation Algorithm (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2885\_replaced([11123447](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqjhoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), pre-scheduler in each SCell shall exclude UEs if there is neither HARQ AN PUCCH as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2884\_replaced([11123433](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqi6nfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) nor pCSI PUCCH(where UE can multiplex HARQ A/N with CSI report).* \*Note: In this case, P(S)Cell** pre-scheduler need not exclude the CA UE and shall not use DPA mechanism, this CA UE can be scheduled only in P(S)Cell.***\*
 If current slot does not allow RA-Msg2 as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22029\_replaced([11177883](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuyhafvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), UEs from that class are not put in CS1.
\* Additionally, in case slowPrbPoolingFddFr1Enhanced = TRUE (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_7785\_replaced([11278788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNePvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) OR if NSA DSS 10Mhz boths side blanking configuration is being used (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4716\_replaced([11171969](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuJBIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), and the cell is shared with LTE having the same cell bandwidth (NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=false), pre-scheduler shall consider the current data slot for RA-Msg2 only if it is an MBSFN slot (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4716\_replaced([11171969](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuJBIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and reserved for CSI-RS in*\*the current cell (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19535\_replaced([11115109](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX4PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**
\* **Note : In a cell shared with LTE having the same cell bandwidth (NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=false) and slowPrbPoolingFddFr1Enhanced = FALSE** AND if NSA DSS 10Mhz boths side blanking configuration is not being used (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4716\_replaced([11171969](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuJBIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the slots allowed to be used for RA-Msg2 are restricted and defined by the Type1 Search Space configured in the cell which is dependent on the prachConfigurationIndex of the cell.***\*
 For UE with RA-Msg4(CRI)/SRB0 message or any transmissions for UE without UE dedicated configuration activated including the UE in the initial BWP without dedicated configuration, pre-scheduler shall check if in the PUCCH slot, symbol 12 or symbol 13 is allocated for SRS transmission, if yes, UE will not be put in CS1.
 Additionally, in a cell shared with LTE having the same cell bandwidth (NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=false), for UE with RA-Msg4(CRI)/SRB0 message or any transmissions for UE without UE dedicated configuration activated including the UE in the initial BWP without dedicated configuration,
if ( (NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=false) and (current slot is NOT an MBSFN slot (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4716\_replaced([11171969](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuJBIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) OR ((slowPrbPoolingFddFr1Enhanced = TRUE (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_7785\_replaced([11278788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNePvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) AND (current slot is reserved for CSI-RS in CsiRsPoolingGroup of current cell (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19535\_replaced([11115109](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX4PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))))
{
UE shall not be put in CS1
}*\*Note: CRI part of msg4 can be send in either MBSFN or normal subframe.**
 For UE with DCI 1\_0 listed hereafter (also see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_16216\_replaced([11178050](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuzvjPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), UE can be put in CS1 if k1 <= 8 (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2473\_replaced([11116092](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp0h3vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and if k1 is allowed in [11116092](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp0h3vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/bi_kp0h3vvsee-aqvopbp1qhq?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9").
If NRCELL.actFdmSchedulingInitialBWP=false, only one such UE, the one with the highest priority, shall be added to the CS1 list
 UE with RA-Msg4/SRB0 message or
 UE without UE dedicated configuration activated or
 SA UE in the transient phase between receiving PsUser\_UserModifyReq and receiving PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq,
 UE performing Beam failure recovery.
 For UE without UE dedicated configuration activated, the pre-scheduler shall check if the decided K1 (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2473\_replaced([11116092](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp0h3vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) will not lead to reuse a PUCCH resource already booked for this UE previously, increasing to 2 the number of HARQ feedbacks in PUCCH Format 1 (see requirement 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4582\_replaced([11187231](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvZlZfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
 FR1 CA UE in FDD SCell shall not be put in CS1 list if all below conditions are met:
 the FDD carrier has txSwitchImpactToRx=true (refer to 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_11305\_replaced([11307687](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tq-2kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
 the FDD slot **(symbol 6) is impacted by TAS-SRS for SB BF from TDD PCell in critical band combination, e.g. FDD slot 4 or 9 impacted by TDD TAS-SRS for SB BF in frame structure 5GC001208.**
 rdSkipPdschTasSRSinMiddle (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23271\_replaced([11193676](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvu8kvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to true.
For FDD Non-DSS cell, when MRBTS/NRBTS/actSlowPrbPoolingFddFr1Enh is set to True and CSI-IM is scheduled in symbols other than CSI-RS for channel acquisition, UE without dedicated configuration shall not be scheduled in the CSI-RS slot. 
For FDD DSS cell with asymmetric DSS (NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=true), UE without dedicated configuration shall not be scheduled in the CSI-IM slots.
**Rationale: Until UE is configured with dedicated configuration, UEs cannot be scheduled in CSI-RS slot as UE is not aware of the CSI-**
IM rate matching configuration (ZP CSI-RS resource for CSI-IM rate matching which is sent as part of dedicated configuration).
\* If "UE Power Saving DCI based SSSG Switching” is activated by higher layers configuring searchSpaceGroupIdList-r17 (5G\_UP\_ALG\_31041\_replaced([11168736](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktx0y_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),  then the CS1 list shall be updated according to SSSG configuration. Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31890\_replaced([11168897](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktzC7_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
In SS/PBCH slot or TRS slot, the UE with DCI Format 1\_0 even if a common TDRA is compatible with the number of available PDSCH symbol (RA\_Msg4/SRB0 for regular RRC setup (no RLC segmentation allowed) and Forced DCI (DCI 1\_0 Type3) (no obvious reason) and DCI Format 1\_0 Type1 for C-RNTI without dedicated configuration) shall not be added in the CS1. Therefore, the RA-Msg2 is not removed from CS1 list. The U-Plane will check the PDCCH and the PDSCH constraint in the TD and FD schedulers.
For FR1 TDD beamforming cell, if actTddCsiImRm = TRUE (note: actTddCsiImRm is not get from NIDD but from L3 indicator), the UE with DCI Format 1\_0 could be scheduled on CSI-IM slots but it is only allowed to be scheduled on the non-CSI-IM symbols (even if this restriction does not exist in the 3GPP for the UE configured with associated zero power CSI-RS).
In FR1 TDD eCPRI non-FD BF case, if the DL subcell is pooled and the available DL subcell is less than 2(L1 Resource Allocator allocates DL subcells, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_5233\_replaced([11210144](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw3lCvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), UE shall not be scheduled in SSB slot or TRS slot.
UEs shall not be put in CS1 list, if MAC layer monitoring is triggered (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31674\_replaced([11153894](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kspMVvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for traffic other than DL SRB traffic (initial and re-transmission)
UEs shall not be put in CS1 list if MAC layer monitoring is triggered (5G\_UP\_ALG\_29060\_replaced([11153872](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kspMVPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for following condition
-  traffic other than DL SRB traffic (initial and re-transmission) till rrcProcessingDelay timer.
- Post rrcProcessingDelay timer and till timer expiry for both SRB/DRB traffic.
This limited candidate set is used as basis for subsequent TD scheduling.

---

### 3.29.4.0-29 DL Pre-Scheduling Bucket algorithm for selecting DL pairing groups (ID: 12447143)

**3.29.4.0-29.0-3**  (ID: `13486169`)

DL Pre-Scheduling
During procedure of UE selection for CS1 (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4209\_replaced([11174627](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kudxRfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall decide which UEs in which pairing group shall be added into CS1 and prioritized in current slot according to the below algorithm. Only one pairing group can be selected to boost priority in one slot.

1. Decide the maximum number of UEs in pairing group which can be prioritized in current slot using the formula of T = ROUNDUP[MAX(0, rdDlPairingGroupPriorityBoostRatio \* (MIN(rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl, cs1ListMaxSize, rrmAverageScheduledUesDl) - numUEsInCS1))].
2. The value of rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl is defined in [11179018: DL FDM Parameters](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku3Z4PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
3. The rdDlPairingGroupPriorityBoostRatio is defined in [12505828: rdDlPairingGroupPriorityBoostRatio](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_IxXl0BVQEfCV0v_Ffc8sJw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
4. The numUEsInCS1 is the number of UEs which are already added in CS1 list.
5. The cs1ListMaxSize is current max size of CS1 list.
6. The rrmAverageScheduledUesDl is averaged number of scheduled UEs in DL slots.
7. If T > 1, select one pairing group using the below bucket algorithm and add UEs (which are not added in CS1) from the chosen group into CS1 with priority boost. About how to boost priority, see [11175240: Scheduling weight for non-GBR bearer](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuhbp_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). The number of added UEs shall not exceed room left in T.
8. Add other UEs in pairing groups into CS1 without priority boost. The total number of UEs in pairing groups can be added in CS1 list shall not be higher than MAX(numAvailSeats - numLargeBuff - numNormalnonGbr, T). The numAvailSeats is the number of UEs that can be added into CS1 list after UEs under NBR category are added. The numLargeBuff is the number of UEs under Larger Buffer non-GBR category. The numNormalnonGbr is the number of UEs under normal non-GBR category.
9. [CB014670-C] When UEs have been considered for scheduling or scheduled in previous slot(s) but their post-scheduling has not been performed due to out-of-order scheduling (see [13423834](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_cvOa8RiUEfGFMKAOrP5qqw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), then the gNB-DU shall exclude such UEs from being added to CS1 list (see [13462723](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FpMDZDM2EfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) with/without priority boost as per above conditions. [End CB014670-C]

The bucket algorithm is defined as below. The number of times each pairing group is selected to be prioritized in the slot should match the ratio of the number of UEs it contains vs. the total number of UEs in all groups. To ensure this, a bucket algorithm is used to select the pairing group according to below algorithm:

1. The pairing group shall be chosen without considering bucket value if any UE (MU eligible) in this pairing group is already added into CS1 list due to higher request class (for example, HARQ retransmission, MAC CE.).
2. If number of MU eligible UEs in a pairing group is not higher than 1, the bucket algorithm shall not select this pairing group for boosting scheduling priority. It will avoid boosting a pairing group which has not enough UEs to be paired.
3. Each group has a bucket value associated with it and its initial bucket value is token value.
4. The group with the highest bucket value shall be selected.
5. After the group is selected, buckets of all groups shall be updated as below:
6. For the chosen group, the total number of token in all other groups shall be subtracted from bucket of the chosen one.
7. For the non-chosen group(s), its bucket shall be added with its token.
8. For safety purpose, all group buckets shall be reset to zero if any group bucket value grow beyond +/- 100 or if no UEs are present in any group.

Below is an example to show how bucket of each pairing group is updated step by step. There are 4 PGs and token of each group is: PG0(3), PG1(2), PG2(6), PG3(8).

|  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Steps | Selected group | PG0 bucket | PG1 bucket | PG2 bucket | PG3 bucket |
| 0 | - | 3 | 2 | 6 | 8 |
| 1 | PG3 | 6 (3+3) | 4 (2+2) | 12 (6+6) | -3 (8-11) |
| 2 | PG2 | 9 (6+3) | 6 (4+2) | -1 (12-13) | 5 (-3+8) |
| 3 | PG0 | -7 (9-16) | 8 (6+2) | 5 (-1+6) | 13 (5+8) |
| 4 | PG3 | -4 (-7+3) | 10 (8+2) | 11 (5+6) | 2 (13-11) |
| 5 | PG2 | -1 (-4+3) | 12 (10+2) | -2 (11-13) | 10 (2+8) |
| 6 | PG1 | 2 (-1+3) | -5 (12-17) | 4 (-2+6) | 18 (10+8) |
| 7 | PG3 | 5 (2+3) | -3 (-5+2) | 10 (4+6) | 7 (18-11) |

---

### 3.29.4.0-30 DL Pre-Scheduling Selection of "Friend" users in CS1 (ID: 13341713)

**3.29.4.0-30.0-1**  (ID: `13366982`)

DL Pre-Scheduling
Overload control actions

---

**3.29.4.0-30.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13366984`)

DL Pre-Scheduling
If the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31301\_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is greater than or equal to the value set for the**activation threshold of** rdFriendListDeactOlcDlPerCent [(13365954](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_lxSsBfagEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ)) then gNB-DU shall suspend the below actions specified in [13341715](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_xcRbodylEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) or [13341733](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_v2etE9ymEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).\*\*\*\*

If the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31301\_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is below than the value set for the**deactivation threshold of** rdFriendListDeactOlcDlPerCent [(13365954](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_lxSsBfagEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ)) then gNB-DU shall suspend the below actions specified in [13341715](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_xcRbodylEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) or [13341733](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_v2etE9ymEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).\*\*\*\*

---

**3.29.4.0-30.0-2**  (ID: `13341715`)

DL Pre-Scheduling
Without High TD metric and High buffer users prioritization in CS1 list

---

**3.29.4.0-30.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `13426577`)

DL Pre-Scheduling
If NRCELL.actBundlePreviousPairedUes is set to 'disabled' or 'UL' the following procedure shall be skipped.

During the procedure for UE selection to CS1 list (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4209\_replaced([11174627](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kudxRfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gNB-DU shall decide for a slot, maxNumFriendUsersInCs1 which is the maximum number of friends that can be selected for the already selected users from the drbTraffic class as described below:

maxNumFriendUsersInCs1 = max((numRemainSeatsInCs1 – numReserveSeatsInCs1Rr),0)

where:

numRemainSeatsInCs1: (cs1ListMaxSize - numUEsInCs1), which shall give the number of remaining seats still available in the CS1 list, where the numUEsInCs1 is the number of users already selected in the CS1 list and cs1ListMaxSize is the maximum CS1 size list for the slot.

numReserveSeatsInCs1Rr: rdPerForRrResForNonGbrDl \* numRemainSeatsInCs1, which shall give the percentage of users that must be reserved through round-robin selection process. See [13345095:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_mvi7ceCQEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) for rdPerForRrResForNonGbrDl.

Note: gNB-DU shall also select the friends of those MU users that are selected into the CS1 list from a higher traffic class (if applicable, for e.g the harqRetransDrb traffic class, [CB014699-E]but criticalHarqRetransDrb and criticalDrbTraffic are excluded for tradeoff to complexity [End CB014699-E]). It is likely that these users could have friends in the drbTraffic class. gNB-DU shall ensure that all the users from the higher priority traffic classes[CB014699-E] (excluding criticalHarqRetransDrb and criticalDrbTraffic) [End CB014699-E] are selected before picking the respective friends into the CS1 list to avoid the friends reserving seats in the CS1 list ahead of the higher priority traffic class users. A simple approach could be that, gNB-DU keeps track of the number for their friends and once numUEsInCs1 users are selected, gNB-DU shall pick the respective friends satisfying the condition described above.

---

**3.29.4.0-30.0-3**  (ID: `13341733`)

DL Pre-Scheduling
With High TD metric and High buffer users users prioritization in CS1 list

---

**3.29.4.0-30.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `13341734`)

DL Pre-Scheduling
If NRCELL.actBundlePreviousPairedUes is set to 'disabled' or 'UL' the following procedure shall be skipped.

During the procedure for UE selection to CS1 list (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4209\_replaced([11174627](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kudxRfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

* gNB-DU shall decide for the slot, maxNumBestNKUsersInCs1 which is the maximum number of high buffer and high TD metric users that can be added to the CS1 list as described below:
* gNB-DU shall decide the maximum number of users under high buffer and high TD metric users:

  + If NRBTS/NRCELL/bestNK.actBestKList is set to DL or DL\_UL as follows:
  + maxNumBestNKUsersInCs1 = BestNKListRatio × cs1ListMaxSize, where BestNKListRatio (DL) is given by NRBTS/NRCELL.bestNK.dlBestNListRatio.
  + Please refer to [12550648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Q5B2YyQrEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) for the selection process for the above category of users.
  + If NRBTS/NRCELL/bestNK.actBestKList is disabled and NRCELL.actLargeBufferUe is equal to DL or ULAndDL, then
  + maxNumBestNKUsersInCs1 = maxNumUeToAddLargeBuffer + (BestNKListRatio × cs1ListMaxSize). For maxNumUeToAddLargeBuffer see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4209\_replaced([11174627](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kudxRfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* gNB-DU shall add the users as described above to the CS1 list such that it shall satisfy the below equation.
* maxNumBestNKUsersInCs1 = max((numRemainSeatsInCs1 - numReserveSeatsInCs1Rr),0)
* gNB-DU shall decide for a slot, maxNumFriendUsersInCs1 which is the maximum number of friends that can be selected for the already selected users from the drbTaffic class.
* maxNumFriendUsersInCs1 =  max((numRemainSeatsInCs1 – numReserveSeatsInCs1Rr),0)
* For friends of users belonging to higher traffic class see [13341713](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_c_z-gNylEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

where:

numRemainSeatsInCs1: (cs1ListMaxSize - numUEsInCs1), which shall give the number of remaining seats still available in the CS1 list, where the numUEsInCs1 is the number of users already selected in the CS1 list and cs1ListMaxSize is the maximum CS1 size list for the slot.

numReserveSeatsInCs1Rr: rdPerForRrResForNonGbrDl \* numRemainSeatsInCs1, which shall give the percentage of users that must be reserved through round-robin selection process. See [13345095:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_mvi7ceCQEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) for rdPerForRrResForNonGbrDl.

---

### 3.29.4.0-31 DL Pre-Scheduling UE weight for Distributed PUCCH Algorithm (ID: 11174799)

**3.29.4.0-31.0-1**  (ID: `11174803`)

DL Pre-Scheduling
Each DL Pre-Scheduler shall check for each CA UE with distributed PUCCH allocation (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2885\_replaced([11123447](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqjhoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) if it has SRB/DRB data to be sent (as per L2-LO)  Note: This info is stored for the last rdAvgTimeSCSAttRatio\_msec (default 40 msec). (see 5G\_L2\_1468\_replaced([11184390](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27qsGfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Note: For more details on Distributed PUCCH Allocation algorithm, please refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2884\_replaced([11123433](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqi6nfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

### 3.29.4.0-32 DL Pre-Scheduling PUCCH Token Availability for Pre-scheduler (ID: 11174808)

**3.29.4.0-32.0-4**  (ID: `12659442`)

DL Pre-Scheduling
For each UE in the pre-scheduling candidate set which requires PUCCH scheduling, DL prescheduler shall check that L1 PUCCH decoding capacity limit has not been reached (see 5G\_UP\_3230\_replaced([11397508](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uf2tp_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) on its reporting serving cell at targeted K1 value used for current DL slot scheduling. For TDD FR1 with long PUCCH enabled, the L1 PUCCH decoding capacity limits are given in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2464\_replaced([11116063](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp0h1vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). In FDD with long PUCCH configured there is no need to check L1 PUCCH decoding capacity limits as C-Plane already guarantees sufficient PUCCH format 1 resources for A/N reporting.

For each CA UE which uses Distributed PUCCH Allocation Algorithm (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2885\_replaced([11123447](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqjhoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), PUCCH allocation shall be based on distributed PUCCH allocation result.

If the CA UEs with VoIP/SRB or MAC CE but no pre-allocation PUCCH resource Unit, the CA UE can use non-CA UE  PUCCH Resource Unit.

When checking L1 PUCCH decoding capacity, pre-scheduling shall consider the expected periodic CSI reports received over PUCCH in the target slot for HARQ feedback.

Transmission of Msg2 does not require PUCCH scheduling and is not concerned by the restriction.

A UE that already have PUCCH resources allocated in the targeted slot for HARQ feedback may be preselected if :

* The allocated PUCCH resource has format 0 and UE has been scheduled only once,
* OR the allocated PUCCH resource has format 2 and HARQ feedback UCI payload is less than the maximum allowed size.
* OR the allocated PUCCH resource has format 0 with two bits payload and L1 PUCCH decoding capacity for format 2 has not been reached.
* the allocated PUCCH resource has format 1 and UE has been scheduled only once and the UE is able to handle 2 bits Ack/Nack (see requirement 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4582\_replaced([11187231](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvZlZfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* OR the allocated PUCCH resource has format 3 and HARQ feedback UCI payload is less than the maximum allowed size.
* OR the allocated PUCCH resource has format 1 with two bits payload and L1 PUCCH decoding capacity for format 3 has not been reached.

A UE not supporting CSI-HARQ multiplexing (simultaneousHARQ-ACK-CSI in 5G\_CP\_IF\_RRC\_3816\_replaced([11348112](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wXgBN_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) which already has a CSI report scheduled in the targeted slot for HARQ feedback shall not be preselected. For FR1 CA UEs, DL prescheduler will get the configuration for P(S)Cell CSI report and Scell CSI report and beam report according to perCsiReportConfig defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2670\_replaced([11120289](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqPYmfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for Scell and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2667\_replaced([11120269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqPYlPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for P(S)Cell to skip the UE preselection in case HARQ feedback in same slot as CSI report and beam report while the UE does not support CSI-HARQ multiplexing according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2667\_replaced([11120269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqPYlPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For FR1 CA UEs, DL prescheduler will only consider the setting of CSI-HARQ multiplexing.

[Before CNI-137616-C]

If long PUCCH is configured (IE PucchModeSelect in PsCell\_CellSetupReq) and rdSimuHarqAckSrOnLongPucch (5G\_L2\_1230\_replaced([11182169](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27ZmVPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to false then the Pre-Scheduler shall not select a UE for DL scheduling if the HARQ feedback would fall in the same slot as UE's Scheduling Request occasion. Note, before 5GC000885-E the only valid value of rdSimuHarqAckSrOnLongPucch is false. [End CNI-137616-C]

For FR1 **CA UEs, DL prescheduler will always consider SR multiplexing with HARQ-ACK [Before CNI-137616-C] whatever rdSimuHarqAckSrOnLongPucch is configured. [End CNI-137616-C]**

If /NRBTS/NRCELL/actSharedSr is set to TRUE and /NRBTS/NRCELL/pucchModeSelect is set to longPucch and the cell-related parameter sharedSrPrb (see 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_7088\_replaced([11278984](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpTbkfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is equal to the parameter startingPrb of the UE’s SR resource (see 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2973\_replaced([11311385](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TrYfOPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and the DL transmissions HARQ timing will overlap with the UE's SR timing if only the UE’s shared SR resource is configured in that UL slot, then the pre-scheduler shall not select the UE for DL scheduling.

K1 value is precomputed according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2473\_replaced([11116092](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp0h3vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The maximum number of UCI bits for HARQ feedback in PUCCH format 2 and 3 **can refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1218\_replaced([11104718](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_koAj__vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**

For E-UTRA-NR dual connected /SA UEs with MGs setup, the PUCCH drop in interrupted slots shall be treated as invalid.

---

### 3.29.4.0-33 DL Pre-Scheduling Beam Availability for Pre-Scheduler (ID: 11174828)

**3.29.4.0-33.0-1**  (ID: `11174832`)

DL Pre-Scheduling
In FR2, If NRBTS/NRCELLGRP/actPucchBeamConstraintFR2 = TRUE, DL Pre-scheduler shall filter the UEs which require PUCCH scheduling based on their beams considering the already allocated PUCCH resources in the slot n+k1 as below:

* For UEs which require PUCCH scheduling:
* If there exists atleast one PUCCH symbol without any PUCCH resource allocation in the slot n+k1 across all carriers configured in the cellgroup, all those UEs can be added to CS1.
* If PUCCH resource allocation is already present in all PUCCH symbols in the slot n+k1 in any of the CCs within cellgroup, then only UEs from the beams of those allocated PUCCH resources shall be added to CS1
* For UEs which does not require PUCCH scheduling (For ex. SIB/Msg2):
* All those UEs shall be added to CS1.

The PDSCH Transmission that does not require PUCCH scheduling are as below:

* SystemInformation (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4150\_replaced([11174046](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuYRt_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* Paging (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4152\_replaced([11174054](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuYRufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* rachMsg2 (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4154\_replaced([11174063](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuYRu_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

---

### 3.29.4.0-34 DL Pre-Scheduling Reception of PsUser_UserSuspendSchedulingReq (ID: 11174838)

**3.29.4.0-34.0-2**  (ID: `11174845`)

DL Pre-Scheduling
Upon reception of PsUser\_UserSuspendSchedulingReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_477\_replaced([10976953](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VJoBvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

The DL Prescheduler, for the designated UE:

- Shall be declared as suspended for DRB data scheduling

- Shall not allow the UE to be added into the Candidate Set 1 when there is only DRB data available

- Shall not include any DRB information into the LoCtrl\_PduMuxReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_863\_replaced([10984505](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WAjrfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) message to L2-LO

- Shall stop all HARQ re-transmissions for DRB data

[CB008140-GC] For the designated UE which existed connection with SCell(s) located in ext-gNB and indicated as inter-gNB HO, L2 PS in prime-gNB shall notify SCell(s) located in ext-gNB to stop data scheduling and DPA measurement. [End CB008140-GC]

Note: please refer to Note in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4831\_replaced([11195211](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv6ixfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

### 3.29.4.0-35 DL Pre-Scheduling Reception of PsUser_UserResumeSchedulingReq (ID: 11174850)

**3.29.4.0-35.0-1**  (ID: `11174855`)

DL Pre-Scheduling
[Before CNI-84537-A]

Upon reception of PsUser\_UserResumeSchedulingReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_485\_replaced([10977058](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VKPF_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), DL Prescheduler shall, for the designated UE:

For any bearer

- Declare them as no more suspended

- Consider them to add the UE into Candidate Set 1

Re-evaluate whether UE shall be added into Candidate Set 1

[End CNI-84537-A]

---

### 3.29.4.0-36 DL Pre-Scheduling Handling of synchronization in PCell (ID: 11174858)

**3.29.4.0-36.0-1**  (ID: `11174862`)

DL Pre-Scheduling
When [Before CB008451-C-UPD001]PCell L2 PS[CB008451-C-UPD001]PCell's 5G-L2-PS[End CB008451-C-UPD001] receives ‘OutOfSync’ status for the specific [Before CB008451-C-UPD001]{PCell, ext-SCell}[CB008451-C-UPD001]{PCell, ext-SCell(s)}[End CB008451-C-UPD001] pair with UE list (each {PCell, ext-SCell} has its’ specific UE list) from [Before CB008451-C-UPD001] the following nodes, PCell L2 PS[CB008451-C-UPD001] prime-CP-RT or ext-L2-PS nodes, then PCell's 5G-L2-PS[End CB008451-C-UPD001] shall execute ext-SCell deactivation procedure [Before CB008451-C-UPD001](5G_UP_ALG_12817_replaced([11122057](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcM6vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

-  prime-CPRT, or

-  ext-L2-PS [CB008451-C-UPD001](5G_UP_ALG_24724_replaced([11122095](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcz9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).[End CB008451-C-UPD001]

When [Before CB008451-C-UPD001]PCell L2 PS[CB008451-C-UPD001]PCell's 5G-L2-PS[End CB008451-C-UPD001] receives ‘InSync’ status for the specific [Before CB008451-C-UPD001]{PCell, ext-SCell}[CB008451-C-UPD001]{PCell, ext-SCell(s)}[End CB008451-C-UPD001] pair with UE list (each {PCell, ext-SCell} has its’ specific UE list) from [Before CB008451-C-UPD001] the following nodes, PCell L2 PS [CB008451-C-UPD001] prime-CP-RT or ext-L2-PS nodes, then PCell's 5G-L2-PS [End CB008451-C-UPD001] shall execute ext-SCell re-activation procedure [Before CB008451-C-UPD001](5G_UP_ALG_14021_replaced([11122085](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcz8vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

-  prime-CPRT, or

-  ext-L2-PS [CB008451-C-UPD001](5G_UP_ALG_24726_replaced([11122108](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcz-PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).[End CB008451-C-UPD001]

### 3.29.4.0-37 DL Pre-Scheduling Handling of synchronization in ext-SCell (ID: 11174867)

**3.29.4.0-37.0-1**  (ID: `11174870`)

DL Pre-Scheduling
When ext-L2-PS receives ‘OutOfSync’/‘InSync’ status for the specific {PCell, ext-SCell} pairs with UE list (each {PCell, ext-SCell} has its’ specific UE list) from [Before CB008451-C-UPD001]ext-CPRT[CB008451-C-UPD001]ext-CP-RT, then [End CB008451-C-UPD001] ext-L2-PS shall notify ‘OutOfSync’/’InSync’ status to [Before CB008451-C-UPD001]PCell L2 PS[CB008451-C-UPD001]PCell's 5G-L2-PS.[End CB008451-C-UPD001]

---

### 3.29.4.0-38 DL Pre-Scheduling Common channels management (ID: 11174874)

**3.29.4.0-38.0-1**  (ID: `11174878`)

DL Pre-Scheduling
When the common channels (SI-RNTI/P-RNTI) must be scheduled in a given slot, the associated RNTI (SI-RNTI/P-RNTI) are added in the Candidate Set 1 (CS1) list.

According to the number SS/PBCH considered for a given slot, it is possible to have several times the same common RNTI in the CS1 list.

The presence of the common channels in the CS1 list allows to take into account their associated SS/PBCH which must be transmitted.

All the characteristics (PDCCH/PDSCH resources) are available in the associated scheduling contexts.

---

### 3.29.4.0-39 DL Pre-Scheduling RA/TC-RNTI and C-RNTI without dedicated configuration filtering according to Type 1 search space availability (ID: 11174884)

**3.29.4.0-39.0-2**  (ID: `12659665`)

DL Pre-Scheduling
12659665:
DL Pre-Scheduling
[Before PR873539-26R2] ; The 5G-L2-PS must remove from the CS1 list or must not add in the CS1 list, the RA-RNTI and TC-RNTI if the Type 1 PDCCH is not available in the slot, from the formula hereafter, [Before CNI-137616-B] when the rdCs1ListFilteringForType1PDCCH parameter (5G\_L2\_9066\_replaced([11182501](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27cCm_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to true. The rdCs1ListFilteringForType1PDCCH parameter (5G\_L2\_9066\_replaced([11182501](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27cCm_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to true for DSS configuration. [CNI-137616-B]for DSS configurations or when the small RRC setup is activated (NRCELL.actSmallestRRCSetup set to true). [End CNI-137616-B]
[PR873539-26R2] ; The 5G-L2-PS must remove from the CS1 list or must not add in the CS1 list, the RA-RNTI and TC-RNTI if the Type1 PDCCH is not available in the slot, from the formula hereafter, when the rdCs1ListFilteringForType1PDCCH parameter (5G L2 Entity: [11182501 (rdCs1ListFilteringForType1PDCCH)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27cCm_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) is set to true.
The rdCs1ListFilteringForType1PDCCH parameter is set to true for DSS configuration, even if it makes no sense to deactivate the filtering for other configurations leading to potentially increase the load due to the lack of PDCCH detected in the TD scheduler when the search space is not configured in the target slot. [End PR873539-26R2]
If it is a Contention Free Random Access procedure, the check about the availability of the Type 1 PDCCH is done in the UE active BWP (only for the RA-Msg2. The retransmissions of RA-Msg3, for the C-RNTI, is not in a Type 1 PDCCH in that case).
Otherwise, it is a Contention Based Random Access procedure and the check is done with the Type 1 search space in the initial BWP, if configured in this BWP (cell depType SA or SA+NSA) or in a dedicated BWP with a Type 1 search space configured (NSA cell only). When the RA-Msg3 contains a MAC Control Element C-RNTI, the RNTI is no more a TC-RNTI.
To determine if the slot handles the Type 1 PDCCH or not, the 5G-L2-PS checks that the following condition is met
[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is:
(sfn × 2μ × 10 + rfSlot - slotOffsets) - periodicitys × |(sfn × 2μ × 10 + rfSlot - slotOffsets) / periodicitys| < durations[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_12979.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]
with,

Target System Frame Number index

### 3.29.4.0-40 DL Pre-Scheduling RNTI filtering according to Time Domain Resource Allocation, slot format and UE constraints (ID: 11174914)

**3.29.4.0-40.0-3**  (ID: `11174929`)

DL Pre-Scheduling
The 5G-L2-PS must remove from the CS1 list, all candidates RNTIs using a PDSCH Time Domain Resource Allocation (TDRA) list (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2387\_replaced([11115342](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNG_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and followings) which does not contain a SLIV compatible with the slot format defined for the selected slot.

The SI-RNTI to schedule the SIB1 uses the PDSCH default Time Domain Resource Allocation (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2389\_replaced([11115349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNHfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

The SI-RNTI for SI-Msg(s) scheduling, P-RNTI, RA-RNTI, TC-RNTI and C-RNTI using a Common Search Space associated to the coreset(0), use the PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2391\_replaced([11115362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

The C-RNTI using the UE-Specific Search Space(s) uses the PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocation (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2396\_replaced([11115520](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvCRvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| RNTI | Search Space | Time Domain Resource Allocation |
| SI-RNTI | Common Search Space (Type0-PDCCH) | Default (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2389\_replaced([11115349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNHfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) |
| SI-RNTI | Common Search Space (Type0A-PDCCH) | Common (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2391\_replaced([11115362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) |
| RA-RNTI, TC-RNTI, C-RNTI without dedicated configuration activated. | Common Search Space (Type1-PDCCH) | Common (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2391\_replaced([11115362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) |
| P-RNTI | Common Search Space (Type2-PDCCH) | Common (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2391\_replaced([11115362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) |
| C-RNTI, MCS-C-RNTI, CS-RNTI | Common Search Space (Type3-PDCCH) associated to CORESET(0) | Common (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2391\_replaced([11115362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) |
| C-RNTI, MCS-C-RNTI, CS-RNTI | Common Search Space (Type3-PDCCH) not associated to CORESET(0)   UE-Specific Search Space | Dedicated (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2396\_replaced([11115520](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvCRvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) |

**[CB012269-A] The UE’s applicable SLIV should be checked against available symbols for PDSCH transmission as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2373\_replaced([11115215](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpr--_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).** [End CB012269-A]\*\*\*\*

---

### 3.29.4.0-41 DL Pre-Scheduling C-RNTI without DCI BWP switch filtering for slots without PDSCH capability (ID: 11174934)

**3.29.4.0-41.0-3**  (ID: `13364340`)

DL Pre-Scheduling
**[Before CNI-151163-A**] When the parameter NRBTS/NRCELL/actCaWimaxInterferenceAvoidance=true, the gNB, for the DL14 slot before the BI one, does not add in the CS1 list any RNTI candidate for a DL grant which is not for a DCI BWP switch (k0=6). The RNTI for DCI BWP switch are allowed, because there is no PDSCH transmisison which may interfer with the Wimax technology (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26216\_replaced([11170193](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt8z6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**[End CNI-151163-A**]***\****\*

---

### 3.29.4.0-42 DL Pre-Scheduling C-RNTI without grant capability in UE Search Space Set Group (ID: 12714733)

**3.29.4.0-42.0-1**  (ID: `12714734`)

DL Pre-Scheduling
The gNB-DU removes any C-RNTI from the CS1 list for which the one following condition is met:

·    When the UE active Search Space Set Group (SSSG) is confirmed (see [11168840](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktzC4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), the PDCCH slot pattern for the candidate slot does not allow DL grant capability in at least one search space associated to its UE active SSSG (default or ueSssgId(>0)).

·    When the UE active Search Space Set Group is not confirmed yet (see [11168840](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktzC4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), the PDCCH slot pattern for the candidate slot does not allow the DL grant capability neither in any search space of its active SSSG nor in any search space of its passive SSSG.

---

### 3.29.4.0-43 DL Pre-Scheduling C-RNTI with dedicated configuration filtering according to Type 3 search space configuration (ID: 13396967)

**3.29.4.0-43.0-1**  (ID: `13396968`)

DL Pre-Scheduling
13396968:
DL Pre-Scheduling
[PR873539-26R2] ; When rdCs1ListFilteringForType1PDCCH parameter ([11182501: rdCs1ListFilteringForType1PDCCH](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27cCm_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) is set to true [End PR873539-26R2], the 5G-L2-PS must remove from the CS1 list or must not add in the CS1 list, , the C-RNTI requesting a grant in the Type 3 PDCCH in its active BWP, if it is not configured in the slot, from the formula hereafter.
To determine if the slot handles the Type 3 PDCCH or not, the 5G-L2-PS checks that the following condition is met

### 3.29.4.0-44 DL Pre-Scheduling RA/TC-RNTI and C-RNTI without dedicated configuration filtering in slot handling CSI-IM (ID: 13415083)

**3.29.4.0-44.0-1**  (ID: `13415084`)

DL Pre-Scheduling
[Before 05283414-26R2] ; When the slot handles CSI-IM in symbol 4 or 8 or 10, the U-Plane does not add RNTI without capability to handle rate matching around the CSI-IM. [05283414-26R2].

When the TDRA is configured in the common TDRA list in order to allocate a PDSCH without any overlapping on the CSI-IM configured in symbol 8 or 10, the U-Plane does not remove the RA-RNTI from the CS1 list.

For the following conditions, the U-Plane removes or does not add the RNTI:

·    RA-RNTI and without specific TDRA configured in the SIB1 to have PDSCH symbol allocation which are not overlapping the CSI-IM.

·    TC-RNTI (CRI alone or CRI combined with DL-[C,D]CCH (RRC [Setup,Reestablishment,Resume]).

·    C-RNTI without any dedicated configuration activated.

·    C-RNTI with a dedicated configuration activated but without zeroPower CSI-RS (zp-CSI-RS) to rate match the PDSCH around the CSI-IM.

[End 05283414-26R2]

---

### 3.29.4.1 DTX optimized scheduling

#### 3.29.4.1.0-1 DTX optimized scheduling DTX optimized class handling (ID: 11174950)

**3.29.4.1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11174957`)

DTX optimized scheduling
If NRBTS/NRCELL/actDtxOptimizedScheduler is set to true then 5G-L2-PS shall use the DTX optimization for the scheduling of PDSCH with non-delay sensitive traffic for RRC connected UEs.

In that case, UEs that would normally be assigned to the drbTraffic request class (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4178\_replaced([11174242](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuaG5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall be assigned to the dtxOptimizedDrbTraffic (described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8549\_replaced([11174294](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuat9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) request class instead if none of the following conditions are verified:

 DTX oriented scheduling is disabled (as described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9949\_replaced([11174961](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kufmdvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

[Before CB009333-C]The UE has an activated SCell [CB009333-C]The UE has an activated SCell and NRBTS/NRCELL/actEnhDtxOptimizedScheduler is set to false or NRBTS/NRCELL/dtxOptimizedScheduler/caSupportEnabled is set to false [End CB009333-C]

[Before CB009333-A] If NRBTS/NRCELL/dtxOptimizedScheduler/dtxDelaySincelastScheduling > 0: [CB009333-A] If dtxDelaySincelastScheduling > 0 (see NOTE 2) [End CB009333-A]:

[PR695280]  When NRBTS/NRCELL/actEnhDtxOptimizedScheduler is set to true and NRBTS/NRCELL/dtxOptimizedScheduler/rlcStatusPduSupportEnabled is set to true and UE has pending UL RLC Status PDU data indicated for any of non-GBR DRB (via buffer status report).[End PR695280]

The delay since the last scheduling that emptied the 5G-L2-LO buffers of this UE is either undefined or is higher than or equal to [Before CB009333-A] NRBTS/NRCELL/dtxOptimizedScheduler/dtxDelaySincelastScheduling.  [CB009333-A] dtxDelaySincelastScheduling  (see NOTE 2)  [End CB009333-A] Such delay shall be measured by counting the number of slots since the last scheduling during which the UE buffers were emptied.

Note: The assignment of the dtxOptimizedDrbTraffic request class shall only take place on the reception of new non-GBR DRB data (except 5QI5) while the 5G-L2-LO buffers for the UE were empty for this type of traffic. Both the drbTraffic and the dtxOptimizedDrbTraffic request classes cannot co-exist on the same UE.

Note: UL scheduling behaviour shall remain the same regardless of the value of NRBTS/NRCELL/actDtxOptimizedScheduler.

[CB009333-A]NOTE 2: dtxDelaySinceLastScheduling is parameter read from: NRBTS/NRCELL/dtxOptimizedScheduler/dtxDelaySincelastScheduling when NRBTS.NRDRB.dtxDelaySincelastScheduling for the current bearer is not present or NRBTS/NRCELL/actEnhDtxOptimizedScheduler is set to false or if NRBTS/NRCELL/dtxOptimizedScheduler/drbDifferentiationEnabled is set to false. Otherwise, dtxDelaySinceLastScheduling is parameter read from:  NRBTS/NRDRB/dtxDelaySincelastScheduling for the current bearer.[End CB009333-A]

---

#### 3.29.4.1.0-2 DTX optimized scheduling Dynamic enabling/disabling of DTX oriented scheduling (ID: 11174961)

**3.29.4.1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11174970`)

DTX optimized scheduling
5G-L2-PS shall compute the ratio, dtxCellNbUeCs1Ratio, of UEs in the CS1 list over the averaged maximum number of UEs in the CS1 list (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8945\_replaced([11174992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kufmffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

When DTX oriented scheduling is enabled, if (dtxCellNbUeCs1Ratio is higher or equal to rdDtxCellNbUeCs1ThresholdHigh\_percent (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9388\_replaced([11193368](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvr5TfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))))  [CB013709-B] OR (the condition for disabling dtx optimized scheduling under overload (as described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_33049\_replaced([11174974](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kufmefvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is TRUE) [End CB013709-B]

* then the DTX oriented scheduling shall be disabled and gNB-DU (5G-L2-PS) shall stop any ongoing rdDtxCellEnablingTimer\_ms (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9390\_replaced([11193387](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvsgU_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). When DTX oriented scheduling is disabled, then the dtxOptimizedDrbTraffic request class shall not be assigned to any UE. UEs already in the dtxOptimizedDrbTraffic request class shall not be affected.

When DTX oriented scheduling is disabled, then:

* If (dtxCellNbUeCs1Ratio becomes lower or equal to rdDtxCellNbUeCs1ThresholdLow\_percent (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9463\_replaced([11193377](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvsgUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) [CB013709-B] AND (the condition for enabling dtx optimized scheduling under overload (as described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_33050\_replaced([11174984](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kufme_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is TRUE)  [End CB013709-B]
* If the rdDtxCellEnablingTimer\_ms (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9390\_replaced([11193387](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvsgU_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is expired, gNB-DU (5G-L2-PS) shall re enable DTX oriented scheduling and thus the dtxOptimizedDrbTraffic request class can be assigned to UEs
* If no rdDtxCellEnablingTimer\_ms (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9390\_replaced([11193387](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvsgU_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))timer is ongoing, then gNB-DU (5G-L2-PS) shall start the rdDtxCellEnablingTimer\_ms  timer with a duration set as indicated in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9390\_replaced([11193387](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvsgU_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

#### 3.29.4.1.0-3 DTX optimized scheduling Condition for Disabling DTX Optimized Scheduling Under Overload (ID: 11174974)

**3.29.4.1.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11174979`)

DTX optimized scheduling
This requirement describes a condition which is TRUE when the following checks are satisfied:

* The HwVariant is not ABIL
* NRBTS.tmpActFeat1(Bit 0) is set to 0  and either one of the following conditions are satisfied
* the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31301\_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is greater than or equal to the activation threshold value set for rdMicroDtxOlcDlPerCent (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31828\_replaced([11216795](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxa-ovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31301\_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is less than the activation threshold value set for rdMicroDtxOlcDlPerCent (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31828\_replaced([11216795](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxa-ovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) and the overload mitigation action of disabling dtx optimized scheduling is active

---

#### 3.29.4.1.0-4 DTX optimized scheduling Condition for Enabling DTX Optimized Scheduling Under Overload (ID: 11174984)

**3.29.4.1.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11174987`)

DTX optimized scheduling
This requirement describes a condition which is TRUE if

NRBTS.tmpActFeat1(Bit 0) is set to 1

OR

HwVariant is ABIL

OR

{

If {(the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31301\_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is less than the deactivation threshold value set for rdMicroDtxOlcDlPerCent (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31828\_replaced([11216795](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxa-ovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))))}

OR

If {(the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31301\_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler is greater than the deactivation threshold value set for rdMicroDtxOlcDlPerCent (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31828\_replaced([11216795](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxa-ovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) AND (The overload mitigation actions of disabling dtx optimized scheduling is not active)}

}
