NOTE: assuming a smaller BWP fully overlaps with any larger BWP, to a) BWP n resources can be allocated to any BWP UE; to b) the ith BWP exclusive resource can only be allocated to (i-k)th BWP UEs, where k {0, 1, …, i-1}. For example with n = 3, 3rd BWP can be allocated to 1st, 2nd, 3rd BWP UEs, 2nd BWP exclusive resources can be allocated to 1st and 2nd BWP UEs. 1st BWP exclusive resources can be allocated to 1st BWP UEs only.

In a slot (not SSB or TRS slot), 5G-L2-PS shall determine the available FD resources separately for each dedicated BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1809\_replaced([11110718](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4279\_replaced([11177002](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

In a slot (not SSB or TRS slot), 5G-L2-PS shall determine the available FD resources separately for a) (i+1)th dedicated BWP and c) ith dedicated BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1809\_replaced([11110718](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4279\_replaced([11177002](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where i ϵ {1, 2, …, n-1}..

In a slot (not SSB or TRS slot), 5G-L2-PS shall determine the available FD resources for b) ith BWP exclusive resources by setting result b) = result c) - result a), while considering different RBG sizes (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4495\_replaced([11179260](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku4oCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

In a SSB slot, 5G-L2-PS shall determine the available FD resources for a) the nth BWP resources according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4284\_replaced([11177074](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kusa1PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

In a SSB slot, 5G-L2-PS shall assume all b) ith BWP exclusive resources are not occupied by SSB resources, where i ϵ {1, 2, …, n-1}..

NOTE: If easier for implementation, result b) = result c) - result a) would also be correct, while considering different RBG sizes (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4495\_replaced([11179260](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku4oCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

In a TRS slot, 5G-L2-PS shall determine the available FD resources separately for a) the (i+1)th BWP and c) the ith BWP, according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4288\_replaced([11177156](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kutB3PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), ), where i ϵ {1, 2, …, n-1}.

In a TRS slot, 5G-L2-PS shall determine the available FD resources for b) by setting result b) = result c) - result a), while considering different RBG sizes (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4495\_replaced([11179260](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku4oCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

5G-L2-PS shall consider 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4495\_replaced([11179260](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku4oCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

For FDD cell with slowPrbPoolingAllowed set to 'true' or for FR1 TDD with slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is True (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283\_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

* for all types of DL slots (non SSB/TRS, SSB or TRS),  the total number of usable PRBs in the cell (across all BWPs) is restricted to the total amount of DL PRB granted to the cell (numAllocCellPrb) by the BBRM, hence, shall not be exceeded. This grant is computed every [Before CB009215-D]bbPoolingPeriod (NRBTS.bbPoolEvalPeriod)[CB009215-D]bbPoolEvalPeriod (refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6781\_replaced([11211947](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw-StfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))[End CB009215-D] by the slow pooling algorithm in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6500\_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Full RBGs, the non-full last RBG and non-full first RBG when actSpecificBwpSize is true may be used as far as the numAllocCellPrb limitation is respected.
* with NRCELL/actDlMuMimoEnh is True, the total number of usable physical PRB limit in the slot is given by the value of rrmNumUsableCellPrbPerSlot = min{numAllocCellPrb, dlBandwidth(5G\_UP\_ALG\_1795\_replaced([11110609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpGJHfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))}. Rationale given in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4279\_replaced([11177002](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

###### 3.29.5.4.3.2-2.0-2 Determining the maximum number of FD resources in an SSB slot General limitations (ID: 11177251)

**3.29.5.4.3.2-2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11177255`)

Determining the maximum number of FD resources in an SSB slot
If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

gNB-DU shall determine the available FD resources separately a) for dedicated BWP n, and b) for each ith BWP exclusive resources versus (i+1)th BWP where i ϵ {1,2,…,n-1} (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1813\_replaced([11110813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-QPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

NOTE: assuming a smaller BWP fully overlaps with any larger BWP, to a) BWP n resources can be allocated to any BWP UE; to b) the ith BWP exclusive resource can only be allocated to (i-k)th BWP UEs, where k {0, 1, …, i-1}. For example with n = 3, 3rd BWP can be allocated to 1st, 2nd, 3rd BWP UEs, 2nd BWP exclusive resources can be allocated to 1st and 2nd BWP UEs. 1st BWP exclusive resources can be allocated to 1st BWP UEs only.

[CB008927-D] In addition to the above rules, if the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true, the FD resources for a dedicated BWP could be split into more than one PDSCH sub-areas and hence to determine the available FD resources for a dedicated BWP i where i ϵ {1,2,…,n} gNB-DU shall take into account the location and size of the PDSCH sub-areas and the number of PRBs for each BWP i within the sub-areas. Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23452\_replaced([11175855](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kumUKvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [End CB008927-D]

In a slot (not SSB or TRS slot), gNB-DU shall determine the available FD resources separately for each dedicated BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1809\_replaced([11110718](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4279\_replaced([11177002](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

In a slot (not SSB or TRS slot), gNB-DU shall determine the available FD resources separately for a) (i+1)th dedicated BWP and c) ith dedicated BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1809\_replaced([11110718](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4279\_replaced([11177002](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where i ϵ {1, 2, …, n-1}..

[CB008927-D] If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = false, [End CB008927-D] in a slot (not SSB or TRS slot), gNB-DU shall determine the available FD resources for b) ith BWP exclusive resources by setting result b) = result c) - result a), while considering different RBG sizes (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4495\_replaced([11179260](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku4oCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[CB008927-D] If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true, the exclusive resource of a dedicated BWP is always within the largest PDSCH sub-area if there are more than one PDSCH sub-areas. gNB-DU shall determine the available FD resources for b) ith BWP exclusive resources by setting result b) = result c) - result a) within this largest PDSCH sub-area (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23452\_replaced([11175855](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kumUKvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End CB008927-D]

In a SSB slot, gNB-DU shall determine the available FD resources for a) the nth BWP resources according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4284\_replaced([11177074](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kusa1PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

In a SSB slot, gNB-DU shall assume all b) ith BWP exclusive resources are not occupied by SSB resources, where i ϵ {1, 2, …, n-1}.

NOTE: [CB008927-D] If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = false, [End CB008927-D] If easier for implementation, result b) = result c) - result a) would also be correct, while considering different RBG sizes (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4495\_replaced([11179260](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku4oCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[CB008927-D] If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true, in the SSB slot, the exclusive resource of a dedicated BWP is always within the largest PDSCH sub-area if there are more than one PDSCH sub-areas, that lies above the SSB block (20 PRBs) (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23462\_replaced([11176070](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuoJUPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). gNB-DU shall determine the available FD resources for b) ith BWP exclusive resources by setting result b) = result c) - result a) within this largest PDSCH sub-area (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23452\_replaced([11175855](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kumUKvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End CB008927-D]

In a TRS slot, gNB-DU shall determine the available FD resources separately for a) the (i+1)th BWP and c) the ith BWP, according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4288\_replaced([11177156](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kutB3PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), ), where i ϵ {1, 2, …, n-1}.

[CB008927-D] If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = false, [End CB008927-D] in a TRS slot, gNB-DU shall determine the available FD resources for b) by setting result b) = result c) - result a), while considering different RBG sizes (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4495\_replaced([11179260](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku4oCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[CB008927-D] If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true, the exclusive resource of a dedicated BWP is always within the largest PDSCH sub-area if there are more than one PDSCH sub-areas. gNB-DU shall determine the available FD resources for b) ith BWP exclusive resources by setting result b) = result c) - result a) within this largest PDSCH sub-area (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23452\_replaced([11175855](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kumUKvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End CB008927-D]

[CB008927-D] If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = false, with RAT0, FD resources in terms of RBGs are considered for each dedicated BWP. Each BWP can have specific RBG sizes. [End CB008927-D] gNB-DU shall consider 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4495\_replaced([11179260](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku4oCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

###### 3.29.5.4.3.2-2.0-3 Determining the maximum number of FD resources in an SSB slot Pooling limitations (ID: 11177261)

**3.29.5.4.3.2-2.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `12826899`)

Determining the maximum number of FD resources in an SSB slot
For FDD cell with slowPrbPoolingAllowed set to 'true' or for FR1 TDD with slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is True (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283\_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

* for all types of DL slots (non SSB/TRS, SSB or TRS), the total number of usable PRBs in the cell (across all BWPs) is restricted to the total amount of DL PRB granted to the cell (numAllocCellPrb) by the BBRM, hence, shall not be exceeded. This grant is computed every bbPoolEvalPeriod (refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6781\_replaced([11211947](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw-StfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) by the slow pooling algorithm in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6500\_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). **If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc =false, Full RBGs, the non-full last RBG** and non-full first RBG when actSpecificBwpSize is true **may be used as far as the numAllocCellPrb limitation is respected.**\*\*\*\*

with NRCELL/actDlMuMimoEnh is True, the total number of usable physical PRB limit in the slot is given by **the value of rrmNumUsableCellPrbPerSlot = min{numAllocCellPrb, dlBandwidth(5G\_UP\_ALG\_1795\_replaced([11110609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpGJHfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))}**. Rationale given in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4279\_replaced([11177002](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))\*\*\*\*

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = TRUE, the maximum number of usable PRBs (defined as rrmMaxNumUsablePrb in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) across all BWPs for all types of DL slots(SSB/TRS or non SSB/TRS) will be dependent on the layer PRB capacity computed every pooling period and is described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Also, only the non-full last RBG **(but not the non-full first RBG)** may be used as far as the rrmMaxNumUsablePrb limitation is respected.\*\*\*\*

The usable PRBs shall be considered as the remaining number of FD resources available for initialisation.

[CB0014543-G]

If partialZABAllowed =True, gNB-DU shall determine the maximum number of FD resources and corresponding numAllocCellPrb by executing the algorithm specified in ([12825840](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Onwec61_EfCyQasEtWkQ4A?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) ).

[End CB0014543-G]

---

###### 3.29.5.4.3.2-3 Determining the maximum number of FD resources in an SSB slot

**3.29.5.4.3.2-3.0-3**  (ID: `12826900`)

Determining the maximum number of FD resources in an SSB slot
**For FR1 TDD and FDD**

gNB shall determine and maintain in each slot the number of PRBs available for power boosting.

When PRB pooling feature is enabled, the usable PRB limit set by BBRM is not applicable to additional PRBs required to power boost the eligible HARQ retransmissions, so these PRBs for power boost can be mapped to both granted and non-granted pooled PRB resources of the cell. **Hence, FD resources used for PRB allocation for PDSCH may get reduced when PRB for power boost is mapped to granted pooled resources.**

rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs is defined as the pool of PRBs from which PRBs are allocated for the PDSCH allocations of all the UEs scheduled in the slot limited by granted pooled FD resources, moreover PRBs for power boost is also reserved from the same pool. This pool contains PRBs from both granted and non-granted pooled FD resources.

Definition of granted and non-granted pooled resources is derived from 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4279\_replaced([11177002](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and is defined as;

granted pooled PRB resources is given by bbrmUsableCellPrb defined as numAllocCellPrb(for FDD), rrmNumUsableCellPrbPerSlot(for TDD).[5G\_UP\_ALG\_4279\_replaced([11177002](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) containis the definition of numAllocCellPrb and rrmNumUsableCellPrbPerSlot]

non-granted pooled PRB resources is defined as dlBandwidth (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1795\_replaced([11110609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpGJHfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) “minus”  granted pooled PRB resources

rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs shall depend upon size of channel bandwidth, PRB blanking restrictions, PRB for PDSCH allowed in a slot with SSB, CSI-RS for tracking. Same is calculated as below;

In a slot without SSB or CSI-RS for tracking

rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs = dlBandwidth (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1795\_replaced([11110609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpGJHfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) -  blanked PRBs.

In SSB slot without CSI-RS for tracking

rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs = Min [numPdschPrbInSsbSlots , (dlBandwidth (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1795\_replaced([11110609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpGJHfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))**- numOfSsbPrb - numPrbCsiRsBm -  blanked PRBs.)]**

In a slot with CSI-RS for tracking  and without SSB

rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs = Min [numPdschPrbInTrsSlots, (dlBandwidth (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1795\_replaced([11110609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpGJHfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) -  blanked PRBs.)]

In a slot with both SSB and CSI-RS for tracking

rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs = Min [Min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots , numPdschPrbInTrsSlots), (dlBandwidth (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1795\_replaced([11110609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpGJHfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) - numOfSsbPrb - numPrbCsiRsBm -  blanked PRBs.)]

numPdschPrbInSsbSlots is defined as the the maximum number of PRBs that can be used for PDSCH in SSB slot for the largest BWP.

numPdschPrbInTrsSlots is defined as the the maximum number of PRBs that can be used for PDSCH in TRS slot for the largest BWP.

numPrbCsiRsBm is the number of PRBs of CSI-RS for Beam Mangement for Beam Refinement: it is equal to 0 is if NRCELL.beamSet.nrBtsBeamRefinementP2 = false (no Beam refinement) otherwise refer to 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2667\_replaced([11302851](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqiKqfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_10892\_replaced([11350748](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uboU-_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**.**

numOfSsbPrb for SSB occupied resources is fixed to be 20PRBs.

In the slot with PRB muting by IM(refer to [12707684: SSB Interference Mitigation for non-BF](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Vz03IGLOEfC3KtQ77je1xA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), the muted PRBs(refer to nbPrbsMutedIMFinal in [12709089: Basic functionality](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_pAtj4GOsEfCtwYrh0KQ_DA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) shall further be reduced from rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs.

[CB0014543-H, CB0014543-G]

If partialZABAllowed =True, gNB-DU shall determine the maximum number of FD resources and corresponding numAllocCellPrb by executing the algorithm specified in ([12825840](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Onwec61_EfCyQasEtWkQ4A?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) )

[End CB0014543-G, End CB0014543-H]

---

###### 3.29.5.4.3.2-4 Determining the maximum number of FD resources in an SSB slot

**3.29.5.4.3.2-4.0-1**  (ID: `12825845`)

Determining the maximum number of FD resources in an SSB slot
Note: The algorithm below is not applicable when only the UE-specific CSI-RS is configured. Then, the full ZAB limit applies to the cell with ZAB privilege.

Algorithm Input:

* numAllocCellPrb, as specified in ([12705604)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BizfAGFPEfCLrcnPCspVyQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)
* partialZabAllocCellPrb, as specified in ([12804289](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ui5xYp6QEfCkxIKMlo4L6w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))
* dSymbol is the number of *d**ata-only symbols (D-symbols) that can be used for data transmission in the current scheduling slot, excluding those symbols determined for static symbols (e.g., TRS, CSI).*
* symbolWithZab is the number of *d**ata-only symbols (D-symbols) and* *static/wideband symbols (S-symbols) that can be used for data transmission in the current scheduling slot, including those symbols determined for static symbols (e.g., TRS, CSI-RS).*

**[CB014543-G-UPD001]**

Note:

If the other pooling groups have ACQ only at the end of the slot and the current pooling group does not have any CSI-RS,

then determine the number of FD REs as per below algorithm

Else

use partial ZAB limit

Endif

**[End CB014543-G-UPD001]**

Algorithm

// Step 0: Initialization ( This step only runs at beginning of BBRM period):

* numAllocCellPrbInit = numAllocCellPrb. The parameter numAllocCellPrbInit represents the number of cell PRBs allocated by BBRM. This value, received at the start of the BBRM period, is retained throughout the entire BBRM pooling period and serves as the reference for resource allocation during the BBRM interval.

// Step 1: Compute the number of REs for numPRB

numRE = numAllocCellPrbInit \* 12 \* dSymbol

// Step 2: Compute the number of REs for numPartialZabPRB

numPartialZabRE = partialZabAllocCellPrb \* 12\*symbolWithZab

// Step 3: *Compare the computed RE values to validate the Partial ZAB allocation. // This check ensures that the allocation for (S-Symbols + D-Symbols) is not impractically small // compared to the allocation for D-symbols.*

If numRE > numPartialZabRE  THEN

The ZAB privilege flag received from the BBRM algorithm ([12804289](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ui5xYp6QEfCkxIKMlo4L6w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) in the cell is overwritten and modified  to False

numAllocCellPrb  = numAllocCellPrbInit

Else

The ZAB privilege flag received from the BBRM algorithm ([12804289](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ui5xYp6QEfCkxIKMlo4L6w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) in the cell.

numAllocCellPrb  = partialZabAllocCellPrb

**[Before CB014543-G-UPD001]** Note: In those slots where TRS and ACQ or TRS-only symbols are present, only partial ZAB allocation is taken into account. **[End CB014543-G-UPD001]**

End If

Algorithm Output:

* The ZAB privilege flag in the cell, numAllocCellPrb

---

###### 3.29.5.4.3.2.0-1 Determining the maximum number of FD resources in an SSB slot previous releases (before 25R1) (ID: 11177079)

**3.29.5.4.3.2.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `11177111`)

Determining the maximum number of FD resources in an SSB slot
**Note: starting 25R1, due to cleaning purpose (GATEKEEPER), this requirement (Determining the maximum number of FD resources in an SSB slot) has been split in 2 parts:**

* FDD, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24048\_replaced([11177116](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kutB1PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* TDD, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24049\_replaced([11177127](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kutB1vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

**For FDD:**

The PRB which is not used by SS block in SSB slot without **or with CSI-RS for tracking is allowed for PDSCH scheduled by DCI format 1\_1 for FDD except 5MHz cell bandwidth:**

In SSB slot without TRS, If numPdschPrbInSsbSlots is greater than zero, 5G-L2-PS shall determine the available RBGs which is not occupied by SSB or PRB blanking, and total number of PRBs is not greater than numPdschPrbInSsbSlots;

5G-L2-PS shall use parameters *numPdschPrbInSsbSlots and* numPdschPrbInTrsSlots values corresponding to a UE's active dedicated BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1809\_replaced([11110718](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).\*\*

In SSB slot with CSI-RS for Tracking, remaining FD resource shall be initialized by the available PDSCH RBGs. If min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots) is greater than zero, 5G-L2-PS shall determine the available RBGs which is not occupied by SSB or PRB blanking, and total number of PRBs is not greater than min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots);

For FDD cell, if slowPrbPoolingAllowed set to 'true', the total number of PRBs to be used in the SSB slot (for SSB and PDSCH) is limited to the total amount usable DL PRB granted to the cell (numAllocCellPrb) by the BBRM. This grant is computed every bbPoolingPeriod (NRBTS.bbPoolEvalPeriodFdd) by the slow pooling algorithm in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6500\_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Full RBGs and the non-full last RBG and if NRCELL.actSpecificBwpSize is true, the non-full first RBG may be used as far as the numAllocCellPrb limitation is respected.

**For TDD FR1:**

In TDD FR1, the non-blanked  PRB which is not used by SS block in SSB slot without **or with** CSI-RS for tracking is allowed for PDSCH scheduled by DCI format 1\_1:\*\*\*\*

In SSB slot without TRS, If numPdschPrbInSsbSlots is greater than zero, 5G-L2-PS shall determine the available RBGs which is not occupied by SSB or PRB blanking , and total number of PRBs is not greater than numPdschPrbInSsbSlots;

**[PR771184-24R3]**

**]If NRCELL.tmpActFeat2.Bit26** is equal to TRUE AND NRCELL.actPdschAtSsbSlots is equal to  TRUE\*\*\*\*

PRBs that need to be blocked from PDSCH allocation in a SSB slot due to SSB block power usage(5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2040\_replaced([11277571](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpN8BfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall not be located adjacent to the PRBs used for SSB.

Note: Implementation details are captured in 5G\_L2\_9467\_replaced([11149280](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24VEOPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). This update was added in SFS so as to activate/deactivate the correction using NIDD param(tmpActFeat2.Bit26 **).**

**[End PR771184-24R3]**

If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), **5G-L2-PS shall use parameters *numPdschPrbInSsbSlots and *numPdschPrbInTrsSlots values corresponding to a UE's active* \*dedicated BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1809\_replaced([11110718](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).***\*\*\*

In TDD FR1, SSB slot with CSI-RS for Tracking, remaining FD resource shall be initialized by the available PDSCH RBGs. If min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots) is greater than zero, 5G-L2-PS shall determine the available RBGs which is not occupied by SSB  or PRB blanking, and total number of PRBs is not greater than min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots);

In SSB slot with CSI-RS for beam management without CSI-RS for tracking, the remaining FD resource which is not used by SSB and CSI-RS for beam management  or PRB blanking  shall be initialized by the available PDSCH RBGs. If numPdschPrbInSsbSlots is greater than zero, 5G-L2-PS shall determine the available RBGs which is not occupied by SSB and CSI-RS for beam management, and total number of PRBs is not greater than numPdschPrbInSsbSlots.

In SSB slot with CSI-RS for beam management and CSI-RS for tracking, the remaining FD resource which is not used by SSB and CSI-RS for beam management or PRB blanking shall be initialized by the available PDSCH RBGs. If min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots) is greater than zero, 5G-L2-PS shall determine the available RBGs which is not occupied by SSB and CSI-RS for beam management, and total number of PRBs is not greater than min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots), and PDSCH is rate matching around CSI-RS for tracking.

For TDD FR1, to calculate the available RBGs in SSB slots configured with CSI-RS for tracking, the RBGs which have partial overlapped PRBs with CSI-RS for tracking are not avaliable for PDSCH based on the csirsTracking configuration(csirsTrackingStartingPrb and csirsTrackingNumOfPrbs) in PsCell\_CellSetupReq.

For TDD FR1, in SSB slot with or without CSI-RS for tracking/beam management, if slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is True (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283\_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

* the total number of PRBs used by SSB and PDSCH and/or CSI-RS for beam management shall not exceed the total amount usable DL PRB granted to the cell by the BBRM. This grant is computed every bbPoolingPeriod (NRBTS.bbPoolEvalPeriod) by the slow pooling algorithm in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6500\_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).  For PDSCH, full RBGs, the non-full last RBG and first non-full RBG when actSpecificBwpSize is true **may be used as far as the total number of usable DL PRB limit allocated by the BBRM is respected.**
* with NRCELL/actDlMuMimoEnh is True, the total number of usable physical PRB limit in the slot is given by **the value of rrmNumUsableCellPrbPerSlot = min{numAllocCellPrb, dlBandwidth(5G\_UP\_ALG\_1795\_replaced([11110609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpGJHfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))}**. Rationale given in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4279\_replaced([11177002](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).\*\*\*\*

For TDD FR1, when large BB pooling is enabled, i.e., slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and subcellDeactivationDlAllowed is true, in SSB slot with or without CSI-RS for tracking/beam management,

* the total number of PRBs used by SSB and PDSCH and/or CSI-RS for beam management are allocated in primary subcell of the cell, the primary subcell of the cell is always activated and granted by BBRM.
* the total number of usable physical PRB limit in the slot is given by **the value of rrmNumUsableCellPrbPerSlot = min{numAllocCellPrb, dlBandwidth (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1795\_replaced([11110609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpGJHfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))}.**

**Note:**

1. The SW implementation detail to calculate the available RBG bitmap and PRBs in SSB slot is covered by CP3.

numPdschPrbInSsbSlots: the total number of PRBs that can be scheduled in SSB slot (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2011\_replaced([11275482](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpGnSPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

numPdschPrbInTrsSlots: total number of PRBs that can be scheduled in a slot with at least one symbol for CSI-RS for tracking (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2011\_replaced([11275482](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpGnSPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

---

###### 3.29.5.4.3.2.0-2 Determining the maximum number of FD resources in an SSB slot FDD (ID: 11177116)

**3.29.5.4.3.2.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `12826832`)

Determining the maximum number of FD resources in an SSB slot
The PRB which is not used by SS block in SSB slot without **or with CSI-RS for tracking is allowed for PDSCH scheduled by DCI format 1\_1 for FDD except 5MHz cell bandwidth:**

**If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = false,**

{ **in SSB slot without TRS, If numPdschPrbInSsbSlots is greater than zero, gNB-DU shall determine the available RBGs which is not occupied by SSB or PRB blanking, and total number of PRBs is not greater than numPdschPrbInSsbSlots. }**

If NRCELL.actPdschAllocAroundSsb**is equal to TRUE AND NRCELL.actPdschAtSsbSlots is equal to  TRUE**

PRBs that need to be blocked from PDSCH allocation in a SSB slot due to SSB-block power usage(5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2040\_replaced([11277571](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpN8BfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall not be located adjacent to the PRBs used for SSB.

**Note: Implementation details are captured in 5G\_L2\_9467\_replaced([11149280](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24VEOPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). This update was added in SFS so as to activate/deactivate the correction using NIDD param(NRCELL.actPdschAllocAroundSsb). }**

**If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true,**

{ **in SSB slot without TRS, if numPdschPrbInSsbSlots (defined in 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2040\_replaced([11277571](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpN8BfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is greater than zero, gNB-DU shall determine the number and the size of the PDSCH sub areas (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23455\_replaced([11175942](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kum7OvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and check that the number of the PRBs reserved**in all the PDSCH sub areas are not greater than numPdschPrbInSsbSlots (check constraints on 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23481\_replaced([11176397](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kup-g_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). }\*\*\*\*

gNB-DU shall use parameters *numPdschPrbInSsbSlots and* numPdschPrbInTrsSlots values corresponding to a UE's active dedicated BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1809\_replaced([11110718](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).\*\*

If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = false,

{ **in SSB slot with CSI-RS for Tracking, remaining FD resource shall be initialized by the available PDSCH RBGs. If min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots) is greater than zero, gNB-DU shall determine the available RBGs which is not occupied by SSB or PRB blanking, and total number of PRBs is not greater than min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots) }**

If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true,

{ if min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots) is greater than zero (defined in 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2040\_replaced([11277571](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpN8BfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2041\_replaced([11277590](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpN8B_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gNB-DU shall determine the number and the size of the PDSCH sub areas (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23455\_replaced([11175942](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kum7OvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and check that the number of the PRBs reserved**in all the PDSCH sub areas with the sum of the PRBs coming from the RBGs of the dynamicswitch RAT 0 (as retransmission if allocated in the slot, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25183\_replaced([11176710](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuqlmPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))** are not greater than min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots) (check constraints on 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23481\_replaced([11176397](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kup-g_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). }\*\*\*\*

For FDD cell, if slowPrbPoolingAllowed set to 'true', gNB-DU shall check that the total number of PRBs  (in all the PDSCH sub areas if the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true) and the sum of the PRBs coming from the RBGs of the dynamicswitch RAT 0 (as retransmission if allocated in the slot, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25183\_replaced([11176710](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuqlmPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **to be used in the SSB slot (for SSB and PDSCH) is limited to the total amount usable DL PRB granted to the cell (numAllocCellPrb) by the BBRM. This grant is computed every bbPoolingPeriod (NRBTS.bbPoolEvalPeriodFdd) by the slow pooling algorithm in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6500\_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true,

{this limitation will be checked in the constraints for PRBs reservation in the PDSCH sub areas (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23481\_replaced([11176397](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kup-g_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The PRB blanking and the specific bandwidth are already handled through the size and the startPrb of the PDSCH sub areas, (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23455\_replaced([11175942](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kum7OvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and constraints 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23481\_replaced([11176397](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kup-g_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). }

If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = false, full RBGs and the non-full last RBG and if NRCELL.actSpecificBwpSize is true, the non-full first RBG may be used as far as the numAllocCellPrb limitation is respected.

Note: in SSB slot without TRS symbol, if the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true, the PRBs reserved include the PRBs reserved for DCI 1\_1 PDSCH grants and the PRBs allocated for DCI 1\_0 PDSCH grants.

In SSB slot with TRS symbols, if the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true, if the conditions listed in 5G\_UP\_11022\_replaced([11350898](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubpjFvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are fullfilled, gNB-DU shall initialize the FD resources (PRBs) available for any DL RAT1 or dynamicswitch RAT1 and RAT0 allocation through the size of PDSCH sub areas (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30501\_replaced([11175903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kum7NvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30520\_replaced([11176383](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kup-gfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) which are split due to the additional blanking PRBs area: the PRBs in this additional blanking PRBs area are blanked PRBs (but only for PDSCH signal) and the PDSCH sub areas are split below and above these PRBs. If required, gNB-DU shall apply the PRB\_GRANULARITY to the PDSCH sub areas and the PDSCH grants (see 5G\_UP\_11022\_replaced([11350898](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubpjFvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

**Note:**

The SW implementation detail to calculate the available RBG bitmap and PRBs in SSB slot is covered by CP3.

numPdschPrbInSsbSlots: the total number of PRBs that can be scheduled in SSB slot (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2011\_replaced([11275482](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpGnSPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

numPdschPrbInTrsSlots: total number of PRBs that can be scheduled in a slot with at least one symbol for CSI-RS for tracking (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2011\_replaced([11275482](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpGnSPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[CB0014543-G]

If partialZABAllowed =True, gNB-DU shall determine the maximum number of FD resources and corresponding numAllocCellPrb by executing the algorithm specified in ([12825840](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Onwec61_EfCyQasEtWkQ4A?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) ).

[End CB0014543-G]

---

###### 3.29.5.4.3.2.0-3 Determining the maximum number of FD resources in an SSB slot FR1 TDD (ID: 11177127)

**3.29.5.4.3.2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11177132`)

Determining the maximum number of FD resources in an SSB slot
General limitations

---

**3.29.5.4.3.2.0-3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11177135`)

Determining the maximum number of FD resources in an SSB slot
In TDD FR1, the non-blanked PRB which is not used by SS block in SSB slot without or with CSI-RS for tracking is allowed for PDSCH scheduled by DCI format 1\_1:

[CB008927-I] If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = false, [End CB008927-I]

{In SSB slot without TRS, If numPdschPrbInSsbSlots is greater than zero, gNB-DU shall determine the available RBGs which is not occupied by SSB or PRB blanking, and total number of PRBs is not greater than numPdschPrbInSsbSlots;

If [Before PR771184-25R1]NRCELL.tmpActFeat2.Bit26 [PR771184-25R1] NRCELL.actPdschAllocAroundSsb[End PR771184-25R1] is equal to TRUE AND NRCELL.actPdschAtSsbSlots is equal to  TRUE

PRBs that need to be blocked from PDSCH allocation in a SSB slot due to SSB-block power usage(5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2040\_replaced([11277571](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpN8BfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall not be adjacent to the PRBs used for SSB.

Note: Implementation details are captured in 5G\_L2\_9467\_replaced([11149280](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24VEOPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). This update was added in SFS so as to activate/deactivate the correction using NIDD param(NRCELL.actPdschAllocAroundSsb). }

[CB008927-I] If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true,

{ in SSB slot without TRS, if numPdschPrbInSsbSlots (defined in 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2040\_replaced([11277571](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpN8BfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is greater than zero, gNB-DU shall determine the number and the size of the PDSCH sub areas  (discarding the blanked PRBs due to SSB or PRB blanking, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23455\_replaced([11175942](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kum7OvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and check that the number of the PRBs  reserved in all the PDSCH sub areas  [CB008927-L] and the sum of the PRBs coming from the RBGs of the dynamicswitch RAT 0 (as retransmission if allocated in the slot, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25183\_replaced([11176710](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuqlmPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB008927-L] are not greater than numPdschPrbInSsbSlots (check constraints on 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23481\_replaced([11176397](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kup-g_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). } [End CB008927-I]

If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gNB-DU shall use parameters numPdschPrbInSsbSlots and numPdschPrbInTrsSlots values corresponding to a UE's active dedicated BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1809\_replaced([11110718](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[CB008927-I] If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = false, [End CB008927-I]

{In TDD FR1, SSB slot with CSI-RS for Tracking, remaining FD resource shall be initialized by the available PDSCH RBGs. If min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots) is greater than zero, gNB-DU shall determine the available RBGs which is not occupied by SSB or PRB blanking, and total number of PRBs is not greater than min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots);

In SSB slot with CSI-RS for beam management without CSI-RS for tracking, the remaining FD resource which is not used by SSB and CSI-RS for beam management or PRB blanking shall be initialized by the available PDSCH RBGs. If numPdschPrbInSsbSlots is greater than zero, gNB-DU shall determine the available RBGs which is not occupied by SSB and CSI-RS for beam management, and total number of PRBs is not greater than numPdschPrbInSsbSlots.

In SSB slot with CSI-RS for beam management and CSI-RS for tracking, the remaining FD resource which is not used by SSB and CSI-RS for beam management or PRB blanking shall be initialized by the available PDSCH RBGs. If min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots) is greater than zero, gNB-DU shall determine the available RBGs which is not occupied by SSB and CSI-RS for beam management, and total number of PRBs is not greater than min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots), and PDSCH is rate matching around CSI-RS for tracking.}

[CB008927-I] If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true,

{in SSB slot with CSI-RS for Tracking, gNB-DU shall determine the available FD resource (PRBs) for any DL RAT1 allocation through initializing the number and the size of the PDSCH sub areas (discarding the blanked PRBs due to SSB or PRB blanking, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23455\_replaced([11175942](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kum7OvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) If min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots) is greater than zero (defined in 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2040\_replaced([11277571](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpN8BfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2041\_replaced([11277590](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpN8B_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gNB-DU shall check that the number of the PRBs reserved in all the PDSCH sub areas  [CB008927-L] and the sum of the PRBs coming from the RBGs of the dynamicswitch RAT 0 (as retransmission if allocated in the slot, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25183\_replaced([11176710](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuqlmPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB008927-L] are not greater than min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots) (check constraints on 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23481\_replaced([11176397](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kup-g_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

In SSB slot with CSI-RS for beam management without CSI-RS for tracking, gNB-DU shall determine the available FD resource which is not used by SSB and CSI-RS for beam management or PRB blanking for any DL RAT1 allocation through initializing the number and the size of the PDSCH sub areas (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23455\_replaced([11175942](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kum7OvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) If numPdschPrbInSsbSlots is greater than zero, gNB-DU shall check that the number of the PRBs reserved in all the PDSCH sub areas are not greater than numPdschPrbInSsbSlots (check constraints on 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23481\_replaced([11176397](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kup-g_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

in SSB slot with CSI-RS for beam management and CSI-RS for tracking, gNB-DU shall determine the available FD resource which is not used by SSB and CSI-RS for beam management or PRB for any DL RAT1 allocation through initializing the number and the size of the PDSCH sub areas (discarding the blanked PRBs due to SSB, CSI-RS for beam management or PRB blanking see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23455\_replaced([11175942](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kum7OvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) If min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots) is greater than zero (defined in 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2040\_replaced([11277571](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpN8BfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2041\_replaced([11277590](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpN8B_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gNB-DU shall check that the number of the PRBs reserved in all the PDSCH sub areas are not greater than min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots) (check constraints on 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23481\_replaced([11176397](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kup-g_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).}  [End CB008927-I]

[CB008927-I] If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = false, [End CB008927-I]

{For TDD FR1, to calculate the available RBGs in SSB slots configured with CSI-RS for tracking, the RBGs which have partial overlapped PRBs with CSI-RS for tracking are not available for PDSCH based on the csirsTracking configuration (csirsTrackingStartingPrb and csirsTrackingNumOfPrbs) in PsCell\_CellSetupReq.}

[CB008927-I] If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true,

{in SSB slots configured with CSI-RS for tracking, if FR1 TDD multi beams with FD beamforming (NRCELL.actBeamforming = True and NRBTS.actFdmEnhancedScheduling = True), for each PDSCH area, gNB-DU shall initialize the startPrb and the size of the PDSCH sub area as a multiple of a PRB granularity (see 5G\_UP\_11022\_replaced([11350898](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubpjFvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).} [End CB008927-I]

[PR782200]   Note: in SSB slot without TRS symbol, if the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true, the PRBs reserved include the PRBs reserved for DCI 1\_1 PDSCH grants and the PRBs allocated for DCI 1\_0 PDSCH grants. [End PR782200]

[PR780308] In SSB slot with TRS symbols, if the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true, if the conditions listed in 5G\_UP\_11022\_replaced([11350898](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubpjFvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are fullfilled, gNB-DU shall initialize the FD resources (PRBs) available for any DL RAT1 or dynamicswitch RAT1 and RAT0 allocation through the size of PDSCH sub areas (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30501\_replaced([11175903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kum7NvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30520\_replaced([11176383](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kup-gfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) which are split due to the additional blanking PRBs area: the PRBs in this additional blanking PRBs area are blanked PRBs (but only for PDSCH signal) and the PDSCH sub areas are split below and above these PRBs. If required, gNB-DU shall apply the PRB\_GRANULARITY to the PDSCH sub areas and the PDSCH grants (see 5G\_UP\_11022\_replaced([11350898](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubpjFvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End PR780308]

Note:

The SW implementation detail to calculate the available RBG bitmap and PRBs in SSB slot is covered by CP3.

numPdschPrbInSsbSlots: the total number of PRBs that can be scheduled in SSB slot (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2011\_replaced([11275482](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpGnSPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

numPdschPrbInTrsSlots: total number of PRBs that can be scheduled in a slot with at least one symbol for CSI-RS for tracking (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2011\_replaced([11275482](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpGnSPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

---

**3.29.5.4.3.2.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11177142`)

Determining the maximum number of FD resources in an SSB slot
Pooling limitations

---

**3.29.5.4.3.2.0-3.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `12826855`)

Determining the maximum number of FD resources in an SSB slot
If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = false,

{for TDD FR1, in SSB slot with or without CSI-RS for tracking/beam management, if slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is True (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283\_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

* the total number of PRBs used by SSB and PDSCH and/or CSI-RS for beam management shall not exceed the total amount usable DL PRB granted to the cell by the BBRM. This grant is computed every bbPoolingPeriod (NRBTS.bbPoolEvalPeriod) by the slow pooling algorithm in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6500\_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).  For PDSCH, full RBGs, the non-full last RBG and first non-full RBG when actSpecificBwpSize is true **may be used as far as the total number of usable DL PRB limit allocated by the BBRM is respected.**
* with NRCELL/actDlMuMimoEnh is True, the total number of usable physical PRB limit in the slot is given by **the value of rrmNumUsableCellPrbPerSlot = min{numAllocCellPrb, dlBandwidth(5G\_UP\_ALG\_1795\_replaced([11110609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpGJHfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))}**. Rationale given in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4279\_replaced([11177002](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).\*\*\*\*

For TDD FR1, when large BB pooling is enabled, i.e., slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and subcellDeactivationDlAllowed is true, in SSB slot with or without CSI-RS for tracking/beam management,

* the total number of PRBs used by SSB and PDSCH and/or CSI-RS for beam management are allocated in primary subcell of the cell, the primary subcell of the cell is always activated and granted by BBRM.
* the total number of usable physical PRB limit in the slot is given by **the value of rrmNumUsableCellPrbPerSlot = min{numAllocCellPrb, dlBandwidth (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1795\_replaced([11110609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpGJHfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))}.}**

´If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = TRUE, the maximum number of usable PRBs (defined as rrmMaxNumUsablePrb in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) will be dependent on the layer PRB capacity computed every pooling period and is described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

gNB-DU shall determine the available RBGs which is not occupied by SSB and CSI-RS for beam management, and total number of PRBs is not greater than min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots, rrmMaxNumUsablePrb), and PDSCH is rate matched around CSI-RS for tracking.

The usable PRBs shall be considered as the remaining number of FD resources available for initialisation.

If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true,

{in SSB slot with or without CSI-RS for tracking/beam management, if slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is True (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283\_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gNB-DU shall check that the total number of PRBs in all the PDSCH sub areas and the sum of the PRBs coming from the RBGs of the dynamicswitch RAT 0 (as retransmission if allocated in the slot, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25183\_replaced([11176710](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuqlmPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **to be used in the SSB slot by SSB and PDSCH and/or CSI-RS for beam management shall not exceed the total amount usable DL PRB granted to the cell (numAllocCellPrb) by the BBRM. This grant is computed every bbPoolingPeriod (NRBTS.bbPoolEvalPeriod) by the slow pooling algorithm in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6500\_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). gNB-DU shall check this limitation in the constraints for PRBs reservation in the PDSCH sub areas (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23481\_replaced([11176397](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kup-g_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

when large BB pooling is enabled, i.e., slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and subcellDeactivationDlAllowed is true, in SSB slot with or without CSI-RS for tracking/beam management,

- the total number of PRBs used by SSB and PDSCH and/or CSI-RS for beam management are allocated in primary subcell of the cell, the primary subcell of the cell is always activated and granted by BBRM.

- gNB-DU shall check that the total usable physical cell PRBs in all the PDSCH sub areas in the slot shall not exceed the rrmNumUsableCellPrbPerSlot, which is defined as: rrmNumUsableCellPrbPerSlot = min(numAllocCellPrb, dlBandwidth) (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23481\_replaced([11176397](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kup-g_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1795\_replaced([11110609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpGJHfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). }

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = TRUE, the maximum number of usable PRBs (defined as rrmMaxNumUsablePrb in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) will be dependent on the layer PRB capacity computed every pooling period and is described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

gNB-DU shall determine the available RBGs which is not occupied by SSB and CSI-RS for beam management, and total number of PRBs is not greater than min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots, rrmMaxNumUsablePrb), and PDSCH is rate matched around CSI-RS for tracking.

The usable PRBs shall be considered as the remaining number of FD resources available for initialisation.

End If

[CB0014543-H]

If partialZABAllowed =True, gNB-DU shall determine the maximum number of FD resources and corresponding numAllocCellPrb by executing the algorithm specified in ([12825840](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Onwec61_EfCyQasEtWkQ4A?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) ).

[End CB0014543-H]

---

##### 3.29.5.4.4 Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2

###### 3.29.5.4.4.0-1 Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 To-be-scheduled list determination and FD resource tracking (ID: 11177286)

**3.29.5.4.4.0-1.0-6**  (ID: `13458454`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
gNB-DU shall determine the list of to-be-scheduled UEs from CS2 to be sent to the FD scheduler for resource allocation.

For a UE to be added to the list, the checks in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4297\_replaced([11177362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuu3A_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are performed.

During the determination process, each of these UEs shall be assigned to an L1 DL subcell. gNB-DU shall keep track of the remaining FD resources in the BW during the process. Initialization of the available RBGs / PRBs in the BW is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4278\_replaced([11176996](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = TRUE, gNB-DU shall also keep track of the used/remaining layer PRB resources during the process (rrmNumUsedPdschLayerPrbPerSlot/rrmRemainingPdschLayerPrbPerSlot; refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The maximum available layer PRB resources is initialised in every slot to the value determined at the beginning of every pooling period (5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The layer PRB usage shall be tracked also for PRB based RAT1 allocation scheme (i.e. NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = True)

[Before CB013712-A] If actDlMuMimo in PsCell\_CellSetupReq is true, the FD scheduler will receive multiple CS2 list(s) which are created by SD scheduler according to DL pairing result. For each CS2 list, the FD scheduler shall determine to-be-scheduled UEs according to algorithm which is defined in this requirement as below.

When DL MU-MIMO (NRCELL/actDlMuMimo = True and conduct mode only) is enabled, the FD scheduler may receive multiple CS2 list(s) which are created by TD scheduler (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4258\_replaced([11175719](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kulGCPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). For each CS2 list, the FD scheduler shall schedule one UE from list with an unused DL subcell. The algorithm that determines to-be-scheduled UEs which is described in this requirement is not needed. About PUCCH resources for these co-scheduled UEs, these UEs shall be allocated to any configured PUCCH resources (even with same PUCCH resource) for HARQ ACK via DCI 1\_1, and FD scheduler shall not trigger PUCCH receiving request to L1 to receive HARQ ACK from these UEs because forced ACK is assumed in this feature. About PDCCH resources for these co-scheduled UEs, please refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11156\_replaced([11171188](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuCTd_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).[End CB013712-A]

When MU aware scheduling is enabled (/NRBTS/NRCELL/NRDLMUMIMO/actMuAwareTdSch = True), the gNB DU shall determine the applicable load threshold as follows:

If NRBTS.NRCELL.bestNK.actBestNList= DL or DL\_UL or NRBTS.NRCELL.bestNK.actBestKList= DL or DL\_UL or NRBTS.NRCELL.actTdPfMetricOp= DL or DL\_UL or NRBTS.NRCELL.actTdHighBufUePrio= DL or DL\_UL or NRBTS.NRCELL.actFdAlgoEnh= DL or DL\_UL :

The load threshold used is [13340222:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_aqF20dwBEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) rdDlMuAwareDisableLoadThreshold ForHBUePrio.

else:

The load threshold used is rdDlMuAwareDisalbeLoadThreshold (5G\_UP\_ALG\_29407\_replaced([11193998](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvx_4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Subsequently, if the maximum CS1 list size (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19715\_replaced(11216193)) is not less than the determined load threshold, the gNB DU shall select the list of to-be-scheduled UEs from the CS2 list for resource allocation, as specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23036\_replaced([11177323](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuuQAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for TDD FR1.

Enhancements of the below described handling for systems with a single TD scheduler for all established carriers are given in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4295\_replaced([11177311](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuuP_vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Paging has specific PDSCH and PDCCH resource allocation process refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3903\_replaced([11167436](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktp4-_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). For the DL subcell resource, paging will apply the same allocation process refer to step 3) as below, each PMO relevant paging schedule will treated as a single UE.  For paging schedule slot, paging resource will be allocated in TD scheduler before the process of 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4292\_replaced([11177281](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuuP-PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Paging resource allocation result will be recorded in corresponding cell DB. Paging will preempt allocated resources (PDSCH/PDCCH/SUBCELL) before below process apply to each UEs in CS2 list. During paging resource preempt process, each PMO relevant paging schedule will treated as a single UE, and P-RNTI will not add to to-be-scheduled list as paging has specify scheduler process in FD scheduler.

---

###### 3.29.5.4.4.0-2 Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD schedulers in  system with common TD scheduler for all carriers (ID: 11177311)

**3.29.5.4.4.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `12803872`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
If multiple carriers are handled by a single L2 PS instance, the establishing of UEs to-be-scheduled lists should be done as follows:

When “NRBTS/NRCELL/actTdHighBufUePrio is set to 'disabled', or NRBTS/NRCELL/actTdHighBufUePrio is set to DL/DL\_UL but conditions as per [12517603](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e_1yEBiQEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) is not satisfied

* choose next candidate from each carrier according to the list sorted by TD metric.
* sort these next candidates according to their TD metric and add them in this order from this list to the UEs to-be-scheduled list of the corresponding carrier by evaluating the steps from 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4292\_replaced([11177281](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuuP-PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Else,

numOfLargeBufferUeThreshold = rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl \* ([Before PR869874]NRCELL. dlHighBufferPrioUeRatio [PR869874]dlHighBufPrioUeRatio[End PR869874]/100)

Step 1: Choose next  UEs “with priority greater than drbTraffic class” (please refer to [11174018](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuYRsfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)),  according to list sorted by TD metric, add these UEs to to-be-scheduled list until rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl , after evaluating the steps from 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4292\_replaced([11177281](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuuP-PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

* [CB014044-F-UPD003] UEs within drbTraffic class that are marked as prioritized (e.g., prioritized NBR, UEs in pairing group categories) shall be added to to-be-scheduled list first. [End CB014044-F-UPD003]

Step 2: If count of UEs added  to-be-scheduled list are less than “*rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl – numOfLargeBufferUeThreshold*”,choose next candidate from each carrier according to the list sorted by TD metric, and add these UEs to to-be-scheduled list after evaluating the steps from 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4292\_replaced([11177281](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuuP-PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).\*\*

[Before CB014044-B-UPD004] Note:High Buffer UEs have higher priority over NBR bearers. When NRCELL.actNbrFornon-GBRBearers = TRUE and NRBTS.NRCELL.actTdHighBufUEPrio=DL or DL\_UL, buffer length alone shall be used as the selection criterion for high-buffer UEs, regardless of NBR prioritization or token availability. As such, a high-buffer UE could be an NBR bearer or a non-GBR bearer, depending solely on buffer status. [End CB014044-B-UPD004]

Step 3: After the above steps, as per High buffer UE TD algorithm (see [12566433](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TFvwsSvuEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) choose next candidate UE and add it to to-be-scheduled list.

[Before PR852235]

Step 4: If number of UEs added to to-be-scheduled list is less than  *rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl, Then add remaining UEs in the order of TD metric priority.*

[End PR852235 ]

**Rationale: If there is a single TD scheduler for multiple carriers, one CS2 list needs to be created per carrier. While TD metric sorting and PDCCH allocation can be done per carrier without considering the other carriers; PUCCH resource allocation needs to be done commonly since PUCCH is allocated on PCell only and, thus, on different carrier then PDCCH / PDSCH if SCell is scheduled.**

---

###### 3.29.5.4.4.0-3 Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Decision on which UEs are to be forwarded to FD scheduler for MU Aware scheduling (DL MU MIMO TDD FR1) (ID: 11177323)

**3.29.5.4.4.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `12570231`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
12570231:
Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
When MU Aware scheduling is enabled (/NRBTS/NRCELL/NRDLMUMIMO/actMuAwareTdSch = True) , UE selection for FD scheduler shall follow the below algorithm.
NOTE: It is allowed to have some calculation simplifications for selecting MU candidates in this algorithm to avoid capacity issue in L2-PS. Details shall be defined in CP3 level.
L2-PS shall build the tbsList for MU Aware scheduling when the size of cs2List <= rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl with below steps:
**Starting from the step under SU mode:**
1. Pick UE from cs2List to tbsList in descending priority according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4297\_replaced([11177362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuu3A_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
2. IF the selected UE meet following conditions, then switch to MU mode
a) The priority of traffic class of UE is lower or equals to drbTraffic.
b) The prbRatio (sum of requiredPRB / totalPRB(for all UEs in tbsList) > NIDD:dlMuAwarePRBratio.
Else repeat step 1 until no UE can be selected or the size of tbsList reached rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl.
~~[CB014044-F] Note: If high buffer algorithm is activated (NRBTS/NRCELL/actTdHighBufUePrio is set to DL/DL\_UL),then NIDD:dlMuAwarePRBratio shall be set to 1. [End CB014044-F]~~
 
**For the step under MU mode:**
1. Pick UE from cs2List to tbsList in descending priority according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4297\_replaced([11177362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuu3A_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and UE meets corrWithTbsList (5G\_UP\_ALG\_23057\_replaced([11177334](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuu3AfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) < NIDD:dlMuAwareCorrThd. [CB014044-F]  Note: If high buffer algorithm is activated (NRBTS/NRCELL/actTdHighBufUePrio is set to DL/DL\_UL), then MU aware UEs are picked after picking the the high buffer UE as per [12570228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TgXkQC5sEfCRMdP0Nuo3Hg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) [End CB014044-F]
2. Repeat step 1 until no UE can be selected or the size of tbsList reached rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl.
 
**For the step after MU mode:**
If no UE can be selected under MU mode and the size of tbsList is less than rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl:
1. Pick UE from cs2List to tbsList in descending priority according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4297\_replaced([11177362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuu3A_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
2. Repeat step 1 until no UE can be selected or the size of tbsList reached rrmMaxNumUesFdmD.
 
-  cs2List: it is the CS2 list.
-  tbsList: it is the to be scheduled list.
-  totalPRB(BW): the total number of available PRB in current DL slot.
-  requiredPRB(k): the number of required PRBs for transmitting all DL data in buffer based on current rank and average CQI for UE(k).
-  about MU eligible UE, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7454\_replaced([11142605](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr4-afvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
-  rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl: the maximum number of UEs can be scheduled in current slot.
 
The algorithm is defined in the below flow diagram as well. The editable version can be found at
 
 
 
[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a black rectangle with a small white text box in the bottom left corner. The text box contains the following text: "NOTE: for visited UEs which don't meet conditions defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4297, they can remove them from cs2List."[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_13361.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

###### 3.29.5.4.4.0-4 Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 High buffer UE prioritization in TD algorithm (ID: 12517596)

**3.29.5.4.4.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `12517600`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
Overview

---

**3.29.5.4.4.0-4.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `13399848`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
This proposal is to enhance RB utilization while also providing special handling to high buffer UEs, e.g., FWA (Fixed Wireless Access). Few high buffer UEs are prioritized so as to improve the RB utilization. This scheme is trying to reserve several positions (defined by parameter [Before PR869874]NRCELL. dlHighBufferPrioUeRatio [PR869874]dlHighBufPrioUeRatio[End PR869874] out of rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl for UEs with high buffer in case high  TD metric  UEs could not occupy all available resources. This help fully utilize the PRB resources to boost cell throughput.

---

**3.29.5.4.4.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `12517603`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
Condition to apply this algorithm

---

**3.29.5.4.4.0-4.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `12737614`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
When NRCELL.actTdHighBufUePrio is DL or DL\_UL, the following algorithm shall be apply:

[PR852235] Let total number of candidate UEs be 'S' and Max number of UEs that can be selected to be scheduled 'Nsched'. [End PR852235] [Before PR852235] The algorithm is applicable only if the total number of candidate UEs (S) is larger than max number of UEs that can be selected to be scheduled (Nsched), i.e., *S>N*sched. In that case, [Before CB014044-UPD002] up front itself UEs shall be sorted on descending order of PRB needs (*RB\_estu). [CB014044-UPD002] first sort non-GBR UEs in S list by DRB buffer*\*\*[End CB014044-UPD002]. [PR852235] Sort non-GBR UEs in S list by DRB buffer.  [End PR852235] And then it shall be determined if [CB014044-UPD002] for the top of numOfLargeBufferUeThreshold UEs [End CB014044-UPD002], sum of RBest is greater than "[Before PR861041] n [End PR861041] NBW - sum of higher priority (GBR, retransmission) UEs RBest". If yes, the following corresponding algorithm is applied. If not, this modification is not needed.

[Before CB014044-B-UPD004] Note 2: When NRCELL.actNbrForNonGbrBearers = TRUE and NRBTS.NRCELL.actTdHighBufUEPrio=DL or DL\_UL, buffer length alone shall be used as the selection criterion for high-buffer UEs, regardless of NBR prioritization or token availability. As such, a high-buffer UE could be an NBR bearer or a non-GBR bearer, depending solely on buffer status.[End CB014044-B-UPD004]

[Before PR861041]

n = 1, when, NRCELL.actDlMuMimoEnh is set to FALSE

n=  [Before PR857062] rdChannelBwMultiplierDl (see [12657403](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_fBIEwEkSEfC0Ye3M8ARUWQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) [PR857062] NRCELL.channelBwMultiplierDl [End PR857062], when, NRCELL.actDlMuMimoEnh is set to TRUE

[End PR861041]

for RBest, see [11181264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku-HkfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) [PR873563] Instead of using rrmDlProposedMcs (defined in [11181264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku-HkfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), rrmAvgSpectralEffDlSlot (defined in [11210238](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw4MGvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) will be used to determine RB\_est. [End PR873563]
