**3.29.5.4.4.0-4.0-3**  (ID: `12517606`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
Algorithm

---

**3.29.5.4.4.0-4.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `12566433`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
With enhanced MU MIMO disabled/enabled and MU aware TD scheduler disabled

---

**3.29.5.4.4.0-4.0-3.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `13317549`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
13317549:
Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
When NRBTS/NRCELL/actTdHighBufUePrio is DL or DL\_UL, and when NRCELL.NRDLMUMIMO.actMuAwareTdSch is set to FALSE, follow below algorithm
Definitions:
\* Let S be the list of not evaluated UEs (with priority class ~~less than or~~ equal to drbTraffic) in CS2 list.
**[Before CB014044-B-UPD004]**
Note: When NRCELL.actNbrForNonGbrBearers = TRUE and NRBTS.NRCELL.actTdHighBufUEPrio=DL or DL\_UL, buffer length alone shall be used as the selection criterion for high-buffer UEs, regardless of NBR prioritization or token availability. As such, a high-buffer UE could be an NBR bearer or a non-GBR bearer, depending solely on buffer status.
[End CB014044-B-UPD004]
\* Let L be the list of UEs selected for scheduling (to-be-scheduled list).
\* Let N\_sched be the maximum number of UEs that can be scheduled in FDM DL, defined as:
N\_sched = rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl (see [11179079](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku3Z6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))
\* Let N\_PRB be the total estimated PRBs allocated for UEs in list L.[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$N\_{PRB} = \sum\_{u=1}^{|L|} RB\_{est\_u}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-04132328.png[/image\_path][/image-0]
\* Let N\_BW be the total available PRBs.
\* Let threshold be defined as:
threshold = N\_sched × ([Before PR869874]NRCELL. dlHighBufferPrioUeRatio [PR869874]dlHighBufPrioUeRatio[End PR869874] / 100)
\* [PR852235] Let remainingOpportunitiesToBeScheduledInslot be defined as
remainingOpportunitiesToBeScheduledInSlot = min(remaining UEs in ‘S’, N\_sched – UEs in ‘L’). [End PR852235]
n = 1 if NRCELL.actDlMuMimoEnh is set to FALSE
else  NRCELL.actDlMuMimoEnh is set to True, n= [Before PR857062] rdChannelBwMultiplierDl (see [12657403](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_fBIEwEkSEfC0Ye3M8ARUWQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) [PR857062] NRCELL.channelBwMultiplierDl [End PR857062]
Algorithm:
\* Sort the candidate UE list S in descending order based on their TD metric.
\* Iterate through each UE u in S:
\* If the [Before PR852235] current number of UEs in L satisfies |L| ≥ N\_sched – threshold [PR852235] following condition is satisfied:  ‘remainingOpportunitiesToBeScheduledInSlot  <= threshold’ [End PR852235]  and N\_PRB < nN\_BW:
Check if UE u is eligible for scheduling based on predefined criteria: RBest\_u, >= [((n \* N\_BW) - N\_PRB)/(Nsched  - L)]
If eligible, schedule the UE:
Update:
\* N\_PRB = min(N\_PRB + RBest\_u, nN\_BW)
\* L = L ∪ {u}
\* S = S \ {u}
\* Else, skip u and continue to the next UE.
\* If any of the following conditions are met, terminate the loop:
+ No more PRBs are available (N\_PRB >= nN\_BW)
+ All UEs in S have been visited
\* (if |L| < N\_sched):
\* Iterate through Candidate Set 2 again and select additional non-GBR UEs based on TD metric priority.
+ Continue this process until:
|L| = N\_sched
Note:
The value RBest\_u (estimated PRBs required by UE u) is defined in spec see [11181264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku-HkfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). [PR873563] Instead of using rrmDlProposedMcs (defined in [11181264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku-HkfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), rrmAvgSpectralEffDlSlot (defined in [11210238](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw4MGvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) will be used to determine RB\_est\_u. [End PR873563]

---

**3.29.5.4.4.0-4.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `12570228`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
With enhanced MU MIMO enabled and MU aware TD scheduler enabled

---

**3.29.5.4.4.0-4.0-3.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `13317554`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
13317554:
Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
When NRBTS/NRCELL/actTdHighBufUePrio is DL or DL\_UL, and when NRCELL.actDlMuMimoEnh is set to TRUE and NRCELL.NRDLMUMIMO.actMuAwareTdSch is set to TRUE, follow below algorithm:
Definitions:
\* Let S be the list of not evaluated UEs (with priority class ~~less than or~~ equal to drbTraffic) in CS2 list.
[Before CB014044-B-UPD004]
Note: When NRCELL.actNbrForNonGbrBearers = TRUE and NRBTS.NRCELL.actTdHighBufUEPrio=DL or DL\_UL, buffer length alone shall be used as the selection criterion for high-buffer UEs, regardless of NBR prioritization or token availability. As such, a high-buffer UE could be an NBR bearer or a non-GBR bearer, depending solely on buffer status.
[End CB014044-B-UPD004]
\* Let L be the list of UEs selected for scheduling (to-be-scheduled list).
\* Let N\_sched be the maximum number of UEs that can be scheduled in FDM DL, defined as:
N\_sched = rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl (see [11179079](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku3Z6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))
\* Let N\_PRB be the total estimated PRBs allocated for UEs in list L.[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$N\_{PRB} = \sum\_{u=1}^{|L|} RB\_{est\_u}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-04132328.png[/image\_path][/image-0]
\* Let N\_BW be the total available PRBs.
\* Let threshold be defined as:
threshold = N\_sched × (NRCELL.dlHighBufferPrioUeRatio / 100)
\* [PR852235] Let remainingOpportunitiesToBeScheduledInslot be defined as
               remainingOpportunitiesToBeScheduledInSlot = min(remaining UEs in ‘S’, N\_sched – UEs in ‘L’). [End PR852235]
\* n = [Before PR857062] 1 if NRCELL.actDlMuMimoEnh is set to FALSE [PR857062] NRCELL.channelBwMultiplierDl [End PR857062]
[ Before PR852235]
Go through the list of candidate UEs in the descending order of TD metric
Step 1: For a UE, If   estimated PRB need, RBest, is greater than or equal to  [(NBW - NPRB)/(Nsched - L)], regardless of correlation for MU-MIMO UE, add this UE to  L, else skip this UE and go to next UE and repeat Step 1
\* + - Update NPRB= min(NPRB + RBest , NBW), remove UE from S and add to L, L=L ∪ {u}, S=S{u}
Step 2: If, NPRB,  is lesser than ‘NBW‘ and L is lesser than NSched, go to next UE and repeat Step 1. (Note: Prioritize UE with high buffer)
Step 3: If all UEs in the candidate UE list have been visited, then pick next  UEs as per [11177323](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuuQAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)
For RBest, see [11181264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku-HkfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
[PR852235]
Algorithm:
\* Sort the candidate UE list S in descending order based on their TD metric.
\* Iterate through each UE u in S:
\* If the [Before PR852235] current number of UEs in L satisfies |L| ≥ N\_sched – threshold [PR852235] following condition is satisfied:  ‘remainingOpportunitiesToBeScheduledInSlot  <= threshold’ [End PR852235]  and N\_PRB < nN\_BW:
Check if UE u is eligible for scheduling based on predefined criteria: RBest\_u, >= [Before PR857062] [(NBW - NPRB)/(Nsched - L)] [PR857062] [((n \* NBW) - NPRB)/(Nsched - L)] [End PR857062]
If eligible, schedule the UE:
Update:
\* N\_PRB = min(N\_PRB + RBest\_u, nN\_BW)
\* L = L ∪ {u}
\* S = S \ {u}
\* Else, skip u and continue to the next UE.
\* If any of the following conditions are met, terminate the loop:
+ No more PRBs are available (N\_PRB >= nN\_BW)
+ All UEs in S have been visited
\* (if |L| < N\_sched): pick next  UEs as per [11177323](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuuQAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)
Note:
The value RBest\_u (estimated PRBs required by UE u) is defined in spec see [11181264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku-HkfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). [PR873563] Instead of using rrmDlProposedMcs (defined in [11181264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku-HkfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), rrmAvgSpectralEffDlSlot (defined in [11210238](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw4MGvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) will be used to determine RB\_est\_u. [End PR873563]
[ End PR852235]

---

###### 3.29.5.4.4.0-5 Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Friend User prioritization in TD scheduler during the to-be-scheduled list creation (ID: 13343401)

**3.29.5.4.4.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `13343404`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
TD metric modification for friends

---

**3.29.5.4.4.0-5.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13343406`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
When NRCELL.actBundlePreviousPairedUes is set to 'disabled' or 'UL' the following procedure shall be skipped.

gNB-DU shall perform the below steps for each of the friends added from the Friend Lists (FLs) in the CS1 list, such that they can be selected together in the to-be-scheduled list of users for the current slot.

* Sum the individual TD metrics of each initial transmission user belonging to the same traffic priority class in a FL that is selected to be included in the CS1 list. This gives the TD metric of the FL.
* For each initial transmission UE in a FL, belonging to the same traffic priority class, their TD metric is updated to the TD metric of the FL it belongs, from the above step. The aggregated TD metric shall make it possible for the TD-scheduler to pick the friend users together in to-be-scheduled list of users (tbsList).
* When one UE belongs to more than one “FL”, it’s TD metric shall be updated to the max of the TD metrics of each FL it belongs to.

For the TD metric of the UEs please refer to [11175151](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kug0nPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). For the Friend List description and how friends are added and removed from the lists refer to [13339999.](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3gGHsNvTEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

Note: The TD metric modification/improvement for the friend users described above shall be performed solely for the purpose of increasing the possibility to select the friends (if already present in the CS1 list) together in the CS2/to-be-scheduled list. This improved TD metric thus shall be maintained temporarily during the process of constructing the CS2/to-be-scheduled list. If found that any of these friend user which were MU eligible based on the recent pairing history is deemed MU ineligible (based on the conditions defined in [11142605](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr4-afvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) in the current slot, then that UE's TD metric shall fall back to its original value.

---

###### 3.29.5.4.4.0-6 Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 UE correlation calculation for MU eligible selection (ID: 11177334)

**3.29.5.4.4.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11177357`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
11177357:
Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
Correlation between selected MU eligible UE u with all MU eligible UEs in to-be-scheduled list is calculated as follows:

[Before CB009235-A-UPD001]

[image-0][image\_desc]corrTbsList$*{u}$ = min$*{k \in m \cup B \cup I \cup n \cup TbsList}$ corr$\_{u,k}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_13363.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

where

- [image-1][image\_desc]The image contains the text "CORT u,k". The text is in a light color against a white background. The letters are slightly blurred.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_13363.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1] is the correlation between UE(u) and UE(k) defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7436\_replaced([11143836](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr6zm_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). When calculate correlation at this stage, to simplify the processing, the rank adaption shall be considered as 'Always' mode (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7563\_replaced([11142677](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr5ldPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

- muElgInTbsList is the list which includes all MU eligible UE(s) in to-be-scheduled list.

- About definition of MU eligible UE, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7454\_replaced([11142605](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr4-afvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB009235-A-UPD001]

[image-2][image\_desc]corrWithTbsList$*u$ = $\sqrt{\frac{\sum*{k \in m \cup ElgInTbsList} corr\_{u,k}^2}{N^2}}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_13363.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2]

where

- [image-3][image\_desc]The image contains the text "CORT u,k". The text is in a light color against a white background. The letters are slightly blurred.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_13363.002.png[/image\_path][/image-3] is the correlation between UE(u) and UE(k) defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7436\_replaced([11143836](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr6zm_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). When calculate correlation at this stage, to simplify the processing, the rank adaption shall be considered as 'Always' mode (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7563\_replaced([11142677](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr5ldPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

- N is the number of MU eligible UE(s) in to-be-scheduled list.

- muElgInTbsList is the list which includes all MU eligible UE(s) in to-be-scheduled list.

- About definition of MU eligible UE, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7454\_replaced([11142605](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr4-afvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CB009235-A-UPD001]

---

###### 3.29.5.4.4.0-7 Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Checks done for a UE to be Forwarded to FD scheduler (ID: 11177362)

**3.29.5.4.4.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `11177373`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
Starting from UEs/RNTIs in CS2 list having the highest TD metric, gNB-DU shall add a UE/RNTI to the list of to-be-scheduled UEs if all the following is satisfied:

* Scheduling initial and dedicated BWP transmissions in same slot (allowed or not), see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4300\_replaced([11177376](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuu3BvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* Maximum number of UEs to be scheduled in slot, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4302\_replaced([11177392](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuu3CfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* Maximum number of UEs to be scheduled in initial BWP, , see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4304\_replaced([11177413](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuu3DfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* L1-DL subcell availability check, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4306\_replaced([11177427](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuveEfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* Needed resources availability check, [CB008927-A ]if the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = false see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4311\_replaced([11177467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuveGPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) otherwise see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23663\_replaced([11177504](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuveHvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [End CB008927-A]
* EIRP constraint check. See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4315\_replaced([11177531](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuwFI_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* PDCCH candidate availability aint check, , scheck, , see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4317\_replaced([11177565](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuwFKfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* PUCCH for HARQ feedback and an L1-UL subcell availability check, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4319\_replaced([11177575](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuwFK_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* Overheatting status check, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4323\_replaced([11177598](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuwsMPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* UE have valid target beam Id in UE context for FR1 TDD Scell with beamforming activated according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4325\_replaced([11177606](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuwsMvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**3.29.5.4.4.0-8.0-2**  (ID: `11177389`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
[CB009550-A] If NRBTS/NRCELL/actFdmInitialDedicatedFdd is set to FALSE: [End CB009550-A]

{

For the following cases:

do the following: For a UE in dedicated BWP, end process if rrmNumUesFdmDlInitialBWP >0.

###### 3.29.5.4.4.0-9 Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Maximum number of UEs to be scheduled in slot (ID: 11177392)

**3.29.5.4.4.0-9.0-3**  (ID: `11177407`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
The number of UEs to-be-scheduled has not reached rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl and the remaining resources is not equal to 0.

* End process if this condition is not fulfilled (no more UEs to be added to the list)

In slots carrying TRS with more than 4 TRS symbols the number of UE allocation per slot is limited.

If NRBTS/NRCELL/actLongPucchF1F3BfOnOranExtT6 is True and number of activated SS/PBCH (nActivatedSsPbch, see 5G\_UP\_82\_replaced([11347116](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubJz2PvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) > 4 (more than 4 SSBs are configured and activated) then rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl shall be limited to min(rdMaxNumPdschAllocationPerTRSSlotForExtType6 , rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl).

[CB010944-A] If artificial load for EMF is enabled (5G\_UP\_ALG\_17863\_replaced([11183915](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvN_PvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl > 1, only rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl-1 UEs could be used for real UE DL scheduling, the reserved 1 UE is used for fake UE DL scheduling.  [End CB010944-A]

Note: The rationale is that the number of sections supported with a single FCP message is limited to 92, and the maximum number of sections required in a TRS slot is > 92, when 3 pairs of TRS symbols are configured. With 4 SSB, 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2020\_replaced([11275658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpH1bPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) specifies at most 2 pairs of TRS symbols per slot.

Note: default value of rdMaxNumPdschAllocationPerTRSSlotForExtType6 is set to 6 7

---

###### 3.29.5.4.4.0-10 Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Maximum number of UEs to be scheduled in initial BWP (ID: 11177413)

**3.29.5.4.4.0-10.0-2**  (ID: `11177423`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
[CB009550-B] If /NRBTS/NRCELL/actFdmSchedulingInitialBWP is False [End CB009550-B]

{

For a UE with initial BWP transmission, the number of UEs to-be-scheduled with Initial BWP (rrmNumUesFdmDlInitialBWP ) has not reached rrmMaxNumUesFdmDlInitialBWP

}

Exception: multiple SI-RNTI & P-RNTI are allowed to be scheduled if available.

DL transmissions of UEs in transient phase (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4816\_replaced([11194889](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4GhfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) are considered as initial BWP transmissions.

[CB009550-B] If /NRBTS/NRCELL/actFdmSchedulingInitialBWP is True, then one or more TC-RNTI, RA-RNTI and DCI 1\_0 for C-RNTI are allowed to be scheduled if available.  When scheduling Msg2, L2-PS shall ensure UL subcell availability for related Msg3 as mentioned in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4886\_replaced([11197000](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwGwGPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [End CB009550-B]

###### 3.29.5.4.4.0-11 Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 L1-DL subcell availability check (ID: 11177427)

**3.29.5.4.4.0-11.0-6**  (ID: `13455726`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
For TDD, there is either:

When supercell mode is not enabled, refer to 5G\_UP\_5471\_replaced([11353418](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ub_hVfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**,**

If FD beamforming is disabled (dlEcpriFdBeamforming = False), UEs which are assigned to the same DL subcell shall meet beam conditions defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4309\_replaced([11177456](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuveFvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If FD beamforming is enabled (dlEcpriFdBeamforming = True), UEs can be assigned to any available DL subcell of cell. The total number of beams on DL per symbol shall not exceed the value of MaxNumBeamsPerSymbolDl (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10617\_replaced([11179139](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku4A9_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

When supercell mode is enabled,

the mapping table, refer to 5G\_UP\_1851\_replaced([11375846](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ueQLIfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), is used to check UE beam and associated L1 subcell for each UE allocation.

The associated L1 DL subcell with less than rrmMaxNumUesFdmDlSubcell UEs assigned to it, can be selected.

[PR843432]

If isRrcReject=true (refer to [11153584](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksnXJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), then MSG4 transmission or retransmission shall be scheduled only in the subcell in which PRACH was received. The subcell shall not be changed even if there are available subcells.

[End PR843432]

Note: **A L1 DL subcell can contain UEs at different ranks. Terms of 2x2 and 4x4 UEs shall be avoid using because they have different meaning under different context. For example, they can be different dlMimoMode, different ranks, or different size of precoding matrices, etc.**

Note: If CS2 list is from SD scheduler, the FD scheduler shall use the DL subcell which is selected by SD scheduler to schedule users in CS2 list. See the detail in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4412\_replaced([11142400](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr4XU_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note: for FDD, the to-be-scheduled list of UE has less than *rrmMaxNumUesFdmDlSubcell UEs having the same L1 DL subcell as the current UE.*

[Before CB013712-A]Note: for TDD FR1, L1 DL subcell shall be "available for usage" based on subcell pooling (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_5230\_replaced([11210126](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw3lB_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).[End CB013712-A]

Note: For TDD FR1, when large BB pooling is enabled (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is set to TRUE and subcellDeactivationDlAllowed is set to TRUE), L1 DL subcell shall be "available for usage" based on large baseband pooling (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15314\_replaced([11212864](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxDySvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Note : When L1 ARM based subcell deactivation procedure is enabled in DL i.e. dlSubcellDeactForARMAllowed = TRUE (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_8225\_replaced([11232681](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TmKoDfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), L2-PS shall consider only the active DL subcells received from the BBRM (numActiveDlSubcells & listOfActiveDlSubcells) (refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13411\_replaced([11212398](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxBWAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_18301\_replaced([11213855](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxKf8fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

###### 3.29.5.4.4.0-12 Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Beam conditions for FDMed UEs on DL (ID: 11177456)

**3.29.5.4.4.0-12.0-1**  (ID: `11177461`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
This requirement only applies to TDD/FR1 with digital beamforming enabled and FD beamforming disabled, to multiplex UEs on frequency domain within a DL subcell, below beam related conditions shall be met:

Note: the PdschPrecodingOption4x4 in below table is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6591\_replaced([11139260](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krmDcPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| DL MIMO Mode | PdschPrecodingOption4x4 | Beam conditions for FDMed UEs |
| 2x2 (open or closed loop) | N/A | All UEs shall have the same beam. |
| 4x2 or 4x4 (open or closed loop) | 0, 4 (no port selection) | All UEs shall have same the best beam and second-best beam. |
| 4x2 or 4x4 (open or closed loop) | 1, 5 (port selection up to rank 2) | All UEs shall have same the best beam and second-best beam (if available).   NOTE: the second-best beam may be not available for some UEs due to their ranks and port selection mode. |
| 4x2 or 4x4 (open or closed loop) | 2, 6 (port selection up to rank 4) |  |
| Closed loop 8x4 | 0 | The detail conditions are defined in the below table. |

If DL MIMO mode is ‘Closed loop 8x4’, to multiplex UEs on FD with one DL subcell, L2-RT shall ensure FDMed UEs on each stream have the same beam assigned (share the same first x-pol beam, or second x-pol beam, or both).

Some FDM examples are listed as below:

1) UE1 (rank 4), UE2 (rank 1) and UE3 (rank 1) are FDMed. UE1 is scheduled over two x-pol beams (first x-pol beam and second x-pol beam). UE2 is scheduled over the first x-pol beam. UE3 is scheduled over the second x-pol beam.

2) UE1 (rank 1) and UE2 (rank 1) are FDMed. UE1 is scheduled over the first x-pol beam. UE2 is scheduled over the second x-pol beam.

3) UE1 (rank 3) and UE2 (rank 4) are FDMed. UE1 and UE2 are scheduled over two x-pol beams (first x-pol beam and second x-pol beam).

4) UE1 (rank 4) and UE2 (rank 2 w/ port selection) are FDMed. UE1 is scheduled over two x-pol beams (first x-pol beam and second x-pol beam). UE2 is scheduled over the second x-pol beam.

---

###### 3.29.5.4.4.0-13 Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Needed resources availability check (ID: 11177467)

**3.29.5.4.4.0-13.0-5**  (ID: `11177498`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
If the current UE is the 1st UE having an initial BWP transmission or a retransmission UE, the needed resources are not greater than the remaining resources.

If NRCELL/actDlMuMimoEnh = True, in below resource availability checking for initial transmission and retransmission, frequency resource reserved for each MU eligible UEs (5G\_UP\_ALG\_7454\_replaced([11142605](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr4-afvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall be sharable with all MU eligible UEs. It will increase number of candidates to be added into to-be-scheduled list even without enough frequency resource because these candidates could be multiplexed on spatial domain by using same frequency resources for PDSCH. For example, UE1 and UE2 are MU eligible UEs. 4 RBGs are reserved for UE1, these RBGs can also be reserved for UE2. For more information, please refer to CP3 requirement defined in 5G\_L2\_4282\_replaced([11165013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25wnk_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall consider UE's active dedicated BWP specific RBG sizes (5G\_UP\_ALG\_449\_replaced([11098250](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_km80DvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

* For initial BWP transmission UEs:
* For SIB: the sum of PRBs for SIB1 messages to be sent in this slot, if not already reserved (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3748\_replaced([11165244](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktgH-PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* For transmission with DCI Format 1\_0 in a Common Search Space (Type0/0A/1/2/3): the minimum value between the remaining available RB within initial BWP (excluding the potential blanked PRB) and the CORESET(0) size (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4463\_replaced([11178704](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku2LzPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* For transmission with DCI Format 1\_1 with allocation type 0 (RBG): the RBGs in initial BWP not impacted by the potential blanked PRB.
* For RAT0 allocation, the RBGs to be deducted are those containing at least 1 PRB from the initial BWP.
* For Paging for SI change notification or CMAS Notification, no check is needed as PDSCH isn't used for this message (only PDCCH), see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_12057\_replaced([11167918](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kts8RPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* For retransmissions UEs: If PDSCH RBG randomization is not in enhanced mode (NRCELL.actDlRbgRandomization is not equal to "enhanced") AND (adaptive re-transmission scheme is deactivated (/NRBTS/NRCELL/actAdaptiveReTxResMcs is set to FALSE) or the conditions defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11943\_replaced([11184268](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRCjfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are not fulfilled), the same amount of resources as their initial transmission. Retransmission UEs can be added to list only if exact number of PRBs can be provided with the available RBGs. Usage of the first RBG or last RBG are tracked to ensure this.
* Retransmission UEs with a number of PRBs equal to multiple of RBG size P in their initial transmission and first partial RBG or last partial RBG is not used in initial transmission, can not use first RBG or last RBG if its size is not equal to P PRBs.
* Retransmission UEs with a number of PRBs equal to multiple of RBG size P in their initial transmission AND both first partial RBG and last partial RBG is used in initial transmission, should use both first partial RBG and last partial RBG.
* Retransmission UEs with a number of PRBs not equal to multiple of RBG size P in their initial transmission, need either the both first RBG and last RBG or first RBG or last RBG to be available in their retransmission.
* If the adaptive re-transmission scheme is activated (/NRBTS/NRCELL/actAdaptiveReTxResMcs is set to TRUE) and the conditions defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11943\_replaced([11184268](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRCjfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are fulfilled, the allocation of the retransmission is applied as defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11948\_replaced([11184286](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRCj_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and reserved MCS could be used as defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_12911\_replaced([11184825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRpnPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* If PDSCH RBG randomization is in enhanced mode (NRCELL.actDlRbgRandomization is set to "enhanced") then retransmissions can occur with a different number of PRBs than the initial transmission per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_12664\_replaced([11182875](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvGDbPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* For NRCELL/actDlMuMimoEnh = True and /NRBTS/NRCELL/actAdaptiveReTxResMcs = FALSE, if initial transmission is allocated with last RBG, retransmission can be allocated without last RBG by utilizing reserved MCS (or vice versa). See details in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7435\_replaced([11145579](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksA6PPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4532\_replaced([11184193](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvQbg_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). If the adaptive re-transmission scheme is activated (/NRBTS/NRCELL/actAdaptiveReTxResMcs is set to TRUE) and the conditions defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11943\_replaced([11184268](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRCjfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are fulfilled, the allocation of the adaptive retransmission shall be applied as defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11948\_replaced([11184286](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRCj_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and reserved MCS could be used as defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_12911\_replaced([11184825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRpnPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For a FDD cell shared with LTE when Cat-M support is enabled (actLteNrDssLteCat)  the available PDSCH RBGs for retransmission in the respective slot shall be checked according to values received in EN DSS DL CELL RESOURCE ALLOCATION REQUEST as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4744\_replaced([11172253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuK2VPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the paging, SIB1-BR Cat-M NBs,  for the data Cat-M NB and for repeated MPBCH (if configured).

If slowPrbPoolingAllowed is set to 'true' or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is True (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283\_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

* the available PDSCH RBGs for retransmission in the respective slot shall be checked according to the total number of usable PRBs granted by the BBRM 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6500\_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and the total number of usable RBGs available in the slot given in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4279\_replaced([11177002](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* If the adaptive re-transmission scheme is deactivated (/NRBTS/NRCELL/actAdaptiveReTxResMcs is set to FALSE) or the conditions defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11943\_replaced([11184268](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRCjfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are not fulfilled and if a retransmission is scheduled to bbPoolEvalPeriod (refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6781\_replaced([11211947](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw-StfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) different from its first transmission and if there is no enough usable RBGs, retransmission UEs shall not be added to the list and the retransmission shall be skipped. If the adaptive re-transmission scheme is activated (/NRBTS/NRCELL/actAdaptiveReTxResMcs is set to TRUE) and the conditions defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11948\_replaced([11184286](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRCj_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are fulfilled, the retransmission UEs shall be added to the list.

[CB012605-C]

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = TRUE

* if the adaptive re-transmission scheme is deactivated (/NRBTS/NRCELL/actAdaptiveReTxResMcs is set to FALSE) or the conditions defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11943\_replaced([11184268](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRCjfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are not fulfilled, gNB-DU shall check in the respective slot if the constraint mentioned in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26597\_replaced([11214606](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is fulfilled even after considering the rrmNumLayerPrbUsedPerAllocation (5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for a retransmission. In case there are not enough available layer PRB resources to schedule a retransmission, it shall be skipped.

[CB012605-E]

* If adaptive re-transmission scheme is activated, the amount of required layer PRBs for retransmission shall not exceed the remaining available layer PRBs in a slot (rrmRemainingPdschLayerPrbPerSlot; refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The number of layer PRBs used for the required PRB allocation (given by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11948\_replaced([11184286](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRCj_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) can be calculated as numReqLayerPrb mentioned in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). In case the required number of layer PRBs are not available in the current slot, the retransmission shall be skipped and retried in a later slot. However, if the required number of layer PRBs for the retransmission are greater than the maximum number of available layer PRBs per slot during a pooling period (refer rrmMaxNumLayerPrbPerSlot in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the retransmission shall be skipped and the HARQ process is freed

[End CB012605-E]

[End CB012605-C]

[CB008409-B]

For an HARQ re-transmission which is eligible for power boost (eligibility defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_ 25136), the amount of FD resources required for PDSCH and for power boost is decided as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25138\_replaced([11185420](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvS3t_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If there’s no re-transmission in the slot which is eligible for power boost (eligibility defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_ 25136), the FD resource availability check considers the remaining resources from the pool   of PRBs/RBGs available for PDSCH in the slot,

otherwise, the remaining available FD resources are given by min(remaining resources in the pool of PRBs/RBGs available for PDSCH in the slot, remaining resources in rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs pool). rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs pool is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25085\_replaced([11177271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuuP9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If for a re-transmission which is eligible for power boost there are sufficient PRBs/RBGs for PDSCH allocation (required PDSCH resources <= remaining resources from the pool of PRBs/RBGs available for PDSCH), and not enough for “power boosting” (required PDSCH resources + required power boost resources  > remaining resources from rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs pool), still the  UE shall be added to the  to-be-scheduled list [CB008409-B-UPD001] and the PRBs needed for power boosting shall be corrected based on the available FD resources in rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs pool. [End CB008409-B-UPD001]

Both allocated PDSCH and power boost resources will reduce the amount of available FD resources in rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs pool.

[End CB008409-B]

The adaptive retransmission scheme and the use of reserved MCS shall not be applicable to initial BWP UEs. As an exception, in case of any retransmission of a UE with  RAT1 allocation and DCI1\_0 in the initial BWP(coreset #0) during transient phase, reserved MCS shall be used if the number of RBs used in retransmission is not same as RBs in initial transmission.

---

###### 3.29.5.4.4.0-14 Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Needed resources availability check with Resource Allocation Type 1 (RAT1) (ID: 11177504)

**3.29.5.4.4.0-14.0-4**  (ID: `12684124`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
If the current UE is the 1st UE having an initial BWP transmission or a retransmission UE, the needed resources are not greater than the remaining resources.

If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true,

 For Common channels (SIB1/OSI/Paging scheduled in CSS with DCI\_1\_0):

o For common channels: the sum of PRBs to be sent in this slot (SIB1: see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3748\_replaced([11165244](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktgH-PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)); SI: see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3827\_replaced([11166434](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktlAgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)); PAGING: see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3921\_replaced([11168085](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kttjXfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). For these items, the resource availability shall already be checked and resources shall be allocated even before the resource check for the users listed below are started.

 For DCI 1\_0 (in common search space mode) transmission UEs (initial or retransmission):

o For transmission with DCI Format 1\_0 (rach msg2, rach msg4, DL MAC CE and SRB and any other DCI 1\_0 allocation (type3, transient  phase)) in a Common Search Space (Type0/0A/1/2/3):

* the number of PRBs reserved in the CORESET #0 frequency range in initial BWP,
* or the number of PRBs reserved within the CORESET #X (X>0, other than CORESET#0) frequency range in dedicated BWP but limited to CORESET#0 size. However for DCI\_1\_0 with Type-3 the range need not be limited to CORESET#0, in which case it is not strictly an initial BWP transmission and hence could be handled in FD phase (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4500\_replaced([11179300](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku4oDfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Please refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4463\_replaced([11178704](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku2LzPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for frequency domain assignments with DCI\_1\_0 for initial BWP area, and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23452\_replaced([11175855](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kumUKvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for PDSCH sub area. The amount of resources to be distributed to each such UE is given by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_21155\_replaced([11179648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku52LfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 For retransmissions UEs:

o gNB-DU shall check if the retransmission can be done as RAT1 (including when the initial transmission is a “dynamicswitch” RAT0):

o If NRBTS/NRCELL/actVoNRIncCodingGain is set to TRUE and if the initial transmission contains a VoNR bearer, gNB-DU shall update the number of PRBs required according to requirement 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23974\_replaced([11185342](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvSQqPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

o If adaptive re-transmission scheme is deactivated (/NRBTS/NRCELL/actAdaptiveReTxResMcs is set to FALSE) or the conditions defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11943\_replaced([11184268](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRCjfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are not fulfilled), the same number of resources as their initial transmission. Retransmission UEs can be added to list only if the exact number of PRBs can be reserved according to the constraints within a PDSCH sub area (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23481\_replaced([11176397](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kup-g_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) If several PDSCH sub areas are eligible (that is have enough remaining PRBs for a PRBs reservation, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23464\_replaced([11176110](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuoJV_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gNB-DU shall select a PDSCH sub area where the PRBs according to the criteria described in the requirement 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23683\_replaced([11176637](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuqllPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) **Note: If NRCELL.actDlDynSwitchAlloc is set to true and the initial transmission was a “dynamicswitch” RAT0,  the number of PRBs required for the retransmission has the same amount of resources as the initial transmission (that is from the number of RBGs of the dynamicswitch RAT0). If NRBTS/NRCELL/actVoNRIncCodingGain is set to TRUE and if the initial transmission contains a VoNR bearer, gNB-DU shall update the number of PRBs required according to requirement 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23974\_replaced([11185342](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvSQqPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).When in FR1 TDD and for FD beamforming (NRCELL.actBeamforming = True and NRBTS.actFdmEnhancedScheduling = True), if a retransmission of an initial transmission granted as a RAT1 or “dynamicswitch” RAT1 allocation is scheduled in TRS slots and in SSB slots with TRS symbols or in CSI-IM slots when CSI-IM is rate matched (that is if** [Before CB015668-A] NRBTS.actTddCsiRsOpt = true and NRBTS.actTddCsiImRm = true **[CB015668-A] actTddCsiRsOpt = true and actTddCsiImRm = true (note: actTddCsirsOpt and actTddCsiImRm are not get from NIDD but from L3 indicator)** [End CB015668-A]***\**\*)** and the PRB\_GRANULARITY is greater than 1 PRB (see 5G\_UP\_11022\_replaced([11350898](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubpjFvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gNB-DU shall roundup the number of PRBs to the next PRB\_GRANULARITY and if the number of PRBs is different from the one of the initial transmission, gNB-DU shall apply reserved MCS for the retransmission.\*\*\*\*

o If the adaptive re-transmission scheme is activated (/NRBTS/NRCELL/actAdaptiveReTxResMcs is set to TRUE) and the conditions defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11943\_replaced([11184268](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRCjfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are fulfilled, the allocation of the retransmission is applied as defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11948\_replaced([11184286](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRCj_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and reserved MCS could be used as defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_12911\_replaced([11184825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRpnPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). If several PDSCH sub areas are eligible, gNB-DU shall apply the same rules to select a PDSCH sub area where to reserve PRBs as without adaptive re- transmission (see paragraph just above), that is gNB-DU shall select a PDSCH sub area where the PRBs according to the criteria described in the requirement 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23683\_replaced([11176637](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuqllPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

o If NRCELL/actDlMuMimoEnh = True, for a MU eligible retransmission UE gNB-DU shall apply the same rules of resource availability check as described above, however due to possibility of MU pairing later in the FD phase it is allowed to include the UE even if the number of FD resources available are lesser in number than the resource reservation requires for the UE with or without adaptive retransmission activated.[CB014474-A] Additionally, if NRCELL.actEnhDynSwitchRat0 = True, then for a MU eligible retransmission user, gNB-DU shall consider this user as probable candiddate for dynamicswitch to RAT0 as described in [11176715](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuqlmfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). [End CB014474-A]

o If **when NRCELL.actDlDynSwitchAlloc is set to true** for FDD, FDD DSS, FR1 TDD when MU MIMO is not activated (NIDD parameters NRBTS/NRCELL.actDlMuMimo and NRBTS/NRCELL.actDlMuMimoEnh set to false)  and for FR1 TDD  when MU MIMO is activated (NIDD parameters NRBTS/NRCELL.actDlMuMimo or NRBTS/NRCELL.actDlMuMimoEnh set to true)  and there is only one PDSCH scrambled by DCI 1\_1 scheduled in the CS1 list in the slot , if gNB-DU failed to find an eligible PDSCH sub area for“**dynamicswitch” RAT1, gNB-DU shall check if the retransmission can be done with a “dynamicswitch” RAT0 allocation (see criteria in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25033\_replaced([11176715](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuqlmfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**\*\*\*\*

 If this check fails, gNB-DU shall remove this UE from the CS2 list, shall schedule it to the next slot.

 If this check is successful, gNB-DU shall pre book the RBGs for this UE as explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25033\_replaced([11176715](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuqlmfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), shall add this UE into the CS2 list for this slot.

o For a FDD cell shared with LTE when Cat-M support is enabled (actLteNrDssLteCatM), gNB-DU shall initialize the FD resources (PRBs) available RBGs for retransmission (DL RAT1 and dynamicswitch RAT0) through the start Prb and the size of the PDSCH sub areas (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26285\_replaced([11175892](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kum7NPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) in the respective slot according to values received in EN DSS DL CELL RESOURCE ALLOCATION REQUEST as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4744\_replaced([11172253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuK2VPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the paging, SIB1-BR Cat-M NBs,  for the data Cat-M NB and for repeated MPBCH (if configured).

If slowPrbPoolingAllowed is set to 'true' or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is True (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283\_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

o gNB-DU shall check the available PRBs for retransmission in the respective slot according to the total number of usable PRBs granted by the BBRM 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6500\_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and the remaining number of PRBs available in the slot and in the PDSCH sub areas (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4279\_replaced([11177002](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and the constraints in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23481\_replaced([11176397](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kup-g_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

o If the adaptive re-transmission scheme is deactivated (/NRBTS/NRCELL/actAdaptiveReTxResMcs is set to FALSE) or the conditions defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11943\_replaced([11184268](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRCjfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are not fulfilled and if a retransmission is scheduled to bbPoolEvalPeriod (refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6781\_replaced([11211947](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw-StfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) different from its first transmission and if there is not enough usable PRBs from RAT1 retransmissions and from the RBGs of a dynamicswitch RAT0 retransmisson in any PDSCH sub area in the dedicated BWP (for a DCI 1\_1 PDSCH grant) or the CORESET #0 (or X with X>0) **for a DCI 1\_0 PDSCH grant in CSS mode) in the slot (see constraints in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23481\_replaced([11176397](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kup-g_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), retransmission UEs shall not be added to the list and the retransmission shall be skipped.**

o If the adaptive re-transmission scheme is activated (/NRBTS/NRCELL/actAdaptiveReTxResMcs is set to TRUE) and the conditions defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11948\_replaced([11184286](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRCj_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are fulfilled, for any eligible PDSCH sub area, the retransmission UEs shall be added to the CS2 list.

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = TRUE is set to 'true',

o gNB-DU shall check the available PRBs for retransmission in the respective slot according to the total number of usable layer PRBs granted by the BBRM every pooling period 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25709\_replaced([11214021](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxLHCvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and the remaining number of layer PRBs available in the slot and in the PDSCH sub areas (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4279\_replaced([11177002](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and the constraints in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23481\_replaced([11176397](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kup-g_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

o If the required number of Layer PRBs for a retransmission (considering both adaptive and non-adaptive re-transmission scheme) are greater than the available number layer PRBs in the current pooling period, then retransmission shall be skipped, and the Harq Process shall be freed.

o If the adaptive re-transmission scheme is deactivated (/NRBTS/NRCELL/actAdaptiveReTxResMcs is set to FALSE) or the conditions defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11943\_replaced([11184268](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRCjfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are not fulfilled and if a retransmission is scheduled to bbPoolEvalPeriod (refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6781\_replaced([11211947](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw-StfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) different from its first transmission and if there is not enough usable PRBs from RAT1 retransmissions **and from the RBGs of a dynamics witch RAT0 retransmisson (if the initial transmission was a “dynamicswitch” RAT0) in any PDSCH sub area in the dedicated BWP (for a DCI 1\_1 PDSCH grant) or the CORESET #0 (or X with X>0)** for a DCI 1\_0 PDSCH grant in CSS mode) in the slot (see constraints in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23481\_replaced([11176397](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kup-g_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), retransmission UEs shall not be added to the list and the retransmission shall be skipped.\*\*\*\*

o If the adaptive re-transmission scheme is activated (/NRBTS/NRCELL/actAdaptiveReTxResMcs is set to TRUE) and the conditions defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11948\_replaced([11184286](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRCj_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are fulfilled, for any eligible PDSCH sub area, the retransmission UEs shall be added to the CS2 list.

For an HARQ re-transmission which is eligible for power boost (eligibility defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_ 25136), the amount of FD resources required for PDSCH and for power boost is decided as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25138\_replaced([11185420](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvS3t_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If there’s no re-transmission in the slot which is eligible for power boost (eligibility defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_ 25136), the FD resource availability check considers the remaining resources from the pool   of PRBs/RBGs available for PDSCH in the slot,

otherwise, the remaining available FD resources are given by min(remaining resources in the pool of PRBs/RBGs available for PDSCH in the slot, remaining resources in rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs pool). rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs pool is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25085\_replaced([11177271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuuP9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If for a re-transmission which is eligible for power boost there are sufficient PRBs/RBGs for PDSCH allocation (required PDSCH resources <= remaining resources from the pool of PRBs/RBGs available for PDSCH), and not enough for “power boosting” (required PDSCH resources + required power boost resources  > remaining resources from rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs pool), still the  UE shall be added to the  to-be-scheduled list and the PRBs needed for power boosting shall be corrected based on the available FD resources in rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs pool.

gNB-DU shall not apply the adaptive retransmission scheme and the use of reserved MCS for the DCI 1\_0 PDSCH allocations in CSS mode. As an exception, in case of any retransmission of a UE with RAT1 allocation and DCI1\_0 in the initial BWP(coreset #0 or X with X>0) during transient phase, reserved MCS shall be used if the number of RBs used in retransmission is not same as RBs in initial transmission. If NRCELL.actDlDynSwitchAlloc is set to true, **“dynamicswitch” allocation is not applicable for DCI 1\_0 PDSCH grants.**

---

###### 3.29.5.4.4.0-15 Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 EIRP constraint check (ID: 11177531)

**3.29.5.4.4.0-15.0-7**  (ID: `13433351`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
If NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = false,

When NRCELL/eirpControl/actEpic is disabled, for any UE from drbTraffic request class (5G\_UP\_ALG\_9465\_replaced([11174010](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuXqrvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or from the dtxOptimizedDrbTraffic request class (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8549\_replaced([11174294](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuat9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the sum of the minimum required resources from previously added UEs with the same beam (or pair of beams) shall not exceed *rrmNumberOfRemainingRbFromEirp, the maximum resources which can be transmitted on this beam (or on each beam from the pair) due to EIRP constraint (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4349\_replaced([11177928](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuzIc_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).*

If there are less than remaining *rdFdResPerRoundDl, the UE shall not be added to the list when the UE belongs to drbTraffic request class with normal nonGbBR category (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4178\_replaced([11174242](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuaG5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or dtxOptimizedDrbTraffic request class. If UE belongs to drbTraffic request class with NBR category (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4178\_replaced([11174242](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuaG5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the UE shall be skipped only when EIRP contraint doesn't allow even one FD resource (For ex. 1 RBG) to be scheduled.*

If NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true,

When NRCELL/eirpControl/actEpic is disabled, for any UE from drbTraffic request class (5G\_UP\_ALG\_9465) or from the dtxOptimizedDrbTraffic request class (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8549), the sum of the minimum required resources from previously added UEs with the same beam (or pair of beams) shall not exceed rrmNumberOfRemainingRbFromEirp, the maximum resources which can be transmitted on this beam (or on each beam from the pair) due to EIRP constraint (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4349).

Here, previously added UEs within the above-mentioned traffic classes shall also include UEs belonging to NBR category with positive token.

Further, EIRP constraints checks and related actions shall be performed during the FD scheduler while resource distribution with Exhaustive Scheduling (see [*12483324*](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_qeQ48g-XEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ)) if enabled, otherwise with WRR algorithm (5G\_UP\_ALG\_23755\_replaced ([11179805](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku7ET_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) where the actual number of schedulable PRBs shall be determined.

[CB014699-E] EIRP constraints checks is exempted for critical non-GBR UEs during prioritized resource allocation (in step1, see [13404773](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_rJo3eQyeEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) [End CB014699-E].

Resources for one additional PDCCH transmission shall be considered before assessing the number of RBs that can be scheduled. Note that restransmissions are implicitely excluded from the PRB restriction as part of harqRetransDrb request class.

If UE with valid subband BWVs (5G\_UP\_ALG\_14111\_replaced([11156776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks3OyfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) are excluded from UE-to-be-scheduled list or number of PRB is restricted due to EIRP control then gNB-DU shall mark the UE as " WB SRS constraint UE" and start/restart rdWbSrsConstraintTimer(5G\_UP\_ALG\_22551\_replaced([11158649](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktEDE_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for this UE. When the rdWbSrsConstraintTimer expires, gNB-DU shall mark the UE as " Not WB SRS constraint UE".

Note: When EIRP control is disabled via online modification of NIDD parameters, this timer is not stopped.

EIRP restriction is not checked for UEs with SB SRS because the number of that kind of UEs can be large and only limited ones of them can possibly be selected as WB UE.

---

###### 3.29.5.4.4.0-16 Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 PDCCH candidate availability check (ID: 11177565)

**3.29.5.4.4.0-16.0-1**  (ID: `11177569`)

###### 3.29.5.4.4.0-17 Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 PUCCH for HARQ feedback and an L1-UL subcell availability check (ID: 11177575)

**3.29.5.4.4.0-17.0-3**  (ID: `11177591`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
The UE has a free PUCCH resource for HARQ feedback that can be allocated (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4330\_replaced([11177663](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuwsPPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). When CB006138 is implemented, HARQ-AN bits together with SR bit can’t exceed maxPayloadSize of PUCCH-Reosurce-set1, PDSCH can be scheduled for UE as long as a PUCCH resource in PUCCH-Resource-set1 has been allocated to UE, irrespective the status of the PUCCH resource with the same index in PUCCH-Resource-set2.

L1 UL subcell selection for PUCCH is done as follows (For TDD only):

Before selecting the L1 UL subcell for the HARQ feedback, UEs scheduled to send CSI reports in the current slot shall be taken into consideration by assigning them to a subcell based on their beam.

If a new PUCCH format 0 resource (1st HARQ bit) or a new PUCCH format 2 resource (more than 2 bits HARQ) on a different symbol from the original PUCCH format 0 resource is needed, the availability of an L1 UL subcell is to be checked. The UE is sent to the FD scheduler only if for the symbol of the chosen PUCCH resource there is:

a) An L1 UL subcell with assigned UEs less than available number of PUCCH tokens (as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2455\_replaced([11116019](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp0h0PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), with those UEs using overlapping resources all having the same Beam as the UE in question.

b) Or an L1 UL subcell with assigned UEs less than available number of PUCCH tokens (as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2455\_replaced([11116019](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp0h0PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), with those UEs using overlapping resources having less than or equal to rrmMaxNumBeamsUlSubcell different beams and one of the beams is the same as that of the UE in question.

c) Or an L1 UL subcell with no UEs assigned to it. (use subcell with smallest ID).

d) Or an L1 UL subcell with assigned UEs less than available number of PUCCH tokens (as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2455\_replaced([11116019](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp0h0PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), with those UEs using overlapping resources having less than rrmMaxNumBeamsUlSubcell different beams and none of the beams is the same as that of the UE in question.

Note:

* for TDD FR1, when subcell pooling is enabled (spatialStreamPoolingAllowed is set to TRUE), L1 UL subcell shall be "available for usage" based on subcell pooling (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_5230\_replaced([11210126](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw3lB_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* Additional L1 UL subcell capacity can be available for HARQ if pooled subcell is assigned to a cell (refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2465\_replaced([11116066](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp0h1_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

If a new PUCCH format 2 resource is to be used for HARQ feedback is on the same symbol as the original PUCCH format 0 or an already allocated PUCCH format 2 resource for CSI report, the L1 subcell is the same as that of the original resource (no availability check to be done).  For TDD with beamforming, if PUCCH for msg4/SRB0/ or any transmission(s) for UE without UE dedicated configuration activated [CB010544-A] including the UE in the initial BWP without dedicated configuration [End CB010544-A] HARQ on 2 PUCCH symbols is to be used, an L1 UL subcell with the same beam (as the current UE) needs to be available for both symbols.

In case of long PUCCH (concerning PUCCH format 1 and PUCCH format 3), with supercell mode not enabled,

the same L1 UL subcell is selected for all PUCCHs. Note, in CB006064-A there is no beamforming yet.

When supercell mode enabled,

the mapping table (refer to 5G\_UP\_1851\_replaced([11375846](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ueQLIfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is used to identify UE beam specific L1 subcell for each UE PUCCH allocation.

---

**3.29.5.4.4.0-18.0-1**  (ID: `11177602`)

In case current scheduling for the UE over current carrier is related to retransmission but UE is in overheating status at current carrier according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2871\_replaced([11123293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqiTgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the related HARQ process and dlHarqBufferIndex shall be freed.

###### 3.29.5.4.4.0-20 Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Updating the to-be-scheduled list (ID: 11177617)

**3.29.5.4.4.0-20.0-6**  (ID: `13371569`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
If the checks mentioned in [11177362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuu3A_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) are satisfied for a UE:

* Add the UE to the to-be-scheduled list
* If the UE has an initial BWP transmission, increase *rrmNumUesFdmDlInitialBWP by 1 (initially set to 0)*
* Assign the UE to the chosen L1 subcells for PDCCH & PDSCH from 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4306\_replaced ([11177427](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuveEfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and for PUCCH from 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4319\_replaced ([11177575](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuwFK_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (If more than one option (a-, b- ,c- & d-) are possible, choose subcell from the first available option). The gNB shall send the subcell Id (ulSubcellIndication) of the selected UL Subcell (for PUCCH) to L1 for testing with Airphone.

Note: Case b- & d- only occur if *rrmMaxNumBeamsDlStream  or* rrmMaxNumBeamsUlSubcell  are greater than 1.\*\*

**If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = false, then**

* Update the amount of remaining FD resources by deducting
* For initial BWP transmission & retransmission UEs: the amount indicated in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4311\_replaced([11177467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuveGPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = TRUE, after allocating FD resources to each UE with initial BWP transmission or a retransmission, gNB-DU shall determine the number of layer PRBs consumed (**rrmNumLayerPrbUsedPerAllocation described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and use it to keep track of the used, as well as remaining layer PRB resources (**rrmNumUsedPdschLayerPrbPerSlot, **rrmRemainingPdschLayerPrbPerSlot described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).  gNB-DU shall also ensure that the constraint related to layer PRBs mentioned in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26597\_replaced([11214606](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is maintained. In case allocating the required resources to a UE breaks the constraint, the UE shall be allocated the maximum possible resources whlie considering any minimum PRB requirements (only in case of initial BWP transmission). Is such an allocation is not possible, the UE shall be skipped. The next UE in the list shall be checked for allocation as long as there are still layer PRB resources available. Further UE allocation and scheduling in all steps shall be stopped if there are no more layer PRB resources available for scheduling in the current slot.**\*\*\*\*

* For initial transmission UEs deduct:

UE SRBs with buffered data: min (the FD remaining resources, needed SRB resources (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4502\_replaced ([11179653](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku52LvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))))

OR UE with 5QI-5/69 buffered data: min (the FD remaining resources, needed 5QI-5/69 resources (5G\_UP\_ALG\_22378\_replaced ([11179697](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku6dOPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

OR UE with DC-GBR buffered data:  min (the FD remaining resources, needed DC-GBR resources (5G\_UP\_ALG\_30511\_replaced ([11179689](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku6dNvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))))

OR UE with 5QI-1/65/66 buffered data: min (the FD remaining resources, needed 5QI-1/65/66 resources (5G\_UP\_ALG\_22378\_replaced ([11179697](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku6dOPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))))

OR UE with non-5QI1 GBR buffered data:  min (the FD remaining resources, needed non-5QI1 GBR resources (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8036\_replaced ([11185589](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvUF2vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))))

OR UE with NBR configured non-GBR buffered data (drbTraffic class with NBR category):**min (the FD remaining resources, needed NBR resources (5G\_UP\_ALG\_21689\_replaced ([11179765](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku7ERvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))))**

ElseIf NRBTS.actExtSchedWeightAndPrefWrrAlg != LegacyRange\_lowComplexityWrr and NRBTS.actExtSchedWeightAndPrefWrrAlg != ExtendedRange\_lowComplexityWrr

if NRBTS.actExtSchedWeightAndPrefWrrAlg is not equal to ExtendedRange\_EnhancedWrr or If enhanced slice aware scheduler is deactivated for a cell (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_12237\_replaced ([11288194](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tp5RdPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

: min (the remaining FD resources ,rdFdResPerRoundDl) RBG(s), (rdFdResPerRoundDl defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4504\_replaced ([11179776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku7ESfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

End

If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = false

Note: Amount of FD resources deducted for SRBs will be used later in FD scheduler (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4500\_replaced ([11179300](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku4oDfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))**.**

If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = false

Note: **Because current algorithm doesn’t use the total buffer size of 5QI1/65/66 and other DRBs to allocate FD resources, instead 5QI1/65/66 FD resources are allocated before other DRBs being allocated, it is possible that the total allocated FD resources are a little bigger than the actual required FD resources. This is to be optimized in future, and the key is that once some FD resources can be saved by the optimization, these saved FD resource can still be allocated to UEs whose buffer is still not emptied.**

If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true then,

* Update the remaining PRBs (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23464\_replaced ([11176110](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuoJV_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) by reserving:
* For initial BWP transmission, the amount indicated in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23663\_replaced([11177504](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuveHvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* For the retransmission UEs, the amount indicated in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23663\_replaced ([11177504](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuveHvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) in the respective UE active BWP within the PDSCH sub-area (s), in case there are more than one PDSCH sub-area.
* For initial transmissions reserve:

[CB014699-B]

If UE has critical SRB1 with buffered data: min (remaining PRBs in the UE active BWP within the PDSCH sub-area(s), needed SRB1 resources (refer to [11179653](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku52LvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) which equally applied for critical SRB1)) [ End CB014699-B].

OR UE has SRBs (SRB1/2/3) with buffered data: min (remaining PRBs in the UE active BWP within the PDSCH sub-area(s), needed SRB resources (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4502\_replaced ([11179653](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku52LvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))))

Else for all other traffic class, if there are still remaining PRBs in the UE active BWP within the PDSCH sub-area(s), keep the UE in the to-be-scheduled list without any resource reservation and move to FD scheduling phase where these are handled (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4500\_replaced ([11179300](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku4oDfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

For FR1 TDD when FD beamforming is enabled, in TRS **when**actTddCsirsOpt = false (note: actTddCsirsOpt is not get from NIDD but from L3 indicator) or SSB slots with TRS symbols, **or in CSI-IM slots when CSI-IM is rate matched (that is if** actTddCsiRsOpt = true and actTddCsiImRm = true (note: actTddCsirsOpt and actTddCsiImRm are not get from NIDD but from L3 indicator)**, gNB-DU shall reserve the PRBs as explained above for UEs with DCI\_1\_1, in multiples of PRB granularity (see 5G\_UP\_11022\_replaced([11350898](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubpjFvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) as resource blocks. Due to maintaining PRB granularity in the resource reservation for a user, while calculating the remaining PRBs, the gNB-DU shall mark those PRBs in a resource block unavailable for further use, even if the resource block is partially reserved by this user which means the user got more allocation than it needed. Similarly, gNB-DU shall reduce the allocation for an user, if there are not enough PRBs left to maintain the PRB granularity, in which case the buffer may not be completely drained out.**

Note: It is possible that before this step, there is no PDSCH sub-area yet created in which case the largest BWP size is given as the PDSCH sub-area size, and while reserving the PRBs in this step there may be a need to create a PDSCH sub-area. See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23452\_replaced ([11175855](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kumUKvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for all the scenarios where a PDSCH sub-area can be created and how the size and location of the PDSCH sub-area is determined.

gNB-DU shall follow the rules defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23683\_replaced ([11176637](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuqllPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) while reserving the PRBs in the UE active BWP within a PDSCH sub-area.

Note: Further update to the to-be-scheduled list of UEs and associated PDSCH, PDCCH and PUCCH resource reservation is perfumed in the FD scheduler.

The amount of PRBs reserved in this step in the TD scheduler will be considered during resource allocation in FD scheduler (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4500\_replaced ([11179300](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku4oDfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

**- For all the users in the list, allocate a PDCCH candidate for the DCI (start CCE is determined as in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4433\_replaced([11170857](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuAeTvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

Note: The TD scheduler shall check if there are available PDCCH CCEs before reserving PRBs as described above.

If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = false, and if NRCELL/eirpControl/actEpic is disabled the following check and related actions are performed at this stage,

* Update *rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot for each controlled EIRP segment according to the number of scheduled CCEs for PDCCH and scheduled RBs for PDSCH as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4695\_replaced([11192990](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvo18_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) then compute* rrmNumberOfRemainingRbFromEirp for the scheduled beams as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4349\_replaced([11177928](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuzIc_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).\*\*

otherwise, if the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true and if NRCELL/eirpControl/actEpic is disabled the following check and related actions are perfomed at this stage,

* Update rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot for each controlled EIRP segment according to the number of scheduled CCEs for PDCCH and scheduled RBs for PDSCH as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4695 then compute rrmNumberOfRemainingRbFromEirp for the scheduled beams as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4349 only for the UEs with NBR configured non-GBR buffered data (drbTraffic class with NBR category).
* For the users in the list, allocate the PUCCH resource as indicated in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4330\_replaced ([11177663](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuwsPPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

###### 3.29.5.4.4.0-21 Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 Overload Control Limitation (ID: 11177648)

**3.29.5.4.4.0-21.0-1**  (ID: `11177653`)

Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2
[CNI-90896]When NRBTS/actFdmUeSkippingOlc is set to TRUE, [End CNI-90896][Before CNI-82030-B] If DL-MU-MIMO disabled, [End CNI-82030-B] Overload control may limit the number of UEs considered for to-be-scheduled list (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4327\_replaced([11177617](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuwsNPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) if it predicts that its processing capacity would be exceeded in a slot. In that case, it shall make sure that below conditions are satisfied.

* At least rdMinDlSchedUesPerSlotInHighLoad (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13379\_replaced([11193503](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvtHa_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) UEs are selected for FD resource allocation i.e. added to to-be-scheduled list
* All DL FD resources shall be distributed among the remaining selected UEs in to-be-scheduled list so that DL FD resources are not wasted.

Please refer to overload control defined in CP3/EFS for more details.

---

###### 3.29.5.4.4.0-22 Decision on which UEs are to be scheduled by FD scheduler from Candidate set 2 DTX optimized scheduling check (ID: 11177659)

##### 3.29.5.4.5 PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback

###### 3.29.5.4.5.0-1 PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback Summary (ID: 11177668)

**3.29.5.4.5.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11177684`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
To be able to schedule a UE with HARQ feedback on PUCCH, L2PS shall do the following:

* Keep track of the status of all PRBs in all PUCCH symbols in slot n+K1. (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4335\_replaced([11177700](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuxTRPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). If the UE was marked during the preselection as eligible for scheduling with k1aCsi timing (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4201\_replaced([11174422](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kub8E_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) the PUCCH resources for the UEs shall be searched/allocated from n+k1aCsi slot and PUCCH resource shall be allocated from n+k1aCsi slot for subsequent slots n’ with n’ + k1 = n1 + k1aCsi.
* Determine the available PUCCH resources for a UE [PR777253] additionally considering the UE's beam constraint, if applicable, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29065\_replaced([11177731](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuxTSfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [End PR777253] (out of the configured in the resource sets) and deciding which one to use if UE is to be scheduled. (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4339\_replaced([11177742](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuxTTPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

---

###### 3.29.5.4.5.0-2 PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback Multiplex HARQ feedback over short PUCCH with PRACH (ID: 11177690)

**3.29.5.4.5.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11177694`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
If PRACH multiplexing is enabled (MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/actPrachMultiplexing = TRUE), in PRACH slots, the table as below defines how HARQ feedback over short PUCCH can be multiplexed (FDM or TDM) with PRACH for different cases.

|  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1) FDM\_PRACH means a signal can be FDMed with long or short PRACH. 2) TDM\_S\_PRACH means a signal can be TDMed with short PRACH if there are available symbol(s) after short PRACH signal. 3) For long PRACH signal, TDM with other signal is not possible. |  |  |  |  |  |
|  | FR1-FDD | FR1-TDD |  |  |  |
|  | with Digital BF |  |  | without Digital BF |  |
| with FD BF (eCPRI) | without FD BF (CPRI) |  |  |  |  |
|  | Subcell using for PRACH | Subcell NOT using for PRACH (NOTE: this case is valid when #subcell > 1) |  |  |  |
| HARQ Feedback over Short PUCCH | FDM\_PRACH;   Note: if the DSS (dynamic spectrum sharing) is enabled, the FDM with PRACH is not supported. | FDM\_PRACH; TDM\_S\_PRACH; | TDM\_S\_PRACH; | FDM\_PRACH; TDM\_S\_PRACH; | FDM\_PRACH; TDM\_S\_PRACH; |

---

###### 3.29.5.4.5.0-3 PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback PRB status in PUCCH symbols (ID: 11177700)

**3.29.5.4.5.0-3.0-5**  (ID: `12684151`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
