Until the UlData\_PucchReceiveReq for slot n+K1 or n+K1aCsi, when applicable (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4331\_replaced([11177668](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuwsPfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is sent, L2-PS shall keep track of the status of all PRBs in each PUCCH symbol in that slot. A PRB can be **free or** allocated. L2-PS shall also keep track of the UE to which the PRBs are **allocated.**\*\*\*\*

If Distributed PUCCH Allocation Algorithm is enabled (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2885\_replaced([11123447](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqjhoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))(FR1 P(S)Cell only), 5G-L2-PS will keep track of the status of all PRBs in each PUCCH symbol in that slot based on the PUCCH allocation by DPA algorithm(refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2884\_replaced([11123433](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqi6nfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2924\_replaced([11123706](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqlW1fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and mark the PRB to be allocated.

For FR1, if PRB blanking function is enabled (MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/actPRBBlanking = TRUE) and long PUCCH not configured, L2-PS shall not use blanked PRBs for PUCCH.

If long PUCCH is configured then L2-PS shall keep track of the status of all PRBs in all 14 symbols in that slot.

[BEFORE CB013152-A-UDP004]

If NRCELL.actLongPucchResourceOpt =TRUE, a single PRB can be allocated to up to 18 fully overlapping PUCCH F1 resources separated by 3 different orthogonal cover code (OCC) values and 6 different cyclic shift (CS) values.

[BEFORE CB013152-A] Else a single PRB can be allocated to up to 6 fully overlapping PUCCH F1 payloads separated by a single OCC (i.e., OCC 0) with 6 different cyclic shift values.

[CB013152-A]

When NRCELL.actLongPucchResourceOpt = FALSE or in FDD cell when NRCELL.actLongPucchResourceOpt = TRUE and in the parameter NRBTS.NRDU.ulTxSwitchingSupportList there is a value equal to "220", then

a single PRB can be allocated with up to 6 fully overlapping PUCCH F1 payloads separated by a single OCC (i.e., OCC 0) with 6 different cyclic shift values.

[END CB013152-A]

[CB013152-A-UPD004]

If NRCELL.actLongPucchResourceOpt =TRUE, a single PRB can be allocated to up to 18 fully overlapping PUCCH F1 resources separated by 3 different orthogonal cover code (OCC) values and 6 different cyclic shift (CS) values.

Else a single PRB can be allocated to up to 6 fully overlapping PUCCH F1 payloads separated by a single OCC (i.e., OCC 0) with 6 different cyclic shift values.

[END CB013152-A-UPD004]

[BEFORE CB013152-A] A PRB occupied by a PUCCH F3 can’t be allocated to another PUCCH.

The rationale is as follows: L2-PS supports two different long PUCCH formats, format 1 (PUCCH Resource Set 0) and format 3 (PUCCH Resource Set 1 and PUCCH Resource Set 2 while PUCCH F3 resource allocated to UE for pCSI which also can multiplex with HARQ-ACK).

A single PUCCH format 1 resource, carrying at most two HARQ A/N bits, occupies between 4 and 14 symbols with a bandwidth of 1 PRB.

[CB013152-A] A PRB occupied by a PUCCH F3 in a subslot can’t be allocated to another PUCCH in the same subslot.[END CB013152-A]

If **NRCELL.actLongPucchResourceOpt is 'TRUE', by means of code division multiplexing (through cyclic shifting) there can be up to 6 PUCCH format 1 resources on the same PRB and symbol footprint per used OCC, when only dedicated PUCCH resources are considered. When dedicated and common PUCCH format 1 resources are multiplexed there can be up to 8 PUCCH format 1 resources on the same PRB and symbol footprint on a single OCC.**

Else by means of code division multiplexing (through cyclic shifting) there can be up to 6 PUCCH format 1 resources on the same PRB and symbol footprint on a single OCC.

In the Nokia Implementation, a single PUCCH format 3 resource, carrying more than two bits (HARQ A/N, CSI, SR), occupies alsways 14 symbols or 8 symbols**or 6 symbols (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11128\_replaced([11187168](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvY-XPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))** and up to a number of PRB from 1 to max 5.\*\*\*\*

Code division multiplexing is not supported for PUCCH format 3, i.e. on PRBs allocated for PUCCH format 3 resource there can’t be another PUCCH.

Long PUCCH resources can be configured at either:

* both edges of the dedicated BWP or
* bottom edge of the dedicated BWP

With this, L2-PS shall be able to determine the status of a PUCCH resources, such that:

* A free **F0 or F2 short PUCCH** resource = a resource where all its PRBs are not allocated **to any UE**\*\*\*\*
* An allocated F0 or F2 short PUCCH **resource = a resource where at least one of its PRBs is allocated.**
* A resource can be allocated to a single UE.
* A free **F1 PUCCH** resource = a resource where its PRB is neither allocated **by** a PUCCH F3 on any of its symbols nor by a PUCCH F1 with same cyclic shift **and same orthogonal cover code.*****\****\*
* A free **F3 PUCCH** resource = a resource where its PRBs are not allocated by another PUCCH F1/F3 on any of its symbols.\*\*\*\*
* An allocated F1 **PUCCH** resource = a resource where its PRB is allocated by a PUCCH F3 on any of its symbols or by a PUCCH F1 with same cyclic shift **and same orthogonal cover code.**\*\*\*\*
* An allocated F3 PUCCH **resource = a resource where at least one of its PRBs is allocated by another PUCCH F1/F3 on any of its symbols.**
* If PRACH multiplexing is enabled (NIDD MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/actPrachMultiplexing = TRUE), in PRACH slots, the PRBs and the symbols, which are overlapped with PRACH signals, cannot be allocated for PUCCH. For short PRACH format, L2-PS shall keep 1 symbol guard for PRBs occupied by PRACH reservation in the adjacent symbol. The guard symbols shall be considered as the PRACH symbol as well (see the detail in 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_870\_replaced([11314083](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TrvrkPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). For long PRACH format, all the symbols in the slot are considered in overlap with PUCCH. The positions of PRACH signal in time/frequency domains depend on NRBTS/NRCELL/prachConfigurationIndex and NRBTS/NRCELL/msg1FrequencyStart, refers to 5G\_UP\_1561\_replaced([11361351](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uc1O0PvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_1565\_replaced([11361430](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uc114PvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

PUCCH resources used for the following purposes shall be taken into consideration and their corresponding PRBs shall be marked as allocated:

- If SR only is scheduled: PUCCH resource used for SR shall be reserved (as defined in the periodic SR configuration).

- If CSI-report (with or without SR) is scheduled: : PUCCH resource used for CSI-report shall be reserved.

---

###### 3.29.5.4.5.0-4 PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback Beam Constraint in PUCCH Symbols (ID: 11177731)

**3.29.5.4.5.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11177736`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
In FR2, single beam can only be scheduled in any given symbol across all configured carriers within the cellgroup due to analog beamforming restriction. Hence, L2-PS shall keep track of the beams used in each PUCCH symbol across all configured carriers in each of the PUCCH slot.

With this, L2-PS shall be able to determine if the free/available PUCCH resource (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4335\_replaced([11177700](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuxTRPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) can be used for the UE, as below:

* A free/available PUCCH resource can be used by a UE only if either the symbol(s) of the corresponding PUCCH resource is free across all the configured carriers or the symbol(s) is used in any of the carriers but in the same beam as that of the UE.

This check shall be applicable only when analog beamforming is enabled (see 5G\_UP\_914\_replaced([11353635](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucBWgfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and NRBTS/NRCELLGRP/actPucchBeamConstraintFR2 = TRUE

---

###### 3.29.5.4.5.0-5 PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback Available PUCCH resource for HARQ feedback (ID: 11177742)

**3.29.5.4.5.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11177746`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
Overall description

---

**3.29.5.4.5.0-5.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11177762`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
When short PUCCH is enabled (NRBTS/NRCELL/pucchModeSelect = shortPucch),

* PUCCH-Resource-set0 (set[0]) contains PUCCH Format 0 resources
* PUCCH-Resource-set1 (set[1]) contains PUCCH Format 2 resources

When long PUCCH is enabled (NRBTS/NRCELL/pucchModeSelect = longPucch),

* PUCCH-Resource-set0 (set[0]) contains PUCCH F1 resources
* PUCCH-Resource-set1 (set[1]) and PUCCH-Resource-set2 (set[2]) contain(s) PUCCH Format 3 resources.

For a UE to be sent to the FD scheduler, L2-PS shall first check if a PUCCH resource for HARQ feedback is available for this UE in target slot (slot n+k1):

* PUCCH resource set selection, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11090\_replaced([11177768](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kux6UfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));
* PUCCH resource selection for FDD + TDD FR1 UL Tx switching UE, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25537\_replaced([11177778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kux6U_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));
* PUCCH allocation in case UE has no PUCCH allocated or configured in target slot, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11091\_replaced([11177791](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kux6VfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));
* PUCCH allocation in case UE has PUCCH allocated but no PUCCH configured in target slot, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11092\_replaced([11177818](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kux6WvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));
* PUCCH allocation with PCSI resource, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11093\_replaced([11177838](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kux6XvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));
* PUCCH allocation with SR resource, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11094\_replaced([11177851](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuyhYvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));
* PUCCH allocation for CA UE, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11095\_replaced([11177861](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuyhZPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));
* PUCCH allocation with already existing PUCCH resources for an UE, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23833\_replaced([11177869](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuyhZvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Notes:

1. “available” means a free PUCCH resource exists within the selected PUCCH resource set in slot n+k1 [PR777253] and satisfies the beam constraint, if applicable (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29065\_replaced([11177731](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuxTSfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), [End PR777253] and number of allocated PUCCH resource in slot n+k1 does not exceed L1 capability according to 5G\_UP\_3230\_replaced([11397508](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uf2tp_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The Long PUCCH related L1 capacity limits concerning the number of PUCCH F1 and F3 resources left for A/N reporting in a specific UL slot (rrmNumOfF1ForHarq, rrmNumOfF3ForHarq) are defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2464\_replaced([11116063](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp0h1vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

2. For FDD, if slot n+k1 is a slot with “reserved SRS” (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2536\_replaced([11117398](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-57vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), PUCCH resources found on SRS symbol are considered as unavailable;

3. In the requirements under UP\_ALG\_4339, 'k1' should be interpreted as:

o k1, if the scheduling is attempted with HARQ-ACK timing n + k1;

o k1aCSi, if the scheduling is attempted with HARQ-ACK timing n + k1aCsi (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4331\_replaced([11177668](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuwsPfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

4. Chosen resources are allocated only if UE is to be forwarded to FD scheduler as in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4327\_replaced([11177617](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuwsNPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

5.    For FDD + TDD FR1 UL Tx switching UE, PUCCH format 1 resource selection shall follow 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25537\_replaced([11177778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kux6U_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**3.29.5.4.5.0-5.0-2**  (ID: `11177768`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
PUCCH resource set selection

---

**3.29.5.4.5.0-5.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11177774`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
L2-PS shall decide in which PUCCH resource set a PUCCH shall be allocated based on total UCI bits including HARQ-AN bit for scheduling in current slot (slot n) as follows:

If( total UCI bits <= 2)

{

PUCCH resource set[0] shall be selected;

}

Else if((total UCI bits ≤ maxPayloadSize of PUCCH resource set[1]) || PUCCH resource set[2] is not configured))

{

PUCCH resource set[1] shall be selected;

}

else

{

PUCCH resource set[2] shall be selected;

}

---

**3.29.5.4.5.0-5.0-3**  (ID: `11177778`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
PUCCH resource selection for FDD + TDD FR1 UL Tx switching UE

---

**3.29.5.4.5.0-5.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `12483330`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
For UL Tx switching UE with FDD as PCell and TDD as UL SCell, UE specific PUCCH resource configuration is described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11128\_replaced([11187168](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvY-XPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and PUCCH resource allocation in PUCCH resource set[0] shall follow the below rules:

1. In transient phase of TDD UL SCell addition (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11907\_replaced([11120306](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqPYnfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or release (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2689\_replaced([11120617](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqSb7vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) as start of SCell release transient state and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2692\_replaced([11120624](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqSb8fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) as stop of SCell release transient state), or SCell change for TDD SCell with UL Tx swithing configured or deconfigured, [CB014465-B] result in the symbol length of the resources in PUCCH resource set[0] or [1] is changed, [End CB014465-B]**only last two PUCCH resources in PUCCH resource set[0] are eligible for HARQ A/N.**

**Rationale: PUCCH resource set[0] is reconfigured while TDD SCell is added or TDD SCell is released, only last two PUCCH resources in PUCCH resource set[0] remain same as before. gNB doesn't know when exactly the UE will apply the new configuration, hence only last two PUCCH resources can be selected for HARQ A/N during the short transient phase to avoid the loss of the HARQ feedback. [CB014465-B] It's possible that PUCCH resource may conflict with TDD SCell P-SRS or TDD SCell PUSCH, then retransmission is accepted. [End CB014465-B]**

2. If TDD UL SCell is activated, only first six PUCCH resources in PUCCH resource set[0] are eligible for HARQ A/N, otherwise, all PUCCH resources in PUCCH resource set[0] are eligible for HARQ A/N.

In case PUCCH resource set[1] is selected (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11090\_replaced([11177768](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kux6UfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), all PUCCH resources in PUCCH resource set[1] are eligible for HARQ A/N.

---

**3.29.5.4.5.0-5.0-4**  (ID: `11177791`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
PUCCH allocation in case UE has no PUCCH allocated or configured in target slot

---

**3.29.5.4.5.0-5.0-4.0-4**  (ID: `11177813`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
If UE has no PUCCH resource allocated in target slot n+k1, then L2PS shall search a free PUCCH resource in selected PUCCH resource set (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11090\_replaced([11177768](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kux6UfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for PUCCH resource set selection). if there are more than 1 free resources in the selected PUCCH resource set, the one with smallest resource index is chosen.

In a bundle window for which HARQ-AN will be reported in a slot with configured pCSI resource, PUCCH resource selection shall follow 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11093\_replaced([11177838](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kux6XvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If the HARQ feedback is intended for any transmission, the common PUCCH resource for HARQ feedback, specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_18087\_replaced([11187133](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvY-UvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), is allocated to UE (if free) until one of the following condition is met:

 The UE dedicated configuration is activated at the call setup procedure or after its activation and the PUCCH resource is used to get the HARQ feedback for the RA-Msg4 and DL-CCCH transmissions (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17972\_replaced([11153597](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksnXKPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

 The UE dedicated configuration is deactivated at the call setup procedure and the PUCCH resource is used to get the HARQ feedback  transmissions (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17972\_replaced([11153597](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksnXKPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

 The UE dedicated configuration is in progress and the 5G-L2-PS has not yet detected the completion of the procedure (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17972\_replaced([11153597](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksnXKPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [CB009915-B-UPD005], whereas the UE had no dedicated configuration before the ongoing procedure. [End CB009915-B-UPD005]

 The UE dedicated configuration is deactivated when the UE is in the initial BWP without dedicated configuration.

---

**3.29.5.4.5.0-5.0-5**  (ID: `11177818`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
PUCCH allocation in case UE has PUCCH allocated but no PUCCH configured in target slot

---

**3.29.5.4.5.0-5.0-5.0-3**  (ID: `11177833`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
If UE has been allocated a PUCCH in target slot (slot n + k1), and total UCI bits to be reported in target slot, including the HARQ-AN bit for scheduling in slot n, is no more than the capacity of allocated PUCCH, then no new resource shall be allocated, the same PUCCH can be used for HARQ feedback of scheduling in slot n.

In a bundle window for which HARQ-AN will be reported in a slot with configured pCSI resource, PUCCH resource selection shall follow 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11093\_replaced([11177838](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kux6XvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[Before CB010596-A]

If total UCI bits are more than capacity of the allocated PUCCH, then L2PS shall select a PUCCH resource set according to total UCI bits and search a free PUCCH in selected PUCCH resource set (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11090\_replaced([11177768](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kux6UfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for PUCCH resource set selection), PRB of the allocated PUCCH can be considered as free during the search. If there are more than 1 free PUCCH resources in the selected PUCCH resource set, the one coinciding with the allocated PUCCH is chosen (if all other PRBs are free), otherwise the one with the smallest resource ID is chosen.

[CB010596-A]

If NRCELL.actLongPucchResourceOpt is 'FALSE', if total UCI bits are more than capacity of the allocated PUCCH, then L2PS shall select a PUCCH resource set according to total UCI bits and search a free PUCCH in selected PUCCH resource set (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11090\_replaced([11177768](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kux6UfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for PUCCH resource set selection).

PRB of the allocated PUCCH, if not shared with other UE, can be considered as free during the search. If there are more than 1 free PUCCH resources in the selected PUCCH resource set, the one coinciding with the allocated PUCCH is chosen (if all other PRBs are free), otherwise the one with the smallest resource ID is chosen.

If NRCELL.actLongPucchResourceOpt is 'TRUE', if total UCI bits are more than capacity of the allocated PUCCH, then L2PS shall select a PUCCH resource set according to total UCI bits and search a free PUCCH in selected PUCCH resource set (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11090\_replaced([11177768](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kux6UfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for PUCCH resource set selection).

PRB of the allocated PUCCH, if not shared with other UE, can be considered as free during the search.

If there are more than 1 free PUCCH resources in the selected PUCCH resource set, the one with the smallest resource ID is ALWAYS chosen.

Rationale:

If NRCELL.actLongPucchResourceOpt is 'TRUE, the HARQ A/N PRB dedicated to Format 1 and Format 3 are shared.

Format 1 and Format 3 resources are competing on the same set of PRB; in any resource Set, U\_Plane shall require always the free resource with the smallest resource ID, to cope with the C\_Plane algorithms correctly and ensure the largest possible segregation of the HARQ resources dedicated to Format 1 and Format 3. Hence, it decreases the potential risk and probability of DL scheduler to block a specific UE requiring Format 3 HARQ feedback resources, (UE may otherwise gets blocked due to missing F3 resource in the UL slot).

[End CB010596-A]

If UE has been allocated a PUCCH from PUCCH resource set[2] in slot n+k1 to report HARQ-AN, no other new resource is to be allocated and the same resource can be used.

Notes:

1. The PUCCH already allocated to current UE shall be considered as “allocated” to other UEs;

2.     “coinciding resources” means resources in the same symbol(s) having at least one PRB in common.

---

**3.29.5.4.5.0-5.0-6**  (ID: `11177838`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
PUCCH allocation with PCSI resource configured in target slot

---

**3.29.5.4.5.0-5.0-6.0-2**  (ID: `11177847`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
If the PUCCH resource configured for PCSI reporting presents in the target slot (slot n+k1) and UE supports CSI-HARQ multiplexing (simultaneousHARQ-ACK-CSI in 5G\_CP\_IF\_RRC\_3816\_replaced([11348112](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wXgBN_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), total UCI bits shall include the PCSI bits, HARQ-AN bits of slots within current bundle window that precede and include slot n, and potential SR bit if UE is configured to report SR in target slot. L2PS shall select a PUCCH resource set based on total UCI bits and search a free PUCCH in the selected PUCCH resource set (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11090\_replaced([11177768](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kux6UfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for PUCCH resource set selection), during the search, PRBs of the configured PUCCH for PCSI reporting shall be considered as free. if there are more than 1 free PUCCH resources in the selected PUCCH resource set, the one with most overlapping PRBs with the configured PCSI resource shall be selected (if all other PRBs are free also), otherwise the one with smallest resource ID shall be chosen.

Notes:

1. both the PCSI resource and the chosen PUCCH resource shall be considered as “allocated” to other UEs.

[PR709188]

2. If long PUCCH is deployed, as there is neither overlapping between the pCSI resources of different UEs that will be reported in the same slot, nor overlapping between pCSI resources and HARQ-AN resources, it is unnecessary to mark UE’s pCSI resource as “allocated” when a different PUCCH is allocated for the PDSCH transmission in the associated bundle window.

[End PR709188]

---

**3.29.5.4.5.0-5.0-7**  (ID: `11177851`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
PUCCH allocation with SR resource configured in target slot

---

**3.29.5.4.5.0-5.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `11177856`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
If the PUCCH resource configured for SR presents in the target slot (slot n + k1), total UCI bits shall include 1 bit for SR and the HARQ-AN bits for slots within current bundle window that precede and include slot n. L2PS shall select a PUCCH resource set based on total UCI bits and search a free PUCCH resource in the selected PUCCH resource set (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11090\_replaced([11177768](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kux6UfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for PUCCH resource set selection). if there are more than 1 free PUCCH resources in the selected PUCCH resource set, the one with smallest resource ID is chosen.

---

**3.29.5.4.5.0-5.0-8**  (ID: `11177861`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
PUCCH allocation for CA UE

---

**3.29.5.4.5.0-5.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `11177865`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
For CA UE, PUCCH resource allocation is done per carrier, i.e., for each carier in which the CA UE should be sent to the FD scheduler, the PUCCH resource needs to be cheked.

If Distributed PUCCH Allocation algorithm is disabled (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2885\_replaced([11123447](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqjhoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), for FDD-FR1 TDD CA UE,

* if no PUCCH resource has been allocated to UE in the target slot, L2-PS shall allocate a free PUCCH F1 resource according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4598\_replaced([11187352](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvaMf_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) over Scell, or allocate a free PUCCH F1 resource over P(S)Celll according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4595\_replaced([11187331](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvaMe_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and select PUCCH-resource-index accordingly.
* if UE has been allocated PUCCH resource in the target slot, L2-PS shall allocate a free PUCCH F3 resource over P(S)Cell according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4595\_replaced([11187331](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvaMe_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and select PUCCH-resource-index accordingly. After allocate the F3 resource from PUCCH-Resource-set1, L2-PS shall keep the original PUCCH F1 resource allocated(Note: to consider the last DCI\_1-1 with F3 is missed at UE side).

If Distributed PUCCH Allocation algorithm (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2885\_replaced([11123447](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqjhoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is enabled, for FR1 CA UE, PUCCH for HARQ-AN are allocated according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2884\_replaced([11123433](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqi6nfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and k1 value shall be determined as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2939\_replaced([11123879](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqmk9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**3.29.5.4.5.0-5.0-9**  (ID: `11177869`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
PUCCH allocation with already existing PUCCH resources for an UE

---

**3.29.5.4.5.0-5.0-9.0-1**  (ID: `11177875`)

PUCCH allocation for HARQ feedback
During TD or FD scheduler phase, when an UE is included in the to-be-scheduled list, after resource reservation:

* If a PUCCH F2 resource is allocated in this step for either 1) a UE having a PUCCH F0 allocation from an earlier scheduled slot or carrier OR 2) a UE having a new PUCCH F2 allocation for HARQ + CSI report, gNB-DU shall still mark the old resource (F0 for HARQ or F2 for CSI only) as allocated (but not to be included in the UlData\_PucchReceiveReq message). Rationale is that UE would still use this resource if DCI for this and later schedulings were missed.
* If a new PUCCH F3 resource is allocated in this step for a UE already having a PUCCH F1 allocation or a (smaller) PUCCH F3 allocation from an earlier scheduled slot or a PUCCH F3 allocation for pCSI only reporting, gNB-DU shall still mark the old resource (F3 for CSI or F1/F3 for HARQ as allocated for other UEs. Rationale is that UE would still use this resource if DCI for this and later schedulings were missed.  The old resource(s) shall not be included in UlData\_PucchReceiveReq. The old resource(s) allocated to a UE, e.g. maxNumPucchF1PerSlot is not counted, when maxNumPucchF3PerSlot is counted for a UE.

---

##### 3.29.5.4.6 TD scheduling algorithm restrictions for RA-Msg2

##### 3.29.5.4.6-1 TD scheduling algorithm restrictions for RA-Msg2

**3.29.5.4.6-1.0-5**  (ID: `12539381`)

TD scheduling algorithm restrictions for RA-Msg2
[CB013505-A] When NRCELL/eirpControl/actEpic is disabled [End CB013505-A] and when the EIRP control is active in the slot, the DL scheduler shall determine for the selected beams by the TD scheduler the number of RBs that can be scheduled for non-GBR traffic, *rrmNumberOfRemainingRbFromEirp(b), from the remaining number of tokens in each segment.*

The DL scheduler shall remove from rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s,n) the estimated number of tokens according to the transmissions occurring in the slot as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4695\_replaced([11192990](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvo18_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), that are :

- SS/PBCH, CSI-RS for tracking and CSI-RS for beam-refinement in the slots without PDSCH

- UE specific CSI-RS transmission in the slot, as indicated by the CSI framework (5G\_UP\_ALG\_3473\_replaced([11159017](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktGfW_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

- a provision for UL PDCCH transmissions according to the PDCCH resources dedicated to the UL scheduler

- previously scheduled PDCCH and PDSCH transmissions as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4292\_replaced([11177281](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuuP-PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

For each beam, rrmNumberOfRemainingRbFromEirp(b) = min(rrmNumberOfRemainingRbFromEirp(b,s)) over all segments with rrmNumberOfEirpTokenPerRb(b,s) > 0, where rrmNumberOfRemainingRbFromEirp(b,s) = rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s) / rrmNumberOfEirpTokenPerRb(b,s)). The segment ID with the lowest rrmNumberOfRemainingRbFromEirp(b,s) is denoted s\_min(b) below.

Note: for SRS based oDFT beams, UE may be served with 3 beams: one best beam a and one best beam pair {b, c}. Only best beam pair {b,c} is considered for EIRP in time domain scheduling for simplification. After FD scheduling, gNB shall update accoding to the actual used beam or beam pair. Note: gNB-DU shall apply the same updates for RAT1 PDSCH grants when NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true and for dynamicswitch RAT1 and RAT0 allocations when NRCELL.actDlDynSwitchAlloc = true.

For UE with valid subband BWVs (5G\_UP\_ALG\_14111\_replaced([11156776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks3OyfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), subband beam shall be used to determine the number of RBs that can be scheduled for non-GBR traffic. rrmNumberOfEirpTokenPerRb(b,s) can be updated at runtime for subband beams. Each UE only have one combined subband beam for EIRP control regardless of rank. After FD scheduling, gNB shall update accoding to the actual used beam.

If rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s) is negative, then rrmNumberOfRemainingRBFromEirp(b) = 0.

If rrmNumberOfEirpTokenPerRb(b,s) = 0, then the number of scheduled RBs for the beam is not limited by the segment EIRP budget.

Note that any traffic with higher priority than drbTraffic may still be scheduled if rrmNumberOfRemainingRbFromEirp is equal to 0.

At the end of the slot, if at least one UE has not been added to the UE-to-be-scheduled list (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4292\_replaced([11177281](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuuP-PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) during TD scheduler or has been excluded from the FD resource giveaways (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4504\_replaced([11179776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku7ESfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) because of *rrmNumberOfRemainingRbFromEirp(b) being too small, the PM counter EIRP\_CONTROL\_SEGMENT\_ shall be pegged. The same PM counter shall only be pegged once per slot but several counters may be pegged in a given slot.* *Note that the EIRP constraint check is ONLY done during the FD resouce reservation and not during TD phase,**except for UEs as mentioned in [11177617](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuwsNPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) when NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = True.* *If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actDlDynSwitchAlloc is set to true and when each**candidate UE is checked for a dynamicswitch allocation, gNB-DU shall re check EIRP constraint  when the check for dynamicswitch RAT0 allocation is done for the candidate UE, that is: after Exhaustive Scheduling(see [*12483324*](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_qeQ48g-XEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ)) if enalbed, otherwise WRR steps for all the PDSCH sub areas and before the start PRB allocation when it is an initial transmission (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25658\_replaced([11181459](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku_Vt_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and at TD scheduler phase when it is retransmission (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25033\_replaced([11176715](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuqlmfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).*\*\*

If UE with valid subband BWVs (5G\_UP\_ALG\_14111\_replaced([11156776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks3OyfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) are excluded from UE-to-be-scheduled list or number of PRB is restricted due to EIRP control or if the UE (as initial transmission) **with valid subband BWVs (5G\_UP\_ALG\_14111\_replaced([11156776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks3OyfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is excluded from the resource distribution in Exhaustive Scheduling(**see [*12483324*](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_qeQ48g-XEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ)) is enabled, otherwise WRR algorithm step during FD scheduler (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23763\_replaced([11180562](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku7rXvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4315\_replaced([11177531](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuwFI_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) due to EIRP control (the number of PRBs exceed *rmNumberOfRemainingRbFromEirp)**,  then gNB-DU shall mark the UE as " WB SRS constraint UE" and start/restart rdWbSrsConstraintTimer (5G\_UP\_ALG\_22551\_replaced([11158649](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktEDE_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for this UE. When the rdWbSrsConstraintTimer expires, gNB-DU shall mark the UE as " Not WB SRS constraint UE".*\*\*

---

###### 3.29.5.4.6.0-1 TD scheduling algorithm restrictions for RA-Msg2 RA-Msg3 Transmission Window Check (ID: 11177883)

**3.29.5.4.6.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `11177906`)

TD scheduling algorithm restrictions for RA-Msg2
Assuming that the RA msg2 should be sent at slot n, if none of the slots: n+k2+deltaMsg3  is an uplink slot, then there are no opportunities for any UE to send the RA msg3. In this case no RA msg2 can be scheduled at slot n.

k2 can take any value present in the column k2 of the pusch-symbolAllocation (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2424\_replaced([11115802](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpyFlPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with a slot type corresponding to a rrmMsg3SlotType, considering:

-  the pusch-symbolAllocation table reported to CP-RT in the  PsCell\_CellSetupResp message, if the table reported to CR-RT was not empty,

* In other case the time domain resource allocation default A table.

deltaMsg3 is equal to :

-2 slots with a msg3 subcarrier spacing of 15KHz.

-3 slots with a msg3 subcarrier spacing of 30KHz.

-4 slots with a msg3 subcarrier spacing of 60KHz.

-6 slots with a msg3 subcarrier spacing of 120KHz.

To avoid to allocate uplink resource already allocated to a PUSCH scheduled by the Uplink scheduler, 5G-DL-PS shall also guarantee that msg3 allocation occurs before an allocation of an other PUSCH on the same uplink slot. it is enforced by checking that k2+deltaMsg3  >= k2\_pusch+margin. With:

 k2\_Pusch

o **[CB013305-C] [Before PR826963-25R3] If NRCELL-actIncUlPdcchCapacity is false, [PR826963-25R3] If single K2 is being used (see [11348263](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubTk3vvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), [End PR826963-25R3]**[End CB013305-C]\*\*\*\*

 k2\_Pusch the K2 provided by the pattern of 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2484\_replaced([11116264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp2XB_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the tested UL slot.

o **[CB013305-C]**

o [Before PR826963-25R3] If NRCELL-actIncUlPdcchCapacity is true, [PR826963-25R3] If multiple K2 is being used (see [11348263](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubTk3vvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), [End PR826963-25R3]

 For the first UL slot after special slot, k2\_pusch = 4.

 For the second UL slot after special slot, k2\_pusch = 3.

 Rationale: RAR window may span 20ms PDCCH slot pattern boudary. For simplification, gNB determine k2\_pusch as multiple K2 mode is being used. Hence, for each UL slot, gNB selects the max k2\_pusch associated with the UL slot.

o **[End CB013305-C]**

 margin equal to:

o If NRCELL.actUlSlotAgg == Disabled then

 2 extra slots: delay to inform the 5G-UL-PS from a Msg2/Msg3 scheduling by 5G-DL-PS

o Else // PUSCH Slot Aggregation is enabled

 5 extra slots: 2 slots delay plus 3 slots for slot aggregation repetitions (max of 3 repetitions)

o Endif

5G-L2-PS shall also select a k2 for msg3, such that the minimum delay between msg2 and msg3 is fullfill. Per 3GPP, the minimum delay is:

-3 slots with a msg3 subcarrier spacing of 15KHz.

-3 slots with a msg3 subcarrier spacing of 30KHz.

-6 slots with a msg3 subcarrier spacing of 60KHz.

-9 slots with a msg3 subcarrier spacing of 120KHz.

If RIM UL mitigation extension was triggered (5G\_UP\_ALG\_27175\_replaced([11163444](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktZaQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gNB-DU shall also select a k2 for msg3 to exclude msg3 initial transmission from the 1st UL slot within a TDD pattern.

---

###### 3.29.5.4.6.0-2 TD scheduling algorithm restrictions for RA-Msg2 Prioritizing UEs for which RACH Msg2 with RAPID of same RA-RNTI in a slot (ID: 11177911)

**3.29.5.4.6.0-2.0-4**  (ID: `13370354`)

TD scheduling algorithm restrictions for RA-Msg2
If NRCELL-actFdmSchedulingInitialBWP is true, gNB-DU TD scheduler shall support to schedule one or more Msg2 on a DL slot, and one Msg2 shall support to contain one or more RARs with the identical (RA-RNTI and beam) **as algorithm hereafter.**

Input:

· msg2RequestList: list of requests for Msg2, each item has properties: RA-RNTI, RAPID, beam, sub-priority as 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4154\_replaced([11174063](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuYRu_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). This list is sorted by sub-priority from high to low. [CB015279-A] This list of requests for Msg2 shall also include the RAR that are created by the Scell and sent to Pcell. Such RAR messages are created during CFRA, which, in turn was initiated by PDCCH order [End CB015279-A]

Algorithm to determine an eligible Msg2 item in CS2:

1. select the first item in msg2RequestList

2. check the PDCCH availability as 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4317\_replaced([11177565](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuwFKfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), excluding the PDCCH reserved for higher priority request and eligible Msg2 entry.

3. pack as many as RARs in one Msg2 with considerations:

a. the max number of PDSCH PRBs available for Msg2, which is derived from the PDSCH sub area which is overlapped with CORESET0 (5G\_UP\_ALG\_24042\_replaced([11175880](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kum7MfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with the max number of available PDSCH PRBs of overlapped part.

b. The number of items in msg2RequestList with the same (RA-RNTI, beam) as the first item selected in 1.

c. TBS, the number of required PDSCH PRB and the number of RARs shall respect as 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4627\_replaced([11192210](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvivXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_16542\_replaced([11179347](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku5PGPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

d. For each candidate RAR, Msg3 availability shall be checked:

i. Candidate Msg3 slot as RACH msg3 Transmission Window Check (5G\_UP\_ALG\_22029\_replaced([11177883](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuyhafvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

ii. The number of Msg3 are not beyond rrmMaxNumUesFdmUl defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10654\_replaced([11199273](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwMPmfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) at Msg3 slot.

iii. The number of Msg3 are not beyond rrmMaxRaMsg3FdmUlInitialBWP defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10663\_replaced([11199313](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwM2ofvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) at Msg3 slot.

iv. Available beam for Msg3 at Msg3 slot. 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10697\_replaced([11199387](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwM2rvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

v. Available PUSCH resources for Msg3 at Msg3 slot. 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4972\_replaced([11199446](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdvPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4973\_replaced([11199451](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwNdvfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4974\_replaced([11199486](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwOEw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

4. If all above availability checks are satisfied, the Msg2 item under consideration is taken as eligible. gNB-DU shall:

a. update msg2RequestList to remove the all items with the same (RA-RNTI) as the first item selected in 1. Msg2 requests that are excluded by this step and not served in step 3 and 4 are not considered in current slot further, and shall be considered in next eligible Msg2 slot in RAR window.

b. allocate PDCCH resource.

c. allocate PDSCH resource on the selected PDSCH sub area.

d. allocate Msg3 resource at Msg3 slot.

5. Repeat this algorithm. Exit if:

a. either msg2RequestList is empty or

b. no available resource for Msg2 or

c. no available resource for Msg3.

Note: For FDD BF The beam check in this requirement also works for FDD BF, so the RAR with the same PR-RNTI but different beam will be postponed to the next msg2 available slot, please delete this note in the next rebase..

Note: Rationale for only one beam is used for Msg2 PDCCH/PDSCH, requiring RARs to use the same beam.

For TDD:

1. UE receives the SSB and determines the beam.

2. This beam is used for Msg1 transmission and Msg2 PDCCH and PDSCH reception.

For FDD:

1/2: gNB tries 4 beams for PRACH/msg1 and determine UE's best beam within #4. This best beam is used for Msg2.

General for TDD/FDD:

3. RAR in Msg2 provides a UL grant used for Msg3 PUSCH transmission.

4. According to 3GPP TS 38.213 (section 10.1) and TS 38.214 (section 5.1), the DM-RS antenna port for PDCCH and PDSCH receptions is quasi-co-located.

5. Msg2 DCI 1\_0 and UL grant in RAR no TCI, the UE uses the same beam for PDCCH and PDSCH receptions.

6. Since the SSB beam is not orthogonal, MU-MIMO cannot be applied for Msg2.

7. Per 38.213 section 10.1, UE does not expect to process information from more than one DCI format with CRC scrambled with an identical RA-RNTI per slot. Hence, gNB shall not send 2 DCIs with the same RA-RNTI in a slot regardless the beam.

---

### 3.29.5.5 Pause or skip in time domain scheduling

#### 3.29.5.5.0-1 Pause or skip in time domain scheduling Pause in scheduling due to HARQ NACK flood (ID: 11177959)

**3.29.5.5.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11177964`)

Pause or skip in time domain scheduling
The DL time domain scheduler shall exclude the carrier of the UE from scheduling for that the DL link adaptation provides the request for pausing in scheduling by means of the parameter rrmPauseUeInDlScheduling (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3068\_replaced([11129535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq8jN_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The carrier of the UE for that the DL link adaptation requests the pause in scheduling shall come back periodically into scheduling set for one initial DL transmission to allow the evaluation of the current radio link quality with the aid of the HARQ feedback. The period the certain carrier of the UE shall be scheduled for one initial DL transmission shall be determined by the R&D parameter rdPeriodDlScheduling (see 5G\_L2\_1175\_replaced([11181849](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27XKE_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). HARQ retransmissions shall be scheduled similarly to UEs with regular air link conditions if the DL scheduler receive an HARQ NACK feedback as response to the periodically scheduled initial DL transmission.

---

### 3.29.5.6 Search space (Type1-PDCCH) availability check

#### 3.29.5.6.0-1 Search space (Type1-PDCCH) availability check (ID: 11177973)

**3.29.5.6.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11177977`)

Search space (Type1-PDCCH) availability check
For the transmission of the RA-Msg2, RA-Msg4 or retransmissions of the RA-Msg4, the L2-PS checks the downlink availability of the Type1-PDCCH for the current slot in the active PDCCH slot pattern:

 If the Type1-PDCCH is not available, the RNTI  (RA-RNTI or TC-RNTI or C-RNTI) associated to the Random Access procedure is not included in the CS2 list.

 If the Type1-PDCCH is available, the RNTI is added in the CS2 list.

With or without DSS, the 5G-L2-PS must not add the RA-RNTI, TC-RNTI and C-RNTI without SRB0 in the CS2 list if the Type1-PDCCH is not allowed in the slot according its configuration parameters (periodicity, slot offset and duration) as defined in the 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4022\_replaced([11168667](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktx0wfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For the downlink scheduling of a TC-RNTI with the MAC Control Element Contention Resolution Identity (CRI) and the RRC setup message or a C-RNTI with the only the RRC setup message, on top of the previous constraint, the slot must corresponde to a LTE MBSFN subframe. If both conditions are not met, the RNTI is not added in the CS2 list.

---

### 3.29.5.7 VoIP Packet Aggregation

#### 3.29.5.7.0-1 VoIP Packet Aggregation DL VoIP Packet Aggregation (ID: 11177988)

**3.29.5.7.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `13400037`)

VoIP Packet Aggregation
The purpose of VoIP packet aggregation is to transmit two packets at one time when the cell is highly loaded to conserve PDCCH resources.  The following is the downlink packet aggregation algorithm.

When (actVoipPacketAggr = True) AND (UE has one [CB014699-D] critical 5QI-1/65/66 and [End CB014699-D]5QI1/65/66 bearer)

Note:All 5QI1 characteristics is equally applied for 5QI65/66 with similar mechanism.

Do:

1) When a VoIP packet arrives in the UE’s downlink **5QI1/65/66 buffer and there is no other data in the 5QI1/65/66 buffer, a packet aggregation (PA) timer of 20ms shall be started.**

2) Until a second packet arrives or until the PA timer expires the 5QI1/65/66 data shall be classified as deprioritizedVoip which has lower priority than non-GBR data. This will ensure that the VoIP data will not be scheduled if there is data pending for other UEs allowing for packet aggregation to occur.

2a) If (NRCELL.actDlVoNRLimMaxMcsAndLayer is set to TRUE) AND (actDlForceRankDowng is set to disabled), deprioritizedVoip traffic shall be added to a DL transmission only if the DL transmission satisfies the MCS/Rank condition as specified in (refer to requirement 11129078).

3) If 5QI 1/65/66 data is scheduled when the priority is deprioritizedVoip and the 5QI1/65/66 buffer becomes empty stop the PA timer and return to step 1.

4) If a second VoIP packet arrives in the UE’s **5QI1/65/66 buffer or if the PA timer expires the priority of the VoIP data shall be increased to voipTraffic/[CB014699-D] criticalVoipTraffic [End CB014699-D] priority and the PA timer shall be stopped, if it had not yet expired. The priority shall remain as voipTraffic/[CB014699-D] criticalVoipTraffic [End CB014699-D] until the DL 5QI1/65/66 buffer is empty. When the buffer is empty return to step 1.**

End Do

Note that, the above algorithm is independent of the UE’s DRX configuration.  If DRX is configured, when the UE is in the DRX active state the priority of the VoIP data will be as defined in this requirement.

---

## 3.29.6 DL PDCCH Scheduling

### 3.29.6.1 Basic requirements

#### 3.29.6.1.1 Multiplicity

##### 3.29.6.1.1.0-1 Multiplicity There is one PDCCH scheduler per subcell for DL DCI handling. (ID: 11178018)

#### 3.29.6.1.2 Grant validity

##### 3.29.6.1.2.0-2 Grant validity The assignment of scheduling grants (via DCI) shall be valid for the subcell only in which the PDCCH is transmitted. (ID: 11178032)

### 3.29.6.2 Creating and Sending DL DCI

#### 3.29.6.2.1 3GPP NR DCI format

##### 3.29.6.2.1.0-1 3GPP NR DCI format DCI Format 1_0 (ID: 11178050)

**3.29.6.2.1.0-1.0-7**  (ID: `13343115`)

3GPP NR DCI format
DCI Format 1\_0 is [Before CB015279-A] only [CB015279-A] applicable for [CB015279-A] the following [End CB015279-A] grant issued in a common search space:

* For RA-Msg2, the DCI format 1\_0 with CRC scrambled by RA-RNTI
* For RA-Msg4 handling the CRI MAC CE with or witout DL-CCCH or DL-DCCH), the DCI format 1\_0 with CRC scrambled by TC-RNTI.
* For DL-CCCH (SRB0) message, the DCI format 1\_0 with CRC scrambled by C-RNTI.
* For DL-DCCH (SRB1) messages, the DCI format 1\_0 with CRC scrambled by C-RNTI when the UE dedicated configuration is disabled (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17972\_replaced([11153597](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksnXKPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) including the UE in the initial BWP without dedicated configuration.
* For paging, the DCI format 1\_0 with CRC scrambled by P-RNTI.
* For PDSCH during transient phase which is corresponding to the period between receiving PsUser\_UserModifyReq and receiving PsUser\_UserReconfCompletedReq without indication form C-Plane to apply the new setting after the RRC message delivery at the MAC layer (5G\_UP\_ALG\_17972\_replaced([11153597](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksnXKPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the DCI format 1\_0 with CRC scrambled by C-RNTI (see also 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8181\_replaced([11153814](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksolSvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). **For UE configured with FR1 CA, if the DCI1-1 size will not change during the transient period, e.g., during the transient period triggered by SR resource reconfiguration or activation of new setting after the RRC message deliivery to th eUE from the MAC layer point ofo view, DCI1-1 shall still be used for DL scheduling indication during the transient period.**
* DCI format 1\_0 for Beam failure recovery: DCI Format 1\_0 DL data granted on the common search space of the UE dedicated Bandwidth Part with CRC scrambled by C-RNTI;

For PDSCH granted use **DCI Format 1\_0 on the common search space of  UE dedicated Bandwidth Part with CRC scrambled by C-RNTI that introduced with and FGCR-3574, the PUCCH resource of DL HARQ is determined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_18087\_replaced([11187133](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvY-UvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (the same  PUCCH resource allocation approach shall be applied for  DCI 1-0 as DCI 1-1, as UE has PUCCH resource in dedicate BWP, not like during MSG4 case that only PUCCH common is used)**

[CB015279-A]

DCI Format 1\_0 is also used to issue PDCCH order in UE-specific search space. For a cell having a different TAG than the Pcell, DCI 1\_0 is sent by the SCell to provide the CFRA preamble that the UE should use. For the purpose of PDCCH order, refer to  [13341712](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_xe7jgNykEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). Since there is no PDSCH granted by the PDCCH order, the priority of the PDCCH order shall be defined as follows:

* The priority of PDCCH order is defined in  [13445827: Request Class pdcchOrder](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_unGZoCd1EfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)

The USS in which PDCCH order shall be monitored shall be different from the USS in which DCI 1\_1 and DCI 0\_1 shall be monitored. The USS for PDCCH order shall be monitored by the UE only in its SCell.

[End CB015279-A]

DCI format 1\_0 element definition refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_14181\_replaced([11171487](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuEvt_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 3.29.6.2.1.0-2 3GPP NR DCI format DCI Format 1_1 (ID: 11178081)

**3.29.6.2.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11178087`)

3GPP NR DCI format
Definition

---

**3.29.6.2.1.0-2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11178090`)

3GPP NR DCI format
DCI Format 1\_1 is only applicable when UE is granted in UE Specific Search Space.

With NSA mode, it corresponds to any grant issued by the downlink scheduler outside msg2.

DCI format 1\_1 element definition refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_14011\_replaced([11171535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuEvwfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**3.29.6.2.1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11178096`)

3GPP NR DCI format
Usage

---

**3.29.6.2.1.0-2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11178101`)

3GPP NR DCI format
When the UE is scheduled to receive PDSCH by a DCI using the dedicated TDRA list, the Time-domain resource assignment field of the DCI provides the row index of the RRC configured table.

The bitwidth of the field Time domain resource assignment  in DCI format 1\_1 is determined as the CEIL(LOG2(I )) bits, where I  is the number of entries in the higher layer parameter pdsch-TimeDomainAllocationList.

The definition pdsch-TimeDomainAllocationList in UE dedicated configuration is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6666\_replaced([11115524](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvCR_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 3.29.6.2.1.0-3 3GPP NR DCI format DCI fields setting (ID: 11178107)

**3.29.6.2.1.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11178110`)

3GPP NR DCI format
Setting of parameter PDSCH to HARQ feedback Timing

---

**3.29.6.2.1.0-3.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `13476800`)

3GPP NR DCI format
13476800:
3GPP NR DCI format
The parameter "PDSCH to HARQ feedback Timing" **in the DL DCI indicates the transmission timing of UCI report within PUCCH to the UE. If the DL DCI is sent at NR-Slot n, the corresponding UCI transmission shall happen at NR-slot n + k1.**

k1 being equal to dlDataToUlAck[PDSCH to HARQ feedback Timing]. The dlDataToUlAck is determined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2473\_replaced([11116092](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp0h3vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and reported to C-Plane in cell configuration response message.

If UE does not use Distributed PUCCH Allocation Algorithm, For **FR1 CA UEs over Scell scheduling, L2-PS will decide the k1 for current DL slots and dlDataToUlAck[PDSCH to HARQ feedback Timing] according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2680\_replaced([11120547](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqR02fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

Note: To determine, which UE uses Distributed PUCCH Allocation Algorithm, please refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2885\_replaced([11123447](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqjhoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

5G-L2-PS shall derive the k1 value from PDSCH configuration of the current slot ( 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2473\_replaced([11116092](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp0h3vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Then 5G-L2-PS shall set the "PDSCH to HARQ feedback Timing" in DCI such that dlDataToUlAck[PDSCH to HARQ feedback Timing] is equal to the computed k1.

For DCI format 1\_0, as per 38.213 9.2.3, the decided K1 from 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2473\_replaced([11116092](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp0h3vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is mapped to a fixed set dlDataToUlAck\_format1\_0 = [1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8] **[Before CB013712-B] except in FR2 SA for DCI scheduled for MSG4 transmissions.**[End CB013712-B]\*\*\*\*

**[Before CB013712-B] In FR2 SA for DCI format 1\_0 scheduled MSG4 transmission the smallest value greater than or equal to k1minMsg4 (5G\_UP\_ALG\_23347\_replaced([11116136](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp1I6vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall be selected independently of the configured k1 value for any other transmissions.**[End CB013712-B]\*\*\*\*

5G-L2-PS shall set the “PDSCH to HARQ feedback Timing” in DCI such that dlDataToUlAck\_format1\_0[PDSCH to HARQ feedback Timing] is equal to the computed K1.  dlDataToUlAck\_format1\_0 is hardcoded in 5G-L2-PS.

Note, the figure below shows an example for the case of continuous DL data slot interrupted by a SS Burst slot and continuous DL transmission:

[image-0][image\_desc]The image displays a diagram with numbered boxes from 17 to 32 arranged horizontally. Below these boxes, there are curved arrows in blue and red, originating from some of the boxes and pointing towards others. The arrows create a visual representation of connections or flows between the numbered elements. Additionally, there are three text labels positioned below the arrows: "K1=4" on the left, "K1=5" in the center, and "K1=4" on the right. The box labeled "25" is highlighted in yellow.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_13506.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

---

**3.29.6.2.1.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11178134`)

3GPP NR DCI format
Setting of parameter Time Domain Resource Assignment in DL DCI Format 1\_1

---

**3.29.6.2.1.0-3.0-2.0-11**  (ID: `12828699`)

3GPP NR DCI format
To fulfill the Time Domain Resource Assignement field in the DCI with the right index of TDRA for an initial transmission, the 5G-L2-PS must select the valid start symbol and the number of symbols in order to meet all the following conditions:

1) If NRBTS/NRCELL/actPdcchSharingWithPdsch is set to False, **not overlap the PDCCH symbols in the slot and any CSI-RS in the slot, if present. If NRBTS/NRCELL/actPdcchSharingWithPdsch is set to True, the TDRA shall not overlap any CSI-RS in the slot, however, the TDRA can overlap the PDCCH symbols based on the conditions given in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25284\_replaced([11183082](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvH4lvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

2) in the frequency domain and time domain resource grid to be allocated to UE, not overlap the TRS and PDSCH additional DMRS symbol(s), if both kinds of signals present. Refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9301\_replaced([11115621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpwQY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for overlapping determination and avoiding.

3) not overlap the symbols impacted by TAS-SRS for SB BF from TDD PCell in critical band combination for FR1 CA UE in FDD SCell. (txSwitchImpactToRx=true, refer to 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_11305\_replaced([11307687](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tq-2kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

4) to not overlap with muted symbols in the RIM partially mitigated slots, for which 4 or 8 latter PDSCH symbols are mitigated where RIM DL muting shall be applied (i.e.: [11161119: Determine RIM DL muting applicability](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktSFjPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) conditions are fulfilled).

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true or slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed = TRUE (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_7785\_replaced([11278788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNePvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), and rdAllowZeroAllocBypass (5G\_UP\_ALG\_15040\_replaced([11215279](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxSbxvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is true, L2-PS shall check in every pooling period if the cell has been provided ZAB privilege by the BBRM (5G\_UP\_ALG\_14549\_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

**[CB014543-H,**CB014543-G]\*\*\*\*Note: When partial ZAB is enabled (partialZABAllowed = True), the BBRM determines the set of ZAB-privileged cells according to the specification in ([12804289](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ui5xYp6QEfCkxIKMlo4L6w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). This privilege assignment may subsequently be overridden by the algorithm detailed in ([12825840](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Onwec61_EfCyQasEtWkQ4A?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

**[End CB014543-H,****CB014543-G]**

. If the cell has ZAB privilege in the current pooling period, L2-PS shall also consider the following symbols in DL slots for PDSCH transmissions and select the appropriate TDRA based on the number of symbols available :

* Symbols that are allocated to Cell specific CSI-RS for channel acquisition / CSI-RS for TRS of other CsiRsPoolingGroups.
* Symbols that are marked as available for UE specific CSI-RS for Channel Acquisition in the cell.

A list of such resources is generated at cell setup as described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2511\_replaced([11116693](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp6BcvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for TDD & 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19557\_replaced([11115143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for FDD.

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and the cell has not been provided ZAB privilege by the BBRM (5G\_UP\_ALG\_14549\_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),  **[CB014543-H,**CB014543-G] [Note: w***\*hen partial ZAB is enabled (partialZABAllowed = True), the BBRM determines the set of ZAB-privileged cells according to the specification in ([12804289](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ui5xYp6QEfCkxIKMlo4L6w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). This privilege assignment may subsequently be overridden by the algorithm detailed in ([12825840](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Onwec61_EfCyQasEtWkQ4A?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))],*\*[End CB014543-H,****CB014543-G]**any PDSCH transmission in SIB1 candidate slots (determined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3706\_replaced([11164184](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kteSwvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall not use the last DL symbol of the slot.

Note: In case of DL TDD PRB pooling, the last symbol of a SIB1 slot can be used by other cells of the L1 pool, having different SSB number, for UE-specific CSI-RS. As such it must be considered as a “wideband symbol” in which some cells can only do UE-specific CSI-RS. PDSCH in this symbol is possible only if the cell has been provided ZAB privilege by the BBRM (5G\_UP\_ALG\_14549\_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). **[CB014543-H,**CB014543-G]***\*Note: When partial ZAB is enabled (partialZABAllowed = True), the BBRM determines the set of ZAB-privileged cells according to the specification in ([12804289](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ui5xYp6QEfCkxIKMlo4L6w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). This privilege assignment may subsequently be overridden by the algorithm detailed in ([12825840](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Onwec61_EfCyQasEtWkQ4A?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).* \*[End CB014543-H,****CB014543-G]**

If slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed = TRUE (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_7785\_replaced([11278788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNePvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and the cell has not been provided ZAB privilege by the BBRM (5G\_UP\_ALG\_14549\_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), **[CB014543-H,**CB014543-G] [Note: w***\*hen partial ZAB is enabled (partialZABAllowed = True), the BBRM determines the set of ZAB-privileged cells according to the specification in ([12804289](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ui5xYp6QEfCkxIKMlo4L6w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). This privilege assignment may subsequently be overridden by the algorithm detailed in ([12825840](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Onwec61_EfCyQasEtWkQ4A?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))],*\*[End CB014543-H,****CB014543-G]**

* If a SIB1 candidate slot (determined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3706\_replaced([11164184](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kteSwvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) coincides with any of the slot offsets with Zero Allocation (determined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19557\_replaced([11115143](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), any PDSCH in such slot shall not use the DL symbols for Zero allocation in the slot.

End If

**[Before CB013525-D] If NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode** = 1(mute\_slot\_3\_6\_8)\*\*\*\*

* The last symbol in slot offsets 3 & 6 of every even SFN and slot offset 8 of every odd SFN shall not be used for any PDSCH transmission irrespective of the cell's ZAB privilege. An appropriate TDRA shall be selected in such slots based on the number of available symbols which does not include the last symbol.

Else If NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode **= 2 (mute\_slot\_0\_3\_6\_8)**

* The last symbol in slot offsets 0, 3 & 6 of every even SFN and slot offset 8 of every odd SFN shall not be used for any PDSCH transmission irrespective of the cell's ZAB privilege. An appropriate TDRA shall be selected in such slots based on the number of available symbols which does not include the last symbol.

End If

[CB013525-D]  If NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode is not 0 (0:disabled or not configured), symbols in slots defined in [11115176: Determine slots allocated to CSI-RS for Channel Measurements Slots in other CsiRsPoolingGroups](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpr-8vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) shall not be used for any PDSCH transmission irrespective of the cell's ZAB privilege. An appropriate TDRA shall be selected in such slots based on the number of available symbols which does not include the restricted symbols.

[End CB013525-D]

When several TDRA could fit the number of available and contiguous DL OFDM symbols not used by the PDCCH and if present in the slot by the CSI-RS, the 5G-L2-PS selects the TDRA index with the largest number of symbols which includes the position of the DM-RS Type A position.

The list of allowed TDRA is defined in the requirement 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2396\_replaced([11115520](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvCRvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

When DSS is activated and NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=false , if the initial transmission is done is a slot does not correspond to the MBSFN slot on the LTE side, the specific TDRA (start symbol 3, length 9) available in the PDSCH dedicated TDRA list (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2396\_replaced([11115520](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvCRvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Otherwise, the slot corresponds to the MBSFN subframe on LTE side and the regular algorithm described above is used.

If the adaptive re-transmission scheme is deactivated (/NRBTS/NRCELL/actAdaptiveReTxResMcs is set to FALSE) or the conditions defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11943\_replaced([11184268](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRCjfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are not fulfilled, the TDRA index of a HARQ retransmission is the same as for the initial transmission. If the adaptive re-transmission scheme is activated (NRBTS/NRCELL/actAdaptiveReTxResMcs is set to TRUE) and the conditions defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11943\_replaced([11184268](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRCjfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are fulfilled, the TDRA index shall be calculated as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2396\_replaced([11115520](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvCRvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**3.29.6.2.1.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `11178188`)

3GPP NR DCI format
Setting of parameter Time Domain Resource Assignment in DL DCI Format 1\_0 with a C-RNTI

---

**3.29.6.2.1.0-3.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `12679193`)

3GPP NR DCI format
When the DCI Format 1\_0 is used in a common search space associated to the CORESET(0) and for a C-RNTI, the 5G-L2-PS selects the TDRA index in the set of TDRA available in the requirement 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2391\_replaced([11115362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for an initial transmission.

When the DCI Format 1\_0 is used in a common search space associated to the CORESET(>0) and for a C-RNTI, the 5G-L2-PS selects the TDRA index in the set of TDRA available in the requirement 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2396\_replaced([11115520](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvCRvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for an initial transmission.

The 5G-L2-PS must select the valid start symbol and the number of symbols in order to not overlap the PDCCH symbols in the slot and any CSI-RS in the slot, if present.

When several TDRA could fit the number of available and contiguous DL OFDM symbols not used by the PDCCH and if present in the slot by the CSI-RS, the 5G-L2-PS selects the TDRA index with the largest number of symbols which includes the position of the DM-RS Type A position.

When DSS is activated [CB007372-AA] and NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=false [End CB007372-AA], if the initial transmission is done is a slot does not correspond to the MBSFN slot on the LTE side, the specific TDRA (start symbol 3, length 9) available in the PDSCH common TDRA list (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2391\_replaced([11115362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Otherwise, the slot corresponds to the MBSFN subframe on LTE side and the regular algorithm described above is used.  
[CB007372-AA] Note: for NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=true the DCI Format 1\_0 is in NR dedicated area ([12620260: Resource sharing in asymmetric DSS](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NsAEcDfZEfCYiuaHdt7wgQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) [End CB007372-AA]

For a HARQ retransmisison, the TDRA index is the same as for the initial transmission.

---

3GPP NR DCI format
Setting of parameter Time Domain Resource Assignment in DL DCI Format 1\_0 with a TC-RNTI

---

**3.29.6.2.1.0-3.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `12679187`)

3GPP NR DCI format
When the DCI Format 1\_0 is used in a common search space associated to the CORESET(0) and for a TC-RNTI, the 5G-L2-PS selects the TDRA index in the list the set of TDRA available in the requirement 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2391\_replaced([11115362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for an initial transmission.

The 5G-L2-PS must select the valid start symbol and the number of symbols in order to not overlap the PDCCH symbols in the slot and any CSI-RS in the slot, if present.

When several TDRA could fit the number of available and contiguous DL OFDM symbols not used by the PDCCH and if present in the slot by the CSI-RS, the 5G-L2-PS selects the TDRA index with the largest number of symbols which includes the position of the DM-RS Type A position.

When DSS is activated [CB007372-AA] and NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=false [End CB007372-AA], if the initial transmission is done is a slot does not correspond to the MBSFN slot on the LTE side, the specific TDRA (start symbol 3, length 9) available in the PDSCH common TDRA list (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2391\_replaced([11115362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Otherwise, the slot corresponds to the MBSFN subframe on LTE side and the regular algorithm described above is used.

[CB007372-AA] Note: for NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=true the DCI Format 1\_0 is in NR dedicated area ([12620260: Resource sharing in asymmetric DSS](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NsAEcDfZEfCYiuaHdt7wgQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) [End CB007372-AA]

For a HARQ retransmisison, the TDRA index is the same as for the initial transmission.

3GPP NR DCI format
Setting of parameter Time Domain Resource Assignment in DL DCI address to RA-RNTI

**3.29.6.2.1.0-3.0-5.0-2**  (ID: `12679190`)

3GPP NR DCI format
When the DCI Format 1\_0 is used in a common search space associated to the CORESET(0) and for the RA-RNTI, the 5G-L2-PS selects the TDRA index in the list the set of TDRA available in the requirement 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2391\_replaced([11115362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The 5G-L2-PS must select the valid start symbol and the number of symbols in order to not overlap the PDCCH symbols in the slot and any CSI-RS in the slot, if present.

When several TDRA could fit the number of available and contiguous DL OFDM symbols not used by the PDCCH and if present in the slot by the CSI-RS, the 5G-L2-PS selects the TDRA index with the largest number of symbols which includes the position of the DM-RS Type A position.

When DSS is activated [CB007372-AA] and NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=false [End CB007372-AA], if the transmission is done is a slot does not correspond to the MBSFN slot on the LTE side, the specific TDRA (start symbol 3, length 9) available in the PDSCH common TDRA list (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2391\_replaced([11115362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Otherwise, the slot corresponds to the MBSFN subframe on LTE side and the regular algorithm described above is used.  
[CB007372-AA] Note: for NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=true the DCI Format 1\_0 is in NR dedicated area ([12620260: Resource sharing in asymmetric DSS](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NsAEcDfZEfCYiuaHdt7wgQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) [End CB007372-AA]

**3.29.6.2.1.0-3.0-6**  (ID: `11178224`)

3GPP NR DCI format
Setting of parameter Time Domain Resource Assignment in DL DCI address to P-RNTI

---

**3.29.6.2.1.0-3.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11178230`)

3GPP NR DCI format
The Time Domain Resource assignment field in the DL DCI is set to pdsch-symbolAllocation index defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2391\_replaced([11115362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), considering

* the pdschTimeDomainAllocationList if it was reported to CP-RT in the PsCell\_CellSetupResp message
* the default A table in other case [Table 5.1.2.1.1-2 of 38.214].

pdsch-symbolAllocation index is determined using

- K0 set to 0 and

- SLIV derived from the PDSCH slot format of current slot as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2373\_replaced([11115215](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpr--_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**3.29.6.2.1.0-3.0-7**  (ID: `11178235`)

3GPP NR DCI format
