**3.29.7.2.0-14.0-4**  (ID: `11183066`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
Resource continuity during FD resource allocation for FDM (random)

---

**3.29.7.2.0-14.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `11183077`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
Following rules are applied, regarding the contiguity in RBG allocation during the FD resource allocation (random) specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4510\_replaced([11181328](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku-Hn_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)):

* The resources allocated to UEs are contiguous except when:
* If numOfUesFdmInitialBWP is 1 or more (excluding UEs with Paging for SI change notification or CMAS Notification), and UE getting Y resources, has X FD resources contained/colliding in/with the initial BWP:
* In this case, [CB008927-A]If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = false,[End CB008927-A] the UE is allocated Y-X resources before the initial BWP and X resources after the initial BWP [CB008927-A] else the UE is allocated resources based on the available resources in one of the PDSCH sub-areas it is assigned to for contiguous allocation. See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23683\_replaced([11176637](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuqllPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [End CB008927-A]
* If DL MU-MIMO is enabled, X PRBs in initial BWP shall not be allocated for PDSCH of DL paired users.
* If NRCELL/actDlMuMimoEnh = True and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_14422\_replaced([11181129](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku85ePvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 'Skip MU-MIMO Enhanced' is set to false , one MU UE could be assinged to multiple virtual UEs [Before CB008927-P]which have non-contiguous RBG allocation between these virtual UEs.[CB008927-P] If NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = False, non-contiguous allocation of RBGs is possible for these UEs across the vUEs, otherwise gNB-DU must ensure the contiguous PRB allocation to these UEs across the vUEs [End CB008927-P]

-[CB008927-A] If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = false, [End CB008927-A] if the current UE is assigned to the same subcell as the UE(s) using initial BWP, this is not possible to do (hardware restriction). Therefore, any UE which has no FD resources allocated yet and assigned to another subcell will take the place of the current UE in the allocation order of UEs. If no such replacement UE from another subcell exists, then:

* if retransmission UE: remove it from the to-be-scheduled list
* if initial transmission UE: allocate Y-X resources before the initial BWP only. The first FD resource for the next UE is then the one after the last FD resource used by the initial BWP.
* In FDD or TDD FR1 cells, SSB slot without TRS, [CB008927-A] If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = false,[End CB008927-A] UE is allocated Y-X resources before SSB and X resources after the SSB, both X and Y are RBGs with full PRBs available [CB008927-A] else the UE is allocated resources in terms of PRBs based on the available resources in one of the PDSCH sub-areas it is assigned to for contiguous allocation. See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23683\_replaced([11176637](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuqllPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).[End CB008927-A] and Y is  is not greater than numPdschPrbInSsbSlots.
* In FDD or TDD FR1 cells, SSB slot with TRS,  [CB008927-A] If the NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = false,[End CB008927-A] UE is allocated Y-X resources before SSB and X resources after the SSB. both X and Y are RBGs with full PRBs available [CB008927-A] else the UE is allocated resources in terms of PRBs based on the available resources in one of the PDSCH sub-areas it is assigned to for contiguous allocation. See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23683\_replaced([11176637](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuqllPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).[End CB008927-A] and Y is  is not greater than min(numPdschPrbInSsbSlots, numPdschPrbInTrsSlots).
* For a FDD cell shared with LTE when Cat-M support is enabled (actLteNrDssLteCat), In addition to the conditions listed above, the allocated PRBs might be intercepted withCat-M NBs resources (for paging, SIB1-BR, MPBCH, and data) in the specific slot.
* If NRCELL/actDlRbgRandomization = enhanced.  In this case RBGs allocated to a UE in the dedicated BWP will be randomly distributed.

---

**3.29.7.2.0-14.0-5**  (ID: `11183082`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
PDCCH symbol(s) shared with PDSCH

---

**3.29.7.2.0-14.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11183087`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
PDCCH symbol(s) sharing Algorithm

---

**3.29.7.2.0-14.0-5.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `12731381`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
For TDD FR1, if /NRBTS/NRCELL/actPdcchSharingWithPdsch is set to TRUE AND there is only one UE scheduled in PDSCH, gNB-DU shall use the following algorithm to check if the PDSCH OFDM symbol allocation for the UE in the slot can be extended to include PDCCH symbol(s).

o If ((UE’s DL DCI is inside the PDSCH PRBs) AND (PDSCH PRBs not occupied in PDCCH symbol(s) > 0)) OR (No DCI in PDCCH symbol within PDSCH allocated PRBs)

§ If number of PDCCH symbols == 1 OR the last PDCCH symbol(s) is for DL

· Recalculate TBS and MCS with PDCCH symbol(s) included in PDSCH allocation

· If TBS\_WithPdcchSymbol >= TBS\_WithoutPdcchSymbol AND no PDCCH power boosting for the DL DCI as 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29346\_replaced([11171327](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuC6lPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))/5G\_UP\_ALG\_29348\_replaced([11171360](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuDhmPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

o Extend the PDSCH allocation to include the PDCCH symbol(s). The extended PDSCH allocation shall either have no DCI occupied PRBs in the PDCCH symbol, or the DL DCI (which is scheduling the PDSCH) for the UE.

· Else

o PDCCH symbol(s) sharing with PDSCH is not possible

§ Else  // 2 or more PDCCH symbols in the slot & last symbol is not DL

· The PDCCH symbol(s) cannot be shared with PDSCH.

o Else

§ The PDCCH symbol(s) cannot be shared with PDSCH.

According to the rdPdcchSharingWithPdschSupportedUE (refer to 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_14803\_replaced([11329775](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TtFIYfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) , the sharing of PDCCH symbol(s) with PDSCH shall only be allowed on the UEs with the specific capabilities. (plesae see 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_14801\_replaced([11308254](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TrDICvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))The sharing of PDCCH symbol(s) with PDSCH shall only be applicable to the UE in all dedicated BWPs.

The sharing of PDCCH symbol(s) with PDSCH shall only be applicable to PDSCH scheduled with DCI 1\_1.

gNB-DU shall not apply the algorithm if the DCI 1\_1 is in the interleaved coreset.

In TDD FR1, if R&D parameter rdUseDAfterUForPdcchSharingTdd (5G\_UP\_ALG\_25389\_replaced([11193858](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvwKufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to 0, gNB-DU shall not share the first PDCCH symbol in the first D slot after a U slot.

gNB-DU shall not apply the PDCCH symbol(s) sharing with PDSCH for UE working in high reliablity link adaptation.

If NRCELL.actConfDlInterferenceGen is set to “2” or “3”, gNB-DU shall not share PDCCH symbol(s) with PDSCH if a fake UE is also being scheduled in the slot.

If NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = True, and NRCELL.actDynSwitchAlloc = True, and UE is dynamic switch capable, then the first preference to allocate the PDSCH resources is given to dynamic switch RAT0 and if a UE is not dynamic switch capable then RAT1 PRB allocations are done, rate-matched around PDCCH in the PDSCH sub-area which has both PDCCH and PDSCH allocations.

Rationale: Due to PDSCH fragmentation because of SSB, Common channels etc RAT1 PDSCH allocations are restricted to single PDSCH sub-areas, which would reduce the peak throughput compared with dynamic switch RAT0 allocations.

Rationale: see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29318\_replaced([11171287](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuC6hfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for rationale of PDCCH Power boosting AND shared PDCCH and PDSCH allocations condition.

**[CB012623-B]gNB-DU shall not apply the PDCCH symbol(s) sharing with PDSCH if interference mitigation(refer to [12707684](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Vz03IGLOEfC3KtQ77je1xA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) is applied in this slot.**[End CB012623-B]\*\*\*\*

---

**3.29.7.2.0-14.0-5.0-2**  (ID: `11183112`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
PDCCH symbol(s) sharing with PDSCH for retransmission UEs

---

**3.29.7.2.0-14.0-5.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `12731384`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
If the initial transmission for a UE is either DTX or the number of NACKs == rdAdaptiveReTxNackCount (5G\_UP\_ALG\_12915\_replaced([11193480](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvtHZ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the adaptive retransmission, as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11943\_replaced([11184268](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRCjfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), schedules the retransmission with legacy retransmission using the MCS, PRBs and OFDM symbols from initial transmission. If /NRBTS/NRCELL/actPdcchSharingWithPdsch is set to True and for such a retransmission, if the initial transmission was scheduled with PDCCH symbol(s) shared with PDSCH, the UE is not dropped from CS2 list (as given in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15568\_replaced([11175747](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kultEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

For such a UE, gNB-DU shall use the following method to schedule the retransmission.

 If same number of OFDM symbols available in the slot as initial transmission?

o Schedule the retransmission with initial transmission MCS, PRBs and symbols.

 Else

o If in the next n slots, [Before PR819701] a similar PDCCH slot pattern  will be available as of initial transmission?[PR819701] there are slots with a CORESET pattern that is included in the CORESET pattern originally present in the DL initial transmission slot [End PR819701]

 Postpone the retransmission.

 Increment retxPostponeCounter.

 If   retxPostponeCounter == 5  //the retransmission is being blocked for too long

Drop the retransmission and free the HARQ process.

o Else // no possibility to find the same resources as initial transmission & adaptive retransmission would be meaningless

 Drop the retransmission and free the HARQ process.

The decision to choose the optimal value of ‘n’ used in above condition is left to the EFS.

**[CB012623-B]gNB-DU shall not apply the PDCCH symbol(s) sharing with PDSCH if interference mitigation(refer to [12707684](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Vz03IGLOEfC3KtQ77je1xA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) is applied in this slot.**[End CB012623-B]\*\*\*\*

---

**3.29.7.2.0-14.0-6**  (ID: `11183121`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
Artificial Load allocation after FD resource allocation

---

**3.29.7.2.0-14.0-6.0-4**  (ID: `12583410`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
At the end of the allocation process, an artificial load UE is scheduled and allocated with resources according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4497\_replaced([11183858](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvN_MfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17661\_replaced([11183983](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvOmS_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) if the following is satisfied:

* Artificial load needs to be generated  (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_27154\_replaced([11183777](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvNYIPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) & 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17863\_replaced([11183915](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvN_PvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* Not all FD resources are used by real UEs

If artificial load for EMF is enabled (5G\_UP\_ALG\_17863\_replaced([11183915](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvN_PvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and *rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl  > 1,*

The fake UE is already reserved and shall be scheduled as long as above conditions meet,

else

The fake UE shall be only scheduled when above conditions meet and number of UEs in the to-be-scheduled list is less than *rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl*

end

In addition of PRB pooling and artificial load for EMF is not enabled (5G\_UP\_ALG\_17863\_replaced([11183915](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvN_PvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), for the very rare and corner case it is possible that the maximum number of UEs has been reached but the total load is not met the target. In this case load generation will stop and there is no plan to exceed the L1 and FH limitations.

There is no Competition between Real UEs and Fake UEs. Real UE has the priority, Artificial load shall fill on empty and available PRBs of the remaining PRBs if RAT1 NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = true in all PDSCH areas in largest dedicated BWP after real UEs allocations. [CB014534-A] But, in case of artificial load for EMF in multiple directions, since there is a single fake UE, the fake UE shall fill empty PRBs of the remaining PRBs in one of the PDSCH sub-areas in case of RAT1 allocation, and if the fake UE is dynamic switch capable, then the remaining RBGs (not partial RBGs) shall be allocated in multiple PDSCH SAs in largest dedicated BWP. [End CB014534-A]

---

**3.29.7.2.0-14.0-7**  (ID: `12439014`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
Frequency domain Power Optimization for Low Interference and Throughput Enhancement (FD-POLITE)

---

**3.29.7.2.0-14.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `12533160`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
FD-POLITE overview

---

**3.29.7.2.0-14.0-7.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `12533500`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
If NRBTS/NRCELL/actFdPolite is enabled, gNB-DU shall reduce MCS and Power of UEs PDSCH transmissions at the end of the [Before CB013100-A-UPD004] FDM [CB013100-A-UPD004] FD [End CB013100-A-UPD004] resource allocation process, and after Artificial Load allocation (see [11183121](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_3gIdVPvOEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). To do so, gNB-DU shall execute the following algorithm consecutively:

* If the conditions in [12533182](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_oNYRdxw6EfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) are satisfied, perform FD-POLITE PRB widening as per [12533165](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_jm0A4Bw4EfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)
* [CB013505-A] If the conditions in [12533536](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_AlXOUhxOEfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) are satisfied, perform FD-POLITE EPIC algorithm as per [12533541](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_PnIScBxQEfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). [End CB013505-A] [CB013505-A-UPD002] Due to implementation restrictions of FD-POLITE being exectued per subcell, FD-POLITE EPIC algorithm shall also be executed per subcell (see [11177427](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_YuOPUPvOEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). In such case the EIRP budget allocated to each instance of FD-POLITE EPIC algorithm shall be determined according to [12805143: EIRP budget repartition per subcell for EPIC](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_HtcfFp7WEfCkxIKMlo4L6w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) [End CB013505-A-UPD002]

---

**3.29.7.2.0-14.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `12533182`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
FD-POLITE PRB widening activation

---

**3.29.7.2.0-14.0-7.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12533183`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
FD-POLITE PRB widening shall be performed when the following conditions are satisfied:

* There are remaining available PRB resource (see [11176110](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_QvsSgPvOEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is higher than or equal to the threshold as ( rdMinRemainPrbRatioForFdPolite  (see [12493170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_5PRxsRNyEfCph-OiSyk16Q)) \* rrmMaxNumUsablePrb (see [11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_bXYimvvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) ),
* There is any initial PDSCH transmission with original MCS (see rrmDlUsedMCS in [11192270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_oED7cPvPEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) equal to or higher than NRBTS/NRCELL/minMcsForFdPolite
* [CB013100-A-UPD001] The selected UEs for scheduling in the current DL slot have no RBs restrictions linked to EIRP control. (see [11177928: EIRP control](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_bgJkYPvOEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [End CB013100-A-UPD001]
* [CB013100-A-UPD003] There is NO MU-MIMO paired UE(s) to be scheduled in the DL slot (see [11144070: Virtual UE construction](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr7ao_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [End CB013100-A-UPD003]
* [PR848791]  current DL slot was NOT allocated to CSI-RS for tracking (see [11114897: CSI-RS for tracking configuration](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_36nBkPvIEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) ) [End PR848791]

FD-POLITE PRB widening shall be deactivated depending on the CPU load. If NRBTS.tmpActFeat1(Bit 0) is set to 0 and HwVariant used is not ABIL:

* If the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric, given by l2PsRtCellLevelSeverityMetric (See [11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_h-Ph0vvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) value of the gNB-DU U-Plane, is greater than or equal to the value set for activation threshold of rdFdPoliteOlcDlPerCent ([12505090](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_SlHnYBUaEfCV0v_Ffc8sJw))  
  then, gNB-DU shall suspend above FD-POLITE PRB widening processing
* Else if the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric, given by l2PsRtCellLevelSeverityMetric (See [11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_h-Ph0vvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) value of the gNB-DU U-Plane, is below the value set for deactivation threshold of rdFdPoliteOlcDlPerCent ([12505090](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_SlHnYBUaEfCV0v_Ffc8sJw))  
  then, gNB-DU shall resume above FD-POLITE PRB widening processing

---

**3.29.7.2.0-14.0-7.0-3**  (ID: `12533165`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
FD-POLITE widening PRB usage by reducing UE MCS and Power

---

**3.29.7.2.0-14.0-7.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `12443477`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
If FD-POLITE is configured activated as NRBTS/NRCELL/actFdPolite=”true” and if the conditions in [12533182:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_oNYRdxw6EfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) are fulfilled:

[CB013100-A-UPD004] Due to constraint of implementation, gNB-DU shall execute FD-POLITE processing in subcell by subcell. During FD-POLITE processing in each DL subcell, [End CB013100-A-UPD004] gNB-DU shall use rounds of attempts to calculate extra un-used PRB resource requirement to downgrade the configured MCS and ensure transmission block size (tbSize) for those FD-POLITE candidate UEs. In each round of FD-POLITE processing:

* gNB-DU shall set target\_FD-POLITE\_MCS = max ( minMcsForFdPolite-1 , max\_MCS – rdMcsDownStepForFdPolite , [Before PR863384] 0 [PR863384] (5-1) [End PR863384] )
* where,
* max\_MCS is the max MCS index among those FD-POLITE candidate UEs' current MCS.
* UE's current MCS is initiated with its original MCS (rrmDlUsedMCS in [11192270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_oED7cPvPEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) from the first attempt round, and gNB-DU will replace it in later FD-POLITE attempt round.
* rdMcsDownStepForFdPolite is given in [12442832](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Xp-X0AkmEfCT35inaBGo7g)
* Before each attempt for one selected FD-POLITE candidate, if remaining un-used available DL PRB resource is not higher than the threshold euqal to ( rdMinRemainPrbRatioForFdPolite  (see [12493170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_5PRxsRNyEfCph-OiSyk16Q)) \* rrmMaxNumUsablePrb (see [11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_bXYimvvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) ), gNB-DU shall stop FD-POLITE processing.
* gNB-DU shall select those FD-POLITE candidate whose current MCS is equal to or higher than target\_FD-POLITE\_MCS
* gNB-DU shall select FD-POLITE candidates in the descending order of UE’s current MCS index, regardless difference of MCS mapping tables used for different UEs.
* Among those candidates with same current MCS index, gNB-DU shall attempt FD-POLITE in ascending order of UE’s tbSize
* gNB-DU shall skip the candidate who has failure attempt record.
* [PR853893] gNB-DU shall skip the candidate UE with DCI 1\_0.[End PR853893]
* [PR862240] gNB-DU shall skip the candidate UE's PDSCH transmission which was multiplexed with PDCCH. [End PR862240]
* gNB-DU shall evaluate new MCS, tbSize and PRB resource requirement for the selected FD-POLITE candidate, each evaluation for each FD-POLITE candidate shall be counted as an attempt.
* gNB-DU shall look-up minimum required PRB resource in TBS mapping table (see [1192072](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_m-nWUPvPEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) based on target\_FD-POLITE\_MCS to ensure corresponding DL TB size greater than or equal to UE’s original tbSize.
* If the extra PRB requirement comparing to original PRB requirement is greater than UE's remaining un-used available PRB, FD-POLITE attempt fail for this UE.
* else, gNB-DU shall update UE's current MCS with target\_FD-POLITE\_MCS , current PRB requirement included with FDM resource allocation result and extra required PRB in FD-POLITE, and current tbSize with corresponding DL TB size.
* gNB-DU shall stop FD-POLITE attempts if following conditions were satisfied:
* No FD-POLITE candidate UE with its current MCS in the range of [[Before PR863384]minMcsForFdPolite[PR863384] max(5, minMcsForFdPolite) [End PR863384] target\_FD-POLITE\_MCS ]
* Or, current max\_MCS is lower than [Before PR863384] NRBTS/NRCELL/minMcsForFdPolite [PR863384] max(5, NRBTS/NRCELL/minMcsForFdPolite ) [End PR863384]
* Or, total number of attempt in current slot is not lower than [rdMaxFdPoliteAttempt](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_CnYDwBClEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)(see [12491085](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_CnYDwBClEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))

At the end of FD-POLITE processing, gNB-DU shall update UE’s rrmDlUsedMcs , tbSize and PRB requirement with final values in the last successful FD-POLITE attempt. [PR855082] gNB-DU shall use the final successful updated rrmDlUsedMcs to calculate power reduction for PDSCH transmission ( [11118517: powerReduction (In Module: 5G UP Algorithms)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqDyYPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) ) [End PR855082]

[PR859540] gNB-DU shall determine whether the ACKed PDSCH transmission with successful FD-POLITE widening can be accounted in OLLA or not (see [11129299: Skip OLLA calculation (In Module: 5G UP Algorithms)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq78IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [End PR859540]

[PR866458] gNB-DU shall apply the original tbSize of the PDSCH before FD-POLITE attempts for Calculation of the average 5G UE DL Data Rate  (see [11175317: Calculation of the average 5G UE DL Data Rate](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_LbktgPvOEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) , and apply the original PRB requirement before FD-POLITE attempts to calculation of  the Instantaneous DL Data Rate (see [12517558: Definition of Instantaneous DL Data Rate](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_KIcQwBhhEfC3upM2pE5-4w)) [End PR866458]

gNB-DU shall exclude extra PRB usage by FD-POLITE for loading measurement in term of used PRB.

---

#### 3.29.7.2.0-15 DL resource assignment using FDM Monitoring of DL GBR Load for Radio Admission Control (RAC) (ID: 11183145)

**3.29.7.2.0-15.0-1**  (ID: `11183148`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
DL VoNR PRB Load Monitoring for RAC

---

**3.29.7.2.0-15.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `12440885`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
L2-PS shall provide a **VoNR DL PRB load indication to C-Plane as follows:**

Activation: **GBR Admission Control mode = 1; where**

- GBR Admission Control mode is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl = 1)

Metric:

-Scope: per cell

-Units: percent

* avgGbrPrbLoad(T) = Floor[ nPrb\_used(T) / nPrb\_usable(T)]; where:

- nPrb\_used(T) = number of PRBs assigned for PDSCH Transport blocks [CB013100-A] before FD-POLITE processing (see [12439014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_CMMm5AiSEfCT35inaBGo7g)) [end CB013100-A] , that include **5QI-1** GBR bearers, up to time instant T\*\*\*\*

IF slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is true (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283\_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or **slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = TRUE:**

- nPrb\_usable(T) = the number of potential usable PRB for PDSCH for any DRB up to time instant T. The amount of potential PDSCH PRBs per slot is determined from the number of maximum potential PDSCH PRB per slot given by bbrmNumMaxPdschPrbForGbr (5G\_UP\_ALG\_13416\_replaced([11183252](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJGuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and excluding from it the number of PRBs used for non-PDSCH allocation in that slot;

ELSE

- nPrb\_usable(T) = number of PRBs usable by L2-PS for PDSCH for any DRB, up to time instant T

If actDlPowerBoost is set to (DlVoNRPowerBoost/DlVoNRAndSrbPowerBoost), the calculation of nPrb\_usable(T) is defined as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25493\_replaced([11183268](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJGu_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

END

Report:

* Reported load: avgGbrPrbLoad(T)

- Using periodic load report message from L2-PS to C-Plane, with period = T

- Using GBR PRB load report field existing prior to 22R3. Second GBR PRB load report field (new in 22R3) is set to 0%

Exceptions:

* For GBR Admission Control mode = 0 or RAC GBR measurement /reporting period = 0: L2-PS does not need to perform this GBR Load monitoring
* For GBR Admission Control mode = 2: see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8168\_replaced([11183175](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvIfqfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* If there are no GBR bearers, avgGbrPrbLoad(T) = 0%
* Slots without any PDSCH available shall be skipped.
* PRBs not available for PDSCH user data allocation (any bearer) shall not be considered as “usable”

-PRBs not available for PDSCH user data allocation (any bearer) due to slot blanking (due to high temperature) shall be considered as “usable”.

* If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),
* nPrb\_usable(T) = number of PRBs available per slot for PDSCH of the ith , where i ϵ {n-1, n} and is the index for smallest dedicated BWP which is not the PS BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1811\_replaced([11110797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXP_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1813\_replaced([11110813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-QPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* nPrb\_used(T) = number of PRBs assigned for PDSCH Transport blocks [CB013100-A] before FD-POLITE processing (see [12439014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_CMMm5AiSEfCT35inaBGo7g)) [end CB013100-A] , which are in the ith BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1811\_replaced([11110797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXP_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where i ϵ {n-1, n} and is the index for smallest dedicated BWP which is not the PS BWP.

NOTE: NOT the active BWP of the UE (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1813\_replaced([11110813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-QPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is relevant here but if allocated resources reside in the smallest BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1811\_replaced([11110797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXP_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

* If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is true or **slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = TRUE, the value of nPrb\_usable(T) of the ith BWP is determined from the maximum number of potential PDSCH PRB per slot of the ith BWP given by bbrmNumMaxPdschPrbForGbr\_i (5G\_UP\_ALG\_13416\_replaced([11183252](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJGuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and excluding from it the number of PRBs used for non-PDSCH allocation in that slot;**

ELSE,

If actDlPowerBoost is set to (DlVoNRPowerBoost/DlVoNRAndSrbPowerBoost), the calculation of nPrb\_usable(T) is defined as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25493\_replaced([11183268](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJGu_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

END

Initializations:

* avgGbrPrbLoad(T) is  reset to 0% at start of every measurement period T

Inputs:

* T refers to end of RAC GBR measurement/reporting period provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.GBRLoadUpdatePeriod). Any change in value provided is immediately taken into use at end of current report interval

Notes:

* When GBR Admission Control mode = 1: PRB load report is for VoNR only (5QI-1). Intent is to maintain existing PRB load report method as is, even after introduction of CB008379. For DL GBR PRB load reporting which includes all GBR 5QIs (including 5QI-1), see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8168\_replaced([11183175](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvIfqfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* For PRB allocations for transport blocks with mixed traffic types, a proportional scheme is used for deriving nPrb\_used(t).
* nPrb\_used(t) includes rrm5QI1Prb calculated in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4545\_replaced([11185562](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvUF1fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [CB013100-A] before FD-POLITE processing (see [12439014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_CMMm5AiSEfCT35inaBGo7g)) [end CB013100-A]
* The PRBs shall be weighted equally, not taking into account the number of PDSCH symbols in different slots.

With PRB pooling, if slowPrbPoolingAllowed is set to 'true', or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is True and actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is false (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283\_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

-nPrb\_usable shall consider that the maximum number of PRBs available per slot for PDSCH is limited by the number of usable PRBs granted to DL by the BBRM and this grant may change every BB pooling period (5G\_UP\_ALG\_6500\_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).In addition, if actDlPowerBoost is set to (DlVoNRPowerBoost/DlVoNRAndSrbPowerBoost), nPrb\_usable (maximum number of PRBs available per slot for PDSCH) is further limited by the number of remaining PRBs in rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerBoostPrbs pool after negating PRBs used for power boosting, (rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerBoostPrbs - powerBoostPrbs).

rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerBoostPrbs: As defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25085\_replaced([11177271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuuP9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

powerBoostPrbs**: As defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24935\_replaced([11185393](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvS3svvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

Note: This also applies to **n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

---

**3.29.7.2.0-15.0-2**  (ID: `11183175`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
DL GBR PRB Load Monitoring for RAC

---

**3.29.7.2.0-15.0-2.0-6**  (ID: `13384089`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
gNB-DU shall provide a GBR[CB014699-C] and Critical GBR [End CB014699-C] DL PRB load indication to C-Plane as follows:

Activation: **GBR Admission Control mode (NRBTS/NRCELL/actGBRAdmissionControl) = 2**

Metrics:

* Scope: per cell
* Units: percent
* Base:

**- If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced ([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):**

* For ith BWP, where i ϵ {1, 2, …, n-1}:
* GbrPrbLoad\_i (t) =Floor [ nPrb\_used\_i(t) / nPrb\_usable\_i(t) ] ; where:
* nPrb\_used\_i (t) = number of PRBs within the ith and **(i+k)th** dedicated BWP assigned for PDSCH transport blocks that include any GBR bearer excluding the number of extra PRB used for FD-POLITE (see [12439014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_CO0dEgiSEfCT35inaBGo7g)), where k ϵ {1, …, n-i}\*\*\*\*

IF slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is true (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283\_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or **slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = TRUE**

* nPrb\_usable\_i(t) = the number of potential Usable PRB for PDSCH for any DRB per slot and is determined from the number of maximum number of potential PDSCH PRB per slot given by bbrmNumMaxPdschPrbForGbr\_i (5G\_UP\_ALG\_13416\_replaced([11183252](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJGuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and excluding from it the number of PRBs used for non-PDSCH allocation in that slot;

ELSE

- nPrb\_usable\_i(t) = number of PRBs within the ith dedicated BWP usable for PDSCH for any DRB

* If actDlPowerBoost is set to (DlVoNRPowerBoost/DlVoNRAndSrbPowerBoost), the calculation of nPrb\_usable(t) is defined as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25493\_replaced([11183268](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJGu_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

END

* For nth BWP (Smallest), only if NRBTS/NRCELL/actPowerSavingBwp == False:

- GbrPrbLoad\_n(t)=Floor [ nPrb\_used\_n(t) / nPrb\_usable\_n(t) ] ; where:

* nPrb\_used\_n(t) = number of PRBs within the **nth dedicated BWP assigned for PDSCH transport blocks excluding the number of extra PRB used for FD-POLITE (see [12439014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_CO0dEgiSEfCT35inaBGo7g)) that include any GBR bearer [CB014699-C] (Critical or non-Critical GBR type) [End CB014699-C],**only if UE only supports nth dedicated BWP.\*\*\*\*
* nPrb\_usable\_n(t) = number of PRBs within the nth dedicated BWP usable by for PDSCH for any DRB.
* **If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is true or** slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = TRUE, nPrb\_usable\_n(t) is the number of potential usable PRB for PDSCH for any DRB per slot and is determined from the number of maximum number of potential PDSCH PRB per slot given by bbrmNumMaxPdschPrbForGbr\_i (5G\_UP\_ALG\_13416\_replaced([11183252](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJGuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and excluding from it the number of PRBs used for non-PDSCH allocation in that slot;\*\*\*\*

ELSE,

If actDlPowerBoost is set to (DlVoNRPowerBoost/DlVoNRAndSrbPowerBoost), the calculation of nPrb\_usable(t) is defined as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25493\_replaced([11183268](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJGu_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

END

* ELSE
* GbrPrbLoad1 (t) =Floor [ nPrb\_used\_1(t) / nPrb\_usable\_1(t) ] ; where:
* nPrb\_used\_1(t) = number of PRBs within the **dedicated BWP assigned for PDSCH transport blocks**excluding the number of extra PRB used for FD-POLITE (see [12439014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_CO0dEgiSEfCT35inaBGo7g)) that include any GBR bearer

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and and actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is true (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283\_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or **slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = TRUE:**

- nPrb\_usable\_1(t) = the number of potential Usable PRB for PDSCH for any DRB per slot and is determined from the number of maximum potential PDSCH PRB per slot given by bbrmNumMaxPdschPrbForGbr (5G\_UP\_ALG\_13416\_replaced([11183252](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJGuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))and excluding from it the number of PRBs used for non-PDSCH allocation in that slot;

ELSE

- nPrb\_usable\_1(t) = number of PRBs within the dedicated BWP usable for PDSCH for any DRB

* If actDlPowerBoost is set to (DlVoNRPowerBoost/DlVoNRAndSrbPowerBoost), the calculation of nPrb\_usable(t) is defined as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25493\_replaced([11183268](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJGu_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

END

* END
* Where: t refers to scheduled slot

-Average:

* avgGbrPrbLoad\_n(t) = (1/Tprb) \* GbrPrbLoad\_n (t) + (1−(1/Tprb)) \* avgGbrPrbLoad\_n(t−1)

- If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

- avgGbrPrbLoad\_i(t) = (1/Tprb) \* GbrPrbLoad\_i (t) + (1−(1/Tprb)) \* avgGbrPrbLoad\_i(t−1)

- Where: Tprb= time constant for filter

* Where: i ϵ {1, 2, …, n}, if NRBTS/NRCELL/actPowerSavingBwp == False. Otherwise where i ϵ {1, 2, …, n-1}

Report Load:

* Report periodic load from L2-PS to C-Plane via internal message, with period = T

- avgGbrPrbLoad1(T) = the latest value of avgGbrPrbLoad1(t)  prior to T

- Using GBR PRB load report field existing prior to 22R3.

- avgGbrPrbLoad2(T) = the latest value of avgGbrPrbLoad2(t)  prior to T

- Using Second GBR PRB load report field (new in 22R3)

- If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then set to avgGbrPrbLoad\_n(T), else set to 0%

Exceptions:

* For GBR Admission Control mode = 0 or RAC GBR measurement /reporting period = 0: L2-PS does not need to perform this GBR Load monitoring
* For GBR Admission Control mode = 1: see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4517\_replaced([11183148](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvIfpPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* If there are no GBR bearers, both avgGbrPrbLoad1(T) and avgGbrPrbLoad2(T) are set to 0%
* Slots without any PDSCH available shall be skipped.
* PRBs not available for PDSCH user data allocation (any bearer) shall not be considered as “usable”

-PRBs not available for PDSCH user data allocation (any bearer) due to slot blanking (due to high temperature) shall be considered as “usable”.

Where:

* T refers to end of RAC GBR measurement/reporting period provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.GBRLoadUpdatePeriod). Any change in value provided is immediately taken into use at end of current report interval
* Tprb could be a R&D parameter, with the following suggested properties:

- Range= 40...400; Step size= 10; Default= 200 (see R&D parameter rdGbrPrbLoadFilterCoeff in 5G\_L2\_4364\_replaced([11188264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28HYBPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Notes:

* Including any GBR bearer**[Before CB014699-C] (all GBR 5QIs, including 5QI1/65/66) [CB014699-C] (any GBR 5QIs, e.g., Critical or non-critical)  [End CB014699-C]  for nPrb\_used\_x above means PRBs assigned with any GBR related scheduling class priority (i.e. no check for token bucket (positive or negative) excluding congestion deprioritized GBR [CB014699-C] and excluding congestion deprioritized critical GBR [End CB014699-C] which is scheduled as non-GBR)**
* When GBR Admission Control mode = 2: PRB load report is for [Before CB014699-C] all GBR 5QIs (including 5QI1/65/66) [CB014699-C] any GBR 5QIs (including critical or non-critical 5QI1/65/66) [End CB014699-C]. For DL GBR time domain load reporting which VoNR specific, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4517\_replaced ([11183148](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvIfpPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

**- If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))**, L2 PS reports PRB load per dedicated BWPs configured at cell (max of n)\*\*\*\*

* GBR Load reporting per BWP in this requirement applies only to BWP types = "dedicated" and not to BWP type = "power saving". **Rational: C-Plane does not support Radio Admission Control for PS-BWP. L2 PS dynamically switches UEs between single Dedicated BWP and Power Saving BWP(refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1872\_replaced([11111200](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpLBnfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and already has constraints to keep Power Saving BWP from being overloaded**
* Differentiation between ith BWP is per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1811\_replaced([11110797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXP_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Example with n = 2:

* For PRB allocations for transport blocks with mixed traffic types, a proportional scheme is used for deriving nPrb\_used\_1(t) and nPrb\_used\_2(t).
* nPrb\_used\_1(t) and nPrb\_used\_2(t) include rrm5QI1Prb calculated in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4545\_replaced ([11185562](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvUF1fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) but exclude the number of extra PRB used for FD-POLITE (see [12439014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_CO0dEgiSEfCT35inaBGo7g))
* The PRBs shall be weighted equally, not taking into account the number of PDSCH symbols in different slots.

With PRB pooling (if slowPrbPoolingAllowed is set to 'true'), nPrb\_usable shall consider that the maximum number of PRBs available for use per slot on the cell level is limited to the total number of usable PRBs granted to DL by the BBRM and this grant may change every BB pooling period (5G\_UP\_ALG\_6500\_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). In addition, if actDlPowerBoost is set to (DlVoNRPowerBoost/DlVoNRAndSrbPowerBoost), nPrb\_usable (maximum number of PRBs available per slot for PDSCH) is further limited by the number of remaining PRBs in rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerBoostPrbs pool after negating PRBs used for power boosting, (rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerBoostPrbs - powerBoostPrbs).

rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerBoostPrbs: As defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25085\_replaced ([11177271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuuP9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

powerBoostPrbs**: As defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24935\_replaced([11185393](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvS3svvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

---

**3.29.7.2.0-15.0-3**  (ID: `11183205`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
DL VoNR Time Domain Load Monitoring for RAC

---

**3.29.7.2.0-15.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11183216`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
L2-PS shall provide a VoNR DL time domain load indication to C-Plane as follows:

Activation: GBR Admission Control mode = 1; where

- GBR Admission Control mode is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl = 1)

Metrics:

* Scope: per cell
* Units: percent

-Base:

[Before PR737898]

- GbrAllocations(P) =Floor[ nAllocations\_made(P) / nAllocations\_usable(P) ]; where:

[PR737898]

- GbrAllocations(P) =Round[(nAllocations\_made(P)\*100) / nAllocations\_usable(P) ]; where:

[End PR737898]

[Before PR726507]

* nAllocations\_made(P) = (number of allocations by L2-PS for PDSCH transport blocks that include GBR bearers, up to period P

[PR726507]

* nAllocations\_made(P) =

(number of allocations by L2-PS for PDSCH transport blocks that include 5QI-1 bearers scheduled at voipTraffic

priority, up to period P) +

rdRacDeprioritizedWeight \* (number of allocations by L2-PS for PDSCH transport blocks that include 5QI-1 bearers

scheduled at deprioritizedVoip priority, up to period P)

[End PR726507]

- nAllocations\_usable(P) = number of allocations usable by L2-PS for PDSCH for any DRB, up to time period P

* Where:

P = 40 ms (fixed)

[PR726507]

rdRacDeprioritizedWeight is defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25047\_replaced([11209467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwz6p_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[End PR726507]

-Average:

- avgGbrAllocations(T) = Average[ CurrentGbrAllocations(P) ] over period T

- average is restricted to fully completed periods P within report interval T. Any incomplete period P is included in average for next report interval

* Reported load: avgGbrAllocations(T)

- Using periodic load report message from L2-PS to C-Plane, with period = T

Exceptions:

* For GBR Admission Control mode = 0 or RAC GBR measurement /reporting period = 0: L2-PS does not need to perform this GBR Load monitoring
* For GBR Admission Control mode = 2: see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8170\_replaced([11183221](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJGsvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* If there are no GBR bearers, avgGbrAllocations(T) = 0%
* Slots without any PDSCH available shall be skipped.

Initializations:

* avgGbrAllocations(T) is  reset to 0% at start of every measurement period T

Inputs:

* T refers to end of RAC GBR measurement/reporting period provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.GBRLoadUpdatePeriod)

Notes:

* When GBR Admission Control mode = 1: time domain load report is for VoNR only (5QI-1). Intent is to maintain existing PRB load report method as is, even after introduction of CB008379. For DL GBR time domain load reporting which includes all GBR 5QIs (including 5QI-1), see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8170\_replaced([11183221](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJGsvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* VoNR time domain load is per cell, so it reflects slot utilization over all configured dedicated BWPs

When scheduled UE pooling is enabled (scheUePoolingAllowed is set to 'true'),

* nAllocations\_usable shall consider that the maximum number of scheduled PDSCH UE available per slot is limited by the number of scheduled PDSCH UE assigned by the BBRM and this number may change every BB pooling period (5G\_UP\_ALG\_6363\_replaced([11210707](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw6BQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

**3.29.7.2.0-15.0-4**  (ID: `11183221`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
DL GBR Time Domain Load Monitoring for RAC

---

**3.29.7.2.0-15.0-4.0-3**  (ID: `11183236`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
L2-PS shall provide a **GBR DL time domain load indication to C-Plane as follows:**

Activation: **GBR Admission Control mode = 2; where**

- GBR Admission Control mode is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl = 2)

Metrics:

* Scope: per cell
* Units: percent

-Base:

**- GbrAllocations(P) =Round[(nAllocations\_made(P)\*100) / nAllocations\_usable(P) ]; where:**

* nAllocations\_made(P) =

(number of allocations by L2-PS for PDSCH transport blocks that include GBR bearers scheduled at

voipTraffic or gbrTraffic priority, up to period P) +

rdRacDeprioritizedWeight \* (number of allocations by L2-PS for PDSCH transport blocks that include GBR bearers

scheduled at deprioritizedVoip or deprioritizedGbr priority, up to period P)

**[CB008600-E-UPD001]In case delay critical services is enabled (NRBTS.NRCELL.actDcGbrService=true) and the scheduled transport block contains data from both GBR and DC-GBR bearers, nAllocations\_made(P) should not be increased both here for GBR and correspondingly in [11183293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJtwfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for DC-GBR. This is to avoid that when adding the DC-GBR TD reported load to the GBR TD reported load, the resulting TD overall GBR load considered by the RAC reflects twice the actual allocations. In these cases, the scheduler request class driving the TD scheduling determines whether nAllocations\_made(P) for GBR should be increased (TD scheduling from voipTraffic or gbrTraffic priority) or whether nAllocations\_made (P) in [11183293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJtwfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for DC-GBR should be increased (TD scheduling from dcGbrTraffic priority). In case of TD scheduling from deprioritizedGbr priority, as both deprioritized GBR and deprioritized DC-GBR data have the same priority, it is possible to increase both the nAllocations\_made(P) for GBR and the nAllocations\_made(P) for DC-GBR in [11183293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJtwfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), with a contribution equal to rdRacDeprioritizedWeight for each of them (assuming default value of rdRacDeprioritizedWeight equal to 0.5, this would total 1 full allocation of overall GBR traffic)**

**[End CB008600-E-UPD001]**

- nAllocations\_usable(P) = number of allocations usable by L2-PS for PDSCH for any DRB, up to time period P

- Where:

P = 68 ms (fixed)

rdRacDeprioritizedWeight is defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25047\_replaced([11209467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwz6p_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

-Average:

- avgGbrTdLoadInd(P) = ( 1/Ttdli ) \*GbrAllocations (P) + ( 1−( 1/Ttdli ) ) \* avgGbrTdLoadInd(P−1) ; where

- Ttdli = time constant for filter (number of P intervals)

* Reported load:

- Using periodic load report message from L2-PS to C-Plane, with period = T

- avgGbrTdLoadInd(T) = is the latest value of  avgGbrTdLoadInd (P)  prior to T

Exceptions:

* For GBR Admission Control mode = 0 or RAC GBR measurement /reporting period = 0: L2-PS does not need to perform this GBR Load monitoring
* For GBR Admission Control mode = 1: see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4520\_replaced([11183205](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvIfsPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* If there are no GBR bearers, avgGbrAllocations(T) = 0%
* Slots without any PDSCH available shall be skipped.

Inputs:

* T refers to end of RAC GBR measurement/reporting period provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.GBRLoadUpdatePeriod). Any change in value provided is immediately taken into use at end of current report interval
* Ttdli could be a R&D parameter, with the following suggested properties:

- Range= 5...100; Step size= 5; Default= 20

Notes:

* When GBR Admission Control mode = 2: time domain load report is for all GBR 5QIs (including 5QI-1). For DL GBR time domain load reporting which VoNR specific, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4520\_replaced([11183205](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvIfsPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* GBR time domain load is per cell, so it reflects slot utilization over all configured dedicated BWPs

When scheduled UE pooling is enabled (scheUePoolingAllowed is set to 'true'),

* nAllocations\_usable shall consider that the maximum number of scheduled PDSCH UE available per slot is limited by the number of scheduled PDSCH UE assigned by the BBRM and this number may change every BB pooling period (5G\_UP\_ALG\_6363\_replaced([11210707](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw6BQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

**3.29.7.2.0-15.0-5**  (ID: `11183242`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
DL GBR Time Domain Load Update due to GBR Scheduling Congestion

---

**3.29.7.2.0-15.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11183247`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
L2-PS shall update the GBR DL time domain load indication to C-Plane, based on GBR scheduling congestion, as follows:

Activation: GBR Admission Control mode = 2 AND GBR Congestion Detection = 1 ; where

- GBR Admission Control mode is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl = 2)

- GBR Congestion Detection is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.NRCELL.gbrCongDetectionRac =  true)

Metrics:

* Scope: per cell
* Base:

- gbrSchedBlock (t) = 1 ; If at least one CS2 member with High Priority GBR data (Positive Token Bucket) can not be scheduled in slot t, for any reason

- gbrSchedBlock (t) = 0 ; otherwise

- Where: t the considered slot

* Average:

- avgGbrBlockCnt(t) = ( 1/Tgbrld ) \* gbrSchedBlock(t) + ( 1−( 1/Tgbrld ) ) \* avgGbrBlockCnt(t−1)

- Where: Tgbrld= time constant for filter

* Congestion State Management:
* gbrCongestionState = 00 (No Congestion):

- If avgGbrBlockCnt(t) > gbrCongestionLimit:

- Increment gbrCongestHystCounter by 1

- Set gbrCongestionState = 01

- ElseIf avgGbrBlockCnt(t) <= gbrCongestionLimit:

- No action

* gbrCongestionState = 01 (Pre Congestion):

- If avgGbrBlockCnt(t) > gbrCongestionLimit:

- Increment gbrCongestHystCounter by 1

- ElseIf avgGbrBlockCnt(t) <= gbrCongestionLimit:

- Set gbrCongestionState = 00

- Set gbrCongestHystCounter = 0

- If gbrCongestHystCounter => gbrCongestionCntThresh

- Set gbrCongestionState = 10

- Set gbrCongestHystCounter = 0

* gbrCongestionState = 10 (Congestion):

- If avgGbrBlockCnt(t) < gbrNonCongestionLimit; where = gbrCongestionLimit \* gbrCongestionHystFactor :

- Increment gbrCongestHystCounter by 1

- Set gbrCongestionState = 11

- ElseIf avgGbrBlockCnt(t) >= gbrNonCongestionLimit

- No action

* gbrCongestionState = 11 (Pre Return to No Congestion):

- If avgGbrBlockCnt(t) < gbrNonCongestionLimit;

- Increment gbrCongestHystCounter by 1

- ElseIf avgGbrBlockCnt(t) >= gbrNonCongestionLimit

- Set gbrCongestionState = 10

- Set gbrCongestHystCounter = 0

- If gbrCongestHystCounter => gbrCongestionCntThresh

- Set gbrCongestionState = 00

- Set gbrCongestHystCounter = 0

Report:

- Set avgGbrTdLoadInd(T)  = 100% if gbrCongestionState at T = 10 or 11, else set avgGbrTdLoadInd(T) as derived in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8170\_replaced([11183221](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJGsvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Exceptions:

- gbrSchedBlock (t)= 0 if no GBR UE in CS2 list

- If NRBTS.NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl is not equal to 2 OR If NRBTS.NRCELL.gbrCongDetectionRac =  false, then  GBR DL time domain load indication is not updated due to scheduling congestion

Initializations:

- gbrSchedBlock(init) = 0; avgGbrBlockCnt(init) = 0; gbrCongestionState = 0; gbrCongestHystCounter = 0

Inputs:

* T = RAC GBR load reporting period provided by C-Plane at cell setup
* Tgbrld can be an R&D parameter as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8168\_replaced([11183175](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvIfqfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for Tprb
* gbrCongestionLimit could be a R&D parameter, with the following suggested properties:

- Range= 0.3...1.0; Step size= 0.05; Default= 0.5

* gbrCongestionHystFactor could be a R&D parameter, with the following suggested properties:

- Range= 0.7...1.0; Step size= 0.01; Default= 0.9

* gbrCongestionCntThresh could be a R&D parameter, with the following suggested properties:

- Range= 10...1000; Step size= 10ms; Default= 100

Notes:

* A GBR scheduling congestion state (gbrCongestionState = 1) is reached when avgGbrBlockCnt is above a threshold (gbrCongestionLimit) for "N" consecutive times (gbrCongestionCntThresh)
* Exit from a GBR scheduling congestion state (gbrCongestionState = 1) is reached when avgGbrBlockCnt is below a threshold (gbrNonCongestionLimit) for "N" consecutive times (gbrCongestionCntThresh)
* GBR scheduling congestion detection is a safeguard for GBR RAC by overriding derived GBR Time Domain load report with 100% when GBR scheduling blocks are detected. GBR Time Domain load report is based on a configured slot resource capacity based on max FDM UEs per slot; but that may not reflect PDCCH capacity or other TD scheduling blocking.

---

**3.29.7.2.0-15.0-6**  (ID: `11183252`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
Maximum Number of Potential PDSCH PRBs for GBR Load Monitoring with PRB Pooling

---

**3.29.7.2.0-15.0-6.0-2**  (ID: `11183263`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
When both slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is true (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283\_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [CB012605-C]or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = TRUE[End CB012605-C] with PRB pooling, the total number of PRBs within the cell BW may not always be available for use by 5G L2PS. For the GBR PRB Load monitoring, the total maximum number of potential PRBs that shall be considered available for PDSCH are given by bbrmNumMaxPdschPrbForGbr and it is determined from the total number of potential usable PRB amount per cell, bbrmUsableCellPrb provied by the BBRM (5G\_UP\_ALG\_12402\_replaced([11213298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxG1kPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) as below:

If n > 1, the number of BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

* for the ith BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1813\_replaced([11110813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-QPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where i ϵ {1,2.. n} is the index of the dedicated BWP which is not the PS BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1811\_replaced([11110797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXP_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* bbrmNumMaxPdschPrbForGbr\_i (t)  = min {bbrmUsableCellPrb,

[CB008409-B]rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerBoostPrbs - powerBoostPrbs[End CB008409-B], maxNumPdschPrbInBwp\_i (t)},

* where:
* maxNumPdschPrbInBwp\_i: the maximum number of FD resources per slot in PRB available in the ith BWP without considering limitation from PRB pooling, as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4290\_replaced([11177227](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuto6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* Note:  FD resource in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4278\_replaced([11176996](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is defined for each slot type in  [CB008409-D] PRB,  if NRCELL.actRat1Alloc =TRUE, else [End CB008409-D] RBG and the equivalent amount of PRBs shall be used as maxNumPdschPrbInBwp\_i.
* [CB008409-B]rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerBoostPrbs: As defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25085\_replaced([11177271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuuP9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* powerBoostPrbs: As defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24935\_replaced([11185393](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvS3svvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). PRBs used to power boost all the eligible UEs in the slot[As explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25138\_replaced([11185420](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvS3t_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))]. [End CB008409-B]

Else

* bbrmNumMaxPdschPrbForGbr (t)  = min {bbrmUsableCellPrb,

[CB008409-B]rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerBoostPrbs - powerBoostPrbs[End CB008409-B],  maxNumPdschPrbInBwp(t) },

* where:
* maxNumPdschPrbInBwp: the maximum number of FD resources per slot in PRB available in the BWP without considering limitation from PRB pooling, as initialized 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4278\_replaced([11176996](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* Note: FD resource in  5G\_UP\_ALG\_4278\_replaced([11176996](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is defined for each slot type in  [CB008409-D] PRB,  if NRCELL.actRat1Alloc =TRUE, else [End CB008409-D] RBG and the equivalent amount of PRBs shall be used as maxNumPdschPrbInBwp.
* [CB008409-B] powerBoostPrbs: PRBs used to power boost all the eligible UEs in the slot[As explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25138\_replaced([11185420](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvS3t_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))]. [End CB008409-B]

End

* where :
* t : DL slot
* bbrmUsableCellPrb is provided by the BBRM every pooling period (5G\_UP\_ALG\_12402\_replaced([11213298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxG1kPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

**3.29.7.2.0-15.0-7**  (ID: `11183268`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
Maximum Number of Potential PDSCH PRBs for GBR Load Monitoring with Power boost restriction(without PRB pooling)

---

**3.29.7.2.0-15.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `11183273`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
If actDlPowerBoost is DlVoNRPowerBoost/DlVoNRAndSrbPowerBoost, without PRB pooling enabled, the total number of PRBs within the cell BW may not always be available for use by 5G L2PS. For the GBR PRB Load monitoring, the total maximum number of potential PRBs that shall be considered available for PDSCH are given by numMaxPdschPrbForGbrPowerBoost\_i and it is determined from the total number of PRBs rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs (as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25085\_replaced([11177271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuuP9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [CB008409-D] and in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26756\_replaced([11176544](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kup-kfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) if NRCELL.actRat1Alloc =TRUE [End CB008409-D]) per slot as below:

If n > 1, the number of BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

* for the ith BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1813\_replaced([11110813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-QPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where i ϵ {1,2.. n} is the index of the dedicated BWP which is not the PS BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1811\_replaced([11110797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXP_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* numMaxPdschPrbForGbrPowerBoost \_i (t)  = min { (rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs – powerBoostPrbs), maxNumPdschPrbInBwp\_i (t)},
* where:
* maxNumPdschPrbInBwp\_i: the maximum number of FD resources per slot in PRB, available in the ith BWP without considering limitation from PRB pooling, as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4290\_replaced([11177227](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuto6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* Note:  FD resource in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4278\_replaced([11176996](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is defined for each slot type in [CB008409-D] PRB,  if NRCELL.actRat1Alloc =TRUE, else [End CB008409-D] RBG and the equivalent amount of PRBs shall be used as maxNumPdschPrbInBwp\_i.
* powerBoostPrbs: PRBs used to power boost all the eligible UEs in the slot[As explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25138\_replaced([11185420](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvS3t_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))].

Else

* numMaxPdschPrbForGbrPowerBoost (t)  = min { (rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs - powerBoostPrbs), maxNumPdschPrbInBwp(t) },
* where:
* maxNumPdschPrbInBwp: the maximum number of FD resources per slot in PRB, available in the BWP without considering limitation from PRB pooling, as initialized 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4278\_replaced([11176996](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* Note: FD resource in  5G\_UP\_ALG\_4278\_replaced([11176996](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is defined for each slot type in [CB008409-D] PRB,  if NRCELL.actRat1Alloc =TRUE, else [End CB008409-D] RBG and the equivalent amount of PRBs shall be used as maxNumPdschPrbInBwp.
* powerBoostPrbs: PRBs used to power boost all the eligible UEs in the slot[As explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25138\_replaced([11185420](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvS3t_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))].

End

* where :
* t : DL slot
* rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs for UE eligible for power boosting is defined in [CB008409-D] ,if NRCELL.actRat1Alloc =FALSE, [End CB008409-D] 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25085\_replaced([11177271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuuP9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [CB008409-D] and if NRCELL.actRat1Alloc =TRUE in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26756\_replaced([11176544](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kup-kfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs for UE with initial transmission and eligible for dynamic switch RAT0, if NRCELL.actRat1Alloc =TRUE and NRCELL.actDlDynSwitchAlloc = TRUE, is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_27184\_replaced([11181601](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku_VuvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [End CB008409-D].

Note: Interworking with TDD PRB pooling when actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is set to true is explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13416\_replaced([11183252](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJGuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and interworking with FDD PRB pooling is explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4517\_replaced([11183148](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvIfpPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))(VoNR PRB load) 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8168\_replaced([11183175](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvIfqfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (GBR PRB load).
