#### 3.29.7.2.0-16 DL resource assignment using FDM Monitoring of DL DC-GBR Load for Radio Admission Control (RAC) (ID: 11183277)

**3.29.7.2.0-16.0-1**  (ID: `11183283`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
DL DC-GBR PRB Load Monitoring for RAC

---

**3.29.7.2.0-16.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `12441148`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
L2-PS shall provide  **DC-GBR and GBR DL PRB load indication to C-Plane as follows:**

Activation: **DC-GBR Admission Control mode (NRBTS/NRCELL/actGBRAdmissionControl) =2 and Delay-critical GBR services**(NRBTS/NRCELL/actDcGbrService) = true\*\*\*\*

Metrics:

* Scope: per cell
* Units: percent
* Base:
* DcGbrPrbLoad\_1 (t) =Floor [ nPrb\_used\_1(t) / nPrb\_usable\_1(t) ] ; where:
* nPrb\_used\_1(t) = number of PRBs within the **dedicated BWP assigned for PDSCH transport blocks [CB013100-A] before FD-POLITE processing (see [12439014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_CMMm5AiSEfCT35inaBGo7g)) [end CB013100-A]**  that include any DC-GBR bearer

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and and actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is true (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283\_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or **slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = TRUE:**

- nPrb\_usable\_1(t) = the number of potential Usable PRB for PDSCH for any DRB per slot and is determined from the number of maximum potential PDSCH PRB per slot given by bbrmNumMaxPdschPrbForDcGbr (5G\_UP\_ALG\_31182\_replaced([11183316](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJtxfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))and excluding from it the number of PRBs used for non-PDSCH allocation in that slot;

ELSE

- nPrb\_usable\_1(t) = number of PRBs within the dedicated BWP usable for PDSCH for any DRB

* If actDlPowerBoost is set to (DlVoNRPowerBoost/DlVoNRAndSrbPowerBoost), the calculation of nPrb\_usable(t) is defined as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31181\_replaced([11183327](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJtx_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

END

* Where: t refers to scheduled slot

-Average:

* avgDcGbrPrbLoad\_1(t) = (1/Tprb) \* DcGbrPrbLoad\_1 (t) + (1−(1/Tprb)) \* avgDcGbrPrbLoad\_1(t−1)

- Where: Tprb= time constant for filter

Reported Load:

* Report periodic load report from L2-PS to C-Plane, with period = T

- avgDcGbrPrbLoad\_1(T) = the latest value of avgDcGbrPrbLoad\_1(t)  prior to T

- avgGbrPrbLoad\_n(T), refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8168\_replaced([11183175](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvIfqfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Rationale:Only large BWP support DC-GBR bearers

Exceptions:

* For GBR Admission Control mode = 0,1,2 and**Delay-critical GBR services is disabled or RAC GBR measurement /reporting period = 0 : L2-PS does not need to perform this DC-GBR Load monitoring**
* If there are no DC-GBR bearers, avgDcGbrPrbLoad(T) is set to 0%
* Slots without any PDSCH available shall be skipped.
* PRBs not available for PDSCH user data allocation (any bearer) shall not be considered as “usable”

-PRBs not available for PDSCH user data allocation (any bearer) due to slot blanking (due to high temperature) shall be considered as “usable”.

Inputs:

* T refers to end of RAC DC-GBR measurement/reporting period provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.GBRLoadUpdatePeriod). Any change in value provided is immediately taken into use at end of current report interval
* Tprb could be a R&D parameter, with the following suggested properties:

- Range= 40...400; Step size= 10; Default= 200

Notes:

* Including **any DC-GBR bearer  for nPrb\_used\_x above means PRBs assigned with any scheduling class priority**
* When GBR Admission Control mode = 2 and**Delay-critical GBR services is enabled: provide  DC-GBR and GBR DL PRB load reports to C-Plane.  When GBR Admission Control mode = 2 and**Delay-critical GBR services is disabled : provide GBR DL PRB load reports to C-Plane.\*\*\*\*

DC-GBR PRB load report is for all DC-GBR 5QIs. GBR PRB load (avgDcGbrPrbLoad) report is for all GBR 5QIs (including VONR and non-VONR GBR 5QIs).

For DL VONR and non-VONR GBR PRB load report (avgGbrPrbLoad), it shall be same as that for GBR Admission Control mode = 2 Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8168\_replaced([11183175](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvIfqfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**3.29.7.2.0-16.0-2**  (ID: `11183293`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
DL DC-GBR Time Domain Load Monitoring for RAC

---

**3.29.7.2.0-16.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11183297`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
L2-PS shall provide a **DC-GBR and GBR DL time domain load indication to C-Plane as follows:**

Activation: **DC-GBR Admission Control mode (NRBTS/NRCELL/actGBRAdmissionControl) =[Before CB008600-E-UPD001] 3 [CB008600-E-UPD001]2 and Delay-critical GBR services**(NRBTS/NRCELL/actDcGbrService) = true [End CB008600-E-UPD001]; where\*\*\*\*

- GBR Admission Control mode is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl =**[Before CB008600-E-UPD001] 3** [CB008600-E-UPD001]2\*\*\*\*

- Delay critical GBR services is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration  NRBTS.NRCELL.actDcGbrservice=true)**[End CB008600-E-UPD001]**

Metrics:

* Scope: per cell
* Units: percent

-Base:

- DcGbrAllocations(P) =Floor[ nAllocations\_made(P) / nAllocations\_usable(P) ]; where:

- nAllocations\_made(P) =(number of allocations by L2-PS for PDSCH transport blocks that include DC-GBR bearers scheduled at

DcgbrTraffic priority, up to period P) +

rdRacDeprioritizedWeight \* (number of allocations by L2-PS for PDSCH transport blocks that include DC-GBR bearers

scheduled at deprioritizedGbr priority, up to period P)

- nAllocations\_usable(P) = number of allocations usable by L2-PS for PDSCH for any DRB, up to time period P

- Where: P = 40 ms (fixed)

-Average:

- avgDcGbrTdLoadInd(P) = ( 1/Ttdli ) \*DcGbrAllocations (P) + ( 1−( 1/Ttdli ) ) \* avgDcGbrTdLoadInd(P−1) ; where

- Ttdli = time constant for filter (number of P intervals)

* Reported load:

- Using periodic load report message from L2-PS to C-Plane, with period = T

- avgDcGbrTdLoadInd(T) = is the latest value of  avgDcGbrTdLoadInd (P)  prior to T

Exceptions:

* For GBR Admission Control mode = 0,1,2 **[CB008600-E-UPD001]and**Delay-critical GBR services is disabled **[End CB008600-E-UPD001] or RAC GBR measurement /reporting period = 0: L2-PS does not need to perform this DC-GBR Load monitoring**\*\*\*\*
* If there are no DC-GBR bearers, avgDcGbrAllocations(T) = 0%
* Slots without any PDSCH available shall be skipped.

Inputs:

* T refers to end of RAC GBR measurement/reporting period provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.GBRLoadUpdatePeriod). Any change in value provided is immediately taken into use at end of current report interval
* Ttdli could be a R&D parameter, with the following suggested properties:

- Range= 5...100; Step size= 5; Default= 20

Notes:

* When GBR Admission Control mode = **[Before CB008600-E-UPD001]3**[CB008600-E-UPD001]2 and Delay critical GBR services is enabled**[End CB008600-E-UPD001]:provide** DC-GBR and GBR DL time domain load reports to C-Plane. **[CB008600-E-UPD001] When GBR Admission Control mode = 2 and**Delay-critical GBR services is disabled : provide  GBR DL time domain load reports to C-Plane.**[End CB008600-E-UPD001] DC-GBR time domain load report is for all DC-GBR 5QIs. GBR time domain load(avgGbrAllocations) report is for all GBR 5QIs (VONR and non-VONR GBR 5QIs). For DL VONR and non-VONR GBR time domain load reporting(avgGbrAllocations), it shall be the same as that for GBR Admission Control mode = 2 Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8170\_replaced([11183221](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJGsvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))*****\******\***
* DC-GBR and GBR time domain load is per cell, so it reflects slot utilization over all configured dedicated BWPs

When scheduled UE pooling is enabled (scheUePoolingAllowed is set to 'true'),

* nAllocations\_usable shall consider that the maximum number of scheduled PDSCH UE available per slot is limited by the number of scheduled PDSCH UE assigned by the BBRM and this number may change every BB pooling period (5G\_UP\_ALG\_6363\_replaced([11210707](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw6BQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

**[Before CB008600-E-UPD001]**

When overloading control is enabled (NRCELL/actDynOverloadControl is set to 'true'),

* nAllocations\_usable shall consider that the maximum number of scheduled PDSCH UE available per slot is limited by the overloading control.**[End CB008600-E-UPD001]**

---

**3.29.7.2.0-16.0-3**  (ID: `11183303`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
DL DC-GBR Time Domain Load Update due to DC-GBR Scheduling Congestion

---

**3.29.7.2.0-16.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11183309`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
L2-PS shall update the **DC-GBR DL time domain load indication to C-Plane, based on DC-GBR scheduling congestion, as follows:**

Activation: **GBR Admission Control mode =[Before CB008600-E-UPD001]3**[CB008600-E-UPD001]2 **[End CB008600-E-UPD001]**AND GBR Congestion Detection = 1[CB008600-E-UPD001] and Delay-critical GBR services **(NRBTS/NRCELL/actDcGbrService) = true [End CB008600-E-UPD001]; where*****\****\*

- GBR Admission Control mode is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl = **[Before CB008600-E-UPD001]3** [CB008600-E-UPD001]2**[End CB008600-E-UPD001])**\*\*\*\*

- GBR Congestion Detection is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRBTS.NRCELL.gbrCongDetectionRac =  true)

**[CB008600-E-UPD001] - Delay-critical GBR services is provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRCELL.actdcGbrService =  true)**[EndCB008600-E-UPD001]\*\*\*\*

Metrics:

* Scope: per cell
* Base:

- DcgbrSchedBlock (t) = 1 ; If at least one CS2 member with High Priority DC-GBR data can not be scheduled in slot t, for any reason

- DcgbrSchedBlock (t) = 0 ; otherwise

- Where: t the considered slot

* Average:

- avgDcGbrBlockCnt(t) = ( 1/Tgbrld ) \* DcgbrSchedBlock(t) + ( 1−( 1/Tgbrld ) ) \* avgDcGbrBlockCnt(t−1)

- Where: Tgbrld= time constant for filter

* Congestion State Management:
* DcgbrCongestionState = 00 (No Congestion):

- If avgDcGbrBlockCnt(t) > DcgbrCongestionLimit:

- Increment DcgbrCongestHystCounter by 1

- Set DcgbrCongestionState = 01

- ElseIf avgDcGbrBlockCnt(t) <= DcgbrCongestionLimit:

- No action

* DcgbrCongestionState = 01 (Pre Congestion):

- If avgDcGbrBlockCnt(t) > DcgbrCongestionLimit:

- Increment DcgbrCongestHystCounter by 1

- ElseIf avgDcGbrBlockCnt(t) <= DcgbrCongestionLimit:

- Set DcgbrCongestionState = 00

- Set DcgbrCongestHystCounter = 0

- If DcgbrCongestHystCounter => DcgbrCongestionCntThresh

- Set DcgbrCongestionState = 10

- Set DcgbrCongestHystCounter = 0

* DcgbrCongestionState = 10 (Congestion):

- If avgDcGbrBlockCnt(t) < DcgbrNonCongestionLimit; where = DcgbrCongestionLimit \* DcgbrCongestionHystFactor :

- Increment DcgbrCongestHystCounter by 1

- Set DcgbrCongestionState = 11

- ElseIf avgDcGbrBlockCnt(t) >= DcgbrNonCongestionLimit

- No action

* DcgbrCongestionState = 11 (Pre Return to No Congestion):

- If avgDcGbrBlockCnt(t) < DcgbrNonCongestionLimit;

- Increment DcgbrCongestHystCounter by 1

- ElseIf avgDcGbrBlockCnt(t) >= DcgbrNonCongestionLimit

- Set DcgbrCongestionState = 10

- Set DcgbrCongestHystCounter = 0

- If DcgbrCongestHystCounter => DcgbrCongestionCntThresh

- Set DcgbrCongestionState = 00

- Set DcgbrCongestHystCounter = 0

Report:

- Set avgDcGbrTdLoadInd(T)  = 100% if DcgbrCongestionState at T = 10 or 11, else set avgDcGbrTdLoadInd(T) as derived in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31513\_replaced([11183293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJtwfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Exceptions:

-DcgbrSchedBlock (t)= 0 if no DC-GBR UE in CS2 list

- If NRBTS.NRCELL.actGBRAdmissionControl is not equal to**[Before CB008600-E-UPD001] 3** [CB008600-E-UPD001]2 or actdcGbrService=false **[End CB008600-E-UPD001] OR If NRBTS.NRCELL.gbrCongDetectionRac =  false, then** DC-GBR DL time domain load indication is not updated due to scheduling congestion***\****\*

Initializations:

- DcgbrSchedBlock(init) = 0; avgDcGbrBlockCnt(init) = 0; DcgbrCongestionState = 0; DcgbrCongestHystCounter = 0

Inputs:

* T = RAC GBR load reporting period provided by C-Plane at cell setup
* Tgbrld can be an R&D parameter as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_ 30857 for Tprb
* DcgbrCongestionLimit could be a R&D parameter, with the following suggested properties:

- Range= 0.3...1.0; Step size= 0.05; Default= 0.5

* DcgbrCongestionHystFactor could be a R&D parameter, with the following suggested properties:

- Range= 0.7...1.0; Step size= 0.01; Default= 0.9

* DcgbrCongestionCntThresh could be a R&D parameter, with the following suggested properties:

- Range= 10...1000; Step size= 10; Default= 100

Notes:

* A DC-GBR scheduling congestion state (DcgbrCongestionState = 1) is reached when avgDcGbrBlockCnt is above a threshold (DcgbrCongestionLimit) for "N" consecutive times (DcgbrCongestionCntThresh)
* Exit from a DC-GBR scheduling congestion state (DcgbrCongestionState = 1) is reached when avgDcGbrBlockCnt is below a threshold (DcgbrNonCongestionLimit) for "N" consecutive times (DcgbrCongestionCntThresh)
* DC-GBR scheduling congestion detection is a safeguard for DC-GBR RAC by overriding derived DC-GBR Time Domain load report with 100% when DC-GBR scheduling blocks are detected. DC-GBR Time Domain load report is based on a configured slot resource capacity based on max FDM UEs per slot; but that may not reflect PDCCH capacity or other TD scheduling blocking.

---

**3.29.7.2.0-16.0-4**  (ID: `11183316`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
Maximum Number of Potential PDSCH PRBs for DC-GBR Load Monitoring with PRB Pooling

---

**3.29.7.2.0-16.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11183322`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
When both slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is true (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283\_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = TRUE with PRB pooling, the total number of PRBs within the cell BW may not always be available for use by 5G L2PS. For the DC-GBR PRB Load monitoring, the total maximum number of potential PRBs that shall be considered available for PDSCH are given by bbrmNumMaxPdschPrbForDcGbr and it is determined from the total number of potential usable PRB amount per cell, bbrmUsableCellPrb provied by the BBRM (5G\_UP\_ALG\_12402\_replaced([11213298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxG1kPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) as below:

If n > 1, the number of BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

* for the ith BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1813\_replaced([11110813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-QPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where i  is the index of the large BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1811\_replaced([11110797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXP_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* bbrmNumMaxPdschPrbForDcGbr\_i (t)  = min {bbrmUsableCellPrb, rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerBoostPrbs - powerBoostPrbs, maxNumPdschPrbInBwp\_i (t)},
* where:
* maxNumPdschPrbInBwp\_i: the maximum number of FD resources per slot in PRB available in the ith BWP without considering limitation from PRB pooling, as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4290\_replaced([11177227](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuto6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* Note:  FD resource in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4278\_replaced([11176996](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is defined for each slot type in PRB,  if NRCELL.actRat1Alloc =TRUE, else RBG and the equivalent amount of PRBs shall be used as maxNumPdschPrbInBwp\_i.
* rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerBoostPrbs: As defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25085\_replaced([11177271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuuP9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* powerBoostPrbs: As defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24935\_replaced([11185393](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvS3svvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Else

* bbrmNumMaxPdschPrbForDcGbr (t)  = min {bbrmUsableCellPrb, rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerBoostPrbs - powerBoostPrbs,  maxNumPdschPrbInBwp(t) },
* where:
* maxNumPdschPrbInBwp: the maximum number of FD resources per slot in PRB available in the BWP without considering limitation from PRB pooling, as initialized 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4278\_replaced([11176996](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* Note: FD resource in  5G\_UP\_ALG\_4278\_replaced([11176996](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is defined for each slot type in PRB,  if NRCELL.actRat1Alloc =TRUE, else RBG and the equivalent amount of PRBs shall be used as maxNumPdschPrbInBwp.
* powerBoostPrbs: PRBs used to power boost all the eligible UEs in the slot[As explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25138\_replaced([11185420](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvS3t_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))].

End

* where :
* t : DL slot
* bbrmUsableCellPrb is provided by the BBRM every pooling period (5G\_UP\_ALG\_12402\_replaced([11213298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxG1kPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

**3.29.7.2.0-16.0-5**  (ID: `11183327`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
Maximum Number of Potential PDSCH PRBs for DC-GBR Load Monitoring with Power boost restriction(without PRB pooling)

---

**3.29.7.2.0-16.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11183332`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
If actDlPowerBoost is DlVoNRPowerBoost/DlVoNRAndSrbPowerBoost, without PRB pooling enabled, the total number of PRBs within the cell BW may not always be available for use by 5G L2PS. For the DC-GBR PRB Load monitoring, the total maximum number of potential PRBs that shall be considered available for PDSCH are given by numMaxPdschPrbForDcGbrPowerBoost\_i and it is determined from the total number of PRBs rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs (as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25085\_replaced([11177271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuuP9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26756\_replaced([11176544](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kup-kfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) if NRCELL.actRat1Alloc =TRUE ) per slot as below:

If n > 1, the number of BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

* for the ith BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1813\_replaced([11110813](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-QPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where i is the index of the large BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1811\_replaced([11110797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXP_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* numMaxPdschPrbForGbrPowerBoost \_i (t)  = min { (rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs – powerBoostPrbs), maxNumPdschPrbInBwp\_i (t)},
* where:
* maxNumPdschPrbInBwp\_i: the maximum number of FD resources per slot in PRB, available in the ith BWP without considering limitation from PRB pooling, as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4290\_replaced([11177227](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuto6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* Note:  FD resource in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4278\_replaced([11176996](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is defined for each slot type in PRB,  if NRCELL.actRat1Alloc =TRUE, else RBG and the equivalent amount of PRBs shall be used as maxNumPdschPrbInBwp\_i.
* powerBoostPrbs: PRBs used to power boost all the eligible UEs in the slot[As explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25138\_replaced([11185420](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvS3t_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))].

Else

* numMaxPdschPrbForGbrPowerBoost (t)  = min { (rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs - powerBoostPrbs), maxNumPdschPrbInBwp(t) },
* where:
* maxNumPdschPrbInBwp: the maximum number of FD resources per slot in PRB, available in the BWP without considering limitation from PRB pooling, as initialized 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4278\_replaced([11176996](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* Note: FD resource in  5G\_UP\_ALG\_4278\_replaced([11176996](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is defined for each slot type in PRB,  if NRCELL.actRat1Alloc =TRUE, else RBG and the equivalent amount of PRBs shall be used as maxNumPdschPrbInBwp.
* powerBoostPrbs: PRBs used to power boost all the eligible UEs in the slot[As explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25138\_replaced([11185420](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvS3t_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))].

End

* where :
* t : DL slot
* rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs for UE eligible for power boosting is defined in prb ,if NRCELL.actRat1Alloc =FALSE,  5G\_UP\_ALG\_25085\_replaced([11177271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuuP9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and if NRCELL.actRat1Alloc =TRUE in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26756\_replaced([11176544](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kup-kfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerboostPrbs for UE with initial transmission and eligible for dynamic switch RAT0, if NRCELL.actRat1Alloc =TRUE and NRCELL.actDlDynSwitchAlloc = TRUE, is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_27184\_replaced([11181601](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku_VuvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note: Interworking with TDD PRB pooling when actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is set to true is explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31182\_replaced([11183316](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJtxfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and interworking with FDD PRB pooling is explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30857\_replaced([11183283](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvJGvvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

#### 3.29.7.2.0-17 DL resource assignment using FDM Monitoring of DL load for LB-HO (ID: 13256368)

**3.29.7.2.0-17.0-1**  (ID: `13381544`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
DL nonGBR Load Report

---

**3.29.7.2.0-17.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13313700`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
Monitoring of DL nonGBR Load

---

**3.29.7.2.0-17.0-1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13313225`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
When NRBTS.actLoadReporting= TRUE, for every cell with NRCELL.loadReportProfileDN.LOADREPORT\_PROFILE.loadMeasList that contains DL nonGBR load component, the gNB-DU shall monitor and report the DL nonGBR PDSCH load according to the following procedure.

Inputs and Parameters:

* bbPoolingPeriod: The periodicity of DL nonGBR PDSCH load monitoring. It shall be equal to the BB pooling period defined by `NRBTS.bbPoolEvalPeriod` for TDD FR1 and `NRBTS.bbPoolEvalPeriodFdd` for FDD FR1.
* configBitRateDl [Bits/sec]: The minimum nonGBR configured bit rate per UE, defined by the operator-configurable NIDD parameter `NRCELL.loadReportProfileDN.LOADREPORT_PROFILE.configBitRateDL`
* rdNonGbrPxschLoadFilterCoeff: The filter coefficient for exponential smoothing.(see [13314430: rdNonGbrPxschLoadFilterCoeff](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kLgMR87HEfCVOOJMfwsFiw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* cbrDataVolPerPoolingPeriod [bits]: The minimum nonGBR data volume that shall be expected to be supported per UE within the sampling window. It shall be equal to the product of 'configBitRateDl' [in bits/sec] and 'bbPoolingPeriod' [in sec].
* Note, It shall be taken care in EFS that the units are aligned among multiple used parameters to match the variable ranges (Either kbps and msecs or bps and sec and so on).

Algorithm:

* At every bbPoolingPeriod interval t, the gNB-DU shall perform the following steps:
* The gNB-DU shall calculate the instantaneous nonGBR PDSCH load, `instNonGbrPdschLoad(t)`, for the cell as described in [13313744: Calculation of Instantaneous DL nonGBR Load](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_UtdEgM60EfCVOOJMfwsFiw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
* The gNB-DU shall update the exponentially smoothed average load, `avgNonGbrPdschLoad`. The new value, `avgNonGbrPdschLoad(t)`, shall be calculated as:

  + ``` avgNonGbrPdschLoad(t)=``rdNonGbrPxschLoadFilterCoeff * instNonGbrPdschLoad(t) + ((1 - rdNonGbrPxschLoadFilterCoeff) * avgNonGbrPdschLoad(t-1)) ```

Output:

* The gNB-DU shall report the latest value of the average nonGBR PDSCH load, `avgNonGbrPdschLoad` with a periodicity of 500 msecs and used in [12879686: Process non GBR load samples](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2xRCxbPGEfCQT7hYUxERAg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) where the nonGBR load report is further processed and sent to LRM-CU, as needed (see [12884517: Expiry of common heartbeat periodic Reporting timer](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_mpDFFLVSEfCQT7hYUxERAg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

Notes:

* Any change in configuration parameters shall be applied at the beginning of the next bbPoolingPeriod.
* At startup or when the feature is first activated, the `avgNonGbrPdschLoad` for the first completed bbPoolingPeriod interval shall be set to the calculated `instNonGbrPdschLoad` for that duration, as no historical data is available.

---

**3.29.7.2.0-17.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `13313744`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
Calculation of Instantaneous DL nonGBR Load

---

**3.29.7.2.0-17.0-1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13313746`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
When NRBTS.actLoadReportingDuCu= TRUE, for every cell with NRCELL.loadReportProfileDN.LOADREPORT\_PROFILE.loadMeasList that contains DL nonGBR load component, every BB pooling period t, gNB-DU shall calculate the instantaneous nonGBR PDSCH load (instNonGbrPdschLoad). The calculation shall be performed as follows:

`instNonGbrPdschLoad = 100 * min(cbrDataVolPerPoolingPeriod * numActiveUes * 1/cellSpectralEff , prbDemandNonGbrPerPoolingPeriod) / totalAvailPrbsPerPoolingPeriod`

with:

* cbrDataVolPerPoolingPeriod [bits]: The minimum nonGBR data volume that is supported per active UE in the cell within the BB pooling period. Please refer to [13313700: Monitoring of DL nonGBR Load](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_G6bWWM6wEfCVOOJMfwsFiw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for calculation
* numActiveUEs: The number of unique UEs with nonGBR DL DRB data in their gNB buffers at any point during the BB pooling period interval.
* prbDemandNonGbrPerPoolingPeriod: The cumulative PRB demand as required for the nonGBR service of the cell in the next bbPoolingPeriod. It shall be computed as `prbDemandNonGbr * totalSlotPerPoolingPeriod`. Please refer to [11212148](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw_g1_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for prbDemandNonGbr and totalSlotPerPoolingPeriod calculations.
* cellSpectralEff [bits/PRB]: The DL cell spectral efficiency defined as the average number of bits per DL PRB. The cellSpectralEff calculated from [11212148](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw_g1_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) shall be converted to bits/Prbs and used for the computation here.
* totalAvailPrbsPerPoolingPeriod: The total number of available PRBs for PDSCH scheduling within the last BB pooling period, summed over all slots within that period. For this calculation:
* In a slot, the PRBs available for PDSCH user data allocation (any bearer) shall be computed as in [11177034: FDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kusaxfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) and [11177044: FR1 TDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kusax_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for an FDD and TDD FR1 cell respectively.
* When BB PRB pooling functionality is enabled (see [11372722: PRB baseband pooling concept](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ud-eXPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), BB pooling might restrict the PRBs available for scheduling in the cell.
* As an exception to the above, PRBs that are unavailable for PDSCH user data allocation due to slot blanking (e.g., from high temperature) shall be considered "available".

---

**3.29.7.2.0-17.0-2**  (ID: `13381553`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
DL PDCCH Load Report

---

**3.29.7.2.0-17.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13381574`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
Monitoring of DL PDCCH Load

---

**3.29.7.2.0-17.0-2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13387056`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
When NRBTS.actLoadReporting= TRUE, for every cell with NRCELL.loadReportProfileDN.LOADREPORT\_PROFILE.loadMeasList that contains DL PDCCH load component, the gNB-DU shall monitor and report the DL PDCCH load according to the following procedure.

Inputs and Parameters:

* periodicPdcchEvalInterval: The periodicity of the PDCCH slot pattern evaluation interval. See [11169000: Overview](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt0RBvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_UBmNVp5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA)
* rdPdcchLoadFilterCoeff: The filter coefficient for exponential smoothing.(see [13387057: rdPdcchLoadFilterCoeff](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_IJTFwAIMEfGhFrIQm2O4Ew?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_UBmNVp5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA))

Algorithm:

* At every periodicPdcchEvalInterval t, the gNB-DU shall perform the following steps:
* The gNB-DU shall calculate the instantaneous DL PDCCH load, `instDlPdcchLoad(t)`, for the cell as described in [13381576: Calculation of Instantaneous DL PDCCH Load](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_qIjiowAhEfGhFrIQm2O4Ew?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
* The gNB-DU shall update the exponentially smoothed average load, `avgDlPdcchLoad`. The new value, `avgDlPdcchLoad(t)`, shall be calculated as:

  + ``` avgDlPdcchLoad(t)=``rdPdcchLoadFilterCoeff * instDlPdcchLoad(t) + ((1 - rdPdcchLoadFilterCoeff) * avgDlPdcchLoad(t-1)) ```

Output:

* The gNB-DU shall report the latest value of the average DL PDCCH load, `avgDlPdcchLoad` with a periodicity of 500 msecs and used in [12879686: Process non GBR load samples](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2xRCxbPGEfCQT7hYUxERAg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) where the DL PDCCH load report is further processed and sent to LRM-CU, as needed (see [12884517: Expiry of common heartbeat periodic Reporting timer](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_mpDFFLVSEfCQT7hYUxERAg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

Notes:

* At startup or when the feature is first activated, the `avgDlPdcchLoad` for the first completed periodicPdcchEvalInterval shall be set to the calculated `instDlPdcchLoad` for that duration, as no historical data is available.

---

**3.29.7.2.0-17.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `13381576`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
Calculation of Instantaneous DL PDCCH Load

---

**3.29.7.2.0-17.0-2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13387059`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
When NRBTS.actLoadReportingDuCu= TRUE, for every cell with NRCELL.loadReportProfileDN.LOADREPORT\_PROFILE.loadMeasList that contains DL PDCCH load component, each periodicPdcchEvalInterval, gNB-DU shall calculate the instantaneous DL PDCCH load sample (instDlPdcchLoad) as below:

`instDlPdcchLoad = 100 * usedCcesDl/availCcesDl`

with:

* usedCcesDl: The gNB-DU shall calculate this as the sum of CCEs used for DL scheduling within the UE specific search space(s) of any BWP configured in the cell. The gNB-DU shall calculate this sum over all DL scheduling slots (valid k1) within the last `periodicPdcchEvalInterval`(see [11169000: Overview](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt0RBvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_UBmNVp5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA)). If NRCELL-actPdcchPowerBoost is enabled, if the UE is scheduled with downgraded aggregation level (AL), its used CCE shall be considered based on hypothetical CCEs which were originally needed without the downgraded AL. Additionally. in a given DL scheduling slot, if UE in dedicated BWP (including PS BWP), is blocked from DL scheduling due to unavailability of PDCCH resources, then all the CCEs available for DL scheduling in the dedicated coreset  associated with the BWP of the UE shall be considered in used CCEs in the slot.
* availCcesDl: The gNB-DU shall calculate this as the sum of available CCEs over all DL scheduling slots (valid k1) within the last `periodicPdcchEvalInterval`. For a given DL scheduling slot, the gNB-DU shall calculate the number of available CCEs as the sum of `availCcesInCurrentPdcchPattern` and `cceShareInUnallocPdcchSymbols`, determined as follows:
* availCcesInCurrentPdcchPattern: The base number of available CCEs is the union of total CCEs available for DL scheduling within the UE specific search space(s) of any BWP configured in the cell, according to the current active PDCCH slot pattern (see [11168909: PDCCH Slot Pattern](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktzp8fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_UBmNVp5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA)). The CCEs prempted in the user specific spaces due to their usage in common search spaces (For ex. SIB, paging, RACH, see [11171067: Start CCE selection](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuBFXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall be subtracted from the available CCEs calculation.
* cceShareInUnallocPdcchSymbols: This value depends on the number of symbols used for PDCCH in the current PDCCH pattern for each of BWPs:

  + If the current used PDCCH slot pattern has reduced the PDCCH symbol usage due to lower load, the gNB-DU shall consider the additional possible CCEs in the unused/free PDCCH symbols configured within the UE specific search spaces of BWPs but not allocated in the current PDCCH slot pattern.
  + If the slot contains only DL scheduling, the gNB-DU shall consider all of those CCEs as available.
  + Else (the slot contains both UL and DL scheduling possibilities), the gNB-DU shall consider only a share of those CCEs, defined by the R&D parameter `rdDlShareOfUnallocCces`(see [13387640: rdDlShareOfUnallocCces](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_gbnzEQKBEfGhFrIQm2O4Ew?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), as available for DL.
  + Otherwise (if the PDCCH slot pattern has not reduced PDCCH symbols for any of BWPs), the gNB-DU shall set `cceShareInUnallocPdcchSymbols` to 0.
  + When PRB pooling is enabled (slowPrbPoolingAllowed is set to 'true'), the available CCEs in PDCCH symbols might be impacted (see [11169929: PDCCH Capacity Re-Evaluation with PRB Pooling](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt6-t_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) and the corresponding unavailable CCEs shall be reduced from availCcesInCurrentPdcchPattern and cceShareInUnallocPdcchSymbols, if any. While reducing from cceShareInUnallocPdcchSymbols, the reduction shall be done proportionally according to `rdDlShareOfUnallocCces`
  + Note: It is possible that CCEs of a coreset mapped to the UE specific search spaces of multiple BWPs can partly, fully, or not at all overlap with each other. The gNB-DU shall not count a single CCE that is shared among multiple search spaces of BWPs more than once in the `availCcesDl` and `usedCcesDl` calculation.

---

#### 3.29.7.2.0-18 DL resource assignment using FDM Monitoring of DL GBR Load for eTH in flow control (ID: 11183339)

**3.29.7.2.0-18.0-1**  (ID: `11183343`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
L2-PS shall provide an average GBR DL PRB number indication (avgGbrNPrb) for eTH in flow control.

The GBR refer to here is just for non-VoNR GBR.

Metrics:

* Scope: per cell
* Units: Number of GBR PRBs
* Base:

-- gbrNPrb(t) = number of PRBs per cell for PDSCH transport blocks that include any non-VoNR GBR bearer. If there are no non-VoNR GBR bearers, gbrNPrb(t) is set to 0.

--- Where: t refers to scheduled slot

-Averaging:

-- avgGbrNPrb(t) = (1/Tprb) \* gbrNPrb(t) + (1−(1/Tprb)) \* avgGbrNPrb(t−1)

--- Where: Tprb= time constant for filter

Inputs:

* Tprb: refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8168\_replaced([11183175](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvIfqfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

#### 3.29.7.2.0-19 DL resource assignment using FDM Monitoring of DL DC-GBR Load for eTH in flow control (ID: 11183348)

**3.29.7.2.0-19.0-1**  (ID: `11183353`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
L2-PS shall provide an average DC-GBR DL PRB number indication (avgDcGbrNPrb) for eTH in flow control.

Metrics:

* Scope: per cell
* Units: Number of DC-GBR PRBs
* Base:

-- DcGbrNPrb(t) = number of PRBs per cell for PDSCH transport blocks that include any DC-GBR bearer (allocations from deprioritizedGbr request class do not count). If there are no DC-GBR bearers, DcGbrNPrb(t) is set to 0.

--- Where: t refers to scheduled slot

-Averaging:

-- avgDcGbrNPrb(t) = (1/Tprb) \* DcGbrNPrb(t) + (1−(1/Tprb)) \* avgDcGbrNPrb(t−1)

--- Where: Tprb= time constant for filter

Inputs:

* Tprb could be a R&D parameter, with the following suggested properties:

- Range= 40...400; Step size= 10; Default= 200

---

#### 3.29.7.2.0-20 DL resource assignment using FDM DL NBR congestion control (ID: 11183359)

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-1**  (ID: `11183364`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
DL NBR congestion control suspension during scheduler processing overload

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11183367`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
If NRBTS.tmpActFeat1(Bit 0) is set to 0, HwVariant used is not ABIL, and the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31301\_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is greater than or equal to the value set for **activation threshold of rdNominalBitrateOlcDlPerCent (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31829\_replaced([11216807](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxa-pPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) then, gNB-DU shall skip the following actions for DL NBR congestion control for the NBR category bearers, since all the NBR category users shall be deprioritised in bulk. When the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31301\_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is less than the value set for** deactivation threshold of rdNominalBitrateOlcDlPerCent (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31829\_replaced([11216807](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxa-pPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then gNB-DU shall resume the DL NBR congestion control activities.\*\*\*\*

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-2**  (ID: `11183373`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
PDSCH NBR congestion control

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11183378`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
Monitoring NBR PDSCH PRB load

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11183382`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
NBR Cell Load Monitoring

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-2.0-1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11183386`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
L2-PS shall monitor the PDSCH resource for NBR category bearers and use it for NBR PDSCH congestion control on cell in FR1TDD and FDD.

Activation: NBR feature and PDSCH congestion control is activated (NRBTS/NRCELL.actNbrForNonGbrBearers = TRUE & NRBTS/NRCELL.nbrPdschCongHandling = TRUE)

Metrics:

* Scope:  per cell.
* Units: percent
* Base:

[CB008227-E]

* IF n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* For ith BWP, where i ϵ {1, 2, …, n}:

- NbrPrbLoadDL(i, t) = nPrb\_used(i, t) / nPrb\_usable(i, t), where:

- nPrb\_used(i, t) = number of PRBs within ith dedicated BWP assigned for PDSCH transport blocks that include NBR category bearer(NBR configured non-GBR bearers which having positive token bucket and not de-prioritized, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4178\_replaced([11174242](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuaG5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for UE(s) irrespective of their active BWP.

- nPrb\_used(i, t) = number of PRBs within the ith and (i+k)th dedicated BWP assigned for PDSCH transport blocks that include NBR category bearer(NBR configured non-GBR bearers which having positive token bucket and not de-prioritized, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4178\_replaced([11174242](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuaG5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where k ϵ {1, …, n-i}.

- nPrb\_usable(i, t) = number of PRBs within the ith dedicated BWP usable for PDSCH for any DRB

* ELSE

[End CB008227-E]

- NbrPrbLoadDL(t) = nPrb\_used(t) / nPrb\_usable(t), where:

- nPrb\_used(t) = number of PRBs assigned for PDSCH transport blocks that include NBR category bearer(NBR configured non-GBR bearers which having positive token bucket and not de-prioritized, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4178\_replaced([11174242](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuaG5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

- nPrb\_usable(t) = number of PRBs usable for PDSCH for any DRB

[CB008227-E]

* END

[End CB008227-E]

[PR782203]

If enhanced DL MU-MIMO is activated (NRCELL.actDlMuMimoEnh = True) in the cell, nPrb\_used contribution from each of NBR bearer UEs shall be computed as described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29550\_replaced([11183393](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvKU1vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End PR782203]

- Where: t refers to scheduled slot

* Average:

- avgNbrPrbLoadDL(t) = (1/Tprb) \* NbrPrbLoadDL(t) + (1−(1/Tprb)) \* avgNbrPrbLoadDL(t−1)

[CB008227-E]

- If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

- avgNbrPrbLoadDL(i, t) = (1/Tprb) \* NbrPrbLoadDL(i, t) + (1−(1/Tprb)) \* avgNbrPrbLoadDL(i, t−1)

- Where: i ϵ {1, 2, …, n} and n refers to the number of dedicated BWP per cell (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

[End CB008227-E]

- Where: Tprb could be a R&D parameter, with the following suggested properties:

- Range= 40...400; Step size= 10; Default= 200

* Periodic Load:

Using periodic NBR PRB load for congestion detection

- avgNbrPrbLoadDL(T) = the latest value of avgNbrPrbLoadDL(t) prior to T

[CB008227-E]

- If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

- avgNbrPrbLoadDL(i, T) = the latest value of avgNbrPrbLoadDL(i, t) prior to T

- Where: i ϵ {1, 2, …, n} and n refers to the number of dedicated BWP per cell (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

[End CB008227-E]

where:

- T refers to end of NBR congestion detection period provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRCELL.congDetectPeriod). Any change in value provided is immediately taken into use at end of current congestion detection interval.

Exceptions:

* For nbrPdschCongHandling  = FALSE or NBR congestion detection period NRCELL.congDetectPeriod = 0, L2-PS does not need to perform this NBR Load monitoring
* If there are no NBR configured bearers, the avgNbrPrbLoad(T) is set to 0%
* Slots without any PDSCH available shall be skipped.
* PRBs not available for PDSCH user data allocation (any bearer) shall not be considered as “usable”

Notes:

-[CB008227-E] With PRB pooling (if NRBTS.slowPrbPoolingAllowed or NRBTS.slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is set to 'true'), nPrb\_usable shall consider that the maximum number of PRBs available for use per slot on the cell level is limited to the total number of usable PRBs granted to DL by the BBRM and this grant may change every BB pooling period (5G\_UP\_ALG\_6500\_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).[End CB008227-E]

* For PRB allocations for transport blocks with mixed traffic types, a proportional scheme is used for deriving nPrb\_used(t).
* The PRBs shall be weighted equally, not taking into account the number of PDSCH symbols in different slots.

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-2.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11183393`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
Interaction with DL MU-MIMO

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-2.0-1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11183398`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
If enhanced DL MU-MIMO is activated (NRCELL.actDlMuMimoEnh = True), the PRBs allocated to NBR bearer UEs can be shared with other nonGBR UEs spatially and hence the NBR PDSCH PRB cell load calculation (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29549\_replaced([11183382](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvKU1PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall take that into account and the NBR load shall be reduced proportionally as below.

For NBR UEs which are not paired in any virtual UE, the NBR FD resources allocated to them according to SU-MIMO algorithm (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_21689\_replaced([11179765](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku7ERvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall be directly considered in the nPrb\_used in their corresponding dedicated BWP.

For a NBR UE i, spatially paired either partially or completely, the number of NBR FD resources that shall be considered in nPrb\_used calculation for their NBR bearers, namely rrmMuMimoAllocNbrFdRes(i), in their corresponding BWP shall be computed as follows:

* Let rrmSuMimoAllocNbrFdResRemaining(i) be the number of NBR FD resources allocated for the UE for its NBR bearers initially before MU-pairing with initial Tx UEs as root(see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26503\_replaced([11144193](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr7aqvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for corresponding RAT0/RAT1 allocations) and rrmMuMimoAllocNbrFdRes(i) = 0.
* In every virtualUeA that the UE(i) is taking part:
* rrmSpatialShareOfUeInVirtualUe(i) = layerNumUeInVirtualUe(i)/layerNumvirtualUeA
* rrmNbrFdResShareOfUeinVirtualUe(i) = min(rrmSuMimoAllocNbrFdResRemaining(i), allocatedFdResVirtualUeA) \* rrmSpatialShareOfUeInVirtualUe(i)
* rrmSuMimoAllocNbrFdResRemaining(i) = rrmSuMimoAllocNbrFdResRemaining(i) - rrmNbrFdResShareOfUeinVirtualUe(i)/rrmSpatialShareOfUeInVirtualUe(i)
* rrmMuMimoAllocNbrFdRes(i) = rrmMuMimoAllocNbrFdRes(i) + rrmNbrFdResShareOfUeinVirtualUe(i)

where:

* layerNumVirtualUeA is the total number of PDSCH layers of all paired UEs in virtual UE as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7444\_replaced([11142531](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr4XXvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* layerNumUeInVirtualUe(i) is the number of PDSCH layers of the UE i in the virtual UE.
* allocatedFdResVirtualUeA is the number of FD resources that are requested and allocated to VirtualUeA. See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7449\_replaced([11143103](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr6MhvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for details.

Note:

* For a given UE, the sequence of virtual UEs considered in the calculation of rrmMuMimoAllocNbrFdRes shall be in the same as in scheduling. For ex. UE1 is part of vUE(A) and vUE(B). First, vUE(A) is allocated 10 RBGs spatially for UE1 and UE2 and vUE(B) is then allocated 10 RBGs for UE1 without any spatial pairing. In that case, first vUE(A) shall be considered first and then vUE(B) for UE1's rrmMuMimoAllocNbrFdRes calculation.

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11183403`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
NBR PDSCH PRB load congestion detection

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-2.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `11183415`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
gNB shall support the NBR PDSCH congestion detection mechanism on the cell in FR1 TDD and FDD.

- Activation: NBR feature and PDSCH congestion control is activated inthe cell

(NRBTS/NRCELL.actNbrForNonGbrBearers = TRUE & NRBTS/NRCELL.nbrPdschCongHandling = TRUE)

- Scope: NBR PDSCH congestion shall be detected

IF n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

- Per dedicated BWP i.e. 'n' independent PDSCH congestion detection mechanism per cell.

Note, there can be more than one dedicated BWP configured per cell. Power saving BWP is considered a dedicated BWP and NBR PDSCH congestion detection shall also be performed for power saving BWP.

ELSE

- per cell.

IF sliceAwareSchedulerCellActivation = True,

- per resource group and per dedicated BWP(s) in this cell.

- Input:

 NBR PDSCH congestion detection per dedicated BWP **requires the following inputs:**

- per dedicated BWP **periodic average PDSCH GBR PRB load avgGbrPrbLoad\_n(T) refers to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8168\_replaced([11183175](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvIfqfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).** [Before CB008118-CB] Note, when NRBTS/NRCELL/actPowerSavingBWP = TRUE, as the GBR PRB load is not available for PS BWP, avgGbrPrbLoad(T) for Ps BWP shall be considered 0. **[End CB008118-CB]**\*\*\*\*

- per dedicated BWP **periodic average PDSCH NBR PRB load avgNbrPrbLoadDL(i, T) refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22596\_replaced([11183378](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvKU0_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

 If sliceAwareSchedulerCellActivation = True in the cell (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_12116\_replaced([11278956](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0jvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **[CB008250-C] or PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_16121\_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))** [End CB008250-C], NBR PDSCH congestion detection per resource group requires the following inputs:\*\*\*\*

- Resource Group periodic average DL load avgNbrRGLoadDL\_i(T), the latest value of rrmRGAvgLoadDL\_i(t) prior to T,

where:

· rrmRGAvgLoadDL\_i(t) refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23524\_replaced([11189445](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfsBvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). **[CB008250-C]**

**if PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_16121\_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare as defined in (5G\_UP\_ALG\_31503\_replaced([11188561](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvdPzfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))**

else if, **[End CB008250-C] enhanced slice aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_12237\_replaced([11288194](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tp5RdPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))** or NRBTS.actDynamicTargetShareCalcForRg = TRUE,\*\*\*\*

resource group target share is set to *dynamic resource group target share rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare (5G\_UP\_ALG\_28683\_replaced([11190166](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvgTIPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),*

**[CB008250-C]**

**else,**[End CB008250-C]\*\*\*\*

it is set to *static resource group target share rrmRGTargetShare (5G\_UP\_ALG\_7390\_replaced([11189080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfE9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))*

· i refer to each configured Resource Group.

· T refers to end of NBR congestion detection period provided at cell setup/reconfiguration (NRCELL.congDetectPeriod). Any change in value provided is immediately taken into use at end of current congestion detection interval.

 PDSCH GBR+NBR congestion limit: marks a certain maximum percentage of PDSCH resources to be utilized for GBR+NBR as defined by O&M parameter NRCELL.maxNbrTrafficLimit.

 PDSCH GBR+NBR congestion hysteresis factor: R&D parameter rdDlsNbrPrbCongHyst, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22967\_replaced([11193616](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvuVhfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 PDSCH GBR+NBR load hysteresis limit: as product of the PDSCH GBR+NBR limit and the PDSCH GBR+NBR congestion hysteresis factor.

- Congestion Detection:

If any following conditions are fulfilled, the NBR PDSCH congestion is detected, otherwise congestion is not considered detected:

 any dedicated BWP periodic average PDSCH GBR PRB load avgGbrPrbLoad\_n(T) + PDSCH NBR PRB load avgNbrPrbLoadDL(i, T) exceeds the PDSCH GBR+NBR congestion limit.

 If sliceAwareSchedulerCellActivation = True, **[CB008250-C] or PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_16121\_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))** [End CB008250-C]\*\*\*\*

any Resource Group in the Cell periodic average DL load rrmRGAvgLoadDL\_i(T) exceeds the PDSCH GBR+NBR congestion limit.

 For rrmRGAvgLoadDL\_i(T) which is calculated by PDSCH resources to be utilized for GBR+NBR by RG and RG target share, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23524\_replaced([11189445](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfsBvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

* **[CB008118-CB] If both NRCELL.maxNbrTrafficLimit and NRCELL.maxGBRTrafficLimit is exceeded during PDSCH congestion detection, trigger GBR congestion control (refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31321\_replaced([11183615](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvMKBvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) ) firstly and then NBR congestion control,  if GBR congestion is resolved and NBR congestion is still detected in order to prevent overlapping of GBR and NBR congestion control.** [End CB008118-CB]\*\*\*\*

[CB008250-B-UPD002] Note that when the PLMN aware scheduler is activated for the cell ([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) *GBR congestion limit takes the value of* maxGBRTrafficLimit\_L2PS (\*\*[12704521S](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_oy0TEGCREfCLrcnPCspVyQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) ).[End CB008250-B-UPD002]

As soon as NBR PDSCH congestion is detected on any dedicated BWP  or Resource Groups in the cell**, the congestion deprioritize handling shall be performed according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22595\_replaced([11183420](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvKU2_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

-     Congestion Resolved:

If following conditions are fulfilled, the NBR PDSCH congestion is resolved, otherwise congestion is not considered resolved:

 largest dedicated BWP periodic average PDSCH GBR PRB load avgGbrPrbLoad(T) + PDSCH NBR PRB load avgNbrPrbLoadDL(T) drops below the PDSCH GBR+NBR load hysteresis limit.

When NBR congestion is resolved, re-prioritize NBR bearers to normal NBR scheduling according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24027\_replaced([11183441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvK74vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If PDSCH GBR+NBR load is detected to further increase, additional NBR bearers shall be selected for de-prioritization accordingly.

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `11183420`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
DL NBR bearer/UE de-prioritization in congestion

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-2.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `13320090`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
When NBR PDSCH congestion is detected on any dedicated BWP or Resource Groups in the cell, gNB shall deprioritize NBR bearer(s) or UE(s) as following:

 The DL NBR category bearers/UEs are selected to de-prioritize from Cell each **dedicated BWP  or Resource Groups in the cell which are detected congestion(5G\_UP\_ALG\_22594\_replaced([11183403](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvKU2PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

* If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), as the NBR congestion control mechanism is performed per dedicated BWP, it is possible that congestion might be detected in one BWP but not in the other and so on. If NBR congestion is detected in multiple BWPs, NBR bearer selection for deprioritize shall be performed starting from smallest to the largest BWP so that the predicted NBR load reduction resulting from bearer de-prioritization in smaller BWP can already be considered in the larger BWP as the smaller BWPs are always nested within the larger BWP.
* If sliceAwareSchedulerCellActivation = True in the cell, NBR bearer selection for deprioritize shall be performed from Resource Group firstly, and then check if more NBR bearers still need to be deprioritized for NBR congested Cell (or largest dedicated BWP) after consider the previous NBR deprioritize handling on congested Resource Group. If no resource group congestion is detected, the NBR bearers or UEs to be de-prioritized shall be selected per Cell or dedicated BWPs.

 As many NBR bearers shall be selected such that sum of the NBR PDSCH resource utilization of the selected bearers (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24037\_replaced([11183451](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvK75PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is larger than or equal to the excess of the PDSCH GBR+NBR load hysteresis limit per dedicated BWP or Resource Groups in the cell  The rationale of deprioritize NBR load to the load hysteresis limit is to avoid ping-ping congestion happen.

 The DL NBR category bearers/UEs deprioritize selection are determined by following criteria:

Step1: From higher to lower congestion priority value based on the NRCELL.congWeightAlg selection:

- If the NRCELL.congWeightAlg = ''priorityLevel ', the NBR bearer congestion priority is based on the NRBTS/NRDRB.priorityLevel configured value for the bearer, the lower value indicates higher congestion priority.

- If the NRCELL.congWeightAlg = 'arpPrioPerVul', the bearer congestion priority is based on the ARP priority configured for the bearers (refer to 5G\_CP\_IF\_NTW\_5886\_replaced([11408282](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__GmynPvmEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The deprioritize start from the bearers with ARP vulnerability "preemptable" and sorted by the ARP priority, then from the bearers with ARP vulnerability "not preemptable" and sorted by the ARP priority.

- The UE's congestion priority value is equal to the highest congestion priority value among all NBR bearers within the UE.

Step2: Then from higher to lower PDSCH NBR resource utilisation of a bearer for PDSCH Congestion Control (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24037\_replaced([11183451](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvK75PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), OR higher to lower PDCCH NBR resource utilisation of a UE for PDCCH Congestion Control (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22899\_replaced([11183476](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvK76fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Step3: Then in random order.

This selection only needs be performed for congested dedicated BWP(s) or Resource Groups in the cell when NBR PDSCH/PDCCH congestion is detected or when there is any load level changes following this detection, additional bearers/UEs need to be de-prioritized or some de-prioritized bearers/UEs need to be removed from the de-prioritized list. It is left to entity level/implementation to define which exact procedure has the least complexity (e.g., triggered search, managed sorted lists, etc).

The de-prioritization shall be performed on bearer basis for PDSCH congestion and be performed on UE basis in case of PDCCH congestion.

If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the DL NBR UE/bearers considered here for NBR de-prioritization shall only be among UEs with active BWP same as BWP in which congestion is detected.

[CB013244-SR-B-UPD001]UE is not considered for de-prioritization if the UE is in the "inactive BWP" like during the DL BWP scanning procedure (see [12682751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_7Vn41VGcEfCeeMlEb49MrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).[End CB013244-SR-B-UPD001]

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-2.0-4**  (ID: `11183430`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
Monitoring of PDSCH resources used per NBR bearer

!PLEASE notice this item is replaced by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24037\_replaced([11183451](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvK75PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-2.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11183436`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
L2-PS shall monitor average utilisation of PDSCH resources per NBR bearer and count the PRBs that are allocated for the NBR category bearers in FR1 TDD and FDD cell.

Activation: NBR PDSCH congestion control is activated (NRBTS/NRCELL/nbrPdschCongHandling = TRUE)

Metrics:

* Scope: per NBR bearer
* Units: PRB

This can be expressed in the following equation

* Base:

- PrbNbrDl(i,m,t) = [RNBR,DL,i,m(t) / TBS\_DL(t) ]\* PrbDl(i,t), where:

i:          index of the UE with an NBR bearer.

k:         index of the NBR bearer belong to UE i.

t:         specifies the slot the transport block is sent.

RNBR,DL,i,m(t): Data volume of NBR bearer m inclusive overhead of the MAC header sent to UE i at time t.

PrbDl(i,t)      The overall number of PRBs used for UE i in slot t for all bearers

TbsDl(i,t):    DL TBS of UE i at time t which is equal to the sum of the TBS of the transmitted codeword(s).

* Resource utilisation of a NBR bearer is defined as the amount of PRBs corresponding to the transmission of
* MAC SDU + MAC header corresponding to the bearer in a transport block
* Systematic padding that needs to be added to small data volumes to match the required TBS
* If multiple logical channels are transmitted within a single transport block, the proportion of resources being used for a NBR bearer corresponds to the proportion of NBR data of this bearer to the TBS size
* If no data of the NBR bearer have been scheduled in a slot with DL transmission, resource utilisation of the bearer in this slot is 0
* Initial transmission as well as retransmission need to be considered to determine a bearer's NBR resource utilisation
* If transmission is blocked by PDCCH LA, it also needs to consider NBR resource utilisation this slot.
* Average:

The average PDSCH resource allocation of a NBR bearer is then calculated via an exponential filter on slot basis.

avgPrbNbrDl(i,m,t) = (1/Tprb) \* PrbNbrDl(i,m,t) + (1−(1/Tprb)) \* avgPrbNbrDl(i,m,t−1)

with

i     index of the UE

m    index of the NBR bearer

t     considered slot

PrbNbrDl(i,m,t) as calculated above

Tprb could be a R&D parameter constant for the averaging function, with the following suggested properties:

- Range= 40...400; Step size= 10; Default= 200

For slots when the NBR bearer is de-prioritized as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22595\_replaced([11183420](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvKU2_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), PrbNbrDl(i,m,t) is not calculated which means the average PRB allocation of the NBR bearer will not be updated.  An exception to this is if in a certain slots a deprioritized NBR bearer is given an allocation and if the DL transmission buffer for the NBR bearer is empty OR if the token bucket variable Bi,m  for the NBR bearer is negative, then the filter is updated for all slots since the filter was last updated.

[TEMP CB008227-E] Whenever the UE i switches its active BWP, average PDSCH resource utilization for all its NBR bearers m, avgPrbNbrDl(i,m) shall be re-initialized to 0. [End TEMP CB008227-E]

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-2.0-5**  (ID: `11183441`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
PDSCH NBR congestion reprioritization

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-2.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11183446`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
[CB008227-DA\_UPD001]

gNB shall select as many deprioritized NBR bearer(s) or UE(s) as possible to back to NBR scheduling when NBR PDSCH congestion is resolved (refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22594\_replaced([11183403](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvKU2PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with following conditions met:

* For each dedicated BWP [CB008227-EA] AND each Resource Groups in the cell [End CB008227-EA] the average PDSCH NBR PRB load plus estimated load of reprioritize bearer(s) (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24037\_replaced([11183451](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvK75PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) which belongs to them would not exceed PDSCH GBR+NBR congestion limit.

After reprioritization, the gNB shall update the average PDSCH NBR PRB load of each dedicated BWP [CB008227-EA] or each Resource Groups in the cell [End CB008227-EA] with the estimated load of the reprioritized bearer(s) which belongs to would be affected.

The priority of bearers to be reprioritized are as following:

1: The congestion priority value based on the NRCELL.congWeightAlg selection (same as de-prioritization step1 defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22595\_replaced([11183420](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvKU2_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

2: If value is same in step 1, NBR PDSCH PRB load (5G\_UP\_ALG\_24037\_replaced([11183451](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvK75PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) in increasing order.

[End CB008227-DA\_UPD001]

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-2.0-6**  (ID: `11183451`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
Estimation PDSCH PRB load per NBR bearer for deprioritization and reprioritization

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-2.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11183455`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
L2-PS shall estimate PDSCH PRB load per NBR bearer that used for PDSCH congestion de-prioritization and re-prioritization on FR1 TDD and FDD cell.

Activation: NBR feature and PDSCH congestion control is activated (NRBTS/NRCELL.actNbrForNonGbrBearers = TRUE & NRBTS/NRCELL.nbrPdschCongHandling = TRUE)

Metrics:

* Scope: per NBR bearer
* Units: PRB
* The instantaneous NBR UE DL spectrum efficency calculated at every slot t:

InstUeDlSE (i,t)  = TbsDl(i,t) / PrbDl(i,t),

where:

i: index of the UE with an NBR bearer.

t: slot of UE is scheduled for PDSCH.

PrbDl(i,t): The overall number of PRBs used for UE i in slot t for all bearers

TbsDl(i,t): DL TBS of UE i at slot t which is equal to the sum of the TBS of the transmitted codeword(s)

* If the UE is not scheduled in a slot with DL transmission, the calculation shall not update.
* The average NBR UE DL spectrum efficency is then calculated via an exponential filter on slot basis.

avgUeDlSE(i,t) = (1/Tprb) \* InstUeDlSE (i,t) + (1−(1/Tprb)) \* avgUeDlSE(i, t−1),

where

i: index of the UE with an NBR bearer.

t: slot of UE is scheduled for PDSCH.

Tprb:  R&D parameter constant for the averaging function, with the following suggested properties:

- Range= 40...400; Step size= 10; Default= 200

* The PDSCH PRB load per NBR bearer j is calculated when PDSCH NBR congestion is detected or resolved (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22594\_replaced([11183403](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvKU2PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

- NbrDlPrbLoad(i,k)= nbrDl(i,k) /(avgUeDlSE(i,T) \* normalization\_factor) , where:

i: index of the UE with an NBR bearer.

k: index of the NBR bearer belong to UE i.

T: slot the congestion is detected or resolved.

nbrDl(i,k): derive from NRBTS/NRDRB\_MAC.nbrDl of NBR bearer k for UE i . For DL CA, the nbrDl(i,k) should be calculated based on CA NBR split, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22969\_replaced([11123423](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqi6m_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

avgUeDlSE(i, T):  the latest value of avgUeDlSE(t) when congestion is detected or resolved.

normalization\_factor Normalization based on the total number of DL slot per second (see 5G\_UP\_54\_replaced([11346921](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubIls_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for TDD and 5G\_UP\_77\_replaced([11347090](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubJz0_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for DSS).

Exceptions:

* For nbrPuschCongHandling  = FALSE or NBR congestion detection period NRCELL.congDetectPeriod = 0, gNB  no need to perform this NBR Load calculation.

Note: The PDSCH PRB load calculation needs only be performed when NBR PDSCH congestion is detected/resloved OR when any cell NBR load changes that trigger additional UEs need to be de-prioritized/re-prioritized. It is left to entity level/implementation to define which exact procedure has the least complexity (e.g., triggered search, managed sorted lists, etc).

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-3**  (ID: `11183461`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
PDCCH NBR congestion control

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11183466`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
Monitoring of DL PDCCH NBR load

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11183471`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
L2-PS shall monitor the PDCCH resources (CCEs) used for scheduling the prioritized (i.e. having positive NBR token bucket) DL NBR bearers configured in a given cell which is eventually used to perform DL NBR congestion control based on PDCCH channel.

This requirement is applicable only for FR1(both TDD and FDD). The rationale is that there is no benefit in executing PDCCH congestion control algorithm in FR2 without FDM & dynamic PDCCH.

Activation: DL PDCCH NBR congestion control is activated  (NRBTS/NRCELL/nbrPdcchCongHandlingDl = TRUE).

Metrics:

* Scope: per cell.
* Unit: percent
* Base:
* IF n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):
* For ith BWP, where i ϵ {1, 2, …, n}:

- NbrDlPdcchLoad (i, t) = nCCE\_used(i, t) / nCCE\_usable(i, t), where:

- nCCE\_used(i, t) = number of CCEs within ith dedicated BWP allocated for PDCCH (DL grant) for UE(s) with highest eligible priority class = drbTraffic and scheduling PDSCH transport block containing data from their prioritized (NBR positive token bucket) NBR bearer irrespective of their active BWP, otherwise, it shall be 0.

- nCCE\_usable(i, t) =  number of CCEs available for DL NR scheduling within the ith dedicated BWP.

* ELSE
* NbrDlPdcchLoad(t) = nCCE\_used(t) / nCCE\_usable(t), where:

- nCCE\_used(t) = number of CCEs allocated for PDCCH (DL grant) for UE(s) with highest eligible priority class = drbTraffic and scheduling PDSCH transport block containing data from its prioritized (NBR positive token bucket) NBR bearer, otherwise, it shall be 0.

- nCCE\_usable(t) =  number of CCEs available for DL NR scheduling.

* END

- Where: t refers to scheduled slot

Notes for nCCE\_usable calculation:

* nCCE\_usable shall calculate the number of CCEs available for DL scheduling in any given slot.
* The construction of coreset and PDCCH slot pattern for a given cell is explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11211\_replaced([11168405](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktv_kfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) & 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3958\_replaced([11168909](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktzp8fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and split of CCEs, if any, between UL/DL is explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3955\_replaced([11169860](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt6Xp_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) which can be used to calculate nCCE\_usable.
* The pre-empted CCEs (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4032\_replaced([11169907](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt6-svvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) in the available CCEs, if any, shall be considered in nCCE\_usable.
* With PRB pooling (if NRBTS.slowPrbPoolingAllowed or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is set to 'true'), the nCCE\_usable shall consider the number of CCEs that can be used which is limited by the total amount of usable PRB allocated for PDCCH by the BBRM and this grant may change every BB pooling period (5G\_UP\_ALG\_6960\_replaced([11169929](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt6-t_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* Average:

- avgNbrDlPdcchLoad(t) = (1/Tprb) \* NbrDlPdcchLoad(t) + (1−(1/Tprb)) \* avgNbrDlPdcchLoad(t−1)

- If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

- avgNbrDlPdcchLoad(i, t) = (1/filterCoefficient) \* NbrDlPdcchLoad(i, t) + (1−(1/filterCoefficient)) \* avgNbrDlPdcchLoad(i, t−1)

- Where: i ϵ {1, 2, …, n} and n refers to the number of dedicated BWP per cell (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

- Where: filterCoefficient could be a R&D parameter, with the following suggested properties:

- Range= 40...400; Step size= 10; Default= 200

* Periodic Load:

At the end of every NBR congestion detection period T (NRCELL.congDetectPeriod):

- avgNbrDlPdcchLoad(T) = the latest value of avgNbrDlPdcchLoad(t)  prior to T

- If n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

- avgNbrDlPdcchLoad(i, T) = the latest value of avgNbrDlPdcchLoad(i, t)  prior to T

- Where: i ϵ {1, 2, …, n} and n refers to the number of dedicated BWP per cell (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) which is used as NBR DL PDCCH congestion control mechanism described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22725\_replaced([11183487](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvK76_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Exceptions:

* For nbrPdcchCongHandlingDl = FALSE or NBR congestion detection period NRCELL.congDetectPeriod = 0: L2-PS does not need to perform this NBR DL PDCCH Load monitoring
* If there are no NBR configured bearers, the avgNbrDlPdcchLoad(T) is set to 0%
* Slots without any CCEs available for DL NR PDCCH (PDCCH for DL grant) shall be skipped.

Notes:

* With PRB pooling (if NRBTS.slowPrbPoolingAllowed or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is set to 'true'), the nCCE\_usable shall consider the number of CCEs that can be used which is limited by the total amount of usable PRB allocated for PDCCH by the BBRM and this grant may change every BB pooling period (5G\_UP\_ALG\_6960\_replaced([11169929](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt6-t_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11183476`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
Monitoring of DL PDCCH resources per NBR UE

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-3.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11183481`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
L2-PS shall monitor the PDCCH resource (CCEs) used by UEs for scheduling the prioritized (i.e. having positive NBR token bucket) DL NBR bearers which is eventually used to de-prioritise those NBR UEs during PDCCH congestion control based on their NBR resource usage.

This requirement is applicable only for FR1(both TDD and FDD). The rationale is that there is no benefit in executing PDCCH congestion control algorithm in FR2 without FDM & dynamic PDCCH.

Activation: DL PDCCH NBR congestion control is activated  (NRBTS/NRCELL/nbrPdcchCongHandlingDl = TRUE).

Metrics:

* Scope: per UE
* Unit: CCEs

Base:

- usedCCEsNbrDl(i, t) = number of CCEs allocated for PDCCH (DL grant) for UE i with highest priority class = drbTraffic and scheduling PDSCH transport block containing data from its prioritized (NBR positive token bucket) NBR bearer in slot t, otherwise, it shall be 0.

- Where:

i refers index of the UE

t refers to the scheduled slot

* Average:

The average PDCCH CCE utilization be the UE i to schedule NBR data is then calculated via an exponential filter every DL scheduling slot t

- avgUsedCCEsNbrDl(i,t) = (1/filterCoefficient) \* usedCCEsNbrDl(i,t) + (1−(1/filterCoefficient)) \* avgUsedCCEsNbrDl(i,t−1)

filterCoefficient could be a R&D parameter constant for the averaging function, with the following suggested properties:

- Range= 40...400; Step size= 10; Default= 200

* Periodic Load:

At the end of every NBR congestion detection period T (NRCELL.congDetectPeriod):

- avgUsedCCEsNbrDl(i, T) = the latest value of avgUsedCCEsNbrDl(i)  prior to T

which is used for NBR UE de-prioritization (5G\_UP\_ALG\_22595\_replaced([11183420](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvKU2_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) when NBR congestion is detected on the PDCCH channel (5G\_UP\_ALG\_22725\_replaced([11183487](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvK76_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Exceptions:

* For nbrPdcchCongHandlingDl = FALSE or NBR congestion detection period NRCELL.congDetectPeriod = 0: L2-PS does not need to perform this NBR DL PDCCH Load monitoring

-  Slots without any CCEs available for DL NR PDCCH (PDCCH for DL grant) shall be skipped.

* The exponential filter is updated DL slot (see above) or only when UE is scheduled. In later case, the filter update shall also be done in that slot for all missing DL NR slots (considering zero load in those slots) since the filter was last updated so that the UE NBR load is not artificially seen higher. It is left to entity level/implementation to define which manner has the least complexity.

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `11183487`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
DL PDCCH congestion detection

---

**3.29.7.2.0-20.0-3.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11183497`)

DL resource assignment using FDM
L2-PS shall support the NBR DL PDCCH congestion detection mechanism.

This requirement is applicable only for FR1(both TDD and FDD). The rationale is that there is no benefit in executing PDCCH congestion control algorithm in FR2 without FDM & dynamic PDCCH.

Activation: NBR feature and PDCCH congestion control is activated inthe cell

(NRBTS/NRCELL.actNbrForNonGbrBearers = TRUE & NRBTS/NRCELL.nbrPdcchCongHandlingDl = TRUE)

Scope: NBR PDCCH congestion shall be detected

IF n > 1, the number of dedicated BWP per cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_8240\_replaced([11110833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpH-RfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

* Per dedicated BWP i.e. 'n' independent PDSCH congestion detection mechanism per cell.

Note, there can be more than one dedicated BWP configured per cell. Power saving BWP is considered a dedicated BWP and NBR PDSCH congestion detection shall also be performed for power saving BWP.

ELSE

* per cell.

NBR DL PDCCH congestion detection requires the following inputs:

* periodic average DL PDCCH CCE utilization for UEs scheduling its GBR & prioritized(positive NBR token bucket) NBR bearers in the cell,
* for NBR DL PDCCH CCE load, namely avgNbrDlPdcchLoad(T) refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22699\_replaced([11183466](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvK75_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* for GBR DL PDCCH CCE load, namely avgGbrDlPdcchLoad(T) [Before CB008118-CB] shall be considered 0 (see note below) [CB008118-CB] refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31283\_replaced([11183567](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvLi_PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [End CB008118-CB]
* PDCCH GBR+NBR congestion factor: marks a certain maximum percentage of PDCCH resources to be utilized for GBR+NBR within a given dedicated bandwidth part as defined by O&M parameter NRCELL.maxNbrTrafficLimit.
* DL PDCCH GBR+NBR congestion hysteresis factor (R&D parameter rdPdcchNbrCceCongHyst, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23320\_replaced([11193626](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvuVh_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* DL PDCCH GBR+NBR load hysteresis limit as product of the PDCCH GBR+NBR load limit and the PDCCH GBR+NBR congestion hysteresis factor.

Once every NBR congestion detection period (NRCELL.congDetectPeriod):

NBR DL PDCCH congestion is detected if the periodic average DL PDCCH GBR+NBR load exceeds the NRCELL.maxNbrTrafficLimit, otherwise congestion is not considered detected.

As soon as NBR PDCCH congestion is detected, the following handling shall apply:

* UEs configured with NBR bearers shall be selected for de-prioritization in scheduling
* Criteria for NBR UE selection is same as PDSCH defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22595\_replaced([11183420](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvKU2_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
