**3.29.12.2.0-4.0-6**  (ID: `12711058`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler
Determine Low Buffer Traffic States of All RGs of a PLMN

---

**3.29.12.2.0-4.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `12711062`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler
To decide the low buffer traffic states of all RGs of a non-low-buffer PLMN p, gNB-DU shall execute computeLowBufferRGStateForPlmn(p).

Precondition for determining low buffer states of all RGs of a PLMN p:

* Full buffer temporary target shares of the RGs of PLMN p are computed per [11188307](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvdPx_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).
* Temporary target share for PLMN p has been computed per [11188061](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvdPw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

computeLowBufferRGStateForPlmn(p) first computes the per-slot low buffer state (rrmRGLowBufSlot\_j(t)) of each RG j in PLMN p. rrmRGLowBufSlot\_j(t) is initialized to false and the threshold for low buffer check (rrmLowbufThres\_j) is initialized to full buffer temporary target share (rrmRGFullBufferTempTargetShare\_j), for each RG j in PLMN p.

The following step is kept performing on all remaining RGs of PLMN p until none of the RG can pass the per-slot low buffer state check. It recursively find all per-slot low buffer RGs of PLMN p. rrmRGLowBufSlot\_j(t) of RG j is set to true, if either of the following two conditions has been satisfied:

* The threshold for low buffer state check for RG j (rrmLowbufThres\_j) is equal to 0 and no resource has been assigned to RG j in the slot (rrmRGInstShare\_j(t) = 0).
* rrmLowbufThres\_j for RG j is greater than 0 and the average resource share of RG j rrmRGAvgShare\_j(t) is below rdAvgShareToleranceDL \* rrmLowbufThres\_j in the slot.

All per-slot low buffer RGs (rrmRGLowBufSlot\_j(t) = true) are removed from the list, and the threshold (rrmLowbufThres) of the remaining RGs are updated considering the resources available for PLMN p, the average resource share for high priority traffic (rrmRGAvgHighShare), cell level max quota (rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota) and the resource sharing according to dynamic target shares.

An RG j is considered to have low buffer traffic, i.e. hasLowBuffer(j) = True, if RG j has passed the per-slot low buffer state check (rrmRGLowBufSlot\_j(t) = True) in the past rdMinLowBufferSlotsDL slots. Otherwise, the RG is considered not to have low buffer traffic, i.e. hasLowBuffer(j) = False.

rrmRGLowBufferState\_j, for every RG j in the cell.

Function computeLowBufferRGStateForPlmn(p)

R\_p = rrmPlmnTempTargetShare\_p(t)

//Initialize threshold for low buffer state check and per-slot low buffer state of each RG

For each RG j in PLMN p

rrmLowbufThres\_j = rrmRGFullBufferTempTargetShare\_j

rrmRGLowBufSlot\_j = False

End For

Make a copy of all RGs of PLMN p, denoted as S\_p

While (True)

Found = False

For each RG j in S\_p

If [(rrmLowbufThres\_j <= 0) and (rrmRGInstShare\_j(t) <= 0)] or [rrmRGAvgShare\_j(t) < rdAvgShareToleranceDL \* rrmLowbufThres\_j]

// RG j is identified as low buffer RG

rrmRGLowBufSlot\_j = True

R\_p = R\_p - rrmRGAvgShare\_j(t)

Found = True

Remove RG j from S\_p

End If

End For

If (Found = True) and (S\_p is not empty)

//Update the threshold for low buffer state check of all RGs in S\_p

Compute dynamic target share for the set of RGs S\_p according to [11189319](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfE_PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). The dynamic target share of an RG j is saved in rrmRGDynamicTargetShare\_j.

D = sum(rrmRGDynamicTargetShare\_j), for all RG j in S\_p

If (m\_j = rrmRGAvgHighShare\_j(t) / max[rrmRGDynamicTargetShare\_j \* R\_p / D, 10^(-6)] > 1 for at least one RG j in S\_p)

//Sorting S\_p in order to process RGs with relatively higher rrmRGAvgHighShare earlier.

Sort S\_p in the descending order of m\_j for each RG j

End If

R = R\_p

For each RG j in S\_p

If (D <= 0) or (R <= 0)

rrmLowbufThres\_j = rrmRGAvgHighShare\_j(t)

Else

rrmLowbufThres\_j = max{rrmRGDynamicTargetShare\_j \* R / D, rrmRGAvgHighShare\_j(t)}

End If

//rrmLowbufThres is upper bounded by max{rrmRGAvgHighShare\_j(t), rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota\_j}

rrmLowbufThres\_j = min{max{rrmRGAvgHighShare\_j(t), rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota\_j}, rrmLowbufThres\_j}

D = D - rrmRGDynamicTargetShare\_j

R = R - rrmLowbufThres\_j

End For

Else

//None of the RG is S\_p is in per-slot low buffer state.

Break While

End If

End While

For each RG j in PLMN p

If (t < rdMinLowBufferSlotsDL) or (rrmRGLowBufSlot\_j(t’) is false for any slot t’ in [t – rdMinLowBufferSlotsDL+1, t])

rrmRGLowBufferState\_j = False

Else

rrmRGLowBufferState\_j = True

End If

//If at least one RG has changed low buffer state, rrmLowbufStateChanged is set to true.

If (RG j has rrmRGLowBufferState\_j changed from true to false or from false to true)

rrmLowbufStateChanged = True

End If

End For

End Function

Output: low buffer traffic state of RG j. Return true, if RG j is in low buffer traffic state, Otherwise, return False

Function hasLowBuffer(j)

Return rrmRGLowBufferState\_j

End Function

Notations:

rrmPlmnTempTargetShare\_p(t): The computed temporary target share of PLMN p at slot t, see [11188061](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvdPw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

rrmLowbufThres\_j: the threshold for low buffer state check for RG j.

rrmRGFullBufferTempTargetShare\_j: temporary target share (including both high priority and low priority traffic) for RG j, assuming each RG has full buffer low priority traffic and the actual high priority traffic, see [11188307](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvdPx_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

rrmRGLowBufSlot\_j(t): whether RG j has passed the per-slot low buffer state check in slot t.

rrmRGInstShare\_j(t): the instantaneous resource share used by RG j in slot t, see [11190186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

rrmRGAvgShare\_j(t): average resource share of RG j at slot t, see [11190186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

rdAvgShareToleranceDL: R&D parameter, the tolerance level for checking average resource share for an RG, see [11193707](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvu8mPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

rrmRGDynamicTargetShare\_j: The dynamic target share computed for an RG j in S\_p according to [11189319](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfE_PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

rrmRGAvgHighShare\_j(t): average resource share for high priority traffic of RG j at slot t, see [11190186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota\_j: cell level maximum quota of RG j, see [11188028](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcoufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

rdMinLowBufferSlotsDL: R&D parameter, the minimum number of consecutive slots for low buffer traffic state checking, see [11193715](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvu8m_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

rrmRGLowBufferState\_j: low buffer traffic state of RG j

rrmLowbufStateChanged: whether low buffer state of any PLMN or RG is changed in this algorithm execution, see [11188061](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvdPw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

R\_p: remaining resources for PLMN p after deducting average usage of per-slot low buffer RGs.

R: resources available for RGs of PLMN p whose rrmLowbufThres haven’t been updated. R is initialized to R\_p.

D: the sum of dynamic target shares (rrmRGDynamicTargetShare) of RGs of PLMN p whose rrmLowbufThres haven’t been updated. D is initialized to the sum of rrmRGDynamicTargetShare of all RGs (S\_p) that are not yet identified as per-slot low buffer RG.

**3.29.12.2.0-4.0-7**  (ID: `11188517`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler
Feedback control based on RG low priority target shares

---

**3.29.12.2.0-4.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `11188555`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler
11188555:
PLMN Aware Scheduler
After the low priority traffic target share is computed for each RG (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31424\_replaced([11188061](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvdPw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gNB-DU applies proportional-integral feedback control to compute the RG weight for each RG.

In addition, under the condition that resource sharing is not allowed for a PLMN, RG weight of each RG of the PLMN is set to 0 if the average PLMN resource usage is above a given threshold.

The procedure is listed as follows. The current slot is denoted t.

Output: the RG weight rrmRGWeight\_j(t) for each RG j

Initialization after RG j is created. I-term of PI control is initialized to 0.

For each configured RG j in the cell

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains the mathematical expression "rrmRglterm,(t) = 0". The text is in a light color against a white background. The characters are slightly blurred.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14491.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

End For

The following shall be executed for every run of PVC algorithm.

For each PLMN p in the cell

// If resource sharing among PLMNs is not allowed and the measured average resource used by the PLMN is higher than the PLMN target share by a certain degree, then the PLMN weight is set to 0; otherwise, the PLMN weight is set to 1.

If ([image-1][image\_desc]The image contains text that reads "rrrmAllowPlmnResourcesSharing = False". The text is blurry and difficult to read.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14491.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]) and [image-2][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression written in a sans-serif font. The expression is:
(rrmPlmnAvgShare,(t) > max{rrmPlmnTargetShare, + rdPlmnTargetShareToleranceDL,rrmPlmnAvgHighShare,(t)))
The expression appears to be a condition or a rule, possibly from a technical document or a programming context. It compares a variable `rrmPlmnAvgShare` at time `t` with the maximum of two other values: `rrmPlmnTargetShare` plus some other term (indicated by the '+'), and `rdPlmnTargetShareToleranceDL` along with `rrmPlmnAvgHighShare` at time `t`. The exact meaning of the variables and the operation represented by '+' are not clear from the image alone.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14491.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2]

[image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a blurry, stylized font. The equation appears to be:
`rrrrPmnmWeightμ(t) = 0`
The characters are not clearly defined, and some letters are difficult to distinguish. The overall impression is of a handwritten or distorted mathematical expression.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14491.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3]

Else

[image-4][image\_desc]The image contains the following text: rrrnPmnlWeightµ(t) = 1[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14491.005.png[/image\_path][/image-4]

End If

For each configured RG j in PLMN p

// If a RG has average usage above the cell level max quota or the PLMN to which it belongs has zero weight, then RG weight is set to 0. Else if a RG has low buffer traffic or the PLMN to which it belongs has low buffer traffic, then the RG weight is set to a high value, so that the RG and the PLMN can attain the target share when high traffic demand comes. Otherwise, the RG weight is updated according to PI control.

If ([image-5][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is written in a blurry, sans-serif font. The equation reads:
$r r r m P l m n W e i g h t\_{\mu}(t) = 0$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14491.006.png[/image\_path][/image-5]) or ([image-6][image\_desc]The image contains the following text: rrmRG AvgShare(t) > rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14491.007.png[/image\_path][/image-6])

[image-7][image\_desc]The image contains the text "rrmRGWeightj(t) = 0".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14491.008.png[/image\_path][/image-7]

Else If (hasLowBuffer(j) = True) or (hasLowBufferPLMN(p) = True)

[image-8][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula written in a blurry, stylized font. The formula appears to be:
`rrrmRGWeight(t) = (2 · rdEnhSvcPiPGainDL + 1) · rdLowBufRGWeightAmplifierDL`[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14491.009.png[/image\_path][/image-8]

Else

[image-9][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula written in a light blue font against a white background. The formula is:
rrmRGExpTargetShare;(t) = min (rrmRGExpLowTargetShare;(t) + rrmRGAvgHighShare; (t), rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota;}
The formula appears to be defining a variable `rrmRGExpTargetShare` at time `t` as the minimum of two expressions. The first expression is the sum of `rrmRGExpLowTargetShare` at time `t` and `rrmRGAvgHighShare` at time `t`. The second expression is `rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota`.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14491.010.png[/image\_path][/image-9]

// RG weight is updated with PI control.

Execute rgWeightUpdateWithPiControl(j)

End If

End For

End For

If RG j has RG weight equal to 0, then no resource will be allocated to initial transmissions of nonGBR and deprioritized GBR DRBs of RG j in the following DL slots until the RG weight becomes positive. However, resources can be allocated to initial transmissions and retransmissions of GBR DRBs, or to retransmissions of nonGBR DRBs of RG j even if the RG weight is equal to 0.

Notations:

rrmRGWeight\_j(t): RG weight computed for RG j at slot t

rrmPlmnTargetShare\_p: target share of PLMN p, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7385\_replaced([11188019](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcot_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmRGExpTargetShare\_j(t): the expected target share (including both high and low priority traffic) for RG j, computed at slot t

rrmRGExpLowTargetShare\_j(t): the expected low priority traffic target share for RG j, computed at slot t, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31424\_replaced([11188061](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvdPw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmRGAvgHighShare\_j(t): average resource share for high priority traffic of RG j at slot t, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7392\_replaced([11190186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmPlmnAvgHighShare\_p(t): average resource share for high priority traffic of PLMN p at slot t, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31465\_replaced([11188649](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvd20fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota\_j: maximum quota of RG j measured in terms of cell resource, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31404\_replaced([11188028](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcoufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmRGAvgShare\_j(t): average resource share of RG j at slot t, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7392\_replaced([11190186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmPlmnAvgShare\_p(t): average resource share for PLMN p at slot t, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31465\_replaced([11188649](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvd20fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmAllowPlmnResourceSharing: whether PLMN resource sharing is allowed or not. The value is True or False, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7385\_replaced([11188019](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcot_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmRgIterm\_j: the integral term of PI control for RG j.

rdEnhSvcPiPGainDL:  R&D parameter, the proportional gain of PI control used in the PVC algorithm, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29759\_replaced([11193759](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvvjpfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

hasLowBuffer(j): returns the current low buffer traffic state of RG j, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23506\_replaced([11187568](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcBpfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

hasLowBufferPLMN(p): returns the current low buffer traffic state of PLMN p, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31318\_replaced([11188465](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvdPyfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rdPlmnTargetShareToleranceDL: R&D parameter, tolerance of the overshoot of average usage of a PLMN when resource sharing is not allowed for the PLMN, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31224\_replaced([11194101](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvym9vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmPlmnWeight\_p(t): PLMN weight of PLMN p at slot t.

rdLowBufferRgWeightAmplifierDL: this R&D parameter is used in PVC algorithm when PI control is enabled to increase the chance that DRBs of a low buffer RG get scheduled, so that the RG can get its target share when enough traffic will be available, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31197\_replaced([11194091](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvym9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rgWeightUpdateWithPiControl(j): the function that updates RG Weight with PI Control for RG j, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_32118\_replaced([11187980](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcotPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The rationale behind setting RG weight of a low buffer RG to a static high value is to avoid PI control for the RG, because it may be impossible to attain the target share due to the low buffer traffic demand. Setting a high RG weight has the advantage to let the RG quickly attain the target share when high traffic demand comes.

**3.29.12.2.0-4.0-8**  (ID: `11188561`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler
Compute Dynamic Target Shares for Non-empty Buffer RGs

**3.29.12.2.0-4.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `11188639`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler
11188639:
PLMN Aware Scheduler
gNB-DU executes computeNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShares() to compute dynamic target shares for non-empty buffer RGs in a **virtual** slot.\*\*\*\*

Initialize [image-0][image\_desc]The image contains blurry text. Function computeNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShares()

Make a list *P that contains all PLMNs*

For each PLMN *p in* P\*\*

[image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a blurry, pixelated rendering of the letters "Qp". The "Q" is larger and appears to be in a light blue and orange color scheme, while the "p" is smaller and in a yellow and red color scheme. For each RG *k in PLMN [image-3][image\_desc]The image is a close-up, blurry, and abstract representation of a person's face, possibly a woman, with a focus on the eye area. The colors are muted, with shades of beige, brown, and white, and there are hints of blue and orange. [image-4][image\_desc]The image contains the following text: rrrn NonempBuf RGDynamicT ar getSharek = 0[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14493.004.png[/image\_path][/image-4]

End For

Remove *p from* P\*\*

End If

End For

[image-5][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is:

Notations:

rrmNonempBufRGs\_p: the set of non-empty buffer RGs of PLMN p.

rrmRecompRGTargetShare\_k: recomputed target share of non-empty buffer RG k. To improve performance, it is only computed when necessary.

rrmNonempBufPlmnTargetShare\_p: the expected resources allocated to a non-empty buffer PLMN p.

rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare\_k: dynamic target share for non-empty buffer RG k, considering resources usable by the PLMN.

computeNonempBufRGs(p): compute the set of non-empty buffer RGs of PLMN p, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_28685\_replaced([11187810](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcBqvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmAllowPlmnResourceSharing: whether PLMN resource sharing is allowed or not. The value is True or False, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7385\_replaced([11188019](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcot_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmPlmnTargetShare\_p: target share of PLMN *p, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7385\_replaced([11188019](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcot_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).*

[CB012238-C-UPD001]

rrmRGTargetShare\_j: target share of RG j, see [11189080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_XoObIPvPEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

rrmExistEmptyBufferRGs\_p: whether any of the RGs in PLMN p is in empty buffer state, see [11187810](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_RAU6EPvPEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

rrmRGDynamicTargetShare\_j: dynamic target share of RG j, see [11189551](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvgTFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

rrmEmptyBufferRGsLowBufferRGsMatch\_p: whether the set of empty buffer RGs match exactly the set of low buffer RGs in PLMN p, see [11187810.](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcBqvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

[End CB012238-C-UPD001]

---

#### 3.29.12.2.0-5 PLMN Aware Scheduler PRB Bookkeeping (ID: 11188645)

**3.29.12.2.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11188649`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler
PLMN Resource Share Bookkeeping

---

**3.29.12.2.0-5.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11188664`)

PLMN Aware Scheduler
11188664:
PLMN Aware Scheduler
After the resource allocation in each slot, if PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_16121\_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and available PRBs for SAS is greater than 0 (rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t) > 0, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7577\_replaced([11190661](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6K_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the instantaneous and average PLMN resource share shall be updated for each PLMN.

Instantaneous PLMN resource share shall be updated after instantaneous RG resource shares are updated for all RGs of the PLMN. Average PLMN resource share shall be updated after average RG resource shares are updated for all RGs of the PLMN (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7392\_replaced([11190186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

L2PS shall compute the instantaneous resource share of PLMN p at slot t rrmPlmnInstShare\_p(t) as the sum of the instantaneous resource share of all RGs of PLMN p:

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is:
$rrmPlmnInstShare\_p(t) = \sum\_{each RG j \in PLMN p} rrmRGInstShare\_j(t)$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14496.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0].

L2PS shall compute the average resource share of PLMN p at slot t rrmPlmnAvgShare\_p(t) as the sum of the average resource share of all RGs of PLMN p:

[image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is:
$rrm PLMN AvgShare\_p(t) = \sum\_{each RG j \in PLMN p} rrm RG AvgShare\_j(t)$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14496.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1].

L2PS shall compute the average resource share for high priority traffic of PLMN p at slot t rrmPlmnAvgHighShare\_p(t) as the sum of the average resource share for high priority traffic of all RGs of PLMN p:

[image-2][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is:
$rrmPlmnAvgHighShare\_e(t) = \sum\_{each RG j \in PLMN\_p} rrmRGAvgHighShare\_j(t)$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14496.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2].

---

### 3.29.12.3 Slice Aware Scheduler

#### 3.29.12.3.0-1 Slice Aware Scheduler Introduction (ID: 11188675)

**3.29.12.3.0-1.0-7**  (ID: `13485471`)

Slice Aware Scheduler
If NRBTS.actSliceAwareScheduler = True,

L2-PS shall be aware of the available configured Resource Groups (RGs), their quotas, and the DRBs belonging to each **configured** RG.\*\*\*\*

Slice aware scheduler is only supported for FR1 (both TDD and FDD).

L2-PS shall obtain the following info during cell setup in the *PsCell\_CellSetupReq message (& cell reconfig in the* PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq message):\*\*

* The number of resource group (RG) and theirs IDs
* Configuration of default RGs should be also delivered

The prioritized minimum quota & maximum quota for each RG (*rrmRGMinQuota &* rrmRGMaxQuota: 0<=*rrmRGMinQuota <=1.0 and 0<*rrmRGMaxQuota <=1.0. 0 means 0% and 1.0 means 100%. )\*\*\*\*

where:

*rrmRGMinQuota: The minimum percentage of cell resources for slice aware scheduler that is allocated to a resource group.*

*rrmRGMaxQuota: The maximum percentage of cell resources for slice aware scheduler that is allocated to a resource group.*

[CB016273-A]

If intent-throughput slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchIntentTput = True), the intent throughput for each RG (rrmIntentTput, 0 <= rrmIntentTput <= 62,500,000 bytes/sec)

where

rrmIntentTput*: The intent throughput that is the average throughput per nonGBR UE measured in bytes/sec for a resource group.*

[End CB016273-A]

A DRB that is not associated with an RG is handled by default RG.

For each RG, an RG-specific weight is obtained as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7389\_replaced([11188798](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved7fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The RG weight is then used such that the average resource usage of each RG (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7392\_replaced([11190186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) converges to a target share when possible.

If QoS fairness slice aware scheduler is not activated on parent gNB(NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchQosFairness = False), using the provided quotas, L2-PS shall calculate for each RG a target resource share using the Slice Volume Control (SVC)  algorithm (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7390\_replaced([11189080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfE9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

else [CB016273-A] if intent-throughput slice aware scheduler is deactivated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchIntentTput = False) [End CB016273-A], using both provided quotas and average total scheduling weight for RG, L2-PS shall calculate for each RG the target resource share using Qos fairness target share computation algorithm(see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_33006\_replaced([11189488](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfsCvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and the cell level maximum quota (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31404\_replaced([11188028](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcoufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

[CB016273-A] else (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchIntentTput = True), using both provided quotas, the intent throughput and average total scheduling weight for RG, L2-PS shall calculate for each RG the target resource share using intent-based partitioning target share computation algorithm (see [13480948](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Hy04qT4nEfG0jPRAdLhzvA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) [End CB016273-A] [CB016273-C] and the cell level maximum quota (see [11188028](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcoufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [End CB016273-C], at the end of each virtual slot.

Then, if NRBTS.actDynamicTargetShareCalcForRg = TRUE, L2PS shall compute the dynamic target shares for non-empty buffer RGs (see [11190166](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_dNNtyPvPEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), at the end of each virtual slot.

To achieve the calculated target resource share, L2PS shall calculate a RG-specific weight  (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7389\_replaced([11188798](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved7fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

L2PS shall use the RG-specific weights in the following parts of the DL scheduler:

L2PS shall use the slice-specific weights in the following parts of the DL scheduler:

* UEs selection for CS1 (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4209\_replaced([11174627](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kudxRfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),
* UE selection, by altering the PF metric (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4232\_replaced([11175151](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kug0nPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),
* Resource allocation for initial non-GBR Tx and initial deprioritized GBR/DC-GBR Tx (outer WRR) (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4504\_replaced([11179776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku7ESfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),or DL ES([12483324](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_qeQ48g-XEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ)),
* Non-GBR and deprioritized GBR/DC-GBR DRB resource allocation for each to-be-scheduled UE (inner WRR) (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7536\_replaced([11185805](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvV7B_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

---

#### 3.29.12.3.0-2 Slice Aware Scheduler Configured Slice and Unconfigured Slice (ID: 11188712)

**3.29.12.3.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `11188727`)

Slice Aware Scheduler
[Before CB008828-C]

Irrespective of the value of the flag sliceAwareSchedulerCellActivation, L2-PS shall create the list of saved slices for a cell after the cell setup (the slices are contained in the PsCell\_CellSetupReq message) and after the cell reconfiguration (the slices are contained in the PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq message).

A slice refers to an SA slice or an NSA slice or an NSA resource group (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7387\_replaced([11188675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvd21PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

If a slice is contained in the list of saved slices for a cell, then the slice is configured  for the cell, otherwise, the slice is unconfigured for the cell.

[CB008828-C]

Irrespective of the value of the flag sliceAwareSchedulerCellActivation, L2-PS shall create the list of saved resource groups (RGs)  for a cell after the cell setup (the RGs are contained in the PsCell\_CellSetupReq message) and after the cell reconfiguration (the RGs are contained in the PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq message).

A DRB is not associated with an RG is handled by default RG (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7387\_replaced([11188675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvd21PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Note that DRB either is handled by either configured RG or default RG. Further information about the priority handling of RG and default RG can be found in (5G\_UP\_ALG\_19736\_replaced([11188754](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved5fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[END CB008828-C]

---

#### 3.29.12.3.0-3 Slice Aware Scheduler Handling of DRBs from Unconfigured Slices (ID: 11188733)

**3.29.12.3.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `11188749`)

Slice Aware Scheduler
If NRBTS.actSliceAwareScheduler = True,

then a default RG is mandated to be configured per DRB, and the first time a ([CB008600-F]DC-GBR/[End CB008600-F]GBR/non-GBR) DRB from an unconfigured resource group (RG) is identified, it shall be handled by a default resource group (RG) (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7390\_replaced([11189080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfE9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the computation of target share). After the RG assignment, the DRB is considered to belong to the default RG until its RG is configured for the cell. After the configuration of its RG, irrespective of the flag sliceAwareSchedulerCellActivation, the DRB is assigned to its configured RG.

If a DRB is assigned to a defualt RG or its RG, its scheduling weight shall be counted in the computation of total scheduling weight when updating RG weight for that specific default RG or its RG (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7389\_replaced([11188798](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved7fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The counting of the scheduling weight can be done at the first time the DRB is added/configured to a default RG or its RG.

---

#### 3.29.12.3.0-4 Slice Aware Scheduler DRB to Resource Group Mapping (ID: 11188754)

**3.29.12.3.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `11188764`)

Slice Aware Scheduler
[CB008828-C] The rationale of the table below is the following: the assignment of a DRB to a RG only happens once in the lifetime of the DRB and is permanent. If a DRB is not assigned to any RG, then this DRB is handled by the default RG at that time. The default RG shall be received from the control plane for every DRB.

The following table should be used for the mapping of DRB to Resource Group.

|  |
| --- |
| Upon DRB addition, newly added DRB is assigned to RG as a part of DRB configuration. |
| In runtime, if UE's DRB is not assigned to any RG then it is handled by default RG according to current configuration. |
| If UE's DRB is assigned to RG which does not exist any longer then it is handled by default RG according to current configuration. |

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Scenario | Existing DRBs |
| Feature enabling in the runtime | 1. For the first time enabling the feature: DRBs were not assigned to any RG. They are handled within default RG pointed by the current configuration. 2. When the feature was enabled previously and there are some DRBs with assigned RG: a) then such DRBs are handled with the assigned RG if this RG still exists in the current configuration. b) or if this RG is not present anymore in current configuration, then such DRBs are handled within default RG pointed by the current configuration. |
| Default RG change | 1. DRBs not assigned to any RG will be handled within newly pointed 'default RG' by the current configuration. 2. Also, DRBs assigned to RG which does not exist in the current configuration will be handled within newly pointed 'default RG' by the current configuration. 3. However, change of the default RG does not change existing RG assignment to DRBs. This means DRBs continue to be handled within already assigned RG. |
| RG removal | 1. DRBs assigned to RG which has been removed will be handled within 'default RG' pointed by the current configuration. 2. However, if the removed RG was pointed as 'default RG', it entails 'default RG change' scenario. |
| RG addition | 1. If the feature had been enabled previously and there are some DRBs which are assigned to that newly created RG then such DRBs are handled within this RG. |

Note: If UE's DRB is assigned to RG which does not exist any longer then it is handled by default RG according to current configuration.

[End CB008828-C]

---

#### 3.29.12.3.0-5 Slice Aware Scheduler Slice Volume Control / Enhanced Slice Volume Control per Virtual Slot (ID: 11188771)

**3.29.12.3.0-5.0-3**  (ID: `11188788`)

Slice Aware Scheduler
This functionality applies only when slice aware scheduler is activated (sliceAwareSchedulerCellActivation = True).

If dynamic SVC[CB008250-AB]/PVC[End CB008250-AB] execution period is not allowed (rdEnableNrtSvcDL = 0, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31387\_replaced([11193799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvvjs_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), a virtual slot is defined to include rdSvcExecutionPeriodDL (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30522\_replaced([11193737](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvvjofvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) consecutive DL slots that contain PDSCH resources, otherwise, a virtual slot is defined to include n consecutive DL slots that contain PDSCH resources, where 1<=n<= rdMaxSvcExecutionPeriodDL (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31385\_replaced([11193788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvvjq_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Different virtual slots may have different execution periods (n). The virtual slot with smallest execution period that is allowed by the system load shall be selected.

The rationale for introducing dynamic SVC[CB008250-AB]/PVC[End CB008250-AB] execution period is to achieve a good trade-off between runtime overhead and convergence quality of slice aware scheduler. Increasing the SVC[CB008250-AB]/PVC[End CB008250-AB] execution period has the advantage of low runtime overhead and the disadvantage of low convergence quality---long time to converge to target shares and large oscillations around target shares. The largest execution period of rdMaxSvcExecutionPeriodDL guarantees the convergence to target shares.

With dynamic SVC[CB008250-AB]/PVC[End CB008250-AB]  execution period allowed, the execution of (enhanced) SVC[CB008250-AB]/PVC[End CB008250-AB] algorithm is to be done flexibly in each slot or over several slots depending on system task execution overhead. As a result, allowed SVC[CB008250-AB]/PVC[End CB008250-AB] execution period n can be different for different virtual slots. Details of the procedure are left for implementation.

[CB008250-AB] If PLMN aware scheduler is activated (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_16121\_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), PVC algorithm needs to be executed once per virtual slot; else [End CB008250-AB] If enhanced slice aware scheduler is activated (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_12237\_replaced([11288194](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tp5RdPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), enhanced SVC algorithm (5G\_UP\_ALG\_23499\_replaced([11189521](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfsDvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) needs to be executed once per virtual slot; otherwise, SVC algorithm (5G\_UP\_ALG\_7388\_replaced([11188793](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved7PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) needs to be executed once per virtual slot. That means RG weight (rrmRGWeight) of an RG is updated by (enhanced) SVC[CB008250-AB]/PVC[End CB008250-AB] algorithm once per virtual slot.

---

#### 3.29.12.3.1 Slice Volume Control (SVC)

##### 3.29.12.3.1.0-1 Slice Volume Control (SVC) Slice/RG weights (ID: 11188798)

**3.29.12.3.1.0-1.0-6**  (ID: `11189075`)

Slice Volume Control (SVC)
11189075:
Slice Volume Control (SVC)
If sliceAwareSchedulerCellActivation = True, L2PS shall compute the resource group weights for each configured resource group(RG) j at the end of each virtual slot. First, an intermediate value is calculated as follows:
 
 
[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation defines a variable `rrmRGWeightInterm_i` as the maximum of two values: `rdRGWeightSmall` and a fraction. The numerator of the fraction is `rrmRGTargetShareTemp_i - rrmRGAvgHighShare_i`. The denominator of the fraction is `max{1; Σ_{j∈J_i^{NGBR}} schedulWeight_j}`.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14527.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]
 
 
where,
 
\* rdRGWeightSmall : is a small positive value used if rrmRGTargetShareTemp <  rrmRGAvgHighShare (instead of 0; to avoid blocking low priority traffic when high priority traffic is consuming the slice's share)
\* rrmRGTargetShareTemp : Defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7390\_replaced([11189080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfE9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
\* rrmRGAvgHighShare : Defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7392\_replaced([11190186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
\* [image-1][image\_desc]The image contains the text "JNCBR" with a subscript "i" below the "J". The text is blurry and has a colorful halo effect.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14527.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]: Non-GBR DRBs (excluding 5QI-5) belonging to RG i
\* schedulWeight\_j: scheduling weight of DRB j
 
This intermediate value is then corrected to take into account the actual consumed resources by the RG:
If NRBTS.actDynamicTargetShareCalcForRg = FALSE
If [image-2][image\_desc]The image contains the text "rrmRGTargetShare₁ = 0". The text is in a light color against a white background. The characters are slightly blurred.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14527.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2]
 
[image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula presented as a piecewise function. The formula defines `rrmRGWeight_i` based on the value of `rrmRGAvgShare_i` relative to `rrmRGMaxQuota_i`.
The formula is as follows:
`rrmRGWeight_i =`
\* `0` if `rrmRGAvgShare_i >= rrmRGMaxQuota_i`
\* `rrmRGWeightInterm_i * ((rrmRGMaxQuota_i - rrmRGAvgShare_i) / rrmRGMaxQuota_i)` if `0 < rrmRGAvgShare_i < rrmRGMaxQuota_i`
\* `rrmRGWeightInterm_i` if `rrmRGAvgShare_i = 0`[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14527.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3]
 
 
Else
 
[image-4][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula presented as a piecewise function. The formula defines `rrmRGWeight_i` based on different conditions related to `rrmRGAvgShare_i`, `rrmRGMaxQuota_i`, and `rrmRGTargetShare_i`.
Here's the breakdown of the formula:
`rrmRGWeight_i` is defined as:
\* **0** if `rrmRGAvgShare_i >= rrmRGMaxQuota_i`
\* `rrmRGWeightInterm_i * ( (rrmRGMaxQuota_i - rrmRGAvgShare_i) / (rrmRGMaxQuota_i - rrmRGTargetShare_i) )` if `rrmRGTargetShare_i < rrmRGAvgShare_i < rrmRGMaxQuota_i`
\* `rrmRGWeightInterm_i * (1 + (n-1) * ( (rrmRGTargetShare_i - rrmRGAvgShare_i) / rrmRGTargetShare_i ) )` if `0 <= rrmRGAvgShare_i <= rrmRGTargetShare_i`[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14527.005.png[/image\_path][/image-4]
Else
 If RG i is an empty buffer RG, i.e., RG i is in not in rrmNonempBufRGs
[image-5][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula presented as a piecewise function. The formula defines `rrmRGWeight_i` based on the value of `rrmRGAvgShare_i` relative to `rrmRGMaxQuota_i`.
The formula is as follows:
$$
rrmRGWeight\_i =
\begin{cases}
0 & \text{for } rrmRGAvgShare\_i \geq rrmRGMaxQuota\_i \
rrmRGWeightIntermix\_i \times (1 + (n-1) \times \frac{rrmRGMaxQuota\_i - rrmRGAvgShare\_i}{rrmRGMaxQuota\_i}) & \text{for } 0 \leq rrmRGAvgShare\_i < rrmRGMaxQuota\_i
\end{cases}
$$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14527.006.png[/image\_path][/image-5]
 
  
 Else
 If [image-6][image\_desc]The image contains the text "rrrn NonempBuf RGDynamicT ar getShare = 0". The text is blurry and difficult to read.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14527.007.png[/image\_path][/image-6]
 
[image-7][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula presented as a piecewise function. The formula defines `rrmRGWeight_i` based on the value of `rrmRGAvgShare_i` relative to `rrmRGMaxQuota_i`.
The formula is as follows:
`rrmRGWeight_i = {`
`0`[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14527.008.png[/image\_path][/image-7] 
 
Else
[image-8][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula presented as a piecewise function. The formula defines `rrmRGWeight` based on different conditions related to `rrmRGAvgShare`, `rrmRGMaxQuota`, and `rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare`.
Here's a breakdown of the formula:
`rrmRGWeight` is defined as:
\* **Case 1:** `0`
\* Condition: `rrmRGAvgShareᵢ ≥ rrmRGMaxQuotaᵢ`
\* **Case 2:** `rrmRGWeightIntermᵢ × ( (rrmRGMaxQuotaᵢ - rrmRGAvgShareᵢ) / (rrmRGMaxQuotaᵢ - rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShareᵢ) )`
\* Condition: `rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShareᵢ < rrmRGAvgShareᵢ < rrmRGMaxQuotaᵢ`
\* **Case 3:** `rrmRGWeightIntermᵢ × (1 + (n - 1) × ( (rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShareᵢ - rrmRGAvgShareᵢ) / rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShareᵢ ))`
\* Condition: `0 ≤ rrmRGAvgShareᵢ ≤ rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShareᵢ`[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14527.009.png[/image\_path][/image-8]
Note: the conditions in the above piecewise equations should be evaluated in order. The value of the first satisfied condition should be taken. As an optimization, if a resource group satisfies  [image-9][image\_desc]The image contains the mathematical expression "rrmRG AvgShareᵢ ≥ rrmRGMaxQuotaᵢ". The text is slightly blurry.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14527.010.png[/image\_path][/image-9] in a virtual slot, then [image-10][image\_desc]The image contains the text "rrmRGWeightᵢ = 0". The text is in a light color against a white background. The letters are slightly blurred, but still legible. The subscript "i" is present after the letter "t".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14527.011.png[/image\_path][/image-10]  and the step to compute [image-11][image\_desc]The image contains the text "rrmRGWeightlntem,". The text is in a light color against a white background. The letters are slightly blurred and appear to be in a sans-serif font.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14527.012.png[/image\_path][/image-11] can be skipped.
where,
       n = rdRGWeightBelowTargetFactor  If NRBTS.actHighSliceWeightFactor = True, then default value = 500, Else default value = 8, chosen based on simulation results)
\* rrmRGTargetShare : Defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7390\_replaced([11189080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfE9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
\* rrmRGAvgShare : Defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7392\_replaced([11190186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
\* rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare: Defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_28683\_replaced([11190166](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvgTIPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
\* rrmNonempBufRGs: Defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_28683\_replaced([11190166](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvgTIPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
 
If sliceAwareSchedulerCellActivation = False, the RG weights shall be set to 1.
 
If a configured RG i has RG weight rrmRGWeight\_i = 0, then no resource will be allocated to initial transmissions of nonGBR and deprioritized GBR[CB008600-F]/deprioritized DC-GBR[End CB008600-F] DRBs of RG i in the next virtual slot. However, some resource may be allocated to initial transmissions and retransmissions of GBR[CB008600-F]/DC-GBR[End CB008600-F] DRBs, or to retransmissions of nonGBR and deprioritized GBR[CB008600-F]/DC-GBR[End CB008600-F] DRBs of RG i in the next virtual slot.

##### 3.29.12.3.1.0-2 Slice Volume Control (SVC) Slice/RG Target Share Computed for All Configured Slices/RGs (ID: 11189080)

**3.29.12.3.1.0-2.0-8**  (ID: `13491863`)

Slice Volume Control (SVC)
If at least one of these is activated for a cell

* Slice aware scheduler(5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_5021\_replaced([11288045](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tp4DWvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* Enhanced slice aware scheduler (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_12233\_replaced([11278970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* PLMN aware scheduler (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_16121\_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

AND

* QoS fairness slice aware scheduler is deactivated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchQosFairness = False)

, a target share for every **configured** RG *i  is calculated based on the provided quotas as follows:*\*\*\*\*

If every configured **resource group (RG) *i satisfies [image-0][image\_desc]The image contains the mathematical equation "rrmRGMinQuota₁ = rrmRGMaxQuota₁". The text is in a blurry, italicized font.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14534.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0], equivalently  [image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$$ \sum\_{v\_j} (rrnRGMaxQuota\_j - rrnRGMinQuota\_j) = 0 $$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14534.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1],***

then every RG i, [image-2][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a blurry, italicized font. The equation reads:
`rrmRGT ar getShare e₁ = rrmRGMinQuota₁`[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14534.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2]

Else

[image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is:
$rrmRGTargetShare\_i = min \begin{cases} rrmRGMinQuota\_i + \frac{rrmRGMaxQuota\_i - rrmRGMinQuota\_i}{\sum\_{\forall j}(rrmRGMaxQuota\_j - rrmRGMinQuota\_j)} \times (1.0 - \sum\_{\forall j} rrmRGMinQuota\_j) \ rrmRGMaxQuota\_i \end{cases}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14534.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3]

where

* [image-4][image\_desc]The image contains the text "rrmRGMinQuota & rrmRGMaxQuota". The text is slightly blurry and appears to be in a sans-serif font. The letters are in lowercase, except for "R", "G", "M", and "Q" which are capitalized. The ampersand symbol "&" is present between the two words.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14534.005.png[/image\_path][/image-4] are defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7387\_replaced([11188675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvd21PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* .[image-5][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical symbol that appears to be a summation sign followed by the Greek letter 'v' and the letter 'j'. The summation sign is large and bold, with a gradient effect. The 'v' and 'j' are smaller and appear to be subscripts to the summation sign. The overall image is a close-up of this mathematical notation.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14534.007.png[/image\_path][/image-5]: if PLMN aware scheduler is activated ([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), summation over all RGs of the PLMN to which RG i belongs; otherwise, summation over all RGs of the cell

Else If at least one of these is activated for a cell

* Slice aware scheduler(5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_5021\_replaced([11288045](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tp4DWvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and NRBTS.actDynamicTargetShareCalcForRg = True
* Enhanced slice aware scheduler (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_12233\_replaced([11278970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* PLMN aware scheduler (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_16121\_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

AND

* QoS fairness slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchQosFairness = True)

​​​​​[CB016273-A]​​

AND

* Intent-throughput slice aware scheduler is deactivated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchIntentTput = False)

[End CB016273-A]

, target share calculation for each configured RG shall follow 5G\_UP\_ALG\_33006\_replaced([11189488](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfsCvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),

[CB016273-A]

Else If at least one of these is activated for a cell

* Slice aware scheduler(5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_5021\_replaced([11288045](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tp4DWvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and NRBTS.actDynamicTargetShareCalcForRg = True
* Enhanced slice aware scheduler (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_12233\_replaced([11278970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* PLMN aware scheduler (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_16121\_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

AND

* QoS fairness slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchQosFairness = True)

AND

* Intent-throughput slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchIntentTput = True)

[End CB016273-A]

, target share calculation for each configured RG shall follow [13480948](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Hy04qT4nEfG0jPRAdLhzvA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

To compute target share of RG j, if PLMN aware scheduler is activated, the input param---set of RGs S shall be set to all RGs of the PLMN to which RG j belongs; otherwise, S shall be set to all RGs of the cell.

Depending on the unused resources computed in the last slot t of a virtual slot, a temporary target share is calculated for that slot t:

If NRBTS.actDynamicTargetShareCalcForRg = FALSE

[image-6][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$rrmRGT ar getShareTemp\_i = min { rrmRGT ar getShare\_i + rrmRGU nusedShare (t) \times \frac{rrmRGT ar getShare\_i}{\sum\_{\forall j} rrmRGT ar getShare\_j} ; rrmRGMaxQuota\_i }$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14534.006.png[/image\_path][/image-6]

where,

 [image-7][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical symbol that appears to be a summation sign followed by the Greek letter 'v' and the letter 'j'. The summation sign is large and bold, with a gradient effect. The 'v' and 'j' are smaller and appear to be subscripts to the summation sign. The overall image is a close-up of this mathematical notation.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14534.007.png[/image\_path][/image-7]: summation over all RGs

 [image-8][image\_desc]The image contains the text "rrmRGU nusedShare". The text is in a light color against a white background, and the letters are slightly blurred.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14534.008.png[/image\_path][/image-8]: Defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7392\_replaced([11190186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Else

If RG *i is an empty buffer RG, i.e., RG* i is not in *rrmNonempBufRGs*\*\*

[image-9][image\_desc]The image contains text that appears to be code or a variable assignment. The text is blurry and difficult to read clearly. It seems to read: "rrrRGT targetShareTemp = rrrRGMaxQuota".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14534.009.png[/image\_path][/image-9]

Else

[image-10][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is:
$rrmRGTargetShareTemp\_i = min { rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare\_i + rrmRGunusedShare(t) \times \frac{rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare\_i}{\sum\_{jerrnNonempBufRGs} rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare\_j}, rrmRGMaxQuota\_i }$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14534.010.png[/image\_path][/image-10]

where,

 rrmRGUnusedShare: Defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7392\_replaced([11190186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

 rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare & rrmNonempBufRGs: Defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_28683\_replaced([11190166](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvgTIPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

All quotas and target shares are between 0 and 1.0, where 0 means 0% and 1.0 means 100%.

Note, as an optimization, if an RG i satisfies the condition rrmRGAvgShare\_i >= rrmRGMaxQuota\_i in a virtual slot, then the step to compute rrmRGTargetShareTemp\_i for RG i can be skipped.

---

##### 3.29.12.3.1.0-3 Slice Volume Control (SVC) Slice/RG Dynamic Target Share Computed for a Set of Slices/RGs (ID: 11189319)

**3.29.12.3.1.0-3.0-4**  (ID: `13492108`)

Slice Volume Control (SVC)
Given a set of configured RGs *S (*S is a subset of all configure RGs of the cell), if sliceAwareSchedulerCellActivation = True, a dynamic target share for every RG *i in* S can be computed in the same way as in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7390\_replaced([11189080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfE9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), except that the computation of dynamic target share is performed over the set *S while the computation of target share (5G\_UP\_ALG\_7390\_replaced([11189080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfE9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is performed over the set of all configured RGs. The computed dynamic target share for an RG* i in *S is denoted as* rrmRGDynamicTargetShare\_{i, S}***\****\*

Note, if QoS fairness slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB(NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchQosFairness = True) [CB016273-A] and intent-throughput slice aware scheduler is deactivated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchIntentTput = False) [End CB016273-A], dynamic target shares shall be computed according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_33006\_replaced([11189488](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfsCvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [CB016273-A] If QoS fairness slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB(NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchQosFairness = True) and intent-throughput slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchIntentTput = True), dynamic target shares shall be computed according to [13480948](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Hy04qT4nEfG0jPRAdLhzvA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). [End CB016273-A]

---

##### 3.29.12.3.1.0-4 Slice Volume Control (SVC) Normalized Slice/RG Target Share (ID: 11189335)

**3.29.12.3.1.0-4.0-4**  (ID: `11189440`)

Slice Volume Control (SVC)
11189440:
Slice Volume Control (SVC)
Normalized Resource Group (RG) target share of RG i , [image-0][image\_desc]The image contains the text "rm.NormRGTargetShare,". The text is in a dark color against a light, slightly blurred background. The letters are mostly clear, but there is some slight blurring, particularly around the edges of the characters. The overall impression is of a digital display or a screenshot of text.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14542.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0] is defined as

If (enhanced slice aware scheduler is deactivated for a cell (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_12237\_replaced([11288194](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tp5RdPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) and (NRBTS.actDynamicTargetShareCalcForRg = False)

[image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is:
$rrmNormRGT targetShare\_i = \frac{rrmRGT targetShare\_i}{max{1, \sum\_{j \in j\_i^{NGB}} scheduleWeight\_j}}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14542.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

Else

[image-2][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$rrmNormRGTshare\_i = \frac{rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare\_i}{\max{1, \sum\_{j \in R} scheduleWeight\_j}}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14542.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2]

End If

where,

rrmRGTargetShare\_i: the RG target share of RG i as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7390\_replaced([11189080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfE9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare\_i: dynamic target share for non-empty buffer RG i as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_28683\_replaced([11190166](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvgTIPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [CB008250-AB] for enhanced slice aware scheduler and in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31503\_replaced([11188561](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvdPzfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for PLMN aware scheduler. [End CB008250-AB].

J\_i^NGBR : the set of non-GBR DRBs excluding 5QI-5 belonging to RG i

schedulWeight\_j: scheduling weight of DRB j

---

##### 3.29.12.3.1.0-5 Slice Volume Control (SVC) Slice/RG Load (ID: 11189445)

**3.29.12.3.1.0-5.0-2**  (ID: `11189478`)

Slice Volume Control (SVC)
11189478:
Slice Volume Control (SVC)
If  [CB008250-C] PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_16121\_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), or [End CB008250-C] sliceAwareSchedulerCellActivation = True and NRBTS/NRCELL.actNbrForNonGbrBearers = TRUE and NRBTS/NRCELL.nbrPdschCongHandling = TRUE, gNB shall calculate DL load per Resource Group as follows:

* The instantaneous DL load per Resource Group is calculated at every DL slot t:

If [CB008250-C] PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_16121\_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), or [End CB008250-C] enhanced slice aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_12237\_replaced([11288194](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tp5RdPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or NRBTS.actDynamicTargetShareCalcForRg = TRUE

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is:
$rrmRGInstLoadDL(t) = \frac{rrmRGHighInstShare(t) + rrmRGNbrInstShareDL\_i(t)}{rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare\_i}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14545.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

Else

[image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$rrmRGInstLoadDL\_i(t) = \frac{rrmRGHighInstShare\_i(t) + rrmRGNbrInstShareDL\_i(t)}{rrmRGTargetShare\_i}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14545.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

where

* i: each configured Resource Group
* rrmRGHighInstShare\_i(t): the instantaneous resource share of high priority traffic classes of RG i, defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7392\_replaced([11190186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* rrmRGNbrInstShareDL\_i(t): the instantaneous resource share of NBR DRB of RG i, defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23527\_replaced([11191434](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvhhN_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* rrmRGTargetShare\_i: the target share for every configured RG i , defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7390\_replaced([11189080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfE9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare\_i: the dynamic target share for non-empty buffer RG\_i, [CB008250-C] if PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_16121\_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31503\_replaced([11188561](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvdPzfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), else, as [End CB008250-C] defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_28683\_replaced([11190166](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvgTIPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Exception:

If rrmRGTargetShare\_i=0, then rrmRGTargetShare\_i shall be set to 0.01.

If rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare\_i = 0, then rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare\_i shall be set to 0.01.

* The DL average resource group load can be obtained by applying an exponentially moving average over time window τ :

[image-2][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation presented in a piecewise format. The equation defines a variable `rrmRGAvgLoadDL;(t)` based on the value of `t`.
For `t = 1`, the variable is equal to `rrmRGInstLoadDL;(t)`.
For `t > 1`, the variable is defined by a recursive formula:
`rrmRGAvgLoadDL;(t) = (ε / (1 + τ)) * rrmRGInstLoadDL;(t) + (1 - ε / (1 + τ)) * rrmRGAvgLoadDL;(t-1)`[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14545.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2]

where,

* i: each configured Resource Group
* τ = rdRGAvgShareFilterWindow : is the exponential filter time window (default value=100)
* ε = rdRGAvgShareFilterFactor: is the exponential filter smoothing factor (default value=1)

Note that when a configured Resource Group is newly created or a Resource Group is changed from the default state to the configured state, then t is reset to 1.

---

##### 3.29.12.3.1.0-6 Slice Volume Control (SVC) Slice/RG Weights for critical non-GBR (ID: 13415176)

**3.29.12.3.1.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `13415177`)

Slice Volume Control (SVC)
Critical non-GBR/congestion de-prioritized critical GBR traffic under criticalDrbTraffic (refer to [13393326](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_lHKq4wZMEfGozuGzRUXHpg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) is always exempted from the standard quota-based volume control. The scheduler allocates resources to critical non-GBR traffic based on a combination of its scheduling weight and a calculated maximum RG weight.

Other traffic types, such as non-critical non-GBR, de-prioritized GBR and de-prioritized DC-GBR is fully subject to the standard Slice Volume Control and the normal weight of their respective RGs.

For critical non-GBR, maximum RG weight is calculated:

(2 \* rdEnhSvcPiPGainDL + 1) \* rdLowBufRgWeightAmplifierDL with default rd parameter values (refer to [11189878](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvgTGfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))

Note: The RG weight is used for all scheduling computations. This includes the calculation of the PF metric for time-domain UE selection (refer to [11175151](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kug0nPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), as well as the determination of resource shares in both the prioritized (first round) and standard Weighted Round Robin (second round) allocation phases.

---

#### 3.29.12.3.2 Enhanced Slice Volume Control (SVC)

##### 3.29.12.3.2.0-1 Enhanced Slice Volume Control (SVC) Algorithm of Enhanced SVC (ID: 11189525)

**3.29.12.3.2.0-1.0-6**  (ID: `13492325`)

Enhanced Slice Volume Control (SVC)
If enhanced slice aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_12237\_replaced([11288194](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tp5RdPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), L2PS shall compute an RG weight for each configured RG in the cell with the enhanced SVC algorithm at the end of each DL virtual slot where a virtual slot is defined **in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30750\_replaced([11188771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved6PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

The enhanced SVC algorithm consists of the following steps:

* If QoS fairness slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchQosFairness = True) [CB016273-A] and intent-throughput slice aware scheduler is deactivated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchIntentTput = False)   
   [End CB016273-A], computation of target shares of all RGs in the cell, according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_33006\_replaced([11189488](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfsCvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [CB016273-A] If QoS fairness slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchQosFairness = True) and intent-throughput slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchIntentTput = True), computation of target shares of all RGs in the cell, according to [13480948](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Hy04qT4nEfG0jPRAdLhzvA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).[End CB016273-A] The target share of RG i is stored at rrmRGTargetShare\_i.
* computation of the low priority traffic target share for each RG (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23504\_replaced([11189551](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvgTFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* feedback control based on the low priority traffic target share (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23508\_replaced([11189878](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvgTGfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* computation of dynamic target shares for non-empty buffer RGs (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_28683\_replaced([11190166](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvgTIPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

---

12639957:
Enhanced Slice Volume Control (SVC)
This step computes the low priority traffic target share for each RG. The procedure is listed as follows. The current slot is denoted *t.*

computeLowBufferStateForRGs()

R = 1.0
End If
rrmExistLowBufferRGs = False

 If hasLowBuffer(*j)*[image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a blurry, light-colored font against a white background. The equation reads: R = R - rrmRG AvgShare,(t).[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14558.005.png[/image\_path][/image-3]

Else

End For
 
Notations:
rrmRGExpLowTargetShare\_j(t): the expected low priority traffic target share for RG* j, computed at slot *t*S: the set of RGs in the cell, whose low priority traffic target share hasn’t been computed.R: remaining quota, 0 <= *R <= 1.0**rrmRGTempTargetShare\_j: temporary target share (including both high priority and low priority traffic) for RG* j*rrmRGTargetShare\_j: target share of RG* j, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7390\_replaced([11189080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfE9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))*hasLowBuffer(*j): whether RG *j is in the low buffer traffic state, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23506\_replaced([11187568](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcBpfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**rrmRGAvgShare\_j(t): average resource share of RG* j at slot *t, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7392\_replaced([11190186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**rrmRGMaxQuota\_j: maximum quota of RG* j*rrmRGAvgHighShare\_j(t): average resource share for high priority traffic of RG* j at slot *t, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7392\_replaced([11190186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**rdRGMinLowShareDL: R&D parameter, minimum resource share given to an RG for its low priority traffic, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23511\_replaced([11193687](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvu8lPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
rrmRGDynamicTargetShare\_j:* The dynamic target share computed for an RG *j in* S according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_28248\_replaced([11189319](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfE_PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).***
computeFullBufferTempTargetShares(): compute the temporary target shares of all RGs, assuming that each RG has full buffer low priority traffic and the actual high priority traffic, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26713\_replaced([11189763](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvgTF_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
rrmRGFullBufferTempTargetShare\_j: temporary target share (including both high priority and low priority traffic) for RG *j, assuming each RG has full buffer low priority traffic and the actual high priority traffic, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26713\_replaced([11189763](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvgTF_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).*
computeLowBufferStateForRGs(): compute the low buffer traffic state for all RGs, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23506\_replaced([11187568](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcBpfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
rrmExistLowBufferRGs: if at least one RG is in low-buffer state and at least one RG is in non-low-buffer state, the value is True.
 
If [CB012238-A-UPD002] (QoS fairness slice aware scheduler is deactivated on parent gNB, NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchQosFairness = False) and [End CB012238-A-UPD002] (dynamic target shares need to be obtained for the same set of RGs S as in the last execution of “Computation of low priority traffic target share”) and (rrmRGMinQuota\_j and rrmRGMaxQuota\_j of every RG j in S stay the same as in the last execution), then the computation of dynamic target shares can be skipped, for better runtime performance.

---

##### 3.29.12.3.2.0-3 Enhanced Slice Volume Control (SVC) Compute temporary target share of RGs assuming each RG has full buffer low priority traffic (ID: 11189763)

**3.29.12.3.2.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `12484328`)

Enhanced Slice Volume Control (SVC)
12484328:
Enhanced Slice Volume Control (SVC)
This procedure computes the temporary target shares of all RGs, assuming that each RG has full buffer low priority traffic and actual (the current) high priority traffic. These temporary target shares are stores in variables rrmRGFullBufferTempTargetShare\_j for every RG *j, which will be used later. The procedure is listed as follows. The current slot is denoted* t.**Function computeFullBufferTempTargetShares()
Make a list *S that contains all configured RGs in the cell.*Initialize the remaining quota to be equal to sum of average resource share of all RGs for slot* t, [image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$R = \sum\_{each RG} rrmRG AvgShare\_j(t)$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14560.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]*.**If (R <= 0)
 R = 1.0
End If
For each RG [image-1][image\_desc]The image contains the text "f ∈ S". The text is stylized with a gradient effect, giving it a metallic or iridescent appearance. The letters are outlined in black.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14560.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]
[image-2][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is:
`rrnRGBullBuf ferTempTargetSharej = min ( ( rrnRGTargetSharej / R ) / ( Σk∈S rrnRGTargetSharek ) , rrnRGMaxQuotaj )`[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14560.005.png[/image\_path][/image-2]
End For
While (True)
For each RG [image-3][image\_desc]The image contains the text "f ∈ S". The text is stylized with a gradient effect, giving it a metallic or iridescent appearance. The letters are outlined in black.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14560.006.png[/image\_path][/image-3]
If [image-4][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression written in a sans-serif font. The expression is:
(rrmRGAvgHighShare (t) ≥ rrmRGFullBufferTempTargetShare;) or (rrmRGAvgHighShare; (t) ≥ rrmRGMaxQuota;)[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14560.007.png[/image\_path][/image-4]
[image-5][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a blurry, light-colored font on a white background. The equation is:
R = R - rrmRG AvgHighSharej(t)[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14560.008.png[/image\_path][/image-5]
[image-6][image\_desc]The image contains a line of text that appears to be a mathematical or programming expression. The text is blurry and difficult to read clearly. However, some parts are discernible.
The text reads: `rmmRGFFullBuyfforTempTargetShare = rmmRG AvgHighShare (t)`[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14560.009.png[/image\_path][/image-6]
 Remove RG* j from *S**End If
End For

##### 3.29.12.3.2.0-4 Enhanced Slice Volume Control (SVC) Feedback control based on low priority target share (ID: 11189878)

**3.29.12.3.2.0-4.0-4**  (ID: `11190160`)

Enhanced Slice Volume Control (SVC)
11190160:
Enhanced Slice Volume Control (SVC)
After the low priority traffic target share is computed for each RG (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23504\_replaced([11189551](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvgTFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gNB-DU applies proportional or proportional-integral feedback control to compute the RG weight for each RG. The procedure is listed as follows. The current slot is denoted t.
Output: the RG weight rrmRGWeight\_j(t) for each RG j
Initialization at the start of the system
If rdSvcControlTypeDL = 1
For each configured RG j in the cell
 [image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a blurry, stylized font. The equation reads "rrmRglterm = 0". The characters are white with a slight blur and a subtle gradient, set against a white background. The equation is centered horizontally within the image.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14565.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]
End For
End If
 
The following shall be executed for every run of enhanced SVC algorithm.
If rdSvcControlTypeDL = 0
For each configured RG j in the cell
 [image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula written in a stylized font. The formula is:
rrmRGExpTargetShare,(t) = min{rrmRGExpLowTargetShare, (t)+ rrmRGAvgHighShare; (t), rrmRGMaxQuota;}[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14565.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]
 If [image-2][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical inequality. The text in the image is:
`rrmRGAvgShare_j(t) <= rrmRGExpTargetShare_j(t)`[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14565.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2]
  [image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula written in a stylized font. The formula is:
$rrmRGWeight\_j(t) = rrmRGExpLowTargetShare\_j(t) \cdot [rdEnhSvcPGainDL - (rdEnhSvcPGainDL - 1) \cdot \frac{rrmRGAvgShare\_j(t)}{rrmRGExpTargetShare\_j(t)}]$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14565.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3]
 Else If [image-4][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical inequality. The text reads: rrmRGAvgShare,(t) ≤ rrmRGMaxQuota,[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14565.005.png[/image\_path][/image-4]
  [image-5][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula written in a stylized font. The formula is:
$rrmRGWeight\_j(t) = rrmRGExpLowTargetShare\_j(t) \cdot \frac{rrmRGMaxQuotaj - rrmRGAvgShare\_j(t)}{rrmRGMaxQuotaj - rrmRGExpTargetShare\_j(t)}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14565.006.png[/image\_path][/image-5]  
 Else
  [image-6][image\_desc]The image contains the mathematical expression "rrrmR G W e i g h t j ( t ) = 0". The text is slightly blurry, but the characters are discernible.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14565.007.png[/image\_path][/image-6]
 End If
End For
Else
For each configured RG j in the cell
 If hasLowBuffer(j)
                      [image-7][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a blurry, light-colored font against a white background. The equation appears to be:
`rrrmRGWeight,(t) = (2 * rdEnhSvcPtPGainDL + 1) *`[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14565.008.png[/image\_path][/image-7]rdLowBufRgWeightAmplifierDL
                 Else
   [image-8][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a stylized font. The equation is:
rrmRGExpTargetShareⱼ(t) = min{rrmRGExpLowTargetShareⱼ(t) + rrmRGAvgHighShareⱼ(t), rrmRGMaxQuotaⱼ}
The equation defines a variable `rrmRGExpTargetShareⱼ(t)` as the minimum of two values:
1. The sum of `rrmRGExpLowTargetShareⱼ(t)` and `rrmRGAvgHighShareⱼ(t)`.
2. `rrmRGMaxQuotaⱼ`.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14565.009.png[/image\_path][/image-8]
  If [image-9][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical inequality.
