The text reads: $r r r m R G A v g S h a r e\_{j}(t) \leq r r r m R G M a x Q u o t a\_{j}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14565.010.png[/image\_path][/image-9]
   [Before CB008250-AB]
   [image-10][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a stylized font. The equation is:
rrmRGDeltaj (t) = rrmRGExpTargetShare; (t) - rrmRGAvgShare」(t)[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14565.011.png[/image\_path][/image-10]
   [image-11][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a sans-serif font. The equation is:
$r\_{mm}R\_{g,j} = r\_{mm}R\_{g,j} + rdEnhSvcPtGainDL \cdot r\_{mm}RGDelta\_j(t)$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14565.012.png[/image\_path][/image-11]
 If [image-12][image\_desc]The image contains blurry text. The text appears to be: "rrrm R glterm, > rdEnhSvePtPGain DL".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14565.013.png[/image\_path][/image-12]
    [image-13][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a sans-serif font. The equation is:
`rrrmRgltermj = rdEnhSvcPiPGainDL`[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14565.014.png[/image\_path][/image-13]
   End If 
   If [image-14][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is: `rrrnRglterm, < -rdEnhSvcPvPGainDL`. The text is in a light color against a white background, with a black border around the image.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14565.015.png[/image\_path][/image-14]
    [image-15][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a blurry, light-colored font against a white background. The equation appears to be:
`rrrmRgltermj = -rdEnhSvcPtPGainDL`[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14565.016.png[/image\_path][/image-15]
   End If 
   [image-16][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula written in a stylized font. The formula appears to be defining a variable `rrmRGWeight` at time `t` as the maximum of two expressions.
The first expression is `rrmRGExpLowTargetShare_j(t) + rdEnhSvcPiPGainDL`.
The second expression is `rrmRGDelta_j(t) + rrmRgIterm_j, rrmRGExpLowTargetShare_j(t)/rdRGTinyWeightReciDL}`.
The formula uses subscripts `j` and parentheses `(t)` to indicate dependence on an index `j` and time `t`. The symbols used are standard mathematical operators and variable names.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14565.017.png[/image\_path][/image-16]
   [CB008250-AB]
  // RG weight is updated with PI control.
   Execute rgWeightUpdateWithPiControl(j)
   [End CB008250-AB]
  Else
   [image-17][image\_desc]The image contains the text "rrrrRGWeightj(t) = 0". The text is blurry and difficult to read.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14565.018.png[/image\_path][/image-17]
  End If
 
 End If
 
End For
End If
 
 
If RG j has RG weight equal to 0, then no resource will be allocated to initial transmissions of nonGBR and deprioritized GBR/DC-GBR DRBs of RG j in the following DL slots until the RG weight becomes positive. However, resources can be allocated to initial transmissions and retransmissions of GBR/DC-GBR DRBs, or to retransmissions of nonGBR DRBs of RG j even if the RG weight is equal to 0.
 
Notations:
rrmRGWeight\_j(t): RG weight computed for RG j at slot t
rrmRGExpTargetShare\_j(t): the expected target share (including both high and low priority traffic) for RG j, computed at slot t
rdEnhSvcPGainDL: R&D parameter, the proportional gain of P control used in the enhanced SVC algorithm, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23518\_replaced([11193748](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvvjo_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
[Before CB008250-AB]
rrmRGDelta\_j(t): the difference between rrmRGExpTargetShare\_j(t) and rrmRGAvgShare\_j(t).
[End CB008250-AB]
rrmRgIterm\_j: the integral term of PI control for RG j.
rdEnhSvcPiPGainDL:  R&D parameter, the proportional gain of PI control used in the enhanced SVC algorithm, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29759\_replaced([11193759](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvvjpfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
[Before CB008250-AB]
rdEnhSvcPiIGainDL:  R&D parameter, the integral gain of PI control used in the enhanced SVC algorithm, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29667\_replaced([11193769](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvvjp_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
rdRGTinyWeightReciDL: R&D parameter, the reciprocal of tiny RG weight for DL, to avoid cell resource waste, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29668\_replaced([11193780](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvvjqfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
[End CB008250-AB]
rdSvcControlTypeDL: R&D parameter, it is used to select the type of control algorithm of enhanced SVC, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29755\_replaced([11193727](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvu8nfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
hasLowBuffer(j): returns the current low buffer traffic state of RG j, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23506\_replaced([11187568](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcBpfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
The rationale behind setting RG weight of a low buffer RG to a static high value is to avoid PI control for the RG, because it may be impossible to attain the target share due to the low buffer traffic demand. Setting a high RG weight has the advantage to let the RG quickly attain the target share when high traffic demand comes.
 
rdLowBufRgWeightAmplifierDL: this R&D parameters is used in enhanced SVC algorithm when PI control is enabled to increase the chance that DRBs of a low buffer RG get scheduled, so that the RG can get its target share when enough traffic will be available, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31197\_replaced([11194091](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvym9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
[CB008250-AB]
rgWeightUpdateWithPiControl(j): the function that updates RG Weight with PI Control for RG j, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_32118\_replaced([11187980](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcotPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
[End CB008250-AB]

---

##### 3.29.12.3.2.0-5 Enhanced Slice Volume Control (SVC) Compute Dynamic Target Shares for Non-empty Buffer RGs (ID: 11190166)

**3.29.12.3.2.0-5.0-4**  (ID: `12638660`)

Enhanced Slice Volume Control (SVC)
gNB-DU calls computeNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShares() to compute dynamic target shares for non-empty buffer RGs in a virtual **slot.**

Initialize rrmNonempBufRGs to be an empty set at the start of the system.

Function computeNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShares()

Q = computeNonempBufRGs()

If [CB012238-A-UPD002] (QoS fairness slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB, NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchQosFairness = True) or [End CB012238-A-UPD002] (rrmNonempBufRGs is not equal to Q) or (rrmRGMinQuota\_j or rrmRGMaxQuota\_j of any RG j in Q has been changed since last**virtual slot)**

rrmNonempBufRGs = Q

[CB012238-A-UPD002]

If (rrmExistEmptyBufferRGs = False)

rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare\_j = rrmRGTargetShare\_j, for every RG j in Q.

Else if (rrmEmptyBufferRGsLowBufferRGsMatch = True)

rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare\_j = rrmRGDynamicTargetShare\_j, for every RG j in Q.

Set rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare\_k = 0 for every RG k not in Q.

Else

[End CB012238-A-UPD002]

Compute dynamic target shares for the set of RGs Q according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_28248\_replaced([11189319](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfE_PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and store the results in variables rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare\_k for every RG k in Q.

Set rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare\_k = 0 for every RG k not in Q.

[CB012238-A-UPD002]

End If

[End CB012238-A-UPD002]

End If

End

Notations:

rrmNonempBufRGs: the set of non-empty buffer RGs.

rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare\_k: dynamic target share for non-empty buffer RG k.

computeNonempBufRGs: Compute the set of non-empty buffer RGs, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_28685\_replaced([11187810](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcBqvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB012238-A-UPD002]

rrmRGTargetShare\_j: target share of RG j, see [11189080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_XoObIPvPEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

rrmExistEmptyBufferRGs: whether any of the RGs in the cell is in empty buffer state, see [11187810](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_RAU6EPvPEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

rrmRGDynamicTargetShare\_j: dynamic target share of RG j, see [11189551](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvgTFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

rrmEmptyBufferRGsLowBufferRGsMatch: whether the set of empty buffer RGs match exactly the set of low buffer RGs in the cell, see [11187810.](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcBqvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

[End CB012238-A-UPD002]

---

#### 3.29.12.3.3 PRB Bookkeeping

##### 3.29.12.3.3.0-1 PRB Bookkeeping Slice/RG Resource Share Bookkeeping (ID: 11190186)

**3.29.12.3.3.0-1.0-8**  (ID: `13399171`)

PRB Bookkeeping
13399171:
PRB Bookkeeping
After the resource allocation in each slot, if sliceAwareSchedulerCellActivation = True and available PRBs for SAS is greater than 0 (*rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t) > 0, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7577\_replaced ([11190661](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6K_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the average Resource Group (RG) resource share shall be updated for each configured RG.*

For a slot *t, the instantaneous resource share* rrmRGInstShare\_i of each configured RG *i is the sum of the instantaneous resource share of high priority traffic classes and of low priority traffic classes:*\*\*

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in italics. The equation is:
$rrmRGlInstShare e\_i(t) = rrmRGHInstShare e\_i(t) + rrmGLowInstShare e\_i(t)$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14577.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

 [image-1][image\_desc]The image contains the text "rrmRGHighlnstSharei(t)". The text is in a mathematical or scientific context, indicated by the subscript "i" and the variable "t" in parentheses, which often represents time. The font is italicized, suggesting it might be a variable or a function name.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14577.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]: the instantaneous resource share of high priority traffic classes of RG i

 [image-2][image\_desc]The image contains the text "rrrmRGLowInstSharei(t)". The text is in a dark color against a light background. The characters are slightly blurred, but legible.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14577.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2]: the instantaneous resource share of low priority traffic classes of RG i

[image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$rrmRGHighInstShare\_{e\_i}(t) = \sum\_{c \in C\_H} \sum\_{j \in J\_i} rrmDrblInstShare\_{e\_{j,c}}(t)$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14577.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3]

[image-4][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$rrmRGlowInstShare\_{e\_i}(t) = \sum\_{c \in C\_L} \sum\_{j \in J\_i} rrmDrblnstShare\_{e\_{j,c}}(t)$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14577.005.png[/image\_path][/image-4]

**[CB016273-A]**

If intent-throughput slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchIntentTput = True)

gNB shall compute the instantaneous throughput (transmitted bytes) of low priority traffic classes of RG i, rrmRGLowInstTput\_i(t) = sum\_{c in C\_L} sum\_{j in J\_i} amountBytes\_{j,c}(t).

gNB shall compute the instantaneous throughput (transmitted bytes) of  traffic class drbTraffic (nonGBR iniTx) of RG i, rrmRGNgbrInstTput\_i(t) = sum\_{j in K\_i} amountBytes\_{j, drbTraffic}(t).

End If

**[End CB016273-A]**

Where

[image-5][image\_desc]The image contains a stylized, blurry rendering of the letters "Ji". The letters are large and appear to be in a bold, sans-serif font. The "J" is on the left and the "i" is on the right, slightly smaller and lower than the "J". The letters are rendered with a gradient of colors, including shades of blue, brown, and yellow, giving them a somewhat metallic or iridescent appearance. The background is white, and the entire image is framed by a thick black border.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14577.006.png[/image\_path][/image-5]: the set of non-GBR (excluding 5QI-5) and GBR/DC-GBR DRBs of RG *i*

[image-6][image\_desc]The image contains the text "CH" in a stylized font. The letters are a dark gray color with a slight orange and blue gradient, giving them a metallic or glossy appearance. The "C" is larger and more prominent than the "H", which is positioned slightly below and to the right of the "C". The background is white.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14577.007.png[/image\_path][/image-6]: the set of high priority traffic classes

[image-7][image\_desc]The image contains the text "C" with a subscript "H" followed by an equals sign. The text is blurry and appears to be in a light blue and orange color gradient.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14577.008.png[/image\_path][/image-7]

[Before CB014699-D]

[image-8][image\_desc]The image contains a single line of text enclosed in curly braces. The text appears to be a list of technical terms, possibly related to network traffic or data transmission. The terms are separated by commas. The text is in a sans-serif font and is presented in a dark color against a white background.
The text reads:
{harqRetransDcGbr, harqRetransVoip, harqRetransGbr, harqReTransDrb, dcGbrTraffic, voip Traffic, deprioritizedVoip, gbrTraffic}[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14577.010.png[/image\_path][/image-8]

[CB014699-D] {criticalHarqRetransVoip, criticalHarqRetransGbr, criticalHarqRetransDrb, harqRetransDcGbr, harqRetransVoip, harqRetransGbr,  harqRetransDrb, criticalVoipTraffic, criticalGbrTraffic, criticalDrbTraffic, dcGbrTraffic, voipTraffic, deprioritizedVoiP, gbrTraffic} [End CB014699-D]

[image-9][image\_desc]The image contains the text "CL:". The text is in a stylized font with a gradient effect, appearing to be a mix of brown and blue colors. The background is white.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14577.011.png[/image\_path][/image-9] the set of low priority traffic classes,

[image-10][image\_desc]The image contains the mathematical expression "C\_L = {drbTraffic, deprioritizedGbr}". The text is in a light gray color against a white background. The expression is written in a standard mathematical font.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14577.012.png[/image\_path][/image-10]

[image-11][image\_desc]The image contains the text "rrmDrbInstShare\_{j,c}". The text is in a dark color against a white background. The font is italicized.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14577.013.png[/image\_path][/image-11]: the instantaneous resource share of DRB *j for traffic class* c in slot *t (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7577\_replaced ([11190661](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6K_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))*\*\*

**[CB016273-A]**

amountBytes\_{j,c}(t): the amount of bytes allocated to the transmissions of a DRB *j for traffic class*c in slot *t.*\*\*

K\_i: the set of non-GBR (excluding 5QI-5) DRBs of RG *i.*

**[End CB016273-A]**

The average resource group (RG) resource share can be obtained by applying an exponentially moving average over time window *τ :*

[image-12][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula presented in a piecewise format. The formula defines a variable `rrmRGAvgShare_i(t)` based on the value of `t`.
For `t = 1`, `rrmRGAvgShare_i(t)` is equal to `rrmRGInstShare_i(t)`.
For `t > 1`, `rrmRGAvgShare_i(t)` is defined as:
$$ \frac{\epsilon}{1+\tau} \cdot rrmRGInstShare\_i(t) + \left(1 - \frac{\epsilon}{1+\tau}\right) \cdot rrmRGAvgShare\_i(t-1) $$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14577.014.png[/image\_path][/image-12]

where,

 *τ =* rdRGAvgShareFilterWindow : is the exponential filter time window (default value=100)\*\*

* ε = *rdRGAvgShareFilterFactor: is the exponential filter smoothing factor (default value=1)*

Note that when a configured RG is newly created or an RG is changed from the unconfigured state to the configured state, then *t  is reset to 1.*

L2PS shall be able to separate the average shares of GBR/DC-GBR and non GBR traffic such that:

[image-13][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in italicized text. The equation is:
$rrmRGAvgShare\_1(t) = rrmRGAvgHighShare\_1(t) + rrmRGAvgLowShare\_1(t)$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14577.015.png[/image\_path][/image-13]

rrmRGUnusedShare is used for the computation of RG weight (5G\_UP\_ALG\_7389\_replaced([11188798](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved7fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). L2PS shall **compute** rrmRGUnusedShare for each configured RG at the end of each virtual slot (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30750\_replaced([11188771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved6PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).\*\*\*\*

If NRBTS.actDynamicTargetShareCalcForRg = FALSE

L2PS shall also calculate the unused share by all RGs which will be distributed on the RG when calculating *rrmRGTargetShareTemp (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7390\_replaced([11189080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfE9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):*

[image-14][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula defines "rrmRGUnusedShare" as a summation over "i". The summation includes two terms within parentheses. The first term is the maximum of 0 and the difference between "rrmRGTargetShare\_i" and "rrmRGAvgShare". The second term is the minimum of 0 and the difference between "rrmRGTargetShare\_i" and "rrmRGAvgHighShare\_i".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14577.016.png[/image\_path][/image-14]

Else

Compute dynamic target shares for non-empty buffer RGs by calling computeNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShares(), according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_28683\_replaced([11190166](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvgTIPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

L2PS shall also calculate the unused share by all nonempty buffer RGs which will be distributed on each nonempty RG when calculating *rrmRGTargetShareTemp (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7390\_replaced([11189080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfE9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):*

[image-15][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula written in a sans-serif font. The formula defines a variable `rrmRGUnusedShare` as the sum of terms related to `rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare` and `rrmRGAvgShare`.
The formula is as follows:
`rrmRGUnusedShare = Σ (max{0; rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShareᵢ - rrmRGAvgShareᵢ} + min{0; rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShareᵢ - rrmRGAvgHighShareᵢ})`
where the summation is over `i ∈ rrmNonempBufRGs`.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14577.017.png[/image\_path][/image-15]

where rrmNonempBufRGDynamicTargetShare and rrmNonempBufRGs are defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_28683\_replaced([11190166](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvgTIPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

All variables for resource share are between 0 and 1.0, where 0 means 0% and 1.0 means 100%.

---

##### 3.29.12.3.3.0-2 PRB Bookkeeping Mapping DRB allocations from bytes to PRBs &amp; calculating the instantaneous resource share of the DRBs (ID: 11190661)

**3.29.12.3.3.0-2.0-11**  (ID: `13399175`)

PRB Bookkeeping
13399175:
PRB Bookkeeping
If sliceAwareSchedulerCellActivation = True, L2PS shall compute the equivalent of the allocation that DRB *j* *for traffic class* c has obtained in a slot *t in terms of PRBs (converted from bytes):*\*\*\*\*

If [the combination of DRB *j and traffic class* c does not exist (e.g., a non-GBR DRB and the traffic class harqRetransGbr)] or [DRB *j has not been scheduled for traffic class* c in slot *t]*\*\*\*\*

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is written in a sans-serif font and appears to be in a dark color on a white background. The equation reads:
$rrrmInstDrbPrbAlloc\_{j,c}(t) = 0$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14587.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

Else

[image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$rrmInstDrbPrbAlloc\_{j,c}(t) = \frac{amountBytes\_{j,c}(t)}{payloadBytes\_{u}(t)} \cdot rrmInstUePrbAlloc\_{u}(t)$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14587.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

where:

* amountBytes\_{j,c}(t): is the amount of bytes allocated to the transmissions of a DRB *j for traffic class* c in slot *t (For DRB retransmissions see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4532\_replaced([11184193](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvQbg_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), for non-GBR DRB initial transmissions see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4548\_replaced([11185645](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvUs5vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), for GBR DRB initial transmissions see below)*\*\*
* TBS\_u(t): the DL transport Block size allocated to UE *u in slot* t,\*\*
* payloadBytes\_u(t): the amount of bytes of UE *u transmitted in its transport block in slot* t,\*\*
* rrmInstUePrbAlloc\_u(t): number of PRBs allocated to UE *u in slot* t,\*\*
* **if basic** MU-MIMO is activated for a cell (NRCELL.actDlMuMimo = True), it shall be computed according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8336\_replaced([11191471](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvhhOfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). If enhanced DL MU-MIMO is activated (NRCELL.actDlMuMimoEnh = True), it shall be computed according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23738\_replaced([11191972](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kviISvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).\*\*\*\*

The instantaneous PRBs allocated to UE *u in slot* t for high priority traffic classes and low priority traffic classes, *rrmInstUeHighPrbAlloc\_u(t) and* rrmInstUeLowPrbAlloc\_u(t) can be computed as:\*\*\*\*

[image-2][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$rrmInstUeHighPrbAlloc\_u(t) = \sum\_{c \in C\_H} \sum\_{j \in J\_u} rrmInstDrbPrbAlloc\_{j,c}(t)$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14587.004.png[/image\_path][/image-2]

[image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$rrmInstUeLowPrbAlloc\_u(t) = \sum\_{c \in C\_L} \sum\_{j \in J\_u} rrmInstDrbPrbAlloc\_{j,c}(t)$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14587.005.png[/image\_path][/image-3]

where

  [image-4][image\_desc]The image contains a close-up of a stylized letter "J" with a smaller, stylized "x" to its right. The letters are rendered with a gradient effect, transitioning from a golden-yellow at the bottom to a blue and purple hue at the top. The background is white, and the letters are outlined in black.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14587.006.png[/image\_path][/image-4]: the set of non-GBR (excluding 5QI-5) and GBR/DC-GBR DRBs of UE *u. The non-GBR and deprioritized GBR DC-GBR DRBs belonging to unconfigured slices shall be excluded.*

 [image-5][image\_desc]The image contains the text "CH" in a stylized font. The letters are colored with a gradient of blue, yellow, and orange, giving them a metallic or iridescent appearance. The background is white, and the text is enclosed within a black border.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14587.007.png[/image\_path][/image-5]: the set of high priority traffic classes

[Before CB014699-D]

[image-6][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression written in a serif font. The expression defines a set $C\_H$ as a collection of several elements. The elements are: `harqRetransDcGbr`, `harq RetransVoip`, `harqRetransGbr`, `harqReTransDrb`, `dcGbrTraffic`, `voipTraffic`, `deprioritizedVoip`, and `gbrTraffic`. The elements are separated by commas and enclosed in curly braces, indicating a set.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14587.009.png[/image\_path][/image-6]

[CB014699-D]

CH= {criticalHarqRetransVoip, criticalHarqRetransGbr, criticalHarqRetransDrb, harqRetransDcGbr, harqRetransVoip, harqRetransGbr,  harqRetransDrb, criticalVoipTraffic, criticalGbrTraffic, criticalDrbTraffic, dcGbrTraffic, voipTraffic, deprioritizedVoiP, gbrTraffic}

[End CB014699-D]

 [image-7][image\_desc]The image contains a white square with a black border. Inside the square, there is a stylized letter "C" with a subscript "L". The "C" is colored with a gradient of blue, yellow, and orange, giving it a metallic or iridescent appearance. The subscript "L" is also colored with similar gradients, but it is smaller and positioned below and to the right of the "C". The overall impression is that of a logo or a symbol.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14587.010.png[/image\_path][/image-7]: the set of low priority traffic classes, [image-8][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression written in a sans-serif font. The expression is: $C\_L = { drb'Traffic, deprioritizedGbr }$. The text is slightly blurry.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14587.011.png[/image\_path][/image-8]

The instantaneous PRBs allocated to UE *u that are of interest to slice aware scheduler is:*

[image-9][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a serif font. The equation is:
rrmInstUeSas PrbAlloc(t) = rrmInstUeHighPrbAlloc(t) + rrmInstUeLowPrbAlloc(t)[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14587.012.png[/image\_path][/image-9].

If **[image-10][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical inequality. The inequality is written as:
$\sum\_{\text{each slot } t \text{ in } v} \text{rrmAvailablePrbsForSas}(t) \leq 0$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14587.013.png[/image\_path][/image-10], then quit the SVC algorithm execution for virtual slot *v. \*\*By quitting the SVC algorithm, the step 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24439\_replaced([11187953](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcosPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) shall be executed.***\*\*

The instantaneous share of a DRB for a traffic class from the BW:

If [the combination of DRB *j and traffic class* c does not exist (e.g., a non-GBR DRB and the traffic class harqRetransGbr)] or [DRB *j has not been scheduled for traffic class* c in slot *t]*\*\*\*\*

[image-11][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is written in a sans-serif font and appears to be in a dark color against a white background. The equation reads:
`rrmDrbInstShare_{j,c}(t) = 0`[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14587.014.png[/image\_path][/image-11]

Else

[image-12][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is presented in two lines, with the second line being an expansion or alternative representation of the first.
The first line of the equation is:
$rrmDrbInstShare\_{j,c}(t) = \frac{rrminstDrbPrbAlloc\_{j,c}(t)}{rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t)}$
The second line of the equation is:
$rrmDrbInstShare\_{j,c}(t) = \frac{rrminstDrbPrbAlloc\_{j,c}(t)}{rrminstSasPrbAlloc(t) + rrmInstPrbFree(t)}$
Both equations define $rrmDrbInstShare\_{j,c}(t)$ in terms of other variables. The first equation shows it as a ratio of allocated DRB PRBs to available PRBs for SAS. The second equation shows it as a ratio of allocated DRB PRBs to the sum of allocated SAS PRBs and free PRBs.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14587.015.png[/image\_path][/image-12]

and

[image-13][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$rrmlnstSasPrbAlloc(t) = \sum\_{each\ UE\ u} rrmlnstUeSasPrbAlloc\_u(t)$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14587.016.png[/image\_path][/image-13]*.*

where

* rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t): the number of PRBs available for the slice aware scheduler in slot *t if NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = False, else if NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = TRUE, then rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t) is the available PRBs across all PDSCH sub-area(s) from the largest BWP, if there are several dedicated BWPs configured in the cell.*

rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t) = rrmInstSasPrbAlloc(t) + rrmInstPrbFree(t).

* rrmInstSasPrbAlloc(t): the number of PRBs allocated in slot *t that are of interest to the slice aware scheduler. It includes the PRBs allocated in PDSCH for the following traffic classes: [CB014699-D] criticalHarqRetransVoip, criticalHarqRetransGbr, criticalHarqRetransDrb,[End CB014699-D] harqReTransDcGbr, harqRetransVoip, harqRetransGbr, harqRetransDrb, [CB014699-D] criticalVoipTraffic, criticalGbrTraffic, criticalDrbTraffic,[End CB014699-D] dcGbrTraffic, voipTraffic, deprioritizedVoip, gbrTraffic, drbTraffic, and deprioritizedGbr.*
* rrmInstPrbFree(t): is defined as:

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = TRUE,

rrmInstPrbFree(t) = min{rrmRemainingPdschPrbPerSlot (t),   rrmMaxNumUsablePrb – rrmInstSasPrbAlloc - numScheduledPrbsNotCountedInSas},

where,

- rrmRemainingPdschPrbPerSlot(t) =   rrmRemainingPdschLayerPrbPerSlot/1; considering RANK1 for   remaining layer PRB usage,

- rrmRemainingPdschLayerPrbPerSlot(t)  ([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)),

- rrmMaxNumUsablePrb: Maximum number of usable PRBs   ([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)),

- rrmRemainingPdschLayerPrbPerSlot(t): Remaining PDSCH layer   PRB resources which are not allocated at the end of the scheduling   in a slot. ([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

- numScheduledPrbsNotCountedInSas: number of PRBs scheduled   for non-PDSCH in the slot, this refers to allocation to traffic classes   not included in high-priority/low-priority classes defined by SAS   in ([11190661](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6K_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/web#action=com.ibm.rdm.web.pages.showartifactpage&artifacturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresources%2fbi_kvg6k_vsee-aqvopbp1qhq&oslc_config.context=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2fgc%2fconf"))

Else

rrmInstPrbFree(t) = the number PRBs that are free (unallocated) in   PDSCH.

End

* **if L2-PS distinguishes multiple DL BWPs in the cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1811\_replaced([11110797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpHXP_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the number of PRBs that are free in PDSCH in the largest dedicated BWP is used if NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = False, else if NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = TRUE, then it is the available PRBs** across all PDSCH sub-area(s) from the largest BWP, if there are several dedicated BWPs configured in the cell as in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4290\_replaced([11177227](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuto6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).\*\*\*\*

Moreover, [image-14][image\_desc]The image contains the text "rrmInstUeSasPrbAlloc\_u(t)". The text is in a sans-serif font and appears to be mathematical notation. The letters are slightly blurred, but the overall meaning is discernible.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14587.017.png[/image\_path][/image-14] can be related to [image-15][image\_desc]The image contains the text "rrrmInstUePrbAlloc\_u(t)". The text is in a sans-serif font and appears to be a mathematical or programming variable. The letters are slightly blurred, but the overall meaning is discernible.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14587.018.png[/image\_path][/image-15] with a parameter [image-16][image\_desc]The image contains the text "rrmInstUeSasPrbRatio\_u(t)". The text is in a light color against a white background. The characters are slightly blurred.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14587.019.png[/image\_path][/image-16]. It denotes the percentage of PRBs allocated to a UE that is relevant to the slice aware scheduler.

[image-17][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is presented in a multi-line format, with each line representing a step in the derivation or definition of a variable.
The first line defines `rrmInstUeSasPrbAlloc(t)` as the sum of `rrmInstUeHighPrbAlloc(t)` and `rrmInstUeLowPrbAllocu`.
The second line shows a summation over two indices, `c` and `j`, with the term `rrmInstDrbPrbAlloc; (t)`. The indices `c` belong to the set `CHUCL` and `j` belong to the set `JU`.
The third line presents a fraction. The numerator is a double summation similar to the second line, but with the term `amountBytesje (t)`. The denominator is `payloadBytes(t)`. This fraction is multiplied by `rrmInstUePrbAlloc(t)`.
The fourth line defines `rrmInstUeSasPrbRatio(t)` multiplied by `rrmInstUePrbAlloc(t)`.
The text in the image is:
`rrmInstUeSasPrbAlloc(t) = rrmInstUeHighPrbAlloc(t) + rrmInstUeLowPrbAllocu
= ∑ ∑rrmInstDrbPrbAlloc; (t)
=
CECHUCL JEJU ECECHUCL jeju amountBytesje (t)
payloadBytes(t)
rrmInstUePrbAlloc(t)
= rrmInstUeSasPrbRatio(t) rrmInstUePrbAlloc(t)`[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14587.020.png[/image\_path][/image-17]

* For FDD cell with PRB pooling enabled or TDD FR1 cell with DL PRB pooling extensions enabled (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is true (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283\_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))), **rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t) shall take into account the limitation in the number of usable FD resource that the maximum number of PRBs that can be scheduled per slot including for PDSCH shall not exceed the total number of usable PRBs granted to DL by the BBRM and this value may change every BB pooling period (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6500\_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**
* For a FDD cell shared with LTE if NRCELL.actAsymmetricDss is set to 'false', rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t) shall take into account only PRBs available for NR within DL subframes allowed for NR, (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4278\_replaced([11176996](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* For a FDD cell shared with LTE and with PRB pooling enabled, rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t) shall take into account that maximum number of PRBs available in the slots allowed for the NR are limited to the number of usable PRBs granted to DL by the BBRM and this value may change every BB pooling period (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6500\_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* For a FDD cell shared with LTE, if NRCELL.actAsymmetricDss is set to 'true',  rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t) shall take into account PRBs available for NR in NR Dedicated area and PRBs allocated in the LTE shared area (see [12620260: Resource sharing in asymmetric DSS](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NsAEcDfZEfCYiuaHdt7wgQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9), [11172253: Handling of DL CELL RESOURCE AREA ALLOCATION REQUEST](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuK2VPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))

Note: The additional constraint introduced with layer PRB pooling checked above when slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = TRUE is also valid for PRB based RAT1 allocation scheme (i.e. NRCELL.actRat1Alloc=True)

If sliceAwareSchedulerCellActivation = True, L2PS shall calculate the above values also for the initial transmissions of GBR DRBs.

The value of *amountBytes\_*{j,c}(t) for the initial transmissions of different GBR DRBs are defined in the following requirements where *j is a GRB/DC-GBR DRB and* c is equal to [CB014699-D] criticalVoipTraffic or criticalGbrTraffic [End CB014699-D] or voipTraffic or gbrTraffic or dcGbrTraffic:\*\*\*\*

* 5QI1: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4545\_replaced([11185562](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvUF1fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* For non-5QI1: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8036\_replaced([11185589](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvUF2vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* For DC-GBR 5QI: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30517\_replaced([11185540](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvUF0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

The above computation should be done in each slot after the FD scheduling is complete (i.e. after PRBs are assigned and allocated as in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4487\_replaced([11179166](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku4A_PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Note, the total number of PRBs available for the slice aware scheduler in a cell per DL slot rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t) is considered as the 100% of the resource by the slice aware scheduler. PRBs allocated for each traffic class of interest to slice aware scheduler shall be accounted from the 100% of the resource.

---

##### 3.29.12.3.3.0-3 PRB Bookkeeping NBR Resource Share Bookkeeping for a RG (ID: 11191434)

**3.29.12.3.3.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `12698097`)

PRB Bookkeeping
12698097:
PRB Bookkeeping
If enhanced slice aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_12233\_replaced([11278970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and [Before PR854271] [CB012238-D-UPD003] ( [End CB012238-D-UPD003] [End PR854271] NRBTS/NRCELL.nbrPdschCongHandling = TRUE [Before PR854271] [CB012238-D-UPD003] or NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchQosFairness = True) [End CB012238-D-UPD003] [End PR854271], gNB-DU shall calculate resource group load as follows**:**

-  gNB-DU shall compute the equivalent of the allocation that NBR DRB *j* *has obtained in a DL slot* t in terms of PRBs (converted from bytes):\*\*\*\*

If there is no NBR DRB *j  exist or NBR DRB* j has not been scheduled in slot *t*\*\*

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a sans-serif font. The equation is: $rrmInstNbrPrbAlloc\_j(t) = 0$. The text is black and appears on a white background.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14589.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

Else

[image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$rrmInstNbrPrbAlloc\_j(t) = \frac{amountBytes\_j(t)}{payloadBytes\_j(t)} \cdot rrmInstUePrbAlloc\_u(t)$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14589.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

where:

* amountBytes(j,t): is the amount of bytes allocated to the transmissions of a NBR DRB *j in slot* t , the desired data amount for the positive NBR token bucket of non-GBR DRB initial transmissions defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22149\_replaced([11185651](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvUs5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))\*\*
* TBS\_u(t): the DL transport Block size allocated to UE *u in slot* t,\*\*
* payloadBytes\_u(t): the amount of bytes of UE *u transmitted in its transport block in slot* t,\*\*
* rrmInstUePrbAlloc\_u(t): number of PRBs allocated to UE *u in slot* t,\*\*
* if MU-MIMO is activated for a cell, it shall be computed according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8336\_replaced([11191471](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvhhOfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23738\_replaced([11191972](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kviISvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* The instantaneous share of a NBR DRB is calculated as follow:

If there is no NBR DRB *j exist or the NBR DRB* j is not been scheduled in slot *t*\*\*

[image-2][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a sans-serif font. The equation is:
`rrmNbrInstShare_j(t) = 0`[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14589.004.png[/image\_path][/image-2]

Else

[image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$rrmNbrInstShare\_j(t) = \frac{rrmInstNbrPrbAlloc\_j(t)}{rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t)}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14589.005.png[/image\_path][/image-3]

where

* j : the set of non-GBR DRBs with NBR positive token
* rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t): the number of PRBs available for the slice aware scheduler in slot *t. refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7577\_replaced([11190661](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6K_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Note, the total number of PRBs available for the slice aware scheduler in a cell per DL slot rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t) is considered as the 100% of the resource by the slice aware scheduler. PRBs allocated for NBR DRB of interest to slice aware scheduler should be accounted from the 100% of the resource. This computation shall just be performed if rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t)>0.*
* rrmInstNbrPrbAlloc\_j(t): the number of PRBs allocated for all NBR DRB j in slot *t  in above step.*
* For a slot *t, the instantaneous resource share* rrmSliceNbrInstShare\_i of configured RG *i*is the sum of the instantaneous resource share of each NBR DRB of RG *i,*\*\*\*\*

[image-4][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a serif font. The equation is:
$rrmRGNbrInstShare\_i(t) = \sum\_{j \in J\_i} rrmNbrInstShare\_j(t)$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14589.006.png[/image\_path][/image-4]

where

* [image-5][image\_desc]The image contains the text "Ji" in a stylized font. The "J" is large and bold, with a gradient of colors from orange to blue. The "i" is smaller and positioned to the right of the "J", with a similar gradient of colors. The text is set against a white background with a subtle shadow effect.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14589.007.png[/image\_path][/image-5]: the set of non-GBR DRBs with NBR positive token of RG *i*

The above computation should be done in each slot after the FD scheduling is complete (i.e. after PRBs are assigned and allocated as in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4487\_replaced([11179166](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku4A_PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

#### 3.29.12.3.4 PRB Bookkeeping for MU-MIMO

#### 3.29.12.3.4-1 PRB Bookkeeping for MU-MIMO

**3.29.12.3.4-1.0-4**  (ID: `11192051`)

PRB Bookkeeping for MU-MIMO
11192051:
PRB Bookkeeping for MU-MIMO
If enhanced DL MU-MIMO is activated (NRCELL.actDlMuMimoEnh = True) and DL slice aware scheduler is activated (sliceAwareSchedulerCellActivation = True)  **[CB008250-D] or PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_16121\_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), or** [End CB008250-D], after MU-MIMO scheduling in slot *t is finished, L2PS shall scan the PDSCH schedule and compute the bookkept number of PRBs allocated to each scheduled UE* u rrmInstUePrbAlloc\_u(t) (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7577\_replaced([11190661](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6K_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the actual number of PRBs allocated to each scheduled UE *u rrmActUePrbAlloc\_u(t) and the actual number of PRBs allocated to each RG* k rrmActRGPrbAlloc\_k(t) in the following way:***\****\*

Initialize rrmInstUePrbAlloc\_u(t) = 0 for each scheduled UE *u.*

Initialize rrmActUePrbAlloc\_u(t) = 0 for each scheduled UE *u.*

Initialize rrmActRGPrbAlloc\_k(t) = 0 for each RG k*.*

For each block of PRBs allocated to an unpaired UE (SU-MIMO scheduled UE) or a virtual UE (MU-MIMO co-scheduled UEs):

 If *N PRBs are allocated to an unpaired UE* u, then increment both rrmInstUePrbAlloc\_u(t) and rrmActUePrbAlloc\_u(t) by *N.*\*\*

 If *N PRBs are allocated to a virtual UE* A that consists of multiple paired UEs (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11855\_replaced([11144425](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr8Bt_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then increment rrmInstUePrbAlloc\_u(t) by [image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is a fraction. The numerator is $N \cdot w\_u^U$. The denominator is $\sum\_{v \in A} w\_v^U$.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14607.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0] and increment rrmActUePrbAlloc\_u(t) by *N, for every UE* u in virtual UE *A, where* w\_v^U is the UE weight of UE v. For both iniTx and reTx UE, the UE weight is calculated as the sum of combined weight (i.e., the product of NRBTS/NRDRB.schedulWeight and resource group (RG) weight.**\***\*

**[CB008250-D] if PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_16121\_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), RG weight is computed as defined in (5G\_UP\_ALG\_31226\_replaced([11188517](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvdPy_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), else as defined in** [End CB008250-D] (5G\_UP\_ALG\_7389\_replaced([11188798](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved7fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) of its non-GBR bearers that have data in the buffer.\*\*\*\*

The same UE weight calculation is also applied in WRR (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23761\_replaced([11179826](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku7rUvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) if Exhaustive Scheduling(see [*12483324*](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_qeQ48g-XEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ)) is disabled. For the case that [image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in black text on a white background. The equation is:
$\sum\_{v \in A} w\_v^U = 0$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14607.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1], which corresponds to the situation that each UE of virtual UE *A has RG weight equal to 0, then rrmInstUePrbAlloc\_u(t) of each UE* u in *A is incremented by* N/M, where *M is the number of paired UEs in* A.**\***\*

For each scheduled UE *u:*

 Compute the PRB gain of UE *u as rrmPrbGain\_u(t) = rrmActUePrbAlloc\_u(t) / rrmInstUePrbAlloc\_u(t).*

Note, for unpaired UE, rrmPrbGain\_u(t) should be 1 and for a paired UE, it should be greater than 1.

The PRB bookkeeping continues as in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7577\_replaced([11190661](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6K_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) by using the computed rrmInstUePrbAlloc\_u(t) values. At the beginning of PRB bookkeeping for a slot t, the sum of actual PRBs used by RG k, rrmActRGPrbAlloc\_k(t) is initialized to 0. When L2PS has computed rrmInstDrbPrbAlloc\_{j,c}(t) for a DRB *j and a request class* c, it increments rrmActRGPrbAlloc\_k(t) by rrmInstDrbPrbAlloc\_{j,c}(t) \* rrmPrbGain\_u(t) where DRB *j belongs to UE* u and RG *k.*\*\*\*\*

Rationale: With MU-MIMO, actual PRB used for a DRB j and request class c could be different than what is counted in SAS PRB bookkeeping with rrmInstDrbPrbAlloc\_{j,c}(t). Thus, the difference which is reflected in additional PRB gained per RG due to MU-MIMO will not be controlled by SAS.

---

#### 3.29.12.3.4-2 PRB Bookkeeping for MU-MIMO

##### 3.29.12.3.4-2.0-1 PRB Bookkeeping for MU-MIMO RG Target Share calculation for QoS fairness slice aware scheduler (ID: 11189488)

**3.29.12.3.4-2.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `13486813`)

PRB Bookkeeping for MU-MIMO
gNB shall compute target share of each RG with QoS fairness slice aware scheduler algorithm.

If at least one of these is activated for a cell

* Slice aware scheduler(5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_5021\_replaced([11288045](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tp4DWvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and NRBTS.actDynamicTargetShareCalcForRg = True
* Enhanced slice aware scheduler (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_12233\_replaced([11278970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* PLMN aware scheduler (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_16121\_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

AND

* QoS fairness slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchQosFairness = True)

[CB016273-A]

AND

* Intent-throughput slice aware scheduler is deactivated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchIntentTput = False)

​​​​​​​[End CB016273-A]

, target share computation for each RG in an RG set shall be done as follows. Target share computation is performed at the end of a virtual slot (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30750\_replaced([11188771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved6PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Input:

 The set of RGs S. S is equal to the set of all configured RGs or is a subset of all configured RGs.

 For each RG i in S, the minimum prioritized minimum quota rrmRGMinQuota\_i, the maximum quota rrmRGMaxQuota\_i (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7387\_replaced([11188675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvd21PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and the current average total scheduling weight rrmRgAvgSchedulWeight\_i(t) (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_33082\_replaced([11189507](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfsDPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

* For each RG i in S, the estimated average amount of resource demanded by high priority and NBR (in NBR category) traffic of RG i, rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i (see [12483734](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_neRxYw-lEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). Note, 0 <= rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i <= rrmRGMaxQuota\_i.

Output: the RG target share rrmRGTargetSharei for each RG *i*

Algorithm Description:

Step 1. In RG target share, reserve the estimated resources demanded for high priority traffic and NBR traffic (in short demanded-resources). And the reserved resources for an RG shall be no less than its min quota.

It works as follows:

Step 1.1: for each RG, set rrmRGTargetShare = rrmRGMinQuota to guarantee rrmRGMinQuota for this RG. Update remaining resources and each RG’s demanded-resources(rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i) by subtracting the reserved rrmRGMinQuota.

Step 1.2: Further allocate the remaining resource to each RG based on its demanded-resources.

* If the sum of all RGs’ updated demanded-resources(rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i) after step 1.1 exceeds the remaining resources, then the demanded-resources of each RG shall proportionally decrease to match the remaining resources. Then set rrmRGTargetShare=demanded-resources for each RG which finishes step 1.
* The rrmRGTargetShare shall be sum of resource which are allocated by step 1.1 and step 1.2
* Note, it is possible that after step 1.1, the remaining resources are insufficient for the allocation of the demanded-resources to all RGs. So, the demanded-resources of these RGs have to further decrease to match the remaining resources.

Step 2. Distribute the remaining resource after step 1 to all RGs according to their average total scheduling weights.

The rrmRGTargetShare per RG shall be the sum of resources which are allocated by step 1 and step 2 and shall be limited by rrmRGMaxQuota. The sum of rrmRGTargetShare of all RGs shall not exceed the total resources which are available for slicing in the cell.

**Detail of Algorithm (Pseudo-code is reference for implementation, detail can be decided in EFS)**

Step 1: In RG target share, reserve the estimated resources demanded for high priority traffic and NBR traffic.

Step1.1: initialize remaining resources R and target share of each RG i, rrmRGTargetShare\_i. Update unsatisifed high priority and NBR traffic demand per RG e\_i.

R = 1.0

For each RG i in S

rrmRGTargetShare\_i = rrmRGMinQuota\_i

R -= rrmRGMinQuota\_i

e\_i = max(0, rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i(t) - rrmRGMinQuota\_i)

End For

Step 1.2: if remaining resource to share is positive (R>0) and remaining high priority and NBR traffic demand of all RGs is positive, reserve additional resource for high priority and NBR traffic demand per RG as below, otherwise skip target share computation at this step.

If [image-0][image\_desc](R > 0) and (∑\_{each RG i∈S} eᵢ > 0)[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/a10af5a2-5144-4bb7-a8ff-7ecb3c4233ab.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

[image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$y = \frac{\sum\_{\text{each RG } i \in S} e\_i}{R}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/ecf6358f-f976-4da8-a8b9-a30147e137ca.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

If (y > 1.0)

For each RG i in S, set e\_i = e\_i/y

End If

For each RG i in S

rrmRGTargetShare\_i += e\_i

R -= e\_i

End For

End If

Step 2: Distribute the remaining resource after step 1 to all RGs in proportion to their average total scheduling weights.

Step 2.1: If remaining resource to share is positive (R>0), distribute the resource as below, otherwise stop target share computation.

If (R <= 0)

Stop target share computation

End If

Step 2.2: Distribute resource to all RGs in proportion to their average total scheduling weights.

Sort RGs in S, the RGs that tend to reach maximum quota earlier during resource distribution are put at the front of S.

totW = 0

For each RG i in S,

w\_i = max(10^(-6), rrmRgAvgSchedulWeight\_i(t))

totW += w\_i

End For

Sort RGs in S, in increasing order of (rrmRGMaxQuota\_i - rrmRGTargetShare\_i) / w\_i for RG i

For each RG in the sorted list, distribute R in proportion to w\_i, while ensuring that resulting target share doesn’t exceed the max quota.

For k = 1 to size(S)  (k is the RG index in the sorted list S)

d = R \* w\_k / totW

d = min(d, rrmRGMaxQuota\_k - rrmRGTargetShare\_k)

rrmRGTargetShare\_k += d

R -= d

totW -= w\_k

End For

---

##### 3.29.12.3.4-2.0-2 PRB Bookkeeping for MU-MIMO Average total scheduling weight per RG (ID: 11189507)

**3.29.12.3.4-2.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11189516`)

PRB Bookkeeping for MU-MIMO
11189516:
PRB Bookkeeping for MU-MIMO
If at least one of these is activated for a cell

* Slice aware scheduler(5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_5021\_replaced([11288045](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tp4DWvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and NRBTS.actDynamicTargetShareCalcForRg = True
* Enhanced slice aware scheduler (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_12233\_replaced([11278970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* [CB012238-C] PLMN aware scheduler (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_16121\_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB012238-C]

AND

* QoS fairness slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchQosFairness = True)

, L2PS shall calculate the average total scheduling weight rrmRgAvgSchedulWeight\_i for each RG i in each DL slot.

[Before CB012238-A-UPD001]If rdNbrUEsInCS1ListSchedulingWeightDL = 0 (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_33090\_replaced([11194141](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvzOAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then [End CB012238-A-UPD001]L2PS shall scan each UE in CS1 list that is a candidate for nonGBR iniTx (request class drbTraffic or dtxOptimizedDrbTraffic) [CB012238-D] or deprioritized GBR/DC-GBR iniTx (request class deprioritizedGbr) (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8011\_replaced([11174274](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuat8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB012238-D] and update average total scheduling weight per RG.

[Before CB012238-A-UPD001]If rdNbrUEsInCS1ListSchedulingWeightDL > 0, then L2PS shall randomly scan at most rdNbrUEsInCS1ListSchedulingWeightDL UEs in CS1 list, each of which is a candidate for nonGBR iniTx (request class drbTraffic or dtxOptimizedDrbTraffic) [CB012238-D] or deprioritized GBR/DC-GBR iniTx (request class deprioritizedGbr) (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8011\_replaced([11174274](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuat8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB012238-D] and update average total scheduling weight per RG. [End CB012238-A-UPD001]

Before scanning UEs in CS1 list, initialize instantaneous total scheduling weight rrmRgInstSchedulWeight\_i = 0, for each RG i.

For each scanned UE u:

* For each nonGBR iniTx (with request class drbTraffic or dtxOptimizedDrbTraffic) [CB012238-D] or deprioritized GBR or deprioritized DC-GBR iniTx (with request class deprioritizedGbr) [End CB012238-D] DRB d of UE u with data in buffer:
* If DRB d belongs to an RG i with nonzero RG weight (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7389\_replaced([11188798](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved7fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then rrmRgInstSchedulWeight\_i += schedulWeight\_d.

Note:  [CB012238-D]schedulWeight\_d of a deprioritized GBR DRB or a deprioritized DC-GBR DRB d is equal to rdDepriorGbrSchedulWeight (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10990\_replaced([11193445](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvtHYPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for GBR/DC-GBR excess data and rdCongDepriorGbrSchedulWeight (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31697\_replaced([11193461](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvtHY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for congestion deprioritized GBR DRB. [End CB012238-D] schedulWeight\_d of a nonGBR DRB d is the scheduling weight defined by NIDD MRBTS/NRBTS/NRDRB/schedulWeight.

After scanning the UEs, L2PS shall update the average total scheduling weight per RG i for all RGs, by applying an exponentially moving average. Assume the current slot is denoted by t.

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula presented in a piecewise format. The formula defines a variable, `rrmRgAvgSchedulWeight(t)`, based on the value of `t`.
For `t = 1`, the variable is equal to `rrmRgInstSchedulWeight(t)`.
For `t > 1`, the variable is defined by a recursive relationship:
`rrmRgAvgSchedulWeight(t) = (ε / (1 + τ)) * rrmRgInstSchedulWeight(t) + (1 - (ε / (1 + τ))) * rrmRgAvgSchedulWeight(t - 1)`
Here, `ε` and `τ` are likely constants. The subscript `i` in `rrmRgAvgSchedulWeight_i(t)` and `rrmRgInstSchedulWeight_i(t)` suggests that this formula might apply to multiple entities or indices.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03191038.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

where,

* i: each configured RG
* τ = rdRGAvgShareFilterWindow : is the exponential filter time window (default value=100)
* ε = rdRGAvgShareFilterFactor: is the exponential filter smoothing factor (default value=1)
* t: refer to DL schedule slot.

---

##### 3.29.12.3.4-2.0-3 PRB Bookkeeping for MU-MIMO Estimated resource required by high priority and NBR traffic per RG (ID: 12483734)

**3.29.12.3.4-2.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `12483735`)

PRB Bookkeeping for MU-MIMO
12483735:
PRB Bookkeeping for MU-MIMO
gNB shall compute the estimated average amount of resource demanded by high priority and NBR traffic per RG i (denoted by rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i(t)) for all RGs, at the end of every slot t. rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i(t) consists of two parts: the high priority traffic (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7392\_replaced([11190186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) part and the NBR traffic part. Since the high priority traffic is not controlled by the slice aware scheduler, the estimated average amount of resource demanded by high priority traffic can be assumed to be equal to the average resource share used by high priority traffic. The estimated average amount of resource demanded by the NBR traffic is determined by the configured NRBTS/NRDRB\_MAC.nbrDl (NBR prioritized bit rate configured for a nonGBR bearer via NIDD parameter) of all NBR DRBs of a RG.

[PR854271] If rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t) = 0, then rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i(t) = rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i(t-1) for every RG in the cell, and L2PS shall skip the following logic. [End PR854271]

If PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_16121\_replaced([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

If rrmPlmnAvgShare\_p(t) == 0

rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i(t) = 0

Else

[Before PR854271]

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula written in an italicized font. The formula is:
$rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i(t) = min {rrmRGMaxQuota\_i, \frac{rrmRGAvgHighShare\_i(t) + rrmRGEstAvgNbrDemand\_i(t)}{rrmPlmnAvgShare\_p(t)}}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/a0c73514-6ebd-47f5-bb6c-0636a61622fe.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

[PR854271]

rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i(t) = rrmRGAvgHighShare\_i(t) + rrmRGEstAvgNbrDemand\_i(t)

If (rrmRGEstAvgNbrDemand\_i(t) > 0) [PR861118] and (NBR PDSCH congestion control is activated, i.e. nbrPdschCongHandling = True) [End PR861118]

[Before PR861118]

rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i(t) = rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i(t) \* rdHighNbrDemandBoostFactorDl  / (rrmMaxNbrTrafficLimit \* rdDlsNbrPrbCongHyst / 100)

[PR861118]

rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i(t) = rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i(t) \* rdHighNbrDemandBoostFactorDl  / (NRCELL.maxNbrTrafficLimit \* rdDlsNbrPrbCongHyst / 100)

[End PR861118]

End If

rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i(t) = min{rrmRGMaxQuota\_i, rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i(t) / rrmPlmnAvgShare\_p(t) }

[End PR854271]

End If

Else

[Before PR854271]

[image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a serif font. The equation is:
$rrmRGEst AvgHighNbr Demand\_i(t) = min{rrm RG MaxQuota\_i, rrmRGAvgHighShare(t) + rrmRGEstAvgNbr Demand\_i(t)}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/e802b3eb-05fb-41d6-b15a-7d0714415e42.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

[PR854271]

rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i(t) = rrmRGAvgHighShare\_i(t) + rrmRGEstAvgNbrDemand\_i(t)

If (rrmRGEstAvgNbrDemand\_i(t) > 0) [PR861118] and (NBR PDSCH congestion control is activated, i.e. nbrPdschCongHandling = True) [End PR861118]

[Before PR861118]

rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i(t) = rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i(t) \* rdHighNbrDemandBoostFactorDl  / (rrmMaxNbrTrafficLimit \* rdDlsNbrPrbCongHyst / 100)

[PR861118]

rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i(t) = rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i(t) \* rdHighNbrDemandBoostFactorDl  / (NRCELL.maxNbrTrafficLimit \* rdDlsNbrPrbCongHyst / 100)

[End PR861118]

End If

rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i(t) = min{rrmRGMaxQuota\_i, rrmRGEstAvgHighNbrDemand\_i(t)}

[End PR854271]

End If

where,

* rrmRGAvgHighShare\_i(t): average resource share for high priority traffic of RG i at slot t, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7392\_replaced([11190186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* rrmRGMaxQuota\_i: the maximum quota of RG i.
* rrmRGEstAvgNbrDemand\_i(t): the estimated average resource demanded by NBR traffic of RG i, computed in slot t. It is measured in percentage of resources available to slice aware scheduler. The NBR traffic requirement is determined by NRBTS/NRDRB\_MAC.nbrDl for all NBR DRBs in RG i.
* rrmPlmnAvgShare\_p(t): average resource share of PLMN p at slot t, where p is the PLMN of RG i. See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31465\_replaced([11188649](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvd20fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[PR854271]

* rdDlsNbrPrbCongHyst: PDSCH GBR+NBR congestion hysteresis factor, see [11193616](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvuVhfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).
* rdHighNbrDemandBoostFactorDl: boost factor for the estimation of the demand of high priority and NBR traffic, see [12828213](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ljcVO65-EfCyQasEtWkQ4A?vvc.configuration=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/cm/stream/_UBmNVp5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA).

[End PR854271]

In general, rrmRGEstAvgNbrDemand\_i(t) shall be computed by applying an exponentially moving average on the instantaneous estimated resource demanded by NBR traffic of RG i, rrmRGEstInstNbrDemand\_i(t).

[PR854271] rrmRGEstAvgNbrDemand\_i(t) shall be initialized to 0 for each RG i. [End PR854271]

The detailed logic is as follows. At a slot t,

If there is no NBR DRB in RG i, then

rrmRGEstAvgNbrDemand\_i(t) = 0

[Before PR854271]

Else if (no NBR category traffic for RG i is scheduled in slot t, i.e. rrmRGNbrInstShare\_i(t) == 0) and (rrmRGEstAvgNbrDemand\_i(t-1) == 0), then

[image-2][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is:
$rrmRGEstAvgNbr Demand\_i(t) = \frac{rrmMaxNbrTrafficLimit}{100} \cdot \frac{rrmNbrDli}{\sum\_{each RG k} rrmNbrDlk}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/9739bc12-3281-4e3c-b539-d8fa68401028.png[/image\_path][/image-2]

Else if (no NBR category traffic for RG i is scheduled in slot t, i.e. rrmRGNbrInstShare\_i(t) == 0) and (rrmRGEstAvgNbrDemand\_i(t-1) > 0)

[Before PR847181]

rrmRGEstAvgNbrDemand\_i(t) = rrmRGEstAvgNbrDemand\_i(t-1)

[PR847181]

[image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in an italicized font. The equation is:
$rrmRGEstAvgNbrDemand\_i(t) = (1 - \frac{\epsilon}{1+\tau}) \cdot rrmRGEstAvgNbrDemand\_i(t-1)$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-09031104.png[/image\_path][/image-3]

[End PR847181]

Else (\*)

DESC: rrmRGEstInstNbrDemand\_i(t) is equal to the configured number of bytes to be transmitted by NBR traffic of RG i per slot multiplied by a factor. The factor is equal to the ratio of the percentage of cell resources used by NBR traffic of RG i  to the number of bytes transmitted by NBR traffic, measured in slot t.

[image-4][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is:
$rrmRGEstInstNbr Demand\_i(t) = \frac{rrmRGNbrInstShare\_i(t)}{\sum\_{each scheduled NBR DRB j of RG i in slott} amountBytes\_j(t)} \cdot \frac{rrmNbr Dli \cdot 10^6}{8 \cdot rrmNumSlotsPerSec}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/6af404af-cba1-40e8-a6cf-0e9253f5afbe.png[/image\_path][/image-4]

[PR854271]

Else

DESC: rrmRGEstInstNbrDemand\_i(t) is computed according to the configured data rate of each NBR DRB of RG i and the spectral efficiency of the related UE.

rrmRGEstInstNbrDemand\_i(t) = sum\_{NBR DRB j of RG i} {nbrDl\_j / InstUeDlSE(Ue(j), t) } / (normalization\_factor \* rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t))

To avoid division by zero, if InstUeDlSE(Ue(j), t) = 0 for a NBR DRB j, in the above formula, skip the DRB in the summation.

[End PR854271]

[PR847181]

If PLMN aware scheduler is activated for a cell ([11279261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpUpufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

maxQuota\_i = rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota\_i

Else

maxQuota\_i = rrmRGMaxQuota\_i

End If

rrmRGEstInstNbrDemand\_i(t) = min(rrmRGEstInstNbrDemand\_i(t), maxQuota\_i, (NRCELL.maxPrbsPerNbrUe/100) \* ( [Before PR852032]# NBR UEs in the cell involving RG i[PR852032]#NBR UEs in cell with at least one NBR DRB belonging to RG i [End PR852032]) )

If NBR congestion control is activated, that is if nbrPdschCongHandling is set to True,

rrmRGEstInstNbrDemand\_i(t) = min(rrmRGEstInstNbrDemand\_i(t), maxQuota\_i \* (NRCELL.maxNbrTrafficLimit/100))

End If

[End PR847181]

If (rrmRGEstAvgNbrDemand\_i(t-1) is undefined) or (rrmRGEstAvgNbrDemand\_i(t-1) == 0), then

rrmRGEstAvgNbrDemand\_i(t) = rrmRGEstInstNbrDemand\_i(t)

Else

[image-5][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a stylized font. The equation is:
$rrmRGEstAvgNbrDemand\_i(t) = \frac{\epsilon}{1+\tau} \cdot rrmRGEstInstNbrDemand\_i(t) + (1 - \frac{\epsilon}{1+\tau}) \cdot rrmRGEstAvgNbrDemand\_i(t-1)$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/5cd56d4f--afe2-b82cfb7d9dce.png[/image\_path][/image-5]

End If

End If

[Before PR854271] \* Note, this is the case that NBR category traffic for RG i is scheduled in slot t, i.e. rrmRGNbrInstShare\_i(t) > 0 [End PR854271]

where,

* τ = rdRGAvgShareFilterWindow: the exponential filter time window (default value=100)
* ε = rdRGAvgShareFilterFactor: the exponential filter smoothing factor (default value=1)

[Before PR854271]

* amountBytes\_j(t): the amount of bytes allocated to the transmissions of a NBR DRB j in slot t, defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23527\_replaced([11191434](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvhhN_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* rrmRGNbrInstShare\_i(t): the instantaneous NBR resource share of RG i in slot t,  defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23527\_replaced([11191434](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvhhN_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* rrmNumSlotsPerSec: the number of DL slots in a second.
* rrmNbrDl\_i: the NBR traffic requirement of RG i, measured in Mbit/s. It is equal to the sum of NRBTS/NRDRB\_MAC.nbrDl of all NBRs DRBs of RG i.

[PR854271]

* nbrDl\_j: It is equal to NRBTS/NRDRB\_MAC.nbrDl\*10^6 of NBR DRB j, measured in bit/s
* InstUeDlSE(Ue(j), t): The most up-to-date instantaneous NBR UE DL spectrum efficiency calculated for the UE of NBR DRB j, see [11183451](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvK75PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?vvc.configuration=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/cm/stream/_UBmNVp5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA).
* normalization\_factor: Normalization based on the total number of DL slot per second, see [11183451](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvK75PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?vvc.configuration=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/cm/stream/_UBmNVp5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA).
* rrmAvailablePrbsForSas(t): available PRBs for SAS in slot t, see [11190661](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6K_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

[End PR854271]

[Before PR861118]

* rrmMaxNbrTrafficLimit: the maximum NBR traffic limit for a cell. If NRCELL.maxNbrTrafficLimit is configured, rrmMaxNbrTrafficLimit is set to the value of NRCELL.maxNbrTrafficLimit; otherwise, rrmMaxNbrTrafficLimit is set to 100.

[End PR861118]

* rrmCellLevelRGMaxQuota\_i: cell level maximum quota of RG i, see [11188028](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcoufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).
* maxQuota\_i: the maximum average resource RG i can get, measured in percentage of available cell resources.

---

#### 3.29.12.3.4-3 PRB Bookkeeping for MU-MIMO

##### 3.29.12.3.4-3.0-1 PRB Bookkeeping for MU-MIMO Number of nonGBR UEs per RG (ID: 13485934)

**3.29.12.3.4-3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13485936`)

PRB Bookkeeping for MU-MIMO
If intent-throughput slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchIntentTput = True), gNB needs to compute the average number of nonGBR UEs per RG i, rrmAvgNumNgbrUe\_i(t) at each slot t.

First, gNB needs to compute the instantaneous number of nonGBR UEs per RG i per slot t, rrmInstNumNgbrUe\_i(t). It is equal to the number of nonGBR UEs of RG i in the cell, where a nonGBR UE of RG i has at least one nonGBR DRB with nonempty buffer belonging to RG i.

To improve runtime performance, rrmInstNumNgbrUe\_i(t) can be implemented based on the BSR (buffer status report) info for UEs. The details are provided by EFS/CP3.

If all nonGBR DRBs of a UE must belong to the same RG, rrmInstNumNgbrUe\_i(t) can be implemented by tracking the buffer status of all nonGBR UEs of RG i. If the buffer of all nonGBR DRBs of UE u changes from empty to non-empty, rrmInstNumNgbrUe\_i(t) increments by 1, else if the buffer of all nonGBR DRBs of UE u changes from non-empty to empty, rrmInstNumNgbrUe\_i(t) decrements by 1, where UE u is a nonGBR UE of RG i.

Then, gNB derives rrmAvgNumNgbrUe\_i(t) from rrmInstNumNgbrUe\_i(t) as follows:

If t = 1, rrmAvgNumNgbrUe\_i(t) = rrmInstNumNgbrUe\_i(t)

Else, rrmAvgNumNgbrUe\_i(t) = ε/(1+τ)\*rrmInstNumNgbrUe\_i(t) + [1 - ε/(1+τ)] \* rrmAvgNumNgbrUe\_i(t-1)

where,  
τ = rdRGAvgShareFilterWindow : is the exponential filter time window (default value=100).  
ε = rdRGAvgShareFilterFactor: is the exponential filter smoothing factor (default value=1).

---

##### 3.29.12.3.4-3.0-2 PRB Bookkeeping for MU-MIMO Estimated Resources for Intent Throughput per RG (ID: 13484174)

**3.29.12.3.4-3.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13484196`)

PRB Bookkeeping for MU-MIMO
If intent-throughput slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchIntentTput = True), gNB needs to compute the estimated average amount of resources (in percentage of resources available to slice aware scheduler) needed for nonGBR and deprioritized GBR iniTx per RG which satisfies the intent throughput, rrmRGEstAvgIntentResource\_i(t), at the end of a virtual slot t (see [11188771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved6PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Initialization:

Initialization is done only once when NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchIntentTput switches from False to True, or an RG i is newly created:

rrmRGLowAvgSe\_i(t) = 0, rrmRGAvgNgbrTputRatio\_i(t) = 0, rrmRGEstAvgIntentResource\_i(t) = 0

Input:

* For each RG i of the cell:
* The intent throughput of the RG, rrmIntentTput\_i, measured in bytes/sec. see [11188675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvd21PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).
* The average number of nonGBR UEs of the RG, rrmAvgNumNgbrUe\_i(t), see [13485934](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_bcrlFEIBEfGli_ln9e-cvQ).
* The instantaneous throughput (transmitted bytes) of low priority traffic classes of the RG, rrmRGLowInstTput\_i(t), see [11190186.](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)
* The instantaneous resource share of low priority traffic classes of the RG, rrmRGLowInstShare\_i(t), see [11190186.](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)
* The instantaneous throughput (transmitted bytes) of traffic class drbTraffic of the RG, rrmRGNgbrInstTput\_i(t), see [11190186.](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6I_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

Output: the estimated average amount of resources needed for nonGBR and deprioritized GBR iniTx for each RG i, which satisfies the intent throughput, rrmRGEstAvgIntentResource\_i(t).

Detail of Algorithm (Pseudo-code is reference for implementation, detail can be decided in EFS)

Step 1: Computation of instantaneous and average spectral efficiency of low priority traffic for each RG i, rrmRGLowInstSe\_i(t) and rrmRGLowAvgSe\_i(t).

If (rrmRGLowInstShare\_i(t) > 0)

rrmRGLowInstSe\_i(t) = rrmRGLowInstTput\_i(t) / rrmRGLowInstShare\_i(t).

If t = 1

rrmRGLowAvgSe\_i(t) = rrmRGLowInstSe\_i(t)

Else

rrmRGLowAvgSe\_i(t) = ε/(1+τ)\*rrmRGLowInstSe\_i(t) + [1 - ε/(1+τ)] \* rrmRGLowAvgSe\_i(t-1)

End If

End If

Step 2: Computation of the instantaneous and average throughput ratio of nonGBR iniTx to low priority traffic for each RG i, rrmRGInstNgbrTputRatio\_i(t) and rrmRGAvgNgbrTputRatio\_i(t).

If (rrmRGLowInstTput\_i(t) > 0)

rrmRGInstNgbrTputRatio\_i(t) = rrmRGNgbrInstTput\_i(t) / rrmRGLowInstTput\_i(t).

If t = 1

rrmRGAvgNgbrTputRatio\_i(t) = rrmRGInstNgbrTputRatio\_i(t)

Else

rrmRGAvgNgbrTputRatio\_i(t) = ε/(1+τ)\*rrmRGInstNgbrTputRatio\_i(t) + [1 - ε/(1+τ)] \* rrmRGAvgNgbrTputRatio\_i(t-1)

End If

End If

Step 3: Computation of the estimated average amount of resources needed for satisfying throughput intent of each RG i, rrmRGEstAvgIntentResource\_i(t).

If (rrmRGAvgNgbrTputRatio\_i(t) > 0 and rrmRGLowAvgSe\_i(t) > 0)

rrmRGAllUeIntentThroughput\_i(t) = rrmIntentTput\_i \* rrmAvgNumNgbrUe\_i(t)

rrmRGEstAvgIntentResource\_i(t) = rrmRGAllUeIntentThroughput\_i(t) / (normalization\_factor \* rrmRGAvgNgbrTputRatio\_i(t) \* rrmRGLowAvgSe\_i(t))

End If

If rrmRGLowAvgSe\_i(t), rrmRGAvgNgbrTputRatio\_i(t) or rrmRGEstAvgIntentResource\_i(t) are not updated in slot t, they are set the corresponding value in slot t-1.

Notations:

* τ = rdRGAvgShareFilterWindow : is the exponential filter time window (default value=100).
* ε = rdRGAvgShareFilterFactor: is the exponential filter smoothing factor (default value=1).
* rrmRGAllUeIntentThroughput\_i(t): the total throughput of all nonGBR UEs of RG i which satisfies the per UE intent throughput rrmIntentTput\_i. The unit is in bytes/sec.
* normalization\_factor: Normalization based on the total number of DL slot per second, see [11183451](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvK75PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

---

##### 3.29.12.3.4-3.0-3 PRB Bookkeeping for MU-MIMO RG Target share calculation for intent-based partitioning (ID: 13480948)

**3.29.12.3.4-3.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `13480953`)

PRB Bookkeeping for MU-MIMO
gNB shall compute target share of each RG with intent-throughput slice aware scheduler algorithm.

If intent-throughput slice aware scheduler is activated on parent gNB (NRBTS.actSliceAwareSchIntentTput = True), target share computation for each RG in an RG set shall be done as follows. Target share computation is performed at the end of a virtual slot (see [11188771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved6PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Input:

* The set of RGs S. S is equal to the set of all configured RGs or is a subset of all configured RGs.
* For each RG i in S:
* The minimum prioritized minimum quota rrmRGMinQuota\_i, the maximum quota rrmRGMaxQuota\_i (see [11188675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvd21PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and the current average total scheduling weight rrmRgAvgSchedulWeight\_i(t) (see [11189507](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfsDPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
