### 3.29.13.0-10 Transport Block Size Calculation PRBs limitation according to MCS to skip buffer based MCS downgrade procedure (ID: 11192333)

**3.29.13.0-10.0-1**  (ID: `11192339`)

Transport Block Size Calculation
Restriction on UE DL max data rate (up to 24R2)

---

**3.29.13.0-10.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11192351`)

Transport Block Size Calculation
[CNI-103796-AA] from 24R3 onward refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24656\_replaced([11192358](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvj9ePvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [End CNI-103796-AA]

[Before CNI-103796-AA]

Within a cell group, a UE is not required to handle PDSCH transmissions in certain slot if the condition specified in 5G\_UP\_IF\_1892\_replaced([11515666](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_tUOYS_v1Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is not fulfilled

Consequently, FD scheduling shall be done with respect for the following algorithm (variables used are just for the algorithm description):

[CB008830-A]

let localDlDmrsType determined with 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24898\_replaced([11192062](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kviIT_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CB008830-A]

If 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4630\_replaced([11192270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvjWafvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) fulfills the conditions to run, use its output as input for the current algorithm:

* let A = tbSize , i.e. transport block size (TBS) determined with 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4630\_replaced([11192270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvjWafvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* let C = number of code blocks corresponding to tbSize determined with 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4630\_replaced([11192270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvjWafvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* localDlProposedMcs = rrmDlUsedMcs
* let localCdmGroupsWithoutData = number of cdm groups without data determined with 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4630\_replaced([11192270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvjWafvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

else

[Before CB008830-A]

let localCdmGroupsWithoutData determined below

If ( ((actDlMuMimo in PsCell\_CellSetupReq is true) and (dlDataDmrsFdmAllowed decided in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4405\_replaced([11142329](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr3wSfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is FALSE))

or (PDSCH is scheduled by DCI 1\_0))

number of cdm groups without data is 2

Else

number of cdm groups without data = number of cdm groups without data determined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3045\_replaced([11125301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqt5svvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Endif

[CB008830-A]

Let localCdmGroupsWithoutData = “number of cdm groups without data” and calculate number of cdm group without data as follows:

If (PDSCH is scheduled by DCI 1\_0)

number of cdm groups without data is 2

Else

If UE is configured to DL DMRS type 1 (5G\_UP\_ALG\_24898\_replaced([11192062](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kviIT_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

If ( (MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/actDlMuMimo is true) and (dlDataDmrsFdmAllowed decided in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4405\_replaced([11142329](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr3wSfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is FALSE))

number of cdm groups without data is 2

Else

number of cdm groups without data is determined by MCS value according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3045\_replaced([11125301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqt5svvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Endif

Else // UE is configured to DL DMRS type 2 (5G\_UP\_ALG\_24898\_replaced([11192062](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kviIT_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

number of cdm groups without data is determined by MCS value according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3045\_replaced([11125301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqt5svvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Endif

Endif

[End CB008830-A]

* let A = tbSize , i.e. transport block size (TBS) determined with 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6874\_replaced([11192598](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvlypfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* let C = number of code blocks determined with 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6874\_replaced([11192598](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvlypfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* localDlProposedMcs = rrmDlProposedMcs (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3045\_replaced([11125301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqt5svvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* let maxDataRateDl\_bpms be expressed in bits per millisecond (maxDataRateDl\_bpms = maxDataRateDl in kbps). Note that maxDataRateDl corresponds to max data rate as specified in chapter "$4.1.2 Supported max data rate." of TS 38.306 V15.4.0. expressed in kbps.
* let instantDataRateDl\_bpms be the instant data rate (in bpms) that could be achieved with the data scheduled in the current slot.
* u corresponds to the PDSCH numerology (see 38.211 - Table 4.2-1: Supported transmission numerologies)

{ If rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 1, the max data rate split as determined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2856\_replaced([11123215](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqhFbvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) needs to be taken into account.}

If this is the first carrier scheduled for the current UE:

{ If rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 0}

maxDataRateDl\_bpms -= SUM (X[j]), where X[j] = TB size [CC j], if the UE needs to be scheduled for a re-tx  in CC j, and  X[j] = 0, if the UE could be scheduled for a 1'st tx in CC j

{ else // i.e. If rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 1

rrmMaxDataRateSplit(k) -= SUM (X[j]), where X[j] = TB size [CC j], if the UE needs to be scheduled for a re-tx  in CC j and core k, and  X[j] = 0, if the UE could be scheduled for a 1'st tx in CC j and core k}

if a re-tx is scheduled:

If [CB008830-A] (UE is configured to DL DMRS type 1 (5G\_UP\_ALG\_24898\_replaced([11192062](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kviIT_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) and [End CB008830-A]  (number of cdm groups without data in initial transmission is 1) and (localCdmGroupsWithoutData==2)

use localCdmGroupsWithoutData and a reserved MCS(refer to 5G\_UP\_IF\_1897\_replaced([11515718](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_tUO_Wvv1Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to schedule the UE. The MCS index shall be the one having same Qm as initial transmission.

else

Just schedule the UE with same number of cdm groups without data as initial transmission.

else:

{ If rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 0}

if C \* floor (A / C) \* 2u > maxDataRateDl\_bpms

{ Else if C \* floor (A / C) > rrmMaxDataRateSplit(k) for considered core k}

Run DL MCS downgrading procedure:

DL scheduler downgrades the DL MCS as follows:

5G-L2-PS shall try to find the largest MCS value rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade which fulfills all of the following conditions:

* It is smaller than localDlProposedMcs
* It is included in list of supported MCSes (see 5G\_L2\_642\_replaced([11164067](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25qg9fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* With an allocation of all PRBs, it maps to the largest DL TB size rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade so that, for the new corresponding number of transport blocks C

If [CB008830-A] localDlDmrsType is type 1 and [End CB008830-A] localCdmGroupsWithoutData == 2

nb\_cdm\_no\_data (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4635\_replaced([11192394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvkkgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to calculate rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade is 2.

[CB008830-A]

else if localDlDmrsType is type 2 and localCdmGroupsWithoutData == 3   then

nb\_cdm\_no\_data (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4635\_replaced([11192394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvkkgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to calculate rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade is 3.

[End CB008830-A]

esle

nb\_cdm\_no\_data (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4635\_replaced([11192394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvkkgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to calculate rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade is determined by rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3054\_replaced([11129150](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq6uCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

{ If rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 0}

C \* floor (rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade / C) \* 2u <= maxDataRateDl\_bpms.

{ Else C \* floor (rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade / C) <= rrmMaxDataRateSplit(k) for considered core k}

See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4622\_replaced([11192072](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvivUPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the TBS mapping table. 5G-L2-PS shall assume one sub-header per MAC CE (see 5G\_L2\_1960\_replaced([11216443](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2--exPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and the size of the MAC CE given in 5G\_L2\_1971\_replaced([11215683](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-5mTfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB008830-A]

If localDlDmrsType is type 1

[End CB008830-A]

If nb\_cdm\_no\_data is 1 with localDlProposedMcs, execute above DL MCS downgrading procedure again assuming nb\_cdm\_no\_data is always 2, and find a MCS value rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade1 with tbs rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade1,

If rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade < rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade1

rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade = rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade1,

rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade = rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade1,

nb\_cdm\_no\_data = 2,

[CB008830-A]

Else // DL DMRS type 2

If nb\_cdm\_no\_data is 2 with localDlProposedMcs,

execute above DL MCS downgrading procedure again assuming nb\_cdm\_no\_data is always 3,and find a MCS value rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade1 with tbs rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade1,

If rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade < rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade1

rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade = rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade1

rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade = rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade1

nb\_cdm\_no\_data = 3

Endif

Else If nb\_cdm\_no\_data is 1 with localDlProposedMcs,

execute above DL MCS downgrading procedure again assuming nb\_cdm\_no\_data is always 2, and find a MCS value rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade1 with tbs rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade1,

excute above DL MCS downgrading procedure again assuming nb\_cdm\_no\_data is always 3, and find a MCS value rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade2 with tbs rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade2,

If rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade < max (rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade1, rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade2)

If rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade2 < rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade1

rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade = rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade1

rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade = rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade1

nb\_cdm\_no\_data = 2

Else

rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade = rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade2

rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade = rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade2

nb\_cdm\_no\_data = 3

Endif

Endif

Endif

Endif

[END CB008830-A]

If such an MCS value is found, 5G-L2-PS shall set in the HARQ process:

* rrmDlUsedMcs = rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade.
* tbSize = rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade.
* mark that the UE shall be removed from all the CS2 lists during the CS2 list(s) priority update procedure.

Otherwise (This case should not exist), 5G-L2-PS shall set in the HARQ process:

* rrmDlUsedMcs = localDlProposedMcs
* Keep the current value of tbSize.
* mark that the UE shall be removed from all the CS2 lists during the CS2 list(s) priority update procedure.
* Trace the case

Else //when C \* floor (A / C) \* 2u <= maxDataRateDl\_bpms { for rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 0 or C \* floor (A / C) <= rrmMaxDataSplit(k) for considered core k}

DL scheduler shall schedule tbSize bits, i.e. with localCdmGroupsWithoutData, and without downgrading the MCS.

{  If rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 0}

* instantDataRateDl\_bpms = C \* floor ( tbSize / C) \* 2u

{ Else instantMaxDataRate = C \* floor ( tbSize / C) }

else // If this is NOT the first carrier scheduled for the current UE:

if a re-tx is scheduled:

If [CB008830-A] (UE is configured to DL DMRS type 1 (5G\_UP\_ALG\_24898\_replaced([11192062](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kviIT_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) and [End CB008830-A]  (number of cdm groups without data in initial transmission is 1) and (localCdmGroupsWithoutData==2)

use localCdmGroupsWithoutData and a reserved MCS((refer to 5G\_UP\_IF\_1897\_replaced([11515718](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_tUO_Wvv1Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) to schedule the UE. The MCS index shall be the one having same Qm as initial transmission.

else

Just schedule the UE with same number of cdm groups without data as initial transmission.

else:

{ If rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 0}

if instantDataRateDl\_bpms + C \* floor (A / C) \* 2u > maxDataRateDl\_bpms

{ Else if instantMaxDataRate + C \* floor (A / C) > rrmMaxDataRateSplit(k) for considered core k}

Select the first available option: Select another UE schedulable w/o restrictions  OR Run DL MCS downgrading procedure described above:

if the current CS2 list contains at least one other UE2

DL scheduler shall schedule UE2. The procedure in current requirement shall be followed for UE2 as well

Note: Implementaiton shall control the maximum number of investigated UEs with an internal parameter. The minimum value could be 0, meaning that MCS reduction is applied to UE.

Else

Run DL MCS downgrading procedure described above

If the MCS downgrading procedure fails, UE is not scheduled (removed from all the CS2 lists), and the next UE in CS2 is proposed for scheduling.

Else // when instantDataRateDl\_bpms + C \* floor (A / C) \* 2u <= maxDataRateDl\_bpms for rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 0 or instantMaxDataRate + C \* floor (A / C) <= rrmMaxDataSplit(k) for considered core k

DL scheduler shall schedule tbSize bits, i.e. with localCdmGroupsWithoutData, and without downgrading the MCS.

{  If rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 0}

* instantDataRateDl\_bpms += C \* floor (tbSize / C) \* 2u

{ Else instantMaxDataRate += C \* floor ( tbSize / C) }

[End CNI-103796-AA]

---

**3.29.13.0-10.0-2**  (ID: `11192358`)

Transport Block Size Calculation
Algorithm for calculation of restriction on UE DL max data rate

---

**3.29.13.0-10.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11192363`)

Transport Block Size Calculation
[Before CNI-103796-A] This requirement was created according split from 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24733\_replaced([11192339](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvj9dfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [End CNI-103796-A]

Within a cell group, a UE is not required to handle PDSCH transmissions in certain slot if the condition specified in 38.214 - Section 5.1.3 is not fulfilled

Consequently, gNB-DU shall ensure UE's DL max data rate is not exceeded across all its scheduled transport block in a given slot as per following algorithm.

let localDlDmrsType determined with 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24898\_replaced([11192062](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kviIT_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

let localCdmGroupsWithoutData determined with 5G \_UP\_ALG\_24939

If 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4630\_replaced([11192270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvjWafvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) fulfills the conditions to run, use its output as input for the current algorithm:

* let A = tbSize , i.e. transport block size (TBS) determined with 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4630\_replaced([11192270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvjWafvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* let C = number of code blocks corresponding to tbSize determined with 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4630\_replaced([11192270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvjWafvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* localDlProposedMcs = rrmDlUsedMcs (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4630\_replaced([11192270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvjWafvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Else

* let A = tbSize , i.e. transport block size (TBS) determined with 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6874\_replaced([11192598](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvlypfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* let C = number of code blocks determined with 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6874\_replaced([11192598](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvlypfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* localDlProposedMcs = rrmDlProposedMcs (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3045\_replaced([11125301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqt5svvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Endif

* let maxDataRateDl\_bpms be maxDataRateDl as provided via PsUser\_SetupReq message but expressed in bits per millisecond (maxDataRateDl\_bpms = maxDataRateDl in kbps). Note that maxDataRateDl corresponds to max data rate as specified in chapter "$4.1.2 Supported max data rate." of TS 38.306 V15.4.0. expressed in kbps.
* let instantDataRateDl\_bpms be the instant data rate (in bpms) that could be achieved with the data scheduled in the current slot.

u corresponds to the PDSCH numerology (see 38.211 - Table 4.2-1: Supported transmission numerologies)

Algorithm:

{ If rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 1, the max data rate split as determined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2856\_replaced([11123215](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqhFbvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) needs to be taken into account.}

If this is the first carrier scheduled for the current UE:

{ If rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 0}

maxDataRateDl\_bpms -= SUM (X[j]), where X[j] = TB size [CC j], if the UE needs to be scheduled for a re-tx  in CC j, and  X[j] = 0, if the UE could be scheduled for a 1'st tx in CC j

{ else // i.e. If rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 1

rrmMaxDataRateSplit(k) -= SUM (X[j]), where X[j] = TB size [CC j], if the UE needs to be scheduled for a re-tx  in CC j and core k, and  X[j] = 0, if the UE could be scheduled for a 1'st tx in CC j and core k}

if a re-tx is scheduled:

[Before CB008830-B]

If  (UE is configured to DL DMRS type 1 (5G\_UP\_ALG\_24898\_replaced([11192062](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kviIT_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) and (number of cdm groups without data in initial transmission is 1) and (localCdmGroupsWithoutData==2)

use localCdmGroupsWithoutData and a reserved MCS(refer to 5G\_UP\_IF\_1897\_replaced([11515718](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_tUO_Wvv1Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to schedule the UE. The MCS index shall be the one having same Qm as initial transmission(see Note1).

[CB008830-B]

If (number of cdm groups without data in initial transmission != localCdmGroupsWithoutData)

Use localCdmGroupsWithoutData to schedule the ue.

If reserved MCS is not allocated to the re-tx

Use a reserved MCS(refer to 5G\_UP\_IF\_1897\_replaced([11515718](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_tUO_Wvv1Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to schedule the UE. The MCS index shall be the one having same Qm as initial transmission(see Note1).

endif

[End CB008830-B]

else

Just schedule the UE with same number of cdm groups without data as initial transmission.

else:

If {[(rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 0) and (C \* floor (A / C) \* 2u > maxDataRateDl\_bpms) ] or [(rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 1) and C \* floor (A / C) > rrmMaxDataRateSplit(k) for considered core k)]}  then

Run DL MCS DL procedures according to [5G\_UP\_ALG\_24658\_replaced([11192380](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvj9fPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))]

Else //when C \* floor (A / C) \* 2u <= maxDataRateDl\_bpms { for rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 0 or C \* floor (A / C) <= rrmMaxDataSplit(k) for considered core k}

DL scheduler shall schedule tbSize bits, i.e. with localCdmGroupsWithoutData, and without downgrading the MCS. (according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24658\_replaced([11192380](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvj9fPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

{  If rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 0}

* instantDataRateDl\_bpms = C \* floor ( tbSize / C) \* 2u

{ Else instantMaxDataRate = C \* floor ( tbSize / C) }

else // If this is NOT the first carrier scheduled for the current UE:

if a re-tx is scheduled:

[Before CB008830-B]

If  (UE is configured to DL DMRS type 1 (5G\_UP\_ALG\_24898\_replaced([11192062](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kviIT_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) and (number of cdm groups without data in initial transmission is 1) and (localCdmGroupsWithoutData==2)

use localCdmGroupsWithoutData and a reserved MCS(refer to 5G\_UP\_IF\_1897\_replaced([11515718](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_tUO_Wvv1Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to schedule the UE. The MCS index shall be the one having same Qm as initial transmission(see Note1).

[CB008830-B]

If (number of cdm groups without data in initial transmission != localCdmGroupsWithoutData)

Use localCdmGroupsWithoutData to schedule the ue.

If reserved MCS is not allocated to the re-tx

Use a reserved MCS(refer to 5G\_UP\_IF\_1897\_replaced([11515718](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_tUO_Wvv1Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to schedule the UE. The MCS index shall be the one having same Qm as initial transmission(see Note1).

endif

[End CB008830-B]

else

Just schedule the UE with same number of cdm groups without data as initial transmission.

else:

If {[(rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 0) and (instantDataRateDl\_bpms + C \* floor (A / C) \* 2u > maxDataRateDl\_bpms)] or [instantMaxDataRate + C \* floor (A / C) > rrmMaxDataRateSplit(k) for considered core k]} then

Select the first available option: Select another UE schedulable w/o restrictions  OR Run DL MCS downgrading procedure described above:

if the current CS2 list contains at least one other UE2

DL scheduler shall schedule UE2. The procedure in current requirement shall be followed for UE2 as well

Note: Implementation shall control the maximum number of investigated UEs with an internal parameter. The minimum value could be 0, meaning that MCS reduction is applied to UE.

Else

Run DL MCS DL procedures according to [5G\_UP\_ALG\_24658\_replaced([11192380](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvj9fPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))]

If the MCS downgrading procedure fails, UE is not scheduled (removed from all the CS2 lists), and the next UE in CS2 is proposed for scheduling.

Else // when instantDataRateDl\_bpms + C \* floor (A / C) \* 2u <= maxDataRateDl\_bpms for rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 0 or instantMaxDataRate + C \* floor (A / C) <= rrmMaxDataSplit(k) for considered core k

DL scheduler shall schedule tbSize bits, i.e. with localCdmGroupsWithoutData, and without downgrading the MCS. (according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24658\_replaced([11192380](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvj9fPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

{  If rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 0}

* instantDataRateDl\_bpms += C \* floor (tbSize / C) \* 2u

{ Else instantMaxDataRate += C \* floor ( tbSize / C) }

Note1: different cdm group without data on initialTx & reTx could be happened only when MU-MIMO enabled (e.g. initialTx with SU-MIMO, reTx with MU-MIMO; or initialTx with MU-MIMO, reTx with SU-MIMO; or both with MU-MIMO).

---

**3.29.13.0-10.0-3**  (ID: `11192369`)

Transport Block Size Calculation
Determination of localCdmGroupsWithoutData parameter

---

**3.29.13.0-10.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11192374`)

Transport Block Size Calculation
[Before CNI-103796-A] This requirement was created according split from 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24733\_replaced([11192339](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvj9dfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [End CNI-103796-A]

Let localCdmGroupsWithoutData = “number of cdm groups without data” and calculate number of cdm group without data as follows:

If 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4630\_replaced([11192270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvjWafvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) fulfills the conditions to run, use its output as input for the current algorithm:

* calculate number of CDM groups without data according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4630\_replaced([11192270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvjWafvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Else

If (PDSCH is scheduled by DCI 1\_0)

number of cdm groups without data is 2

Else

If UE is configured to DL DMRS type 1 (5G\_UP\_ALG\_24898\_replaced([11192062](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kviIT_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

If ( (MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/actDlMuMimo is true) and (dlDataDmrsFdmAllowed decided in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4405\_replaced([11142329](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr3wSfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is FALSE))

number of cdm groups without data is 2

Else

number of cdm groups without data is determined by MCS value according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3045\_replaced([11125301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqt5svvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Endif

Else // UE is configured to DL DMRS type 2 (5G\_UP\_ALG\_24898\_replaced([11192062](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kviIT_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

number of cdm groups without data is determined by MCS value according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3045\_replaced([11125301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqt5svvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Endif

Endif

Endif

---

**3.29.13.0-10.0-4**  (ID: `11192380`)

Transport Block Size Calculation
MCS downgrade procedure for observing the maximum bitrate

---

**3.29.13.0-10.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `13368217`)

Transport Block Size Calculation
inputs:

Define localDlDmrsType, A, C, localDlProposedMcs, maxDataRateDl\_bpms, instantDataRateDl\_bpms according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24656\_replaced([11192358](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvj9ePvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and localCdmGroupsWithoutData according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24939\_replaced([11192369](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvj9evvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Procedure:

DL scheduler downgrades the DL MCS as follows:

5G-L2-PS shall try to find the largest MCS value rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade which fulfills all of the following conditions:

* It is smaller than localDlProposedMcs
* It is included in list of supported MCSes (see 5G\_L2\_642\_replaced([11164067](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25qg9fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* With an allocation of all PRBs, it maps to the largest DL TB size rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade so that, for the new corresponding number of transport blocks C

If localDlDmrsType is type 1 and localCdmGroupsWithoutData == 2   then

nb\_cdm\_no\_data (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4635\_replaced([11192394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvkkgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to calculate rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade is 2.

Else if localDlDmrsType is type 2 and localCdmGroupsWithoutData == 3   then

nb\_cdm\_no\_data (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4635\_replaced([11192394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvkkgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to calculate rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade is 3.

Else

nb\_cdm\_no\_data (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4635\_replaced([11192394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvkkgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to calculate rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade is determined by rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3054\_replaced([11129150](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq6uCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Endif

{ If rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 0 then the condition

C \* floor (rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade / C) \* 2u <= maxDataRateDl\_bpms

must be fulfilled.}

Else/\*  rrmBufferStatusSplitNeeded == 1 {the condition

C \* floor (rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade / C) <= rrmMaxDataRateSplit(k) for considered core k

must be fulfilled.}

See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4622\_replaced([11192072](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvivUPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the TBS mapping table. 5G-L2-PS shall assume one sub-header per MAC CE (see 5G\_L2\_1960\_replaced([11216443](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2--exPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and the size of the MAC CE given in 5G\_L2\_1971\_replaced([11215683](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-5mTfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If localDlDmrsType is type 1

If nb\_cdm\_no\_data is 1 with localDlProposedMcs, execute above DL MCS downgrading procedure again assuming nb\_cdm\_no\_data is always 2, and find a MCS value rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade1 with tbs rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade1,

If rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade < rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade1

rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade = rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade1,

rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade = rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade1,

nb\_cdm\_no\_data = 2,

Endif

Endif

Else // DL DMRS type 2

If nb\_cdm\_no\_data is 2 with localDlProposedMcs,

execute above DL MCS downgrading procedure again assuming nb\_cdm\_no\_data is always 3,and find a MCS value rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade1 with tbs rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade1,

If rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade < rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade1

rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade = rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade1

rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade = rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade1

nb\_cdm\_no\_data = 3

Endif

Else If nb\_cdm\_no\_data is 1 with localDlProposedMcs,

execute above DL MCS downgrading procedure again assuming nb\_cdm\_no\_data is always 2, and find a MCS value rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade1 with tbs rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade1,

excute above DL MCS downgrading procedure again assuming nb\_cdm\_no\_data is always 3, and find a MCS value rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade2 with tbs rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade2,

If rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade < max (rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade1, rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade2)

If rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade2 < rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade1

rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade = rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade1

rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade = rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade1

nb\_cdm\_no\_data = 2

Else

rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade = rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade2

rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade = rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade2

nb\_cdm\_no\_data = 3

Endif

Endif

Endif

Endif

[PR869513-26R2]

If the effective code rate with rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade & rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade is greater than 0.95,

gNB-DU shall continue to downgrade MCS until the corresponding effective code rate is not greater than 0.95, rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade & rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade shall be updated accordingly.

[End PR869513-26R2]

If such an MCS value is found, 5G-L2-PS shall set in the HARQ process:

* rrmDlUsedMcs = rrmDlMcsAfterDowngrade.
* tbSize = rrmDlTbsAfterDowngrade.
* mark that the UE shall be removed from all the CS2 lists during the CS2 list(s) priority update procedure.

Otherwise (This case should not exist), 5G-L2-PS shall set in the HARQ process:

* rrmDlUsedMcs = localDlProposedMcs
* Keep the current value of tbSize.
* mark that the UE shall be removed from all the CS2 lists during the CS2 list(s) priority update procedure.
* Trace the case

---

### 3.29.13.1 TBS computation

#### 3.29.13.1.1 TBS computation algorithm

##### 3.29.13.1.1.0-1 TBS computation algorithm TBS computation algorithm introduction (ID: 11192400)

**3.29.13.1.1.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `12721564`)

TBS computation algorithm
The exhaustive set of transport block size that can be configured in 3GPP release 15 [**CB008949-A] and later [End**CB008949-A] is provided in the look up table lut\_tbs.xls stored at\*\*\*\*

<https://nokia.sharepoint.com/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Forms/Tree_View.aspx?viewid=967508b3%2D8e81%2D461c%2Db99d%2D145065cf0c1c&id=%2Fsites%2F5Gdoc%2FAS%5FTech%5FSpec%2F5G%20Architecture%20documents%2F5G%20NR%20TBS%20Tables>

This table contains [Before **CB008949-A] 568 [**CB008949-A] 577 [End **CB008949-A]entries which are uniquely identified by an index TBS\_index. Several combinations of number of data symbols, mcs, number of layers, number of scheduled RB can lead to a same transport block size and the algorithm that associates each combination to the transport block index is presented below.**\*\*\*\*

The TBS is computed step by step (1 to 3  or 4) in order retrieve the TBS index to use in the table lut\_tbs\_index.

---

##### 3.29.13.1.1.0-2 TBS computation algorithm TBS computation algorithm step 1 (ID: 11192414)

**3.29.13.1.1.0-2.0-4**  (ID: `13417491`)

TBS computation algorithm
First determine the number of data RE per resource block Nre, based on the total number of PxSCH symbols nb\_symb and the number of DMRS symbols nb\_dmrs\_symb according to:

Nre = min(156, 12*nb\_symb - nb\_dmrs\_re\_per\_rb*nb\_cdm\_no\_data\*nb\_dmrs\_symb - Nxoh)

where:

* nb\_cdm\_no\_data is the number of CDM groups without data as indicated in the DCI section in 38.212.  nb\_cdm\_no\_data could be 1 or 2 for DMRS config type 1, and could be 1 or 2 or 3 for DMRS config type 2 according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3054\_replaced([11129150](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq6uCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* Nxoh is the xOverhead parameter (38.214 §5.1.3.2) calculated according to 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2201\_replaced([11325202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tsrfu_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The values supported for Nxoh are {0,6,12,18}.

-**nb\_dmrs\_re\_per\_rb is the number of DMRS REs per RB, it equals to 6 for DMRS config type 1, and equals to 4 for DMRS config type 2.**

In slots where the PDSCH are ratematched with LTE CRS REs including when it is combined with other ratematching such as LTE PSS/SSS REs, legacy LTE PSS/SSS/PBCH REs,

Nxoh =  xOverhead for TBS calculation, else Nxoh = 0 for TBS calculation even if the IE xOverhead >0 has been configured from L3 for this UE. (e.g., for msg2)

In slots where PDSCH are punctured,

if C-RNTI is used for scrambling, before and including Msg4: Nxoh = 0 for TBS calculation

if C-RNTI is used for scrambling, after Msg4: Nxoh = xOverhead for TBS calculation

if SI-RNTI, RA-RNTI, or P-RNTI is used for scrambling: Nxoh = 0 (3GPP 38.214, clause 5.1.3.2)

Note: the difference for C-RNTI is due to signalling xOverhead in RRC Setup, therefore it is assumed to be 0 by the UE until it received RRC Setup.

Note:

[PR875696] If NRCELL.actAsymmetricDss is set to 'false' [End PR875696] the xOverHead parameter is only handling the LTE CRS ratematching. For the additional flexible rate matching due to LTE PSS/SSS/PBCH signals [PR875696] or LTE CRS ratematching in case of NRCELL.actAsymmetricDss='true' [End PR875696], the TBS computation is transparent , and it is up to the effective coding rate process to compute a more accurate TBS (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2967\_replaced([11124515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqrdc_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

The xOverHead parameter (value >0) is used for LTE CRS rate matching for PDSCH for FDD DSS ( MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/lteNrDssMode > 1) and set to:

* 18 for 4 LTE CRS ports (*lteCrsPorts*= 4, see 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_7622\_replaced([11325223](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TsrfvvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))\*\*
* 12 for 2 LTE CRS ports  (*lteCrsPorts*= 2, see 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_7622\_replaced([11325223](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TsrfvvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))\*\*
* 6 for 1 LTE CRS port  (*lteCrsPorts*= 1, see 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_7622\_replaced([11325223](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TsrfvvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))\*\*

if NRCELL.actAsymmetricDss is set to "true', xOverHead shall not be used, it shall be not present or the value shall be set to 0.

---

##### 3.29.13.1.1.0-3 TBS computation algorithm TBS computation algorithm step 2 (ID: 11192432)

**3.29.13.1.1.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `12721580`)

TBS computation algorithm
Compute the quantized number of information bit X as follows:

X = (Nre*Nrb*QmxRx1024\**nu) >> p*

where

Nre is the number of data RE per RB as defined above

Nrb is the number of allocated RB for the PxSCH allocation

Nu is the number of layers

p is the scaling factor shift determined as follows:

If TBS is computed for PDSCH transmission and RNTI used to scramble PDSCH equals P-RNTI or RA-RNTI

Then p is obtained from the following table and from the field TB scaling field of DCI\_1\_0

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| TB scaling field | scaling shift s |
| 0 | 0 |
| 01 | 1 |
| 10 | 2 |
| 11 | not applicable |

Else

p=0

Endif

QmxRx1024 is the modulation order multiplied by the coding rate and multiplied by 1024 and obtained from the MCS index as per the table below.

Non Transform precoding Tables:

**[Before CB008949-A]**

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| mcs | PxSCH : LowSE table used |  | PxSCH : 256QAM table used |  | PxSCH :  64QAM table used |  |
| Qm | QmxRx1024 | Qm | QmxRx1024 | Qm | QmxRx1024 |  |
| **0** | 2 | 60 | 2 | 240 | 2 | 240 |
| **1** | 2 | 80 | 2 | 386 | 2 | 314 |
| **2** | 2 | 100 | 2 | 616 | 2 | 386 |
| **3** | 2 | 128 | 2 | 898 | 2 | 502 |
| **4** | 2 | 156 | 2 | 1204 | 2 | 616 |
| **5** | 2 | 198 | 4 | 1512 | 2 | 758 |
| **6** | 2 | 240 | 4 | 1736 | 2 | 898 |
| **7** | 2 | 314 | 4 | 1960 | 2 | 1052 |
| **8** | 2 | 386 | 4 | 2212 | 2 | 1204 |
| **9** | 2 | 502 | 4 | 2464 | 2 | 1358 |
| **10** | 2 | 616 | 4 | 2632 | 4 | 1360 |
| **11** | 2 | 758 | 6 | 2796 | 4 | 1512 |
| **12** | 2 | 898 | 6 | 3102 | 4 | 1736 |
| **13** | 2 | 1052 | 6 | 3402 | 4 | 1960 |
| **14** | 2 | 1204 | 6 | 3696 | 4 | 2212 |
| **15** | 4 | 1360 | 6 | 3996 | 4 | 2464 |
| **16** | 4 | 1512 | 6 | 4314 | 4 | 2632 |
| **17** | 4 | 1736 | 6 | 4632 | 6 | 2628 |
| **18** | 4 | 1960 | 6 | 4932 | 6 | 2796 |
| **19** | 4 | 2212 | 6 | 5238 | 6 | 3102 |
| **20** | 4 | 2464 | 8 | 5460 | 6 | 3402 |
| **21** | 6 | 2628 | 8 | 5688 | 6 | 3696 |
| **22** | 6 | 2796 | 8 | 6032 | 6 | 3996 |
| **23** | 6 | 3102 | 8 | 6376 | 6 | 4314 |
| **24** | 6 | 3402 | 8 | 6728 | 6 | 4632 |
| **25** | 6 | 3696 | 8 | 7080 | 6 | 4932 |
| **26** | 6 | 3996 | 8 | 7332 | 6 | 5238 |
| **27** | 6 | 4314 | 8 | 7584 | 6 | 5460 |
| **28** | 6 | 4632 | - | reserved | 6 | 5688 |

**[CB008949-A]**

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| mcs | PxSCH 1024QAM table used |  | PxSCH : LowSE table used |  | PxSCH : 256QAM table used |  | PxSCH :  64QAM table used |  |
| Qm | QmxRx1024 | Qm | QmxRx1024 | Qm | QmxRx1024 | Qm | QmxRx1024 |  |
| 0 | 2 | 240 | 2 | 60 | 2 | 240 | 2 | 240 |

* for MCS tables for PxSCH, LowSE table used, see 38.214 §5.1.3.1 Table 5.1.3.1-3
* for MCS tables for PxSCH, 256QAM table used, see 38.214 §5.1.3.1 Table 5.1.3.1-2
* for MCS tables for PxSCH, neither LowSE table nor 256QAM table **[CB008949-A] nor 1024QAM table**[End CB008949-A] is used, see 38.214 §5.1.3.1\*\*\*\*

Transform precoding Tables:

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| mcs | Transform precoding PUSCH |  |
| Qm | QmxRx1024 |  |
| **0** | q | 240 |
| **1** | q | 314 |
| **2** | 2 | 386 |
| **3** | 2 | 502 |
| **4** | 2 | 616 |
| **5** | 2 | 758 |
| **6** | 2 | 898 |
| **7** | 2 | 1052 |
| **8** | 2 | 1204 |
| **9** | 2 | 1358 |
| **10** | 4 | 1360 |
| **11** | 4 | 1512 |
| **12** | 4 | 1736 |
| **13** | 4 | 1960 |
| **14** | 4 | 2212 |
| **15** | 4 | 2464 |
| **16** | 4 | 2632 |
| **17** | 6 | 2796 |
| **18** | 6 | 3102 |
| **19** | 6 | 3402 |
| **20** | 6 | 3696 |
| **21** | 6 | 3996 |
| **22** | 6 | 4314 |
| **23** | 6 | 4632 |
| **24** | 6 | 4932 |
| **25** | 6 | 5238 |
| **26** | 6 | 5460 |
| **27** | 6 | 5688 |

Note:

* for MCS tables for transform precoding PUSCH, see 38.214 §6.1.4.1 Table 6.1.4.1-1
* Per 3GPP, q = 1 and 2 are supported for mcs 0 and 1. However, gNB-DU will only support one value at a time, sent by CP-RT to L2-Rt at cell setup/reconfiguration.

(Note that from an implementation perspective, the range of X is such that it can be stored as a signed integer on 32 bits).

If X ≤ 3915776

Use Step 3 (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4643\_replaced([11192465](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvkkjPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for the transport block size index determination

Else

Use Step 4 (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4645\_replaced([11192478](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvkkjvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for the transport block size index determination

##### 3.29.13.1.1.0-4 TBS computation algorithm TBS computation algorithm step 3 (ID: 11192465)

**3.29.13.1.1.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11192473`)

TBS computation algorithm
11192473:
TBS computation algorithm
When X ≤ 3915776, compute the ninfo\_index according to the intermediate variable Y, n and Z defined by the decision flow below. Then retrieve the TBS index from the ninfo\_index index using the look up table lut\_tbs\_index stored at:
 
[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a flowchart with blue lines and arrows on a black background. The flowchart depicts a process with multiple branches.
At the top, there is a single downward arrow, indicating the start of the process.
From this initial point, the flow splits into two main paths.
The left path has a horizontal line extending to the right, and then a downward arrow. Below this, there is another horizontal line extending to the right, followed by a downward arrow.
The right path has a longer vertical line extending downwards. From this vertical line, there are two horizontal lines extending to the right, each followed by a downward arrow.
Further to the right, there are two more separate vertical lines, each with a downward arrow at the end. These appear to be independent branches or endpoints of the process.
There is no discernible text in the image.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14667.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]
 
File: TBS\_index\_decision\_flow.pptx
Folder:

---

##### 3.29.13.1.1.0-5 TBS computation algorithm TBS computation algorithm step 4 (ID: 11192478)

**3.29.13.1.1.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11192491`)

TBS computation algorithm
11192491:
TBS computation algorithm
When X > 3915776, compute the TBS index according to the intermediate variable Y, n, and Z defined by the decision flows be
 
[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a flowchart illustrating a decision-making process based on the value of a variable 'Y'. The flowchart begins with an initial assignment: `Y = max(X-24576, 3932160)`.
From this initial step, the flowchart branches based on a series of conditional checks (diamond shapes) involving bitwise AND operations on 'Y' with hexadecimal values. Each conditional check has two possible outcomes: "THEN" (true) and "ELSE" (false), leading to further branches or final outputs.
The final outputs are represented by 'n=' followed by a number from 0 to 9, indicating different results of the decision process.
Here's a breakdown of the flowchart's structure:
1. **Initial Step:**
\* `Y = max(X-24576, 3932160)`
2. **First Decision:**
\* `IF Y & 0x70000000`
\* **THEN:** Leads to a new set of decisions on the right side of the flowchart.
\* **ELSE:** Leads to a new set of decisions on the left side of the flowchart.
3. **Left Branch Decisions:**
\* **From ELSE of the first decision:**
\* `IF Y & 0x3800000`
\* **THEN:** Leads to further decisions.
\* **ELSE:** Leads to `n=0`.
\* **From THEN of `Y & 0x3800000`:**
\* `IF Y & 0x400000`
\* **THEN:** Leads to `n=1`.
\* **ELSE:** Leads to `n=2`.
\* **From ELSE of `Y & 0x3800000`:**
\* `IF Y & 0x2000000`
\* **THEN:** Leads to `n=3`.
\* **ELSE:** Leads to `n=4`.
4. **Right Branch Decisions:**
\* **From THEN of the first decision:**
\* `IF Y & 0x70000000` (This appears to be a duplicate condition, but it's presented as a separate diamond in the diagram)
\* **THEN:** Leads to further decisions.
\* **ELSE:** Leads to `n=5`.
\* **From THEN of `Y & 0x70000000` (right branch):**
\* `IF Y & 0x40000000`
\* **THEN:** Leads to `n=9`.
\* **ELSE:** Leads to further decisions.
\* **From ELSE of `Y & 0x40000000`:**
\* `IF Y & 0x8000000`
\* **THEN:** Leads to `n=6`.
\* **ELSE:** Leads to `n=7`.
\* **From ELSE of `Y & 0x70000000` (right branch):**
\* `IF Y & 0x20000000`
\* **THEN:** Leads to `n=8`.
\* **ELSE:** (No explicit output shown for this path, but it would logically lead to one of the existing 'n' values or a new one if the diagram is incomplete).
The flowchart visually represents a complex set of bitwise operations and comparisons to determine a final numerical output 'n'.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14669.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]o .
 
 
 
[image-1][image\_desc]The image is a flowchart with a black background and blue lines and arrows. At the top, there is a single downward-pointing arrow. Below this, the line splits into two horizontal lines, one going to the left and one going to the right. From the end of the left horizontal line, a vertical line with a downward-pointing arrow extends downwards. Similarly, from the end of the right horizontal line, a vertical line with a downward-pointing arrow extends downwards. There is no text or discernible content within the flowchart elements.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14669.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]
 
Note: if tp-pi2BPSK is configured, q = 1 otherwise q=2.
 
 
File: TBS\_index\_decision\_flow.pptx

##### 3.29.13.1.1.1 informative TBS LUTs

###### 3.29.13.1.1.1.0-1 informative TBS LUTs common LUTs (ID: 11192501)

**3.29.13.1.1.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11192505`)

informative TBS LUTs
Informative tables which are stored at the following link the association between the number of data symbols, number of scheduled RBs, MCS, number of layers, maximum modulation order and the TBS index. Each table provides different combinations:

* lut\_tbs.xls which provide according to tbs\_index value the TBS parameters: TBS, BG, C, K F, Z, set\_index, column\_index
* lut\_all\_mcs\_rb\_tbs\_index.xls with all possible MCS and all the number of RBs (from 1 to 273 RBs).
* lut\_mcs0\_rb\_tbs\_index.xls with all possible RBs from 1 to 273 and MCS set to 0

The informative LUTs can be foundunder this link:

<https://nokia.sharepoint.com/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Forms/Tree_View.aspx?id=%2Fsites%2F5Gdoc%2FAS%5FTech%5FSpec%2F5G%20Architecture%20documents%2F5G%20NR%20TBS%20Tables>

[CB009007-A]

Note: the table Iut\_all\_mcs\_rb\_tbs\_index.xls updated (the minimum of data symbols = 2).

[End CB009007-A]

---

###### 3.29.13.1.1.1.0-2 informative TBS LUTs LUTs for CDM group without data 1 with DMRS configuration type 1 (ID: 11192510)

**3.29.13.1.1.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11192516`)

informative TBS LUTs
New TBS tables added (stored in “CDM group without data 1” directory) which provides the tbs\_index in case the number of CDM groups without data is 1 (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3054\_replaced([11129150](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq6uCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) according to the number of data symbols, number of scheduled RBs, the number of layers, mcs:

- table lut\_all\_cdm1\_dmrs1\_tbs\_index.xls (and table lut\_all\_cdm1\_dmrs1\_256qam\_tbs\_index.xls if 256QAM set to true) for the number of DMRS symbols = 1

- table lut\_all\_cdm1\_dmrs2\_tbs\_index.xls (and table lut\_all\_cdm1\_dmrs2\_256qam\_tbs\_index.xls if 256QAM set to true) for the number of DMRS symbols = 2

- table lut\_all\_cdm1\_dmrs3\_tbs\_index.xls (and table lut\_all\_cdm1\_dmrs3\_256qam\_tbs\_index.xls if 256QAM set to true) for the number of DMRS symbols = 3

Note:

- Nxoh = 0

* This feature is supported based on 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4647\_replaced([11192496](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvlLkPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and the lut\_tbs table is based on 568 entries

[CB009007-A]

Note: the tables lut\_all\_cdm1\_dmrs1\_tbs\_index.xls, table lut\_all\_cdm1\_dmrs1\_256qam\_tbs\_index.xls, lut\_all\_cdm1\_dmrs2\_tbs\_index.xls and table lut\_all\_cdm1\_dmrs2\_256qam\_tbs\_index.xls, updated (the minimum number of data symbols = 2 for 1 DMRS and 4 for 2 DMRS).

[End CB009007-A]

---

###### 3.29.13.1.1.1.0-3 informative TBS LUTs LUTs for xOverhead (ID: 11192521)

**3.29.13.1.1.1.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `12585179`)

informative TBS LUTs
New TBS tables added added which provides the tbs\_ according to the number of data symbols, number of scheduled RBs, the number of layers, mcs:

- table lut\_allmcsrb\_xover\_tbs\_index.xls (resp. lut\_allmcsrb\_xover256qam\_tbs\_index.xls if 256QAM set to true) with the xOverhead values 6,12 and 18.

Other TBS tables added (stored in “CDM group without data 1” directory) which provides the tbs\_index in case the number of CDM groups without data is 1 (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3054\_replaced([11129150](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq6uCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) according to the number of data symbols, number of scheduled RBs, the number of layers, mcs with the xOverhead values 6,12 and 18::

- table lut\_all\_xover\_cdm1\_dmrs1\_tbs\_index.xls (and table lut\_all\_xover\_cdm1\_dmrs1\_256qam\_tbs\_index.xls if 256QAM set to true) for the number of DMRS symbols = 1

- table lut\_all\_xover\_cdm1\_dmrs2\_tbs\_index.xls (and table lu\_all\_xover\_cdm1\_dmrs2\_256qam\_tbs\_index.xls if 256QAM set to true) for the number of DMRS symbols = 2

Note:

- This feature is supported based on 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4647\_replaced([11192496](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvlLkPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and the lut\_tbs table is based on 568 entries

The xOverHead parameter (>0) is used for LTE CRS rate matching for PDSCH for FDD DSS ( MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/lteNrDssMode > 1 ) and set to:

* 18 for 4 LTE CRS ports (*lteCrsPorts*= 4 , see 5G\_ARC\_ALG\_7622)\*\*
* 12 for 2 LTE CRS ports (*lteCrsPorts*= 2 , see 5G\_ARC\_ALG\_7622)\*\*
* 6 for 1 LTE CRS port (*lteCrsPorts*= 1 , see 5G\_ARC\_ALG\_7622)\*\*

[CB007372-AA]  
 if NRCELL.actAsymmetricDss is set to "true', xOverHead shall not be used, it shall be not present or the value shall be set to 0.

[End CB007372-AA]

---

###### 3.29.13.1.1.1.0-4 informative TBS LUTs LUTs for Transform Precoding (ID: 11192531)

**3.29.13.1.1.1.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11192536`)

informative TBS LUTs
New TBS tables added (stored in “PUSCH transform precoding” directory) which provides the tbs\_index in case PUSCH transform precoding is activated (refer to 5G\_L2\_652\_replaced([11164145](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25rIBPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) according to the number of data symbols, q value for MCS 0 and 1, number of scheduled RBs, and mcs:

- table lut\_all\_mcs\_tp\_tbs\_index.xls for all mcs and none and any number of additional DMRS (CDM group w/o data = 2)

Note:

- Nxoh = 0, number of layers = 1, no 256QAM

* This feature is supported based on 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4647\_replaced([11192496](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvlLkPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and the lut\_tbs table is based on 568 entries

###### 3.29.13.1.1.1.0-6 informative TBS LUTs LUTs for DMRS type 2 (ID: 11192551)

**3.29.13.1.1.1.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11192556`)

informative TBS LUTs
New TBS tables added (stored in “dmrs\_type2” directory) which provides the tbs\_index  when:

1) the number of CDM groups without data is 1 (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3054\_replaced([11129150](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq6uCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) according to the number of data symbols, number of scheduled RBs, the number of layers, mcs:

- table lut\_typ2\_cdm1\_dmrs1\_tbs\_index.xls (and table lut\_typ2\_cdm1\_dmrs1\_256qam\_tbs\_index.xls if 256QAM set to true) for the number of DMRS symbols = 1

- table lut\_typ2\_cdm1\_dmrs2\_tbs\_index.xls (and table lut\_typ2\_cdm1\_dmrs2\_256qam\_tbs\_index.xls if 256QAM set to true) for the number of DMRS symbols = 2

- table lut\_typ2\_cdm1\_dmrs3\_tbs\_index.xls (and table lut\_typ2\_cdm1\_dmrs3\_256qam\_tbs\_index.xls if 256QAM set to true) for the number of DMRS symbols = 3

2) the number of CDM groups without data is 2 (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3054\_replaced([11129150](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq6uCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) according to the number of data symbols, number of scheduled RBs, the number of layers, mcs:

- table lut\_typ2\_cdm2\_dmrs1\_tbs\_index.xls (and table lut\_typ2\_cdm2\_dmrs1\_256qam\_tbs\_index.xls if 256QAM set to true) for the number of DMRS symbols = 1

- table lut\_typ2\_cdm2\_dmrs2\_tbs\_index.xls (and table lut\_typ2\_cdm2\_dmrs2\_256qam\_tbs\_index.xls if 256QAM set to true) for the number of DMRS symbols = 2

- table lut\_typ2\_cdm2\_dmrs3\_tbs\_index.xls (and table lut\_typ2\_cdm2\_dmrs3\_256qam\_tbs\_index.xls if 256QAM set to true) for the number of DMRS symbols = 3

Notes:

Nxoh = 0 (no FDD DSS), no transform precoding, no 64qamlowSE

When the number of CDM groups without data is set to 3, there is no PDSCH FDMed in DMRS symbols and then the common LUTs have to be applied.

###### 3.29.13.1.1.1.0-7 informative TBS LUTs LUTs for 1024QAM (ID: 12721631)

**3.29.13.1.1.1.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `12721663`)

informative TBS LUTs
New TBS tables added (stored in “1024qam” directory) which provides the tbs\_index in case:

1) the number of CDM groups without data is 2   according to the number of data symbols, number of scheduled RBs, MCS, number of layers, maximum modulation order and the TBS index.

* lut\_1024qam\_all\_mcs\_tbsind.xls.
* lut\_1024qam\_mcs0\_rb\_tbsind.xls with all possible RBs from 1 to 273 and MCS set to 0 and with the scaling field

2) (in “1024qam/CDM group without data for dmrs type 1” directory) the number of CDM groups without data is 1 according to the number of data symbols, number of scheduled RBs, the number of layers, mcs:

- table lut\_1024qam\_cdm1\_dmrs1\_tbsind.xls for the number of DMRS symbols = 1

- table lut\_1024qam\_cdm1\_dmrs2\_tbsind.xls for the number of DMRS symbols = 2

- table lut\_1024qam\_cdm1\_dmrs3\_tbsind.xls  for the number of DMRS symbols = 3

[CB008949-C] For DMRS type 2 IWK with 1024QAM:

3) (in “1024qam/dmrs type 2” directory) the number of CDM groups without data is 1 according to the number of data symbols, number of scheduled RBs, the number of layers, mcs:

* table lut\_1024qamtyp2\_cdm1\_dmrs1\_tbsind.xls for the number of DMRS symbols = 1
* table lut\_1024qamtyp2\_cdm1\_dmrs2\_tbsind.xls for the number of DMRS symbols = 2
* table lut\_1024qamtyp2\_cdm1\_dmrs3\_tbsind.xls for the number of DMRS symbols = 3

4) (in “1024qam/dmrs type 2” directory) the number of CDM groups without data is 2 according to the number of data symbols, number of scheduled RBs, the number of layers, mcs:

* table lut\_1024qam\_cdm2\_dmrs1\_tbsind.xls for the number of DMRS symbols = 1
* table lut\_1024qam\_cdm2\_dmrs2\_tbsind.xls for the number of DMRS symbols = 2
* table lut\_1024qam\_cdm2\_dmrs3\_tbsind.xls for the number of DMRS symbols = 3

Note:

When the number of CDM groups without data is set to 3, there is no PDSCH FDMed in DMRS symbols and then the LUT described in 1) paragraph for CDM groups without data is 2 have to be applied. [End CB008949-C]

Note: Nxoh = 0 (no FDD DSS), no transform precoding, no 64qamlowSE

#### 3.29.13.1.2 TBS LBRM

#### 3.29.13.1.2-1 TBS LBRM

**3.29.13.1.2-1.0-2**  (ID: `12722372`)

TBS LBRM
In the link provided in the requirement 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4635\_replaced([11192394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvkkgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), according to the value of tbs\_index, select the right line and save the following fields of the lut\_table: BG, TBS, C, K, F, Z, set\_index & column\_index.

[Before **CB008949-A]**

Note: EFS and SW alignment

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Lut\_tbs | l1-l2 itf name DlData\_PdschSendReq/ UlData\_PuschReceiveReq | Description | range |
| BG | baseGraph | LDPC Base Graph number (1 or 2) | u8 {1, 2} |
| TBS | tbSize\_bits | Transport Block Size | u32[0.. 409616] |
| TBS\_offset | tbStartOffset\_bits | The relative start offset of the TB | u32[0..409616] |
| C | numOfCodeBlocks | Number of code blocks C (see 38.212 §5.2.2) | u8 [1..152] |
| K | codeBlockSize | Code block size K (see 38.212 §5.2.2). | u16 [24..8448] |
| F | numOfFillerBits | Number of filler bits F (see 38.212 §5.2.2) | u16 [0..8447] |
| Z | liftSize | LDPC lifting size Z (see 38.212 §5.2.2 & 5.3.2 table 5.3.2-1) | u16 [0..384] |
| set\_index | liftSizeSetIndex | Lift size set index iLS (see 38.212 §5.3.2 table 5.3.2-1) | u8 [0..7] |
| column\_index | liftSizeColumnIndex | Column index of the table 5.3.2-1: Sets of LDPC lifting size Z (38.212 §5.3.2) | u8 [0..7] |

[**CB008949-A]**

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Lut\_tbs | Description |
| BG | LDPC Base Graph number (1 or 2) |
| TBS | Transport Block Size |
| TBS\_offset | The relative start offset of the TB |
| C | Number of code blocks C (see 38.212 §5.2.2) |
| K | Code block size K (see 38.212 §5.2.2). |
| F | Number of filler bits F (see 38.212 §5.2.2) |
| Z | LDPC lifting size Z (see 38.212 §5.2.2 & 5.3.2 table 5.3.2-1) |
| set\_index | Lift size set index iLS (see 38.212 §5.3.2 table 5.3.2-1) |
| column\_index | Column index of the table 5.3.2-1: Sets of LDPC lifting size Z (38.212 §5.3.2) |

[End **CB008949-A]**

Two new fields Ncb & k0divZ are added [Before **CB008949-A] in DlData\_PdschSendReq message [End**CB008949-A] (calculated in [11192587](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvlyo_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).\*\*\*\*

[Before **CB008949-A]**

Note: EFS and SW alignment

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Ncb | ncb | Ncb parameter 38.212 §5.4.2.1 | u16 [0..25344] |
| k0\_divZ | k0divZ | K0 / Zc for rvid = 1, 2 or 3 table 5.4.2.1-2 38.212 §5.4.2.1. For rvid = 0, k0\_divZ = 0. | u8 [0..56] |

[**CB008949-A]**

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Ncb | Ncb parameter 38.212 §5.4.2.1 |
| k0\_divZ | K0 / Zc for rvid = 1, 2 or 3 table 5.4.2.1-2 38.212 §5.4.2.1. For rvid = 0, k0\_divZ = 0. |

[End **CB008949-A]**

If reserved MCS(refer to [11515718](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_tUO_Wvv1Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is used for a re-transmission, Qm is computed from MCS value of the re-transmission, BG, TBS, TBS\_offset, C, K, F, Z, set\_index, column\_index, Ncb are directly obtained from initial transmission of the same transport block, k0\_divZ is computed with rvIndex from the re-transmission.
