##### 3.29.13.1.2.0-2 TBS LBRM PDSCH TBS evaluation (ID: 11192587)

**3.29.13.1.2.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `12722241`)

TBS LBRM
For each PDSCH TBS, the following inputs are needed and are already computed (see references):

* Number of code blocks C (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4635\_replaced([11192394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvkkgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) & 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6874\_replaced([11192598](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvlypfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* LDPC lifting size Z (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4635\_replaced([11192394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvkkgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) & 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6874\_replaced([11192598](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvlypfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* LDPC Base Graph number BG (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4635\_replaced([11192394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvkkgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) & 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6874\_replaced([11192598](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvlypfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* tbs\_lbrm (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4663\_replaced([11192576](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvlyovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) & 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6874\_replaced([11192598](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvlypfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* redundancy version RV (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6874\_replaced([11192598](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvlypfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) & 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13534\_replaced([11184166](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvQbfvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

computation of Ncb variable:

Ncb = min(N,Nref)

with

* Nref = (3\*tbs\_lbrm \* inv\_C) >> (1+32)
* if BG = 1, N = 66*Z otherwise (BG = 2), N = 50*Z

where [Before **CB008949-A] 2 options for inv\_C:**

a) [**CB008949-A] gNB-DU shall [End**CB008949-A] compute**inv\_C through this formula: inv\_C = CEIL (2^32 / C)**\*\*\*\*

[Before **CB008949-A] b) read inv\_C from a LUT either with 152 entries and direct array mapping (lut\_invC\_direct.xls) or with 102 entries and without direct array mapping (lut\_invC\_notdirect.xls) [End**CB008949-A]\*\*\*\*

computation of k0\_divZ variable:

k0\_divZ = (inv\_N \* coeff(RV,BG) \* Ncb )>>32

with:

* N & Ncb are already computed (see above in Ncb computation)
* coeff(RV = 1,BG = 1) = 17 , coeff(RV = 2,BG = 1) = 33 , coeff(RV = 3,BG = 1) = 56
* coeff(RV = 1,BG = 2) = 13 , coeff(RV = 2,BG = 2) = 25 , coeff(RV = 3,BG = 2) = 43

where [Before **CB008949-A] 2 options for inv\_N:**

a)[**CB008949-A] gNB-DU shall [End**CB008949-A] compute inv\_N through this formula: inv\_N = CEIL (2^32 / N)\*\*\*\*

[Before **CB008949-A] b) read inv\_N from a LUT with 54 entries and without direct array mapping (lut\_invN\_notdirect.xls) [End**CB008949-A]\*\*\*\*

Note: k0\_divZ = 0 if RV = 0

**NOTE: For retransmissions, 5G-L2-PS does not need to re-compute all the variables, except for the value of k0\_divZ which shall be re-calculated as above with the RV value of the retransmission.**

[Before **CB008949-A]**

Note: alignment with SW implementation

In the following link, are provided the LUT tables lut\_invC\_direct.xls,  lut\_invC\_nodirect.xls & lut\_invN\_nodirect.xls:

<https://nokia.sharepoint.com/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Forms/Tree_View.aspx?RootFolder=%2Fsites%2F5Gdoc%2FAS%5FTech%5FSpec%2F5G%20Architecture%20documents%2F5G%20NR%20TBS%20Tables%2Flut%5Ftables%5Fncb%5Fk0divZ&FolderCTID=0x012000F0A0A3BA325F7648AD307E6959BA7376>

**[End**CB008949-A]\*\*\*\*

---

## 3.29.14 Configuration of 5G-L2-LO and 5G-L1-DL for Transport Block Transmission

### 3.29.14.1 Downlink PTRS Configuration to L1

#### 3.29.14.1.0-1 Downlink PTRS Configuration to L1 Downlink PTRS behavior (ID: 11192619)

**3.29.14.1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11192630`)

Downlink PTRS Configuration to L1
Downlink PTRS behavior is specified by 5.1.6.3 “PTR-RS reception procedure” section of 38.214, L1 DL shall be configured accordingly.

5G-L2-PS received the Downlink PTRS configuration with pdschConfig containing:

- PTRS is configured or not configured according to enableDlPtrs (NRBTS.NRCELL.dlPtrs.actDlPtrs)

- TimeDensity list provides a list of MCS threshold determining used to evaluate according to the schedule MCS  : whether PTRS is present or absent  and if applicable the dlPtrsTimeDensity value. When the TimeDensity list received is empty, 5G-L2-PS shall consider the downlink PTRS time density list is absent

- FrequencyDensity list provides a list of PRB threshold determining  used to evaluate according to the schedule number of PRBs  : whether PTRS is present or absent  and if applicable the dlPtrsFrequencyDensity value. When the FrequencyDensity list received is empty, 5G-L2-PS shall consider the downlink PTRS time density list is absent

PTRS shall be considered as  not configured when PDSCH is encoded with RA-RNTI (msg2).

[CB009784-A] PTRS is disabled for FR1 TDD and FDD [End CB009784-A]

When 5G-L2-PS has determined the downlink PTRS is present on current PDSCH transmission, it shall set the dlPtrsNumOfPorts to 1 and the dlPtrsResElemOffset to 0.

Note: frequency density (KPTRS) and Time density (LPTRS) is defined by 3GPP 38.214 section 5.1.6.3 and 38.211 section 7.4.1.2 .

---

#### 3.29.14.1.0-2 Downlink PTRS Configuration to L1 Default downlink PTRS configuration (ID: 11192635)

**3.29.14.1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11192645`)

Downlink PTRS Configuration to L1
[CB009784-A] PTRS is not present for FR1 TDD and FDD [End CB009784-A]

When both downlink PTRS time density list and downlink PTRS frequency density list are absent but enableDlPtrs is set to configured (NRBTS.NRCELL.dlPtrs.actDlPtrs==1), 5G-L2-PS shall evaluate following conditions :

- MCS scheduled according to the 64 QAM table, ie MCS was selected from Table 5.1.3.1-1 of 38.214, and MCS is smaller than 10

- MCS scheduled according to the 256 QAM table, ie MCS was selected from Table 5.1.3.1-2 of 38.214; and MCS is smaller than 5.

- Number of scheduled RBs is smaller than 3.

If at least one of the above condition is checked, 5G-L2-PS shall consider the downlink PTRS is not present and set accordingly the dlPtrsFlag into the DlData\_PdschSendReq message.

If none of those conditions are checked; 5G-L2-PS shall consider the downlink PTRS is present and set dlPtrsFlag to present;  dlPtrsTimeDensity =1; dlPtrsFrequencyDensity=2 into the DlData\_PdschSendReq message

If reserved MCS(refer to 5G\_UP\_IF\_1897\_replaced([11515718](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_tUO_Wvv1Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is used for a retransmission, the MCS value shall be obtained from initial transmission to determine the PTRS presence.

---

#### 3.29.14.1.0-3 Downlink PTRS Configuration to L1 DL PTRS configuration when downlink PTRS time density and/or downlink PTRS frequency density is present (ID: 11192649)

**3.29.14.1.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11192660`)

Downlink PTRS Configuration to L1
[CB009784-A] PTRS is not present for FR1 TDD and FDD , otherwise for FR2 TDD, see this requirement below: [End CB009784-A]

When both or at least one of downlink PTRS time density and downlink PTRS frequency density is present and enableDlPtrs is set to configured (NRBTS.NRCELL.dlPtrs.actDlPtrs==1), shall configure the DlData\_PdschSendReq message as followed :

5G-L2-PS shall compute the maximum MCS applicable to Time Density , maxMcsTimeDensity , according to the MCS table used to schedule the PDSCH  :

* maxMcsTimeDensity is equal to MCS 28 if MCS was scheduled according to the 256 QAM table, ie MCS was selected from Table 5.1.3.1-1 of 38.214,
* maxMcsTimeDensity is equal to MCS 29 if MCS was scheduled according to the 64 QAM table, ie MCS was selected from Table 5.1.3.1-2 of 38.214 and the MCS is smaller than 5.

If downlink PTRS time density is present, the downlink PTRS configuration is related to schedule MCS and to the Time Density Table , with TimeDensity[i] corresponding to entry of index i in the  downlink PTRS time density list :

If MCS is < TimeDensity[0]

PTRS is not present

If TimeDensity[0] is not equal to TimeDensity[1]  and TimeDensity[0] <=MCS< TimeDensity[1]

dlPtrsTimeDensity =4

If TimeDensity[1] is not equal to TimeDensity[2]  and TimeDensity[1] <=MCS< TimeDensity[2]                                                                                                  dlPtrsTimeDensity =2

If TimeDensity[2] is not equal maxMcsTimeDensity and TimeDensity[2] <=MCS < maxMcsTimeDensity

dlPtrsTimeDensity =1

If downlink PTRS time density is absent, dlPtrsTimeDensity =1.

If downlink PTRS frequency density is present, the downlink PTRS configuration is related to the number of scheduled PRB (numOfScheduledPrb) and to the Frequency Density Table , with FrequencyDensity[i] corresponding to entry of index i in the downlink PTRS frequency density list :

If numOfScheduledPrb is < FrequencyDensity[0]  :

PTRS is not present

If  FrequencyDensity[0]  is not equal  FrequencyDensity[1] and  FrequencyDensity[0] <= numOfScheduledPrb <FrequencyDensity[1]:

dlPtrsFrequencyDensity =2

If  FrequencyDensity[1] <= numOfScheduledPrb :

dlPtrsFrequencyDensity =4

If downlink PTRS frequency density is absent, dlPtrsFrequencyDensity =2.

If PTRS is considered as not present either due to TimeDensity check or Frequency density check [CB009784-A] or if FR1 TDD or FDD [End CB009784-A], 5G-L2-PS shall considered the downlink PTRS is not present for PDSCH trasnmission and set accordingly the IE dlPtrsFlag into the DlData\_PdschSendReq message.

in other case 5G-L2-PS shall configure DlData\_PdschSendReq message with the computed dlPtrsFrequencyDensity  & dlPtrsTimeDensity and set the  IE dlPtrsFlag to present.

If reserved MCS(refer to 5G\_UP\_IF\_1897\_replaced([11515718](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_tUO_Wvv1Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is used for a retransmission, the MCS value shall be obtained from initial transmission to determine PTRS presence and time density [CB009784-A] if FR2 TDD. For FR1 TDD or FDD, PTRS is not present for retransmission too [End CB009784-A].

---

#### 3.29.14.1.0-4 Downlink PTRS Configuration to L1 PTRS for artificial PDSCH load (ID: 11192667)

**3.29.14.1.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `11192676`)

Downlink PTRS Configuration to L1
For artificial PDSCH load, the following parameters are used:

[CB009784-A] For FR1 TDD and FDD,

* PTRS shall be turned off.

Otherwise (for FR2 TDD): [End CB009784-A]

* PTRS shall be turned on. PTRS parameters shall be set as given below:
* dlPtrsTimeDensity shall be set to 1
* dlPtrsFrequencyDensity shall be set to 4
* dlPtrsNumOfPorts shall be set to 1
* dlPtrsResElemOffset shall be set to 0

---

## 3.29.15 Measurements for L2-HI - L2-LO flow control

### 3.29.15.1 Calculation of estimated throughput measurement for the flow control - non GBR

#### 3.29.15.1.1 Methods of estimating average throughput

##### 3.29.15.1.1.0-1 Methods of estimating average throughput Estimated throghput averaged over slots with PDSCH buffer drained and other slots (ID: 11192696)

**3.29.15.1.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11192702`)

Methods of estimating average throughput
In order to provide support to the Little Law based data split and flow control algorithm in upper layers, MAC-PS  provides to the lower RLC layer the estimated average throughput eThav per DRB, including

* Instant estimated throughput eTh per DRB, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11651\_replaced([11192714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvmZvPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* Averaging of the estimated throughput per DRB, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11652\_replaced([11192763](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvnAxfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* Handling of bursty traffic, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11653\_replaced([11192788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvnAyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* Selection of the method of estimating average throughput, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11700\_replaced([11192802](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvnAy_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

#### 3.29.15.1.2 Estimation of throughput per DRB

##### 3.29.15.1.2.0-1 Estimation of throughput per DRB Sampling estimated throughput eThav per DRB in slots with and without PDSCH transmission (ID: 11192714)

**3.29.15.1.2.0-1.0-9**  (ID: `12636119`)

Estimation of throughput per DRB
12636119:
Estimation of throughput per DRB
**Estimated average throughput *eTh**av** calculation per non-GBR DRB,****considering PRB used by GBR and DC-GBR****\****\*\*\*

The instant estimated Throughput *eTh(t) shall be calculated per slot and per DRB*

1.    Past Throughput Based: based on the number of bytes sent in the subframes (not including retransmission) when 5G-L2-LO buffer cannot be completely drained. This includes the subframes when no data has been sent, but 5G-L2-LO buffer is not empty. In those slots

*eTh(t)= eTh\_past (t) = sumOfTbsOfThisDrbTransmittedOnAllCcs / SlotDuration  (5G\_UP\_ALG\_11651\_replaced([11192714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvmZvPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))-1)*

The *sumOfTbsOfThisDrbTransmittedOnAllCcs shall not contain retransmitted packets.*

2.    Measurement Throughput Based: as estimatedFullBufferTbs/SlotDuration, with estimatedFullBufferTbs  based on unlimited data availability in 5G-L2-LO buffer when the buffer could be completely drained, but a transmission took place or when there was no transmission at all for this bearer due to empty buffer. In those slots

**If (NRCELL.actEnhancedFlowControlETh = TRUE) and (if *numUe(i) > rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl)***

*eTh(t)= eTh\_meas (t) = rdEthCompensation \* estimatedFullBufferTbs / SlotDuration  (5G\_UP\_ALG\_11651\_replaced([11192714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvmZvPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))-3)*

else

if NRBTS.actSliceAwareScheduler is enabled & NRCELL.nrResourceGroupProfileDN is SET [(11278956](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpS0jvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/bi_tps0jvvcee-aqvopbp1qhq?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9")) & NIDD NRBTS.actInternalImprovements1.bit4 is set to '1' ('ENABLED') then:

estFullBufferTbsPerCarrier (i, j) = min(weightOfBearer(j) / sumOfWeightsOverAllEligibleBearersOnCarrier(i), min(numPRBActiveBWP, maxQuota(j)/100%\*maxPRBOnCarrier )/ maxPRBOnCarrier) \* maxTbsOnCarrier(i,j)               (5G\_UP\_ALG\_11651\_replaced([11192714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvmZvPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/web#action=com.ibm.rdm.web.pages.showartifactpage&artifacturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresources%2fmd_tauaapvfee-aqvopbp1qhq&artifactinmodule=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresourc"))-5a)

Else

estFullBufferTbsPerCarrier (i, j) = min(weightOfBearer(j) / sumOfWeightsOverAllEligibleBearersOnCarrier(i), numPRBActiveBWP / maxPRBOnCarrier) \* maxTbsOnCarrier(i,j)               (5G\_UP\_ALG\_11651\_replaced([11192714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvmZvPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/web#action=com.ibm.rdm.web.pages.showartifactpage&artifacturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresources%2fmd_tauaapvfee-aqvopbp1qhq&artifactinmodule=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresourc"))-5b)

End if

End if

where

*estimatedFullBufferTbs* (j) = sum over all carriers *i that are used by the L2-LO entity of the considered bearer* j of {*estFullBufferTbsPerCarrier (i, j)}*,**\***\*

*numUe(i) is the number of all UEs in the pre-Scheduler candidate list on carrier i, cf. 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4215\_replaced([11123496](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqjhqfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).*rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10610\_replaced([11179079](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku3Z6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))\*\*

*rdEthCompensation is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_27070\_replaced([11193968](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvxY1_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).*

**Rationale for adding *rdEthCompensation: With actEnhancedFlowControlETh = TRUE, the denominator of the equation (5G\_UP\_ALG\_11651\_replaced([11192714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvmZvPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))-3)  is reduced wrt. legacy.***

However, in cases when Overload Control restricts the number of UEs to be scheduled, it is beneficial to have a relatively high buffer level for the few UEs that are still scheduled.

If (sliceAwareSchedulerCellActivation = True) and (*j belongs to a default resource group (RG) or a configured RG of 0 RG weight for carrier* i)\*\*

*estFullBufferTbsPerCarrier (i, j) = 0*

Else

*estFullBufferTbsPerCarrier (i, j) = min(weightOfBearer(j) / sumOfWeightsOverAllEligibleBearersOnCarrier(i), numPRBActiveBWP / maxPRBOnCarrier) \* maxTbsOnCarrier(i,j)* *(5G\_UP\_ALG\_11651\_replaced([11192714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvmZvPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))-5)*\*\*

End

*i =index of carrier*

maxTbsOnCarrier(i) = TBS (max (0, maxPRBOnCarrier – avgGbrNPrb - avgDcGbrNPrb), proposed MCS, Rank),

where,

* maxPRBOnCarrier is the maximum number PRBs available for PDSCH in the cell;
* numPRBActiveBWP is the PRB number in active BWP for the UE;
* avgGbrNPrb is GBR DL PRB load indication (refer 5G\_ALG\_8940)
* avgDcGbrNPrb is DC-GBR DL PRB load indication (refer 5G\_ALG\_30853)

TBS computation is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4635\_replaced([11192394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvkkgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) using nb\_symb=13, nb\_dmrs\_symb=1, nb\_cdm\_no\_data=2.

*weightOfBearer(j)*is the scheduling weight of the bearer\*\*

Note: in the above formulas maxTbsOnCarrier(i), the variable MC has been replaced by proposed MCS, as clarified with implementation (Vincent Rabache, on Dec 4, 2025).

If NRCELL.actEnhancedFlowControlETh = TRUE

sumOfWeightsOverAllEligibleBearersOnCarrier(i) is the sum of scheduling weights of UEs with a non-empty buffer and configured in the same subcell as the current UE, upto the maximum number of UEs allowed in the CS1 list for a cell (irrespective of the actual number of UEs in the current CS1 list).

NOTE 1: Refer 5G\_L2\_3697\_replaced([11182022](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27YYNvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to determine the maximum number of UEs allowed in the CS1 list.

NOTE 2: The UEs to be selected shall follow a priority.

* Always consider all UEs in the CS1 List of the current slot that have DRB priority .
* This shall be followed by selecting UEs that have a non-empty buffer but were not selected in the CS1 List of the current slot.
* The last priority shall be of UEs which do not have any buffer. The number of null/empty buffer UEs that can be selected shall be limited, cf. 5G\_L2\_16438\_replaced([11182693](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27d3w_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

In case, the current UE for which the eTh is being calculated is also an empty buffer UE, and UEs selected for the sum has to consider also null buffer UEs, then the bearers of the current UE shall always be selected, followed by other null buffer UEs. This UE is not subject to the limitation provided by 5G\_L2\_16438\_replaced([11182693](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27d3w_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), i.e., its weight must be included into the denominator of  (5G\_UP\_ALG\_11651\_replaced([11192714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvmZvPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))-5).

Else

If Carrier Aggregation using the distributed PUCCH allocation algorithm (DPA) (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2884\_replaced([11123433](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqi6nfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

*sumOfWeightsOverAllEligibleBearersOnCarrier(i) is the sum of scheduling weights of bearers with non-empty buffer in the TD scheduler input scheduling set,*

but modified by adding the bearers of the UEs with non-empty buffer but not having a PUCCH resource allocated by DPA.

It is calculated over all bearers **configured in the same subcells as the UE.**

Else

*sumOfWeightsOverAllEligibleBearersOnCarrier(i) is the sum of scheduling weights of eligible UEs in Set 1 and configured in the same subcells as the UE.*

End If

In case the number of UEs in CS1 is equal to 0 (this can happen according 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15751\_replaced([11192830](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvnn0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) , it shall be assumed that the UE for that eTh(t) is being calculated is the only UE in the cell.

End If

If sliceAwareSchedulerCellActivation = True, the product of scheduling weight and normalized RG target share (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22671\_replaced([11189335](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfsAfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is used instead of scheduling weight.

On an FDD carrier shared with LTE [CB007372-AA] and if NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=false [End CB007372-AA] , 5G-L2-PS shall compute the TBS with nb\_symb=11, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2382\_replaced([11115299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB007372-AA] On an FDD carrier shared with LTE and if NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=true, 5G-L2-PS shall compute the TBS with nb\_symb=12 [CB007372-B] if no coreset overlaps the LTE shared area ([12620260: Resource sharing in asymmetric DSS](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NsAEcDfZEfCYiuaHdt7wgQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), otherwise nb\_symb=11 [End CB007372-B], see ([11115299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [End CB007372-AA]

If Carrier Aggregation using the distributed PUCCH allocation algorithm (DPA) (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2884\_replaced([11123433](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqi6nfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

If sliceAwareSchedulerCellActivation = True, the computing of *sumOfWeightsOverAllEligibleBearersOnCarrier(i) shall exclude the bearers belonging to default RGs or configured RGs of 0 RG weight for carrier* i**. If sliceAwareSchedulerCellActivation = True, the product of scheduling weight and  normalized RG target share** (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22671\_replaced([11189335](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfsAfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **is used instead of scheduling weight.****\***\*

Notes:

* this correction retains the status before DPA, due to higher fluctuation of CS1 size if only CA UEs are scheduled in the Scell (show test case).
* The maximum number of UEs in CS1 is considered when applying this correction.

this change applies regardless the settings of the ActCsiMeasEthFlowControl parameter introduced further below.   
Rationale: this correction is sustainable from the e2e system perspective, as long term the scheduling weight share between the bearers will be enforced by the Proportional Fair metric, averaging out the influence of DPA.

End If

In the computation above, to make sure that the estimated throughput is nonzero, if normalized RG target share is zero and (enhanced slice aware scheduler is activated for a cell ([11288194](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tp5RdPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or NRBTS.actDynamicTargetShareCalcForRg = True), normalized RG target share is replaced by

* [image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is a fraction. The numerator is "rrmRGMaxQuoti". The denominator is "max{1, Σj∈Ji NGBR schedulWeightj}".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03020830.png[/image\_path][/image-0], if RG i is an empty buffer RG,
* [image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is a fraction. The numerator is "rdRGMinLowShareDL". The denominator is "max {1, Σ\_{j∈J\_i^{NGBR}} scheduleWeight\_j}". The expression is written in a standard mathematical font.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03061416.png[/image\_path][/image-1], otherwise.

where

* rrmRGMaxQuota\_i: maximum quota of RG i, to which the DRB belongs
* J\_i^NGBR: the set of non-GBR DRBs (excluding 5QI-5) belonging to RG i
* schedulWeight\_j: scheduling weight of DRB j
* rdRGMinLowShareDL: R&D parameter, minimum resource share given to an RG for its low priority traffic, see [11193687](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvu8lPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)
* to check whether an RG has empty buffer, see [11187810](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvcBqvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

Note: NRCELL.actEnhancedFlowControlETh is an NIDD param to enable/disable the ETh calculation enhancement which will consider max CS1 list size number of UEs in the cell with non-empty buffers while summing the weights of all bearers on a carrier.

Please note, that for *maxTbsOnCarrier(i) and* estFullBufferTbsPerCarrier(j) in single carrier case and therefore for *eTh calculation in general, the DSS resources limitation (Min/Max DL ratio) is not taken into account. It is always assumed that full resources in terms of DL slots and bandwidth are available.*\*\*

In the subframes in that no data has been sent, but 5G-L2-LO buffer is not empty, *eTh(t)=0.*

Before sending to L2 LO, the *eTh*av (t) should be scaled accordingly the subframe pattern.\*\*

When applying scaling, the dl data slot shall include the SSB slot and TRS slot if the corresponding available PRBs is greater than 0.

---

##### 3.29.15.1.2.0-2 Estimation of throughput per DRB Averaging of the estimated throughput eThav per DRB when samples in slots with PDSCH transmission are based on actual schedulings (ID: 11192763)

**3.29.15.1.2.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11192782`)

Estimation of throughput per DRB
11192782:
Estimation of throughput per DRB
When the bearer is added, the eTh shall be set to its default value given by the NIDD parameter minThFlowCtrl.

eTh(t) is used as input of an exponential filter with a time constant T\_eth providing eThav as the output value in each TTI:

An exponential filter with a time constant T\_eth  shall be applied:

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_14721.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0](2)

The averaging time constant T\_eth shall be set according 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11653\_replaced([11192788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvnAyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

In order to avoid invoking the filter defined in (2) even for the UL and control subframes when it is known a priori that eTh(t)=0, before sending to L2 LO the eThav should be scaled according the subframe pattern. In connection with (2), this scaling will cause an error in the calculation, however eTh does not need to be very accurate. The error we are making by trying to look into future wrt. throughput, while not knowing the future load and interference situation, is much bigger.

[Before CNI-87162] In order to avoid introducing new messages only for the sake of transferring eThav ,   eThav is reported for a certain user only when the user is got scheduled. [End CNI-87162]

When the r&d flag rdDlAlwaysScheduled is set to 1  (DL scheduling will always happen regardless if there is dl data or not) and there is no dl user data, eThav shall not be re-calculated. The last  existing eThav  is being reported.

---

##### 3.29.15.1.2.0-3 Estimation of throughput per DRB Handling of bursty traffic in the averaging of estimated throughput (ID: 11192788)

**3.29.15.1.2.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11192796`)

Estimation of throughput per DRB
For handling bursty traffic, the variable

rrmMinBurstyTrafficEth = min(0.2\* [Sum over all carriers i that are used by the 5G-L2-LO entity of the considered bearer j of {maxTbsOnCarrier(i)} ] / SlotDuration],

[Sum over all carriers i that are used by the 5G-L2-LO entity of the considered bearer j of { weightOfBearer(j) / sumOfWeightsOverAllEligibleBearersOnCarrier(i) \* maxTbsOnCarrier(i)} ] / SlotDuration]）is introduced.

Note: weightOfBearer(j), sumOfWeightsOverAllEligibleBearersOnCarrier(i) and maxTbsOnCarrier(i) are defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11651\_replaced([11192714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvmZvPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The algorithm to be used for calculating eTh shall be controlled [Before CB008140-GA] by the NIDD parameter  NRBTS/NRCELL/actCsiMeasEthFlowControl  [End CB008140-GA] according 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11700\_replaced([11192802](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvnAy_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Rationale for the term 0.2\* maxTbsOnCarrier(i) in (3):

-this is to retain the correction of PR437050 in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11649\_replaced([11192696](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvmZufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the burst traffic case.

-The emergency DDDS at low water mark in 5G\_L2\_1932\_replaced([11216925](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2_BiEfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) does not help in case the data is being buffered in PDCP buffer (although it helps with data buffered in the RLC buffer).

---

##### 3.29.15.1.2.0-4 Estimation of throughput per DRB Selection of the method of estimating average throughput (ID: 11192802)

**3.29.15.1.2.0-4.0-4**  (ID: `11192825`)

Estimation of throughput per DRB
The algorithm to be used for calculating eTh shall be controlled by the NIDD parameter NRBTS/NRCELL/actCsiMeasEthFlowControl or, when it runs in an ext-DU for a connection in Inter-gNB CA mode, from the parameter "actCsiMeasEthFlowControl" received from prime-DU (see 5G\_IF\_NTW\_9135) as follows

If actCsiMeasEthFlowControl= ‘PastTputBased’, then

eThav = eTh\_av

Note: throught this requirement, eTh\_av is calculated as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11651\_replaced([11192714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvmZvPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Else if actCsiMeasEthFlowControl= ‘CSIMeasBasedCaUe', then

eThav = max[ eTh\_av , rrmMinBurstyTrafficEth ]  /\* for calculation of eTh\_av s. below

Else if actCsiMeasEthFlowControl= ‘CSIMeasBasedAllUe’, then

eThav = max[ estimatedFullBufferTbs (j) / SlotDuration, rrmMinBurstyTrafficEth]

Else if actCsiMeasEthFlowControl= ‘PastTputBasedMuMimoCSIMeasBasedNonMuMimo’, then

[Before PR756552] If MU-MIMO is enabled  [PR756552]  if actDlMuMimo is enabled  [End PR756552]

eThav = max[ eTh\_av , rrmMinBurstyTrafficEth ]

Else

[Before PR756552] if MU-MIMO is disabled [PR756552]  if actDlMuMimo is disabled  [End PR756552]

eThav = max[ estimatedFullBufferTbs (j) / SlotDuration, rrmMinBurstyTrafficEth]

Else if actCsiMeasEthFlowControl= ‘OptimizedAllUe’

[Before PR756552] If MU-MIMO is enabled  [PR756552]  if actDlMuMimo is enabled  [End PR756552]

eThav = max[ eTh\_av , rrmMinBurstyTrafficEth ]

Else

[Before PR756552] if MU-MIMO is disabled [PR756552]  if actDlMuMimo is disabled  [End PR756552]

eThav = max[ estimatedFullBufferTbs (j) / SlotDuration, rrmMinBurstyTrafficEth]

Else (all spare setttings of actCsiMeasEthFlowControl )

eThav = max[ eTh\_av , estimatedFullBufferTbs (j) / SlotDuration, rrmMinBurstyTrafficEth]

Note: finally, eTh reported to RLC is set equal toeThav calculated above.

---

##### 3.29.15.1.2.0-5 Estimation of throughput per DRB Handling of estimated throughput indication to RLC (ID: 11192830)

**3.29.15.1.2.0-5.0-4**  (ID: `12619068`)

Estimation of throughput per DRB
The estimated throughput *eTh according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11650\_replaced([11192708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvmZu_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) shall be [before PR822466] calculated [PR822466] processed as per below [End PR822466] and passed to higher layers (RLC and above)*

* at each TB request for DRB data transmission on the air (note: this is the legacy mechanism)
* if *actOptimizedFlowControl (PCell)= ‘OptimizedAllUe’, then at the first CSI report arrival*
* if *actOptimizedFlowControl (PCell)= ‘OptimizedAllUe’, then if in absence of DL scheduling for a longer time the*eTh has changed by more than *rdEthThr percent,*\*\*

the push of *eTh towards RLC is required towards RLC is required if* Abs(last\_reported\_eTh - current\_ eTh)/ last\_reported\_eTh >**rdEthThr/100%. The *eTh calculation in in absence of DL scheduling should not trigger overload control according 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24621\_replaced([11216305](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxYiZfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The details are specified in the EFS.***\*\*

The parameter *rdEthThr defining the longest time interval between two eTh updates* is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15749\_replaced([11193537](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvtudPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

In order to avoid ambiguity about the initial value of *last\_reported\_eTh*when evaluating the above trigger condition, herewith it is explicitly required that eTh shall be sent at the very first expiry of the rdEthUpdateTimer or at the first CSI report arrival, whichever happens first.\*\*\*\*

Note: \*actOptimizedFlowControl (PCell) is the NRCELL.actOptimizedFlowControl parameter as configured per NIDD in the PCell or, when it runs in an ext-DU for a connection in Inter-gNB CA mode, from the parameter "actOptimizedFlowControl" received from prime-DU (see 5G\_IF\_NTW\_9137)

[PR822466]   
Note: this part of the algorithm has been transferred from the L2NRT chapter, 5G\_UP\_ALG\_5736\_replaced(xxx).

In the MAC/lower RLC data path component, update the eTh before sending it to higher layers  
   If actOptDataFlowRateEst is set to True,  
      eTh\_to\_be\_reported = Max (\*current\_ eTh, RLC PDU drain rate).  
The algorithm resp. formula for calculating the RLC PDU drain rate will be controlled by the NIDD parameter NRCELL.drainRateCalcAdjFlowCtrl. The details of this calculation are specified in the 5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level EFS.

Rationale: With the introduction of eTh update in L2-PS based on slice weight (CB008132), the eTh for user/bearer mapped to the slice with lower weight results in a lower value than the actual throughput that the bearer can achieve when there are less users in the system or the slice with higher weight has no/less users. This leads to under-utilization of available resources as higher RLC sends DL data based on the eTh reported by scheduler, which is not enough to fill the available resources. To ensure there is sufficient data at lower layers to use the available resources the eTh is updated based on the reported eTH and the drain rate.  
Though this functionality is added due to the changes to eTh introduced in CB008132, this functionality works for all scenarios when enabled.

Else if the actOptDataFlowRateEst is set to False,  
eTh\_to\_be\_reported  = estimated throughput left unchanged as received from the scheduler.

The eTh\_to\_be\_reported shall be rounded up to an even number due to the need of conversion between float and integer values.  
[End PR822466]\*\*

---

### 3.29.15.2 Calculation of estimated throughput measurement for the flow control - non-VoNR GBR

#### 3.29.15.2.0-1 Calculation of estimated throughput measurement for the flow control - non-VoNR GBR DL Scheduler shall provide estimated throughput measurement for the flow control - non-VoNR GBR (ID: 11192857)

**3.29.15.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11192863`)

Calculation of estimated throughput measurement for the flow control - non-VoNR GBR
If the NRCELL.actNonVoNRGbrService= TRUE, 5G-L2-PS shall provide to 5G-L2-LO the estimated throughput *eTh per non-VoNR GBR DRB, to be included in the feedback message DDDS (Downlink Data Delivery Status)* specified in 5G\_L2\_1932\_replaced([11216925](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2_BiEfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (there named *eTh).*\*\*

For non-VoNR GBR DRB, set *eTh = DL GFBR*

DL GFBR is provided by CPlane during DRB setup.

---

### 3.29.15.3 Calculation of estimated throughput measurement for the flow control - DC-GBR

#### 3.29.15.3.0-1 Calculation of estimated throughput measurement for the flow control - DC-GBR DL Scheduler shall provide estimated throughput measurement for the flow control - DC-GBR (ID: 11192871)

**3.29.15.3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11192876`)

Calculation of estimated throughput measurement for the flow control - DC-GBR
If the NRCELL.actDcGbrService = TRUE, 5G-L2-PS shall provide to 5G-L2-LO the estimated throughput eTh per DC-GBR DRB, to be included in the feedback message DDDS (Downlink Data Delivery Status) specified in 5G\_L2\_1932\_replaced([11216925](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2_BiEfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (there named eTh).

For DC-GBR DRB, set eTh = max(DL GFBR, minThFlowCtrl)

DL GFBR is provided by CPlane during DRB setup.

---

### 3.29.15.4 Calculation of estimated throughput measurement for the flow control - NBR

#### 3.29.15.4.0-1 Calculation of estimated throughput measurement for the flow control - NBR DL Scheduler shall provide estimated throughput measurement for the flow control - NBR (ID: 11192885)

**3.29.15.4.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11192890`)

Calculation of estimated throughput measurement for the flow control - NBR
5G-L2-PS shall provide to 5G-L2-LO the estimated throughput eTh per NBR configured and not deprioritized non-GBR DRB, to be included in the feedback message DDDS (Downlink Data Delivery Status) specified in 5G\_L2\_1932\_replaced([11216925](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2_BiEfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (there named eTh).

For NBR configured and not deprioritized non-GBR DRB, set [Before PR749073-24R3] eTh = max(nbrDl, eThav) [PR749073-24R3]eTh = min(max(nbrDl, eThav), maxTbsOnCarrier(i)/SlotDuration) [End PR749073-24R3];

ELSE

For deprioritized NBR DRB,  same as eTH estimation for nonGBR (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4677\_replaced([11192687](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvmZt_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

where

* nbrDl[i,k] is the NBR prioritized bit rate configured for the nonGBR bearer k of UE i via NIDD parameter NRBTS/NRDRB\_MAC.nbrDl; for CA case the nbrDl is based on the rrmNbrPbr\_kbps(i,j) split for each Cell, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22691\_replaced([11123418](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqi6mvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));
* eThav is the averaging of the estimated throughput per DRB that based on 'actCsiMeasEthFlowControl' selection, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11700\_replaced([11192802](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvnAy_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* [PR749073-24R3]maxTbsOnCarrier(i) is TBS with max num PRBs while MCS and rank are the ones that are selected for the UE on carrier i,  refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11651\_replaced([11192714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvmZvPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).[End PR749073-24R3]

---

### 3.29.15.5 Handling of maximum throughput indication to RLC

### 3.29.15.5-1 Handling of maximum throughput indication to RLC

**3.29.15.5-1.0-1**  (ID: `11192949`)

Handling of maximum throughput indication to RLC
In case of massive occurrence of HARQ Nack and Dtx indications, 5G-L2-PS shall provide to 5G-L2-LO an indication of massively deteriorated radio condition if cumulated Nack+Dtx to Ack ratio over a certain time interval exceeds a sustainable level.

To achieve this, DL scheduler shall implement a 'leaky bucket' type filter, with

•     HARQ feedback

•     idle\_Slots\_since\_last\_HARQ feedback

•     #activatedCCs

as input,

•     rrmRemainingBucketLevel

as output,

an internal Boolean variable rrmHighNackDtxInd,

and new parameters

* actNackDtxFloodControlDetection, configured by the NIDD parameter MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELLGRP.actNackDtxFloodControlDetection
* maxNackFloodBurstSize, configured by the NIDD parameter MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELLGRP.nackFloodControlF1.maxNackFloodBurstSizeFRx
* dataFlowResumeThr, configured by the NIDD parameter MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELLGRP.nackFloodControlF1.dataFlowResumeThrFRx
* forgettingRatio, configured by the NIDD parameter MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELLGRP.nackFloodControlF1.forgettingRatioFRx. The value used is forgettingRatio/1000, as specified below.

, where FRx can be FR1 or FR2, depending on frequency range deployed.

Note: The proper assignment of maxNackFloodBurstSize and forgettingRatio according to the frequency range is done in the C-plane.

MAX\_BL = (#activatedCCs\*maxNackFloodBurstSize)

MIN\_BL = - (#activatedCCs\*maxNackFloodBurstSize)

The output variable rrmRemainingBucketLevel is initialized with MAX\_BL.

The internal Boolean variable rrmHighNackDtxInd is initialized with ‘false’.

At each incoming HARQ feedback

{

MAX\_BL and MIN\_BL are updated according to current #activatedCCs

//remainingBucketLevel update using ratio

rrmRemainingBucketLevel = min(MAX\_BL, rrmRemainingBucketLevel + (NumberOfAcks *idle\_Slots\_since\_last\_HARQfeedback\_for\_UE*forgettingRatio/1000).

rrmRemainingBucketLevel = rrmRemainingBucketLevel + NumberOfAcks*rdNackDtxFloodDetectionBlerTargetFxx - NumberOfNacks*(1- rdNackDtxFloodDetectionBlerTargetFxx ) - rdNackDtxFloodDetectionDtxWeightFxx\* NumberOfDtx

, where for rdNackDtxFloodDetectionBlerTargetFxx and rdNackDtxFloodDetectionDtxWeightFxx respectively

If PsCell\_CellSetupReq>ssbScs=='15kHz', then  rdNackDtxFloodDetectionBlerTargetFDD (5G\_L2\_1072\_replaced([11182198](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27ZmWvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and rdNackDtxFloodDetectionDtxWeightFDD ((5G\_L2\_1075\_replaced([11182212](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27ZmXfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall be used.

If PsCell\_CellSetupReq>ssbScs =='30kHz', then  rdNackDtxFloodDetectionBlerTargetFR1 (5G\_L2\_1070\_replaced([11182189](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27ZmWPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and rdNackDtxFloodDetectionDtxWeightFR1 ((5G\_L2\_1073\_replaced([11182203](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27ZmW_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall be used.

If PsCell\_CellSetupReq>ssbScs =='120kHz' or PsCell\_CellSetupReq>ssbScs =='240kHz’, then  rdNackDtxFloodDetectionBlerTargetFR2 (5G\_L2\_1071\_replaced([11182194](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27ZmWfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and rdNackDtxFloodDetectionDtxWeightFR2 ((5G\_L2\_1075\_replaced([11182212](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27ZmXfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall be used.

rrmRemainingBucketLevel = max(MIN\_BL, min(MAX\_BL, rrmRemainingBucketLevel))

// rrmHighNackDtxInd update

if (rrmHighNackDtxInd was ‘false’ AND rrmRemainingBucketLevel  <= 0 )

set rmHighNackDtxInd  to 'true'

if (rrmHighNackDtxInd was ’true’ AND rrmRemainingBucketLevel  >= (#activatedCCs\*dataFlowResumeThr))

set rmHighNackDtxInd  to 'false’

// highNackDtxInd  sending to L2-LO

In the LoCtrl\_PduMuxReq message, L2 shall set the parameter highNackDtxInd  to the current value of rmHighNackDtxInd

Upon reception of LoCtrl\_RadioLinkResumeInd message:

* L2-PS shall set rrmRemainingBucketLevel  = #activatedCCs\*dataFlowResumeThr
* L2-PS shall set rmHighNackDtxInd to ‘false’

The highNackDtxInd processing according the above algorithm shall be done per L2PS instance. Note: e.g., in case of FDD-TDD inter-L2RT CA,  highNackDtxInd is calculated separately for Pcell  and for Scell.

---

#### 3.29.15.5.0-1 Handling of maximum throughput indication to RLC MAC-PS shall provide maximum throughput indication for the flow control (ID: 11192901)

**3.29.15.5.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `11192927`)

Handling of maximum throughput indication to RLC
DL Scheduler shall provide maximum throughput indication for the flow control to RLC.

Within each LoCtrl\_PduMuxReq message,

and if actOptimizedFlowControl (PCell)= ‘OptimizedAllUe’,  
at every time when estimated averaged throughput indication is passed to higher layers (RLC and above) according 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15751\_replaced([11192830](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvnn0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),

L2-PS informs RLC about the maximum achievable throughput  with the maxTput IE set as follows:

maxEstimatedFullBufferTbs (j) = Sum over all carriers i that are used by the 5G-L2-LO entity of the considered UE of {maxEstFullBufferTbsPerCarrier (i)}

where

i =index of carrier

maxTbsOnCarrier(i) = TBS with max num PRBs available for PDSCH in the cell, while MCS and rank are the maximal ones possible for the UE on carrier i, according to the current UE configuration in 5G-L2-PS.

Hint for implementation: the largest transport block size as calculated for the largest MCS (MCS28 or MCS27) in 5G\_UP\_IF\_1905\_replaced([11515773](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_tUPmaPv1Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) can be used for this purpose, after division by the slot length.

Note: actOptimizedFlowControl (PCell) is the NRCELL.actOptimizedFlowControl parameter as configured per NIDD in the PCell or, when it runs in an ext-DU for a connection in Inter-gNB CA mode, from the parameter "actOptimizedFlowControl" received from prime-DU (see 5G\_IF\_NTW\_9137).

Finally,

If NRCELL.actEnhancedFlowControlETh = TRUE

maxTput = min{sum over all non GBR bearers j of the UE of (eTh\_av(j))\*numUesIneThCalculation + sum over all non-VoNR GBR DRB’s DL MFBR of the UE [CB008600-C]+ sum over all DC-GBR DRB's DL MFBR of the UE if NRCell.actDcGbrService=true[End CB008600-C], maxEstimatedFullBufferTbs / SlotDuration},

where numUesIneThCalculation is the number of UEs considered while determining the estFullBufferTbsPerCarrier described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11651\_replaced([11192714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvmZvPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

DL MFBR is provided by CPlane during the DRB setup

Else

maxTput = min{sum over all non GBR bearers j of the UE of (eTh\_av(j))\*numUesCS1 + sum over all non-VoNR GBR DRB’s DL MFBR of the UE  [CB008600-C]+ sum over all DC-GBR DRB's DL MFBR of the UE if NRCell.actDcGbrService=true[End CB008600-C], maxEstimatedFullBufferTbs / SlotDuration},

where numUesCS1 is the number of UEs in CS1

DL MFBR is provided by CPlane during the DRB setup

The maxTput is calculated per UE. It is subject to the same scaling to the slot pattern as eThav .

In case the number of UEs in CS1 is equal to 0, numUesCS1 =1 shall be used.

Note: NRCELL.actEnhancedFlowControlETh is an NIDD param to enable/disable the ETh calculation enhancement which will consider max CS1 list size number of UEs in the cell with non-empty buffers while summing the weights of all bearers on a carrier.

Rationale for adding maxTput on top of eThav  : In order to set the ‘low/high water mark’ of the flow control correctly, L2LO needs an indication on the maximum achievable throughput of the bearer.

---

#### 3.29.15.5.0-2 Handling of maximum throughput indication to RLC Handling of buffer underflow (ID: 11192933)

**3.29.15.5.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11192937`)

Handling of maximum throughput indication to RLC
[Before PR740751]

In case of MAC buffer underflow, the MAC layer on gNB-DU shall replace the eTh calculated according 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4677\_replaced([11192687](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvmZt_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or 5G\_UP\_ALG\_12622\_replaced([11192853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvnn1fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22636\_replaced([11192881](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvnn2_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) by

 maxTput calculated according to the above requirement of 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8082\_replaced([11192895](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvnn3vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for non-CA UEs as well as for CA UEs not having Scell activated

 the eTh calculated according 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4677\_replaced([11192687](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvmZt_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_12622\_replaced([11192853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvnn1fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22636\_replaced([11192881](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvnn2_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) scaled by an adjustable constant for CA UEs  having Scell activated

and provide the updated eTh immediately to RLC. Thereafter, if the low buffer condition is persisting, it is sufficient to provide the eTh updated according above in the periodic DDDS reporting messages.

The calculation of l2loQueueingDelayRlcPdu (aka tQueue) referenced in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_5736\_replaced([11221148](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kx0ANvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) shall be based on the eTh calculated as above, i.e., on eTh being sent to RLC.

This requirement shall be applied for the remote (secondary) gNB in the scenario of inter-gNB Carrier Aggregation as well as for the primary gNB.

[End PR740751]

---

## 3.29.16 Measurements for support of L4S bearers

### 3.29.16.0-1 Measurements for support of L4S bearers Handling of bare estimated throughput indication to RLC (ID: 11192958)

**3.29.16.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `13396948`)

Measurements for support of L4S bearers
On top of providing the estimated throughput estimation *eThav* for flow control according 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4676\_replaced([11192682](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvmZtvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (and therein specifically according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11650\_replaced([11192708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvmZu_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11700\_replaced([11192802](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvnAy_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8116\_replaced([11192857](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvnn1vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22637\_replaced([11192885](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvnn3PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), MAC layer shall provide an additional estimate called bare estimate throughput *eTh\_bare to the RLC for each non-GBR DRB.*\*\*

This bare estimate throughput is the pure prediction of the DRBs troughput according to scheduling weights share and UEs radio conditions, but without modifications needed for avoiding MAC buffer underflow, like the one defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11653\_replaced([11192788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvnAyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) .

The algorithm to be used for calculating *eTh\_bare shall support all the settings of the  NIDD parameter NRBTS/NRCELL/actCsiMeasEthFlowControl*

or, when it runs in an ext-DU for a connection in Inter-gNB CA mode, from the parameter "actCsiMeasEthFlowControl" received from prime-DU (see 5G\_IF\_NTW\_9135) as follows

For any setting of *actCsiMeasEthFlowControl*

*eTh\_bare =* eTh\_av\*\*

where *eTh\_av  is identical with* eTh of  5G\_UP\_ALG\_22637\_replaced([11192885](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvnn3PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for NBR DRBs and of 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11651\_replaced([11192714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvmZvPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for other non-GBR DRBs.  
[05242226] The correction in [11192958](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvoO6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for considering the slice maxQuota in eTh\_av shall be propagated to eth\_bare. [End 05242226]\*\*

It is highly recommended to add *eTh\_bare to the L2 trace flow control related events in TTI traces of L2-PS, L2-Hi and L2-Lo.*

Notes:

The various settings of "actCsiMeasEthFlowControl" boil down to two basic methods of calculating *eTh\_bare =* eTh\_av : past throughput based or CSI measurement based, cf.   5G\_UP\_ALG\_11651\_replaced([11192714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvmZvPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).\*\*

For the usage of  *eTh\_bare in RLC layer, please refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_5837\_replaced([11222455](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kx7U-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).*

---

## 3.29.17 Measurements for L2 Load Balancing for Dynamic Spectrum Sharing (DSS) on a common carrier with LTE

### 3.29.17.0-1 Measurements for L2 Load Balancing for Dynamic Spectrum Sharing (DSS) on a common carrier with LTE Requirements moved to Section "Dynamic Spectrum Sharing Control" (5G_UP_ALG_10213_replaced( 11172338 )), Thomas Deiss, 09-02-2022 (ID: 11192975)

## 3.29.18 Measurements for EIRP control

### 3.29.18.0-2 Measurements for EIRP control Calculation of available EIRP token per segment per slot (ID: 11192990)

**3.29.18.0-2.0-4**  (ID: `12526305`)

Measurements for EIRP control
Normalized EIRP shall be controlled on a slot basis for the cell segments which does not have enough EIRP budget to transmit continuously over the whole bandwidth (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2629\_replaced([11119080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqID2fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

For each of the controlled segment s , the L2PS shall determine the number of available tokens for the current slot rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s,n) [CB013505-A] according to [12526294](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-_HiABrIEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). [End CB013505-A]

[Before CB013505-A]

In every slot n within a sampling period,

- at n=0, ie the beginning of a sampling period, <(s,0) = rrmEirpControlTokenInTheBucket(s) + rrmEirpControlAvailableTokensPerSymbol(s) \* numberOfDlSymbolsInTheSlot

- at n>0, rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s,n) = rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s,n-1) + rrmEirpControlAvailableTokensPerSymbol(s) \* numberOfDlSymbolsInTheSlot.

- numberOfDlSymbolsInTheSlot is derived from the slot format (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2313\_replaced([11114697](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpnGefvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

- rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot may become negative

The number of available tokens in the slot from each segment shall be used to determine the maximum number of RBs that can be allocated by the DL scheduler to non GBR traffic (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4349\_replaced([11177928](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuzIc_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[End CB013505-A]

For each scheduled beam, a number of tokens is consumed from each token bucket of the monitored segments according to the transmitted power and the normalized EIRP budget of the beam.

For that purpose, the DL scheduler is provided with the number of consumed tokens per RB for PDSCH, rrmNumberOfEirpTokenPerRb, for each beam and segment.

If **NRCELL/eirpControl/smoothingEffect is 0 and in order to simplify the computation of the number of consumed tokens per slot, the gNB shall use the approximations described in [12581707](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Yi9pYjJnEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).**

If NRCELL/actDlMuMimoEnh = True, and if DL tapering is enabled (see NIDD parameters of dlMuMimoTaperingH and dlMuMimoTaperingV), 5G-L2-PS shall also calculate the value of rrmNumberOfEirpTokenPerRb(b,s) (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2629\_replaced([11119080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqID2fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with tapered beam(s).

The actual EIRP consumption shall be corrected at the end of the sampling period by the updating the number of EIRP tokens in the bucket.

---

### 3.29.18.0-3 Measurements for EIRP control Approximation for the computation of the consumed tokens (ID: 12581707)

**3.29.18.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `12581708`)

Measurements for EIRP control
When EIRP control is controlled in at least one segment on a slot by slot basis, then, as an approximation, the DL scheduler may consider :

- that reference signals (CSI-RS and SS/PBCH) are transmitted on each symbol with the maximum available power for PDSCH, ie that the number of consumed tokens per OFDM symbol in segment s is equal to maxNumberOfRbs (according to the BW size) multiplied by rrmNumberOfEirpTokenPerRb(b,s), where b is the beam id used for transmission,

- that UL PDCCH is transmitted with the average beam gain over segment over the largest configured CORESET, ie that the number of consumed tokens per OFDM symbol in segment s is equal to the average number of rrmNumberOfEirpTokenPerRb consumed per beam in the segment multiplied by the CORESET size,

- that DL PDCCH is transmitted with same power as PDSCH, ie that the number of consumed tokens per PDCCH transmission in segment s is equal to rrmNumberOfEirpTokenPerRb(b,s) multiplied by the number of scheduled CCEs (the aggregation level) times the number of RBs per CCE

On an FDD carrier shared with LTE and the aggregation level of the PDCCH is configured as 2, and the PRB blanking function is also enabled **(MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/actPRBBlanking = TRUE), the pdcchDciTransmitPower is 3dB higher than PDSCH RE (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2552\_replaced([11118347](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqCkQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). In the above formula, the number of RB per CEE is multiplied by 2 to compensate the 3db power offset for PDCCH.**

- that PDSCH is allocated with all REs (no puncturing or rate matching considered), ie that the number of consumed tokens per PDSCH transmission in segment s is equal to rrmNumberOfEirpTokenPerRb(b,s) multiplied by the number of scheduled RBs and the number of allocated symbols. For SRS based DFT beam, the consumed tokens per PDSCH transmission in segement shall consider the bestBeamPowerOffset for beam which is taken as stronger beam for an UE, and deltaPdschPower for beam which is taken as weaker beam for an UE. The bestBeamPowerOffset and deltaPdschPower are defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13465\_replaced([11118538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqDyZ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). If NRCELL/actDlMuMimoEnh = True, the consumed tokens per PDSCH transmission for MU UEs shall consider the factor of txPowerFactor which is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7434\_replaced([11145459](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksA6MfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). For UE with valid SRS based subband BWVs (5G\_UP\_ALG\_14111\_replaced([11156776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks3OyfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), each UE only have one **combined subband beam for EIRP control regardless of rank. Note this is aligned with power control for PDSCH in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2556\_replaced([11118369](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqCkRvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the transmission power of PDSCH with subband beams indicated by 5G-L2-PS will not be adjusted by rank factor.**

---

### 3.29.18.0-4 Measurements for EIRP control Computation of the number of available tokens in a slot (ID: 12526294)

**3.29.18.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `12526297`)

Measurements for EIRP control
12526297:
Measurements for EIRP control
For each of the controlled segment s, the L2PS shall determine the number of available tokens for the current slot rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s,n).

If NRCELL/eirpControl/actEpic is enabled

In every slot n within a sampling period, we compute the token allowance per segment s as:

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$g\_n = \varepsilon \gamma\_s \frac{n}{N} + (1 - \varepsilon) \gamma\_s + \rho \overline{C\_n} - c\_{t,s}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-08201049.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

Where:

* N is the number DL of slots in an EIRP measurement period as defined in [11118792](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqFnnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)
* [image-1][image\_desc]The image contains the Greek letter gamma ($\gamma$) followed by the letter 's'.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-04161645.png[/image\_path][/image-1]is the number of tokens available in the current measurement period [Before CB013505-A-UPD005] (i.e. rrmEirpControlTokenInTheBucket(s) see [11118968](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqHcxvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) [CB013505-A-UPD005] (i.e. the number of EIRP token from the bucket, see [11119080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqID2fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) [End CB013505-A-UPD005]
* [image-2][image\_desc]The image contains the text "Ct,s".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-04161644.png[/image\_path][/image-2]is the number of tokens consumed in the current measurement period
* [image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a blurry, grayscale rendering of the Greek letter epsilon (ε).[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-04161645.png[/image\_path][/image-3]is the allowance fairness parameter defined in [12528070: rdEpicAllowanceFairness](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_iXvkkBtaEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)
* [image-4][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. It shows the Greek letter rho ($\rho$) followed by a capital C with a subscript 'n'. Above the 'C' and 'n', there is a horizontal bar, indicating a conjugate or average.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-08201050.png[/image\_path][/image-4] is the cumulative number of tokens contribution from the rrmMinEirpTokenPerPeriod (i.e. the sum until the slot n of rrmEirpControlAvailableTokensPerSymbol(s) \* numberOfDlSymbolsInTheSlot)

If [12528080: rdEpicAllowancePfrTolerance](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wcyXMBtbEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) > 0 and allowance > 0 and [image-5][image\_desc]The image contains a Greek letter gamma ($\gamma$) with a subscript 's'.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-04161645.png[/image\_path][/image-5]>0

Then, the number of token available in the current slot rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s,n) is computed as:

[image-6][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is written in LaTeX and reads as follows: $g'*{n} = e^{\alpha \cdot max(\delta - g*{n}, 0)} \cdot P'$.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-08261054.png[/image\_path][/image-6]

Where:

* [image-7][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in black text on a white background. The equation is: $\delta = K\gamma\_s/N$.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-04170847.png[/image\_path][/image-7]
* where K is a constant defined in [12528078: rdEpicAllowanceRegulation](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_sALpABtbEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)
* [image-8][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a light gray color against a white background. The equation is:
  $\alpha = \ln(\rho')/\delta$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-04170846.png[/image\_path][/image-8]
* where 𝜌′ is defined as the power reduction factor in the current segment from NRBTS/NRCELL/eirpControlPowerReductionFactorList minus a constant defined in [12528080: rdEpicAllowancePfrTolerance](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wcyXMBtbEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).
* This value should be converted to linear form.
* P' is the EIRP usage cap in this slot. It is computed as the maximum EIRP that would be used in the current slot if all RBGs are allocated to the current segment at full power

Else rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s,n) is set to allowance instead.

Else

In every slot n within a sampling period,

- at n=0, ie the beginning of a sampling period, rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s,0) = rrmEirpControlTokenInTheBucket(s) + rrmEirpControlAvailableTokensPerSymbol(s) \* numberOfDlSymbolsInTheSlot

- at n>0, rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s,n) = rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s,n-1) + rrmEirpControlAvailableTokensPerSymbol(s) \* numberOfDlSymbolsInTheSlot.

Where:

* numberOfDlSymbolsInTheSlot is derived from the slot format (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2313\_replaced([11114697](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpnGefvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot may become negative

The number of available tokens in the slot from each segment shall be used to determine the maximum number of RBs that can be allocated by the DL scheduler to non GBR traffic (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4349\_replaced([11177928](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuzIc_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

{

*Measured GBR* *,*DC-GBR, NBR Cell load value is set to 0  (default value).\*\*\*\*

}

If (NRBTS/NRPGRP/actLbpsCtrlLogicEnh = TRUE

{

*Measured GBR, DC-GBR, NBR Cell load  shall be an average ratio between the number of used PRBs for GBR and DC-GBR* bearers and  number of available PRBs for PDSCH transmission, in percents.\*\*

The instantaneous power saving load *psLoad at current radio frame number t, is defined as:*

*psLoad (t) =* nPrb\_used (t) / *nPrb\_avail (t)*\*\*

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| *nPrb\_used (t) =* | taking into account all the UE scheduled for GBR **and DC-GBR *Bearer in the slot, for each UE the number of PRBs assigned on **GBR and** DC-GBR*** bearer for PDSCH based on current MCS of the UE is normalized.***\****\*\*\* |

*nPrb\_avail (t)* =     number of PRBs available for PDSCH at t\*\*

For averaging method based on those instantaneous load values, see [5G\_UP\_ALG\_15028\_replaced([11193142](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvqEEvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))];     =[PR846325] **If an artificial load measurement was sent in the previous measurement period, avgPsLoad shall be initialized as 0 (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15028\_replaced([11193142](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvqEEvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End PR846325]**

When slowPrbPoolingAllowed or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is True (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283\_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), nPrb\_avail(t) shall be limited by the total amount of usable PDSCH PRB of the cell which is computed every bbPoolEvalPeriod (refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6781\_replaced([11211947](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw-StfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) by the slow pooling algorithm in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6500\_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = TRUE, nPrb\_avail(t) shall be limited by the maximum number of usable PRBs (defined as rrmMaxNumUsablePrb in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) which is dependent on the layer PRB capacity computed every pooling period and is described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

When actDlPowerBoost is set to (DlVoNRPowerBoost/DlVoNRAndSrbPowerBoost), nPrb\_avail(t) (maximum number of PRBs available per slot for PDSCH) is further limited by the number of remaining PRBs in rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerBoostPrbs pool after negating PRBs used for power boosting, (rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerBoostPrbs - powerBoostPrbs).

rrmPrbPoolForPdschAndPowerBoostPrbs: As defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25085\_replaced([11177271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuuP9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

powerBoostPrbs**: As defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24935\_replaced([11185393](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvS3svvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

}

}

if ( (NRBTS/actNrLBmMimoRTXPowerSaving = true) or (NRBTS/actNrLBRTXPowerSaving = true) ) AND NRBTS/NRPGRP/lbpsSOMethod = 1 (Tx switch off)
