### 3.29.19.0-4 Measurements for L2 Cell load enabling energy saving by Cell switch-off, Tx switch-off or MIMO muting Estimated nGBR nNBR Cell Load for energy saving cell management (ID: 11193073)

**3.29.19.0-4.0-3**  (ID: `11193088`)

Measurements for L2 Cell load enabling energy saving by Cell switch-off, Tx switch-off or MIMO muting
[Before PR846325]

**[CB013709-B] If NRBTS.tmpActFeat1(Bit 0) is set to 0, HwVariant used is not ABIL, and the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31301\_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is greater than or equal to the activation threshold value set for rdPowerSavingsOlcDlPerCent (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31827\_replaced([11216783](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxa-oPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) then, gNB-DU shall send artificial traffic load measurements indicating 100% traffic load to CP-RT. When the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31301\_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is below the deactivation threshold value set for rdPowerSavingsOlcDlPerCent (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31827\_replaced([11216783](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxa-oPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then gNB-DU shall resume the periodic sending of the measurements as mentioned below.  If an artificial load measurement was sent in the previous measurement period, avgPsLoad shall be initialized as 0 (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15028\_replaced([11193142](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvqEEvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

**[End CB013709-B]**

**[End PR846325**]\*\*\*\*

If Power Saving Mode is on for the Cell (NRBTS/actNrLBPowerSaving = TRUE)**or (NRBTS/actNrLBRTXPowerSaving = TRUE)** or (NRBTS/actNr​L​B​mMimoR​T​X​Power​Saving = TRUE) **or (NRBTS/actLbpsCtrlLogicEnh= TRUE); *Measured nGBR nNBR Cell Load shall be provided.***\*\*\*\*

[PR846325]

**[CB013709-B] If NRBTS.tmpActFeat1(Bit 0) is set to 0, HwVariant used is not ABIL, and the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31301\_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is greater than or equal to the activation threshold value set for rdPowerSavingsOlcDlPerCent (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31827\_replaced([11216783](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxa-oPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) then, gNB-DU shall send artificial traffic load measurements indicating 100% traffic load to CP-RT. When the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31301\_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is below the deactivation threshold value set for rdPowerSavingsOlcDlPerCent (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31827\_replaced([11216783](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxa-oPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then gNB-DU shall resume the periodic sending of the measurements as mentioned below.**

**[End CB013709-B]**

[End PR846325]

*Measured nGBR nNBR Cell Load shall be an average ratio between the number of used PRBs assigned for non-GBR bearers and the total number of available PRBs assigned for PDSCH transmission in percents.*

For estimation of Intantanaeous ratio used in average, see [5G\_UP\_ALG\_14409\_replaced([11193094](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvpdCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))]; and for periodicity of transmission see [5G\_UP\_ALG\_15031\_replaced([11193020](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvo1-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))]. [PR846325] If an artificial load measurement was sent in the previous measurement period, avgPsLoad shall be initialized as 0 (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15028\_replaced([11193142](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvqEEvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End PR846325]

---

### 3.29.19.0-5 Measurements for L2 Cell load enabling energy saving by Cell switch-off, Tx switch-off or MIMO muting Instantanaeous ratio used in average for DL scheduler estimated nGBR nNBR bearer Cell Load (ID: 11193094)

**3.29.19.0-5.0-7**  (ID: `12478900`)

Measurements for L2 Cell load enabling energy saving by Cell switch-off, Tx switch-off or MIMO muting
**[CB013709-B] If NRBTS.tmpActFeat1(Bit 0) is set to 0, HwVariant used is not ABIL, and the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31301\_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is greater than or equal to the activation threshold value set for rdPowerSavingsOlcDlPerCent (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31827\_replaced([11216783](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxa-oPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) then, gNB-DU shall send artificial traffic load measurements indicating 100% traffic load to CP-RT. When the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31301\_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is below the deactivation threshold value set for rdPowerSavingsOlcDlPerCent (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31827\_replaced([11216783](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxa-oPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then gNB-DU shall resume sending the measurements periodically as mentioned below.  If an artificial load measurement was sent in the previous measurement period, avgPsLoad shall be initialized as 0 (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15028\_replaced([11193142](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvqEEvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

**[End CB013709-B]**

The instantaneous power saving load *psLoad at current radio frame number t, is defined as:*

*psLoad (t) =* nPrb\_used (t) / *nPrb\_avail (t)*\*\*

The PRBs shall be weighted equally, not taking into account the number of PDSCH symbols in different slots. Radio frames without any PDSCH available shall be skipped.

*psLoad shall be calculated per radio frame allocated to NR and per cell, and used as detailled in averaging method [see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15028\_replaced([11193142](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvqEEvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))]*

If (NRBTS/actNrLBPowerSaving = true AND NRBTS/NRPGRP/lbpsSOMethod = 0 (cell switch off))

{

If (NRBTS/NRPGRP/actLbpsCtrlLogicEnh = FALSE

{

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| *nPrb\_used (t) =* | taking into account all the UE scheduled for the slot, for each UE the number of PRBs assigned for PDSCH based on current MCS of the UE is normalized and excluding the number of extra PRB used for FD-POLITE (see [12439014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_CO0dEgiSEfCT35inaBGo7g)). |

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| *nPrb\_avail (t) =* | number of PRBs available for L2-PS for PDSCH at time instant t |

If NRBTS/NRCELL/actDlMuMimo is true, nPrb\_avail(t) shall be calculated for user group (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4395\_replaced([11142202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr3JOvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

And then

psLoad (t)    = min(nPrb\_used (t) / nPrb\_avail (t),1)

If NRBTS/NRCELL/actDlMuMimoEnh is true, nPrb\_avail(t) shall be calculated based on virtual UE(see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7431\_replaced([11144204](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr7arPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and remaining UE (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7530\_replaced([11145129](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr_FBfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

And then

psLoad (t)    = min(nPrb\_used (t) / nPrb\_avail (t),1)

}

If (NRBTS/NRPGRP/actLbpsCtrlLogicEnh = TRUE

{

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| *nPrb\_used (t) =* | taking into account all the UE scheduled for non-GBR Bearer in the slot, for each UE the number of PRBs assigned on **non-GBR bearer for PDSCH based on current MCS of the UE is normalized and excluding the number of extra PRB used for FD-POLITE (see [12439014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_CO0dEgiSEfCT35inaBGo7g)).** |

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| *nPrb\_avail (t) =* | number of PRBs available for L2-PS for PDSCH at time instant t |

}

}

if ( (NRBTS/actNrLBmMimoRTXPowerSaving = true) or (NRBTS/actNrLBRTXPowerSaving = true) ) AND NRBTS/NRPGRP/lbpsSOMethod = 1 (Tx switch off)

{

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| *nPrb\_used (t) =* | taking into account all the UE scheduled for the slot, for each UE the number of PRBs assigned for PDSCH based on current MCS of the UE is normalized + if NRCELL.actConfDlInterferenceGen is set to a non-zero value, for fake UE the number of PRBs assigned for artificial PDSCH load based on current MCS (please see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17661\_replaced([11183983](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvOmS_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and excluding the number of extra PRB used for FD-POLITE (see [12439014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_CO0dEgiSEfCT35inaBGo7g))  . |

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| *nPrb\_avail (t) =* | number of PRBs available for L2-PS for PDSCH at time instant t |

If NRBTS/NRCELL/actDlMuMimo is true, nPrb\_avail(t) shall be calculated for user group (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4395\_replaced([11142202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr3JOvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

And then

psLoad (t)    = min(nPrb\_used (t) / nPrb\_avail (t),1)

If NRBTS/NRCELL/actDlMuMimoEnh is true, nPrb\_avail(t) shall be calculated based on virtual UE(see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7431\_replaced([11144204](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr7arPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and remaining UE (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7530\_replaced([11145129](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr_FBfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

And then

psLoad (t)    = min(nPrb\_used (t) / nPrb\_avail (t),1)

}

Note: When slowPrbPoolingAllowed or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is True (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283\_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), nPrb\_avail(t) shall be limited by the total amount of usable PDSCH PRB of the cell which is computed every bbPoolEvalPeriod (refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6781\_replaced([11211947](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw-StfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **by the slow pooling algorithm in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6500\_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

[CB012623-B]Note: If interference mitigation is appliable for this slot(refer to[12719425](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_EHEPAWwlEfCRGai1q1VTeQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9), no beamforming, only for FR1 TDD), nPrb\_avail(t) shall exclude the PRBs finally blanked by IM.[End CB012623-B]

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = TRUE, nPrb\_avail(t) shall be limited by the maximum number of usable PRBs (defined as rrmMaxNumUsablePrb in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) which is dependent on the layer PRB capacity computed every pooling period and is described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26582\_replaced([11214591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxOKXPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

*psLoad*shall be calculated per radio frame allocated to NR and per cell, and used in detail in averaging method [see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15028\_replaced([11193142](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvqEEvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))]\*\*

---

### 3.29.19.0-6 Measurements for L2 Cell load enabling energy saving by Cell switch-off, Tx switch-off or MIMO muting Category based nGBR Cell Load for energy saving cell management (ID: 11193134)

**3.29.19.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11193138`)

Measurements for L2 Cell load enabling energy saving by Cell switch-off, Tx switch-off or MIMO muting
If Power Saving enhanced Mode  is on for the Cell [CB008745-B] (NRBTS/actLbpsCtrlLogicEnh= TRUE) [End CB008745-B]; Measured category based nGBR Cell Load shall be provided.

Measured category based nGBR Cell load value shall be an average of ratio between used PRBs for non-GBR bearers and  number of available PRBs for non-GBR Bearers in PDSCH transmission, in percents.

The instantaneous power saving load psLoad at current radio frame number t, is defined as:

psLoad (t) = nPrb\_used (t) / (nPrb\_avail (t)  - nPrb\_used4Gbr (t))

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| nPrb\_used (t)        = | taking into account all the UE scheduled for non-GBR Bearer in the slot, for each UE the number of PRBs assigned on non-GBR bearer for PDSCH based on current MCS of the UE is normalized. |

nPrb\_avail (t)      =  number of PRBs available for PDSCH at time instant t

nPrb\_used4Gbr (t)   =  number of PRBs assigned for GBR bearers in PDSCH at time instant t

For averaging method based on those instanstaneous load, see [5G\_UP\_ALG\_15028\_replaced([11193142](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvqEEvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))]

For periodicity of transmission see [5G\_UP\_ALG\_15031\_replaced([11193020](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvo1-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))]

---

### 3.29.19.0-7 Measurements for L2 Cell load enabling energy saving by Cell switch-off, Tx switch-off or MIMO muting Averaging method applicable to PRB based Cell Load (ID: 11193142)

**3.29.19.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `11193153`)

Measurements for L2 Cell load enabling energy saving by Cell switch-off, Tx switch-off or MIMO muting
**[CB013709-B]**

If NRBTS.tmpActFeat1(Bit 0) is set to 0, HwVariant used is not ABIL, and the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31301\_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is greater than or equal to the activation threshold value set for rdPowerSavingsOlcDlPerCent (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31827\_replaced([11216783](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxa-oPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

* then, gNB-DU shall send artifcial traffic load measurements indicating 100% traffic load to CP-RT.

Else,

If (NRBTS.tmpActFeat1(Bit 0) is set to 0 and the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31301\_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler is below the deactivation threshold value set for rdPowerSavingsOlcDlPerCent (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31827\_replaced([11216783](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxa-oPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))**) OR (NRBTS.tmpActFeat1(Bit 0)is set to 1)**

* **then the gNB-DU shall resume sending the measurements periodically as mentioned below.  If an artificial load measurement was sent in the previous measurment period, avgPsLoad shall be initialized with the value 0**.\*\*\*\*

**[End CB013709-B]**

An averaging constant K is given by  R&D parameter *rdLoadPowerSavingAvgConst , see [5G\_UP\_ALG\_15030\_replaced([11193010](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvo19_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))]; this constant is used as input to an exponential filter that calculate the estimated average load, as detailed below.*

The calculation of estimated average load *avgPsLoad*is as follows:\*\*

The instantaneous power saving load *psLoad at current radio frame number t, defined as:*

*psLoad (t) =* nPrb\_used (t) / *nPrb\_avail (t)*\*\*

*psLoad*shall be calculated per radio frame allocated to NR and per cell, and used for averaging with the constant K as input to an exponential filter as follow:\*\*

*avgPsLoad (0) = 0*

*avgPsLoad (t+1) =* psLoad (t+1) / K*+* avgPsLoad (t) *(1- 1 / K)*\*\*\*\*

---

### 3.29.19.0-8 Measurements for L2 Cell load enabling energy saving by Cell switch-off, Tx switch-off or MIMO muting estimated PDCCH Cell Load for energy saving cell management (ID: 11193157)

**3.29.19.0-8.0-6**  (ID: `11193190`)

Measurements for L2 Cell load enabling energy saving by Cell switch-off, Tx switch-off or MIMO muting
[Before PR846325]

**[CB013709-B]**

If NRBTS.tmpActFeat1(Bit 0) is set to 0, HwVariant used is not ABIL, and the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31301\_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is greater than or equal to the activation threshold value set for rdPowerSavingsOlcDlPerCent (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31827\_replaced([11216783](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxa-oPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

* then, gNB-DU shall send artificial traffic load measurements indicating 100% traffic load to CP-RT.

Else,

If (NRBTS.tmpActFeat1(Bit 0) is set to 0 and the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31301\_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is less than the deactivation threshold value set for rdPowerSavingsOlcDlPerCent (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31827\_replaced([11216783](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxa-oPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))**) OR (NRBTS.tmpActFeat1(Bit 0) is set to 1)**

* then gNB-DU shall resume sending the measurements periodically as mentioned below. If an artifical load measurement was sent in the previous measusurement period, then avgPsLoad (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15028\_replaced([11193142](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvqEEvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall be initialized with value 0**.**

**[End CB013709-B]**

[End PR846325]

If Power Saving Mode is on for the Cell (NRBTS/actNrLBPowerSaving = TRUE) **or (NRBTS/actNrLBRTXPowerSaving = TRUE)** or (NRBTS/actNr​L​B​mMimoR​T​X​Power​Saving = TRUE) or (NRBTS/actLbpsCtrlLogicEnh= TRUE); *Measured PDCCH Cell Load shall be provided.*\*\*\*\*

For periodicity of transmission see [5G\_UP\_ALG\_15031\_replaced([11193020](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvo1-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))].

[PR846325]

**[CB013709-B]**

If NRBTS.tmpActFeat1(Bit 0) is set to 0, HwVariant used is not ABIL, and the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31301\_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is greater than or equal to the activation threshold value set for     rdPowerSavingsOlcDlPerCent (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31827\_replaced([11216783](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxa-oPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

* then, gNB-DU shall send artificial traffic load measurements indicating 100% traffic load to CP-RT.

Else, if (NRBTS.tmpActFeat1(Bit 0) is set to 0 and the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31301\_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value provided by the gNB-DU overload control handler, is less than the deactivation threshold value set for rdPowerSavingsOlcDlPerCent (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31827\_replaced([11216783](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxa-oPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))**) OR (NRBTS.tmpActFeat1(Bit 0) is set to 1)**

* then gNB-DU shall resume sending the measurements periodically as mentioned below. If an artificial load measurement was sent in the previous measusurement period, then avgPsLoad (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15028\_replaced([11193142](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvqEEvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall be initialized with value 0**.**

**[End CB013709-B]**

[End PR846325]

*Measured PDCCH Cell Load shall be the maximum of the ratio of used CCEs (*Nbr\_CCE\_used) versus available (*Nbr\_CCE\_avail) CCEs since the last Power Saving load indication, in percents.*\*\*

This ratio shall be caps to 100 % due to approximation in some  high loaded configuration.

*Nbr\_CCE\_used : The Aggregation Level in the DlData\_PdcchSendReq is used to count the number of CCEs allocated (used) in each slot**. + If NRCELL.actConfDlInterferenceGen is set to "2" or "3", for fake UE the number of CCEs assigned for artificial PDCCH load  is determined by the size of dummy CORESET (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15299\_replaced([11168360](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktvYk_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).*\*\*

*Nbr\_CCE\_avail : Number of CCEs available in every radio frame in UE-Specific search space.*

• The construction of coreset and PDCCH slot pattern for a given cell is explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11211\_replaced([11168405](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktv_kfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) & 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3958\_replaced([11168909](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktzp8fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and split of CCEs, if any, between UL/DL is explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3955\_replaced([11169860](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt6Xp_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) which can be used to calculate nCCE\_usable.

• The pre-empted CCEs (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4032\_replaced([11169907](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt6-svvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) in the available CCEs, if any, shall be considered in nCCE\_usable., according to PDCCH Slot Pattern (5G\_UP\_ALG\_3958\_replaced([11168909](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktzp8fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

• When slowPrbPoolingAllowed or **slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is True (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283\_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or** slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = TRUE, all CCEs may not be available for use by PDCCH in NR and the number of CCEs that can be used is limited by the total amount of usable PRB in DL (5G\_UP\_ALG\_6933\_replaced([11169932](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt6-uPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).\*\*\*\*

Note: Only slots available for NR and including PDCCH are considered.

---

## 3.29.20 Handling of eCPRI fields

### 3.29.20.0-1 Handling of eCPRI fields NumCeAxCId Parameter in 5G-L2-PS Setup with eCpriFlag (ID: 11193201)

**3.29.20.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11193206`)

Handling of eCPRI fields
When 5G-L2-PS is setup with PsCell\_CellSetupReq with eCpriFlag set to true, for each DL subcell a value of the Number of eAXC-IDs is provided in the subcell parameter numCeAxCId in PsCell\_CellSetupReq.

When 5G-L2-PS is setup with PsCell\_CellSetupReq with eCpriFlag set to false, 5G-L2-PS will internally set a parameter for numCeAxCId for each DL subcell corresponding to the number of AxC containers based on the subcell type (4 for C4, 2 for C2/D2, refer to 5G\_UP\_2131\_replaced([11381126](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uerB5PvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) ).

---

### 3.29.20.0-2 Handling of eCPRI fields SSB transmission (ID: 11193210)

**3.29.20.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11193220`)

Handling of eCPRI fields
SSB transmission: The following is followed for setting the ceAxCIndex in DlData\_SsBlockSendReq.

eCpriFlag = true

D2 subcell:

When eCpriFlag is true, 5G-L2-PS uses the highest two ceAxCIndex choices (numCeAxCId-2, numCeAxCId-1) in the DlData\_SsBlockSendReq. This is used to ensure that separate ceAxCIndex choices from data are used for different SCS.

C2, C4 subcells:

When eCpriFlag is true, 5G-L2-PS uses the lowest two ceAxCIndex choices (0, 1) in case of digital beamforming for subcellType C2 and C4 and the lowest four ceAxCIndex choices (0, 1, 2, 3) in case of non digital beamforming for subcellType C4, see  5G\_UP\_ALG\_1886\_replaced([11111439](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpNd2_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), in the DlData\_SsBlockSendReq. In cmWave SSB can use data ceAxCIndex and this choice ensures alignment with 5G\_UP\_2277\_replaced([11385279](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ue8uuPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB012220-H] A1, [End CB012220-H] A2,A4 subcells:

When eCpriFlag is true, 5G-L2-PS uses the fixed [CB012220-H] ceAxCIndex(0) or [End CB012220-H] ceAxCIndex(0,1) or (0,1,2,3) base on subcell type [CB012220-H] A1 or [End CB012220-H] A2 or A4 in the  DlData\_SsBlockSendReq.

eCpriFlag = false

When eCpriFlag is false, 5G-L2-PS sets ceAxCIndex(0) for A1 subcell, two ceAxCIndex choices (0, 1) in case of digital beamforming for subcellType C2 and C4 and four ceAxCIndex choices (0, 1, 2, 3) in case of non digital beamforming for subcellType C4, see  5G\_UP\_ALG\_1886\_replaced([11111439](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpNd2_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and patternIds to value 0  in the DlData\_SsBlockSendReq.

---

### 3.29.20.0-3 Handling of eCPRI fields Setting of ceAxCIndex (ID: 11193226)

**3.29.20.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11193230`)

Handling of eCPRI fields
For all DL channels and signals other than SSB in mmWave, the setting of ceAxCIndex (in DlData\_PdcchSendReq, DlData\_PdschSendReq, DlData\_CsiRsSendReq) follows the selection of spatial streams in CPRI when a spatial stream is assigned to one UE.

Note: in DlData\_PdschSendReq, the ceAxCIndex becomes streamIndex which can be used for CPRI & eCPRI cases.

If dlMimoMode is CL 8x4:

DlData\_PdcchSendReq refer to 5G\_L2\_10447\_replaced([11178156](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26-vm_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

DlData\_PdschSendReq refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4411\_replaced([11142387](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr4XUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

DlData\_CsiRsSendReq refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3565\_replaced([11159629](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktKwyvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

See also 5G\_UP\_2280\_replaced([11385305](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ue8uvPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_2283\_replaced([11385333](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ue9VwPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

### 3.29.20.0-4 Handling of eCPRI fields patternId and ceAxCIndex choices (ID: 11193236)

**3.29.20.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `11193246`)

Handling of eCPRI fields
5G-L2-PS shall populate the patternId values for the DL channels and signals along with the ceAxCIndex choices outlined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4705\_replaced([11193210](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvqrJPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22399\_replaced([11193226](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvqrJ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) as follows.

eCpriFlag = true

DlData\_SsBlockSendReq:

For SSB transmission, one request includes upto 4 SSB transmissions (determined by the bits set in activeSsBlocks), one patternId is set for the pair of ceAxCIndex for each SSB occasion in case of digital beamforming and one patternId up to four ceAxCIndex on the unique SSB occasion in case of non digital beamforming, see  5G\_UP\_ALG\_1886\_replaced([11111439](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpNd2_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The patternId in each array position corresponds to the activated bits in activeSsBlocks.

DlData\_PdcchSendReq & DlData\_PdschSendReq:

Each patternId is applicable to two consecutive ceAxCIndex. The number of patternIds selected is based for Pdcch on the precoding option and for Pdsch  the number of antenna ports (number of bits set in antPort) from the message.

For PDSCH, the number of beams depends on PdschPrecodingOption4x4 and the rank (number of layers) from the message (please refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6591\_replaced([11139260](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krmDcPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

For PDCCH, the number of beams depends on PdcchPrecodingOption4x4 :

* value 2, one patternId is expected.
* values 0,1 : two patternIds are expected.

[CB013442-D] If rdFddBfL3Call = true (refer to 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_16401\_replaced([11329923](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TtGWePvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) & NRBTS.NRCELL.dlMimoMode = 40 or 60, PdcchPrecodingOption4x4 = 2 [End CB013442-D]

If dlMimoMode is CL 8x4Mimo: the setting of patternId follows the selection of patternId in CPRI, refer to 5G\_L2\_497\_replaced([11156027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_248vT_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

DlData\_CsiRsSendReq:

Each patternId is applicable to a single ceAxCIndex. A patternId should be populated for each bit set in antennaStream in the same message. The patternIds placed follow the assignment to DlData\_PatternConfigReq provided in 5G\_L2\_484\_replaced([11155945](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_248IOfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1893\_replaced([11114913](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpo7q_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If dlMimoMode is CL 8x4Mimo: the setting of patternId follows the selection of patternId in CPRI, refer to 5G\_L2\_497\_replaced([11156027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_248vT_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), except 4 patternID is needed for 4 eAxc streams in the interface

patternId is 0 as All in Cloud 20B not support beamforming.

If MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/actSupercell = True, patternId is set to 0 on DlData\_SsBlockSendReq, DlData\_PdcchSendReq, DlData\_PdschSendReq, DlData\_CsiRsSendReq.

eCpriFlag = false

In this case, the patternIds are not used by L1-DL. The value shall be set to 0 by default. Note: for DlData\_PdschSentReq, the patternIds can be set to associated pattern IDs of UE.

Note: The patternId implementation can be referenced for mmWave/Analog beamforming based on 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1909\_replaced([11111524](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpOE7PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and for digital beamforming for the section at 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1939\_replaced([11111782](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpQhIPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The implementation details need to be considered (e.g. whether the mapping is done after collecting the channel specific beamIds before mapping to patternIds or after, need channel specific values in this interface).

---

### 3.29.20.0-5 Handling of eCPRI fields Restriction of multiple UEs scheduling in same DL sub-cell for eCPRI (ID: 11193254)

**3.29.20.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11193260`)

Handling of eCPRI fields
When eCpriFlag is true, and multiple UEs or signals are scheduled within the same DL subcell, 5G-L2-PS follows the following rules.

Scheduling requests that use the same (or overlapping) sets of PRBs shall use different subsets of the available ceAxCIndex choices.

Scheduling requests that use disjoint sets of PRBs can use the same (or overlapping, if they require different number of streams) subsets of the available ceAxCIndex choices.

Note: Such a scenario is not considered with 5GC000399-K, but this requirement is meant to prepare for such cases in the future.

---

## 3.29.21 MBSFN and LTE CRS Rate Matching based Dynamic Spectrum Sharing

### 3.29.21.0-1 MBSFN and LTE CRS Rate Matching based Dynamic Spectrum Sharing Requirements moved to Section 3.21.2, Thomas Deiss, 09-02-2022 (ID: 11193268)

## 3.29.22 L2LO support functions

### 3.29.22.0-1 L2LO support functions RLC UM mode SN assignment for the segmented RLC SDU (ID: 11193276)

**3.29.22.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11193282`)

L2LO support functions
In case of CA when the RLC SDU in RLC UM mode needs to be segmented, the segmented RLC SDU shall be assigned with the RLC SN from the sub-range indicated by gNB DU (5G-L2-HI, see  5G\_UP\_ALG\_30289\_replaced([11222186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kx6G0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30291\_replaced([11222200](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kx6G1fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

If the sub-range for the gNB DU (5G-L2-LO) instance changes at the time of sending RLC PDU carrying the pending segments of the SDU that was sent in an earlier TB, the gNB DU (5G-L2-LO) shall remember and use the same SN for the segmented RLC SDU. For details please see 5G\_L2\_1942\_replaced([11216215](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-8pnvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If the RLC SN from the current sub-range has been exhausted before the gNB-DU(5G-L2-HI) indicates the next RLC SN sub-range, the RLC SN from the next sub-range shall be used.

The gNB DU (5G-L2-LO) shall get the highest SN in the current SN range (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30291\_replaced([11222200](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kx6G1fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) as the upper edge of reassembly window defined in chapter 5.2.2.2 of 3GPP 38.322 and perform the below check:

* If the SN for the segmented RLC SDU is out of the reassembly window, all pending segments for the RLC SDU shall be discarded (Note: the pending segments for the RLC SDU in retransmission shall not be discarded).
* If the full RLC SN range is being used, the check shall be skipped.

In case the full RLC SN range is indicated to the gNB DU (5G-L2-LO), if the RLC SN sub-range is used before the indication, the highest SN from the next SN range shall be used as the next RLC SN, otherwise the next RLC SN shall be kept unchanged.

Note:

* For CA eligible non-GBR DRB in UM mode, only 12-bit RLC SN is supported (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30289\_replaced([11222186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kx6G0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

## 3.29.23 R&amp;D Parameters

### 3.29.23.0-1 R&amp;D Parameters rdDpaPfWeightTd (ID: 11193293)

**3.29.23.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11193297`)

R&D Parameters
Defines the amount of scalings applied to the TD metric according  5G\_UP\_ALG\_8329\_replaced([11175264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuhbrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The scope is "only Scells" or "PCell and Scells".

If rdDpaPfWeightTd is set to a value >1, then the the weight of UE is increased.

If rdDpaPfWeightTd is set to a value <1, then the the weight of UE is decreased.

Otherwise, the TD scheduler behavior of DPA UEs is not modified.

Value range: 0.10..10.00

Default value: 2.0

Unit: NA

Online modifiable: Yes

Step size: 0.1

Used in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8329\_replaced([11175264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuhbrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

### 3.29.23.0-3 R&amp;D Parameters rdDpaActPfboostPcell (ID: 11193312)

**3.29.23.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11193317`)

R&D Parameters
Defines the scope of scalings applied in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8329\_replaced([11175264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuhbrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8331\_replaced([11181145](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku85e_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The scope is "only Scells" or "PCell and Scells".

Value range: {False, True}

'False' means "PF and WRR weight are scaled only in Scells".

'True' means "PF and WRR weight are scaled in PCell and Scells".

Unit: NA

Online modifiable: Yes

Step size: NA

Used in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8329\_replaced([11175264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuhbrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and in  5G\_UP\_ALG\_8331\_replaced([11181145](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku85e_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

### 3.29.23.0-8 R&amp;D Parameters rdDtxCellNbUeCs1ThresholdHigh_percent (ID: 11193368)

**3.29.23.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `11193372`)

R&D Parameters
This parameter defines the limit above which the DTX oriented scheduling is disabled in the DL Scheduler.

When the number of UEs in the CS1 list becomes higher than or equal to this percentage of the averaged maximum number of UEs allowed in the CS1 list, no UE shall enter the dtxOptimizedDrbTraffic request class until further notice.

Value range: 0..100

Default value: 90

Unit: Percent

Online modifiable: No

Step size: 1

Used in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9949\_replaced([11174961](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kufmdvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

### 3.29.23.0-9 R&amp;D Parameters rdDtxCellNbUeCs1ThresholdLow_percent (ID: 11193377)

**3.29.23.0-9.0-1**  (ID: `11193382`)

R&D Parameters
This parameter defines the limit below which the DTX oriented scheduling is enabled again.

When the number of UEs in the CS1 list becomes lower than or equal to this percentage of the averaged maximum number of UEs allowed in the CS1 list, 5G-L2-PS shall start the rdDtxCellEnablingTimer\_ms  timer.

Value range: 0..100

Default value: 80

Unit: Percent

Online modifiable: No

Step size: 1

Used in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9949\_replaced([11174961](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kufmdvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

### 3.29.23.0-10 R&amp;D Parameters rdDtxCellEnablingTimer_ms (ID: 11193387)

**3.29.23.0-10.0-1**  (ID: `11193393`)

R&D Parameters
This timer is started whenever the following condition is fulfilled: While DTX oriented scheduling is disabled, the number of UEs in the CS1

list becomes lower or equal to rdDtxCellNbUeCs1ThresholdLow\_percent. DTX oriented scheduling can only be re-enabled at the expiry of this timer.

However, such timer will be stopped if the number of UEs in the CS1 list becomes greater than or equal to rdDtxCellNbUeCs1ThresholdHigh\_percent.

Value range: 0..1000

Default value: 10

Unit: ms

Online modifiable: No

Step size: 1

Used in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9949\_replaced([11174961](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kufmdvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

### 3.29.23.0-19 R&amp;D Parameters rdMaxCrReTransmissionDl (ID: 11193470)

**3.29.23.0-19.0-1**  (ID: `11193475`)

R&D Parameters
Defines the maximum allowed code rate for the retransmission in DL.

Value range: 0.95, ……., 3.00

Default value: 1.30

Unit: N/A

Online modifiable: No

Step size: 0.01

Used in: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11953\_replaced([11184310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRplPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[CB008662-A-UPD005] Note: The range of the parameter is restricted in L2PS for Loner so that the maximum code rate is below 3.00. The upper bound of the parameter depends on the system bandwidth (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15198\_replaced([11184814](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRpmvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End CB008662-A-UPD005]

---

### 3.29.23.0-20 R&amp;D Parameters rdAdaptiveReTxNackCount (ID: 11193480)

**3.29.23.0-20.0-2**  (ID: `12498916`)

R&D Parameters
[Before PR820861-25R3] Defines the maximum number of NACKs received at gNB for a HARQ process, after which the next retransmission shall use the PRB/MCS of initial transmission.

[PR820861-25R3]

Defines the retransmission type (adaptive or non-adaptive) based on the bitmap value defined. The value 1 corresponds to a non-adaptive retransmission while the value 0 corresponds to adaptive retransmission. The length of bitmap is 7 bits, which corresponds to the maximum number of retransmissions. [End PR820861-25R3]

Value range: 0, .... , 0x7f

[Before PR820861-25R3]

Default value: 2

[PR820861-25R3]

Type: bitmap

Default value: 0100010 (0x22)

[End PR820861-25R3]

Unit: N/A

Online modifiable: No

Step size: 1

Used in: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11943\_replaced([11184268](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRCjfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[PR820861-25R3] The MSB of the bitmap is not used. The remaining 7 bits correspond to the retransmission number 1 to 7 from MCB to LSB. [End PR820861-25R3]

---

### 3.29.23.0-21 R&amp;D Parameters rdActAdaptiveReTxFakeAckMitigationAlg (ID: 13458108)

**3.29.23.0-21.0-1**  (ID: `13458121`)

R&D Parameters
R&D parameter is used to disable adaptive retransmission algorithm for troubleshooting purposes, when more than one HARQ bits are bundled in UCI and there is a NACK for initial transmission because there a UE chipset that sends a fake Ack for the first retransmission.

Value range: 0 (FALSE), 1 (TRUE)

Default value: 0 (FALSE)

Online modifiable: Yes

Type: Control

Used in: [11184268: Scheduling of adaptive Re-transmission](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvRCjfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)

Trigger for deletion: Never

Owner: Ahmed Elhaddad (Nokia)

---

### 3.29.23.0-22 R&amp;D Parameters rdReservePsBwpForVoNR (ID: 11193492)

**3.29.23.0-22.0-2**  (ID: `12659691`)

R&D Parameters
[Before CNI-137616-B]

Defines if the RBGs in the power savings (PS) BWP should be reserved for only UEs that are assigned to PS BWP (e.g. VoNR UEs), or if the PS BWP RBGs can be used by UEs in BWPs that overlap the PS BWP.

Value range: True, False

Default value: True

Unit: N/A

Online modifiable: No

Step size: NA

Used in: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_12661\_replaced([11182756](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvFcWfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[End CNI-137616-B]

Note: R&D parameter removed by CNI-137616.

---

### 3.29.23.0-23 R&amp;D Parameters rdMinDlSchedUesPerSlotInHighLoad (ID: 11193503)

**3.29.23.0-23.0-1**  (ID: `11193506`)

R&D Parameters
Defines the minimum guaranteed number of UEs to be scheduled in a slot in DL under high load situations, when FDM enabled.

Value range: 0, ……., 50

Default value: 1

Step size: 1

Unit: N/A

Online modifiable: No

Performance Impact:-

Used in: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13161\_replaced([11177648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuwsOfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Trigger for deletion: Never

Owner: ranjith.1.ponnusamy@nokia.com

Please note that number of UEs scheduled in any given slot will not be greater than rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10610\_replaced([11179079](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku3Z6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) though rdMinDlSchedUesPerSlotInHighLoad is set to higher value.

### 3.29.23.0-25 R&amp;D Parameters rdEthUpdateTimer (ID: 11193522)

**3.29.23.0-25.0-2**  (ID: `11193532`)

R&D Parameters
This timer is (re-) started at each update of estimated averaged throughput eTh\_av according to  5G\_UP\_ALG\_3376\_replaced([11152282](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kse0TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

At this timer’s expiry

 the condition for sending update of estimated averaged throughput eTh\_av to higher layers is checked

 the timer is restarted, no matter if the update of eTh\_av has been sent or not.

Value range: 0..1000

[Before PR750130]

Default value:  10

[PR750130]

Default value:  40

[End PR750130]

Unit: ms

Online modifiable: No

Step size: 1

Used in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15751\_replaced([11192830](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvnn0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

Default value: 1

Unit: N/A

Performance impact:

### 3.29.23.0-30 R&amp;D Parameters rdFactorInCceSplitSlot (ID: 11193576)

**3.29.23.0-30.0-1**  (ID: `11193580`)

R&D Parameters
This parameter divides the number of UEs in UL and DL direction taking into account the L1low limitation regarding the number of beams per symbol in a slot where CCE split enabled.

Value range: 0.1...0.9

Default value: 0.5

Step size: 0.1

Unit: N/A

Online modifiable: No

Performance impact: The parameter can be used to decrease the UL or DL PDCCH starvation in slots where CCE split is enabled by allowing more UEs to a certain direction, thus increasing the throughput in that direction.

Used in: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17531\_replaced([11179128](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku4A9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Owner: sameera.palipana@nokia.com

The R&D parameter defines the maximum period to execute SVC algorithm, in number of slots for DL.

Value range: 1 to 100

Default value: 10

Step size: 1

Online modifiable: No

Specified in: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30750\_replaced([11188771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved6PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

### 3.29.23.0-52 R&amp;D Parameters rdEnableNrtSvcDL (ID: 11193799)

**3.29.23.0-52.0-1**  (ID: `11193804`)

R&D Parameters
The R&D parameter defines whether SVC algorithm is implemented in NRT or not, for DL. If implementation in NRT is selected, then l2ps allows dynamic SVC execution period between 1 and rdMaxSvcExecutionPeriodDL, depending on the system load.

Value range: 0 or 1; 0 means SVC is not implemented in NRT, 1 means SVC is implemented in NRT.

Default value: 1

Online modifiable: No

Specified in: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30750\_replaced([11188771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved6PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

### 3.29.23.0-53 R&amp;D Parameters rdCs1CandidateUeNumCoeff (ID: 11193808)

**3.29.23.0-53.0-1**  (ID: `11193813`)

R&D Parameters
Short description: coefficient of the CS1 candidate UE number. total CS1 candidate UE number = rdCs1CandiateUeNumCoeff \* Cs1Size, where Cs1Size is determined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4209\_replaced([11174627](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kudxRfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). if rdCs1CandidateUeNumCoeff = 0, there is no restriction to the number of CS1 candidate UEs and the round-robin start position of UE pre-selection is advanced for each DL slot.

Value range: 0 … 10

Default value: 0

Step size: 1

Unit: none

Online modifiable: Yes, new value is applied to the next CS1 UE selection;

Performance impact: minor;

Used in: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4209\_replaced([11174627](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kudxRfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

Trigger for deletion: when the R&D parameter has been replaced by a NIDD parameter.

Owner: Kaifeng Yang

---

### 3.29.23.0-54 R&amp;D Parameters rdMinNbPRBsPdschSubArea (ID: 11193819)

**3.29.23.0-54.0-1**  (ID: `11193824`)

R&D Parameters
The R&D parameter defines the minimum number of PRBs for a creation of a DL PDSCH sub area where a DL RAT1 PDSCH grant can be allocated. If the size of the PDSCH sub area is below this R&D parameter, gNB-DU shall not create this new PDSCH sub area and shall not grant any DL RAT1 DCI 1\_1 (nor DCI 1\_0) for these PRBs.

Value range: 1,...,5

Default value: [Before CB008927-H-UPD005] 4 [CB008927-H-UPD005] 1 [End CB008927-H-UPD005]

Step size: 1

Online modifiable: No

Specified in: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23452\_replaced([11175855](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kumUKvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

### 3.29.23.0-59 R&amp;D Parameters rdUseDAfterUForPdcchSharingTdd (ID: 11193858)

**3.29.23.0-59.0-1**  (ID: `11193863`)

R&D Parameters
The R&D parameter defines the use of first PDCCH symbol sharing with PDSCH in the first D slot after U slot in TDD FR1.

Value range: [0, 1]

Default value: 0

Unit: 1

Online modifiable: No

Step size: 1

Used in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25284\_replaced([11183082](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvH4lvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

### 3.29.23.0-60 R&amp;D Parameters rdTriggerEcpri72eInterfaceSplit (ID: 11193867)

**3.29.23.0-60.0-1**  (ID: `11193873`)

R&D Parameters
The R&D parameter defines activation of L1/L2 interface message split. It is linked to maximum number of user scheduled per TTI per cell. Only applicable to eCpri 7.2e

Value range: 0 (False), 1(True)

Default value:0 (False)

Unit: 1

Online modifiable: No

Step size: 1

Used in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10654\_replaced([11199273](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwMPmfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10610\_replaced([11179079](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku3Z6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Rationale: The R&D parameter is used to activate a new functionality only on specific features (no in scope of RRM porting feature for example).

Note: this R&D parameter can be removed on first 7.2e commercial feature (CB009843)

---

### 3.29.23.0-61 R&amp;D Parameters rdDlSchLowBufferMaxPenalty (ID: 11193877)

**3.29.23.0-61.0-1**  (ID: `11193883`)

R&D Parameters
The R&D parameter defines a penalty factor for low buffer UEs.

Value range: 0,...,100

Default value: 90

Unit: 1

Online modifiable: No

Step size: 1

Used in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26702\_replaced([11175386](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuiCv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Rationale: The R&D parameter modifies the PF metric. It might reduce it significantly by the factor (1 - rdDlSchLowBufferMaxPenalty/100.0). This does not allow low buffer UEs to dominate the PF scheduler and shall guarantee a higher PRB utilization and less MCS downgrading if  DL Scheduler Low Buffer Optimization is activated.

---

### 3.29.23.0-62 R&amp;D Parameters rdDlSchLowBufferFdmAssumption (ID: 11193888)

**3.29.23.0-62.0-1**  (ID: `11193891`)

R&D Parameters
The R&D parameter defines an assumption for the number of low buffer UEs to be ready for being scheduled.

Value range: 0,...,100

Default value: 4

Unit: 1

Online modifiable: No

Step size: 1

Used in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26702\_replaced([11175386](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuiCv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Rationale: The R&D parameter modifies the PF metric and reduces it wrt to low buffer UEs. This does not allow low buffer UEs to dominate the PF scheduler and shall guarantee a higher PRB utilization and less MCS downgrading if DL Scheduler Low Buffer Optimization is activated.

---

### 3.29.23.0-63 R&amp;D Parameters rdDlSchLowBufferReinitPenalty (ID: 11193897)

**3.29.23.0-63.0-1**  (ID: `11193902`)

R&D Parameters
The R&D parameter defines a penalty factor for low buffer UEs in case of re-initialization.

Value range: 0,...,100

Default value: 0

Unit: 1

Online modifiable: No

Step size: 1

Used in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26702\_replaced([11175386](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuiCv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Rationale: The R&D parameter modifies the PF metric. It might reduce it significantly by the factor (1 -rdDlSchLowBufferReinitPenalty/100.0) in case of re-initialization of the average data rate. This does not allow low buffer UEs to dominate the PF scheduler and shall guarantee a higher PRB utilization and less MCS downgrading if DL Scheduler Low Buffer Optimization is activated.

---

### 3.29.23.0-64 R&amp;D Parameters rdDlSchLowBufferFilterConst (ID: 11193908)

**3.29.23.0-64.0-1**  (ID: `11193912`)

R&D Parameters
The R&D parameter defines the aging filter coefficient.

Value range: 0,...,100

Default value: 8

Unit: 1

Online modifiable: No

Step size: 1

Used in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26702\_replaced([11175386](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuiCv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Rationale: The R&D parameter defines the 1st order IIR filter coefficient to allow aging.  This R&D parameter is part of a set of parameters to modify the PF metric.

---

### 3.29.23.0-65 R&amp;D Parameters rdDlSchLowBufferTbTxPenalty (ID: 11193917)

**3.29.23.0-65.0-1**  (ID: `11193922`)

R&D Parameters
The R&D parameter defines a penalty factor for low buffer UEs for the calculation of the a-posteriori downgraded DL data rate.

Value range: 0,...,100

Default value: 75

Unit: 1

Online modifiable: No

Step size: 1

Used in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26702\_replaced([11175386](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuiCv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Rationale: This R&D parameter is part of a set of parameters to modify the PF metric. It might reduce it significantly by the factor (1 -rdDlSchLowBufferTbTxPenalty/100.0) for the a-posteriori downgraded DL data rate. This does not allow low buffer UEs to dominate the PF scheduler and shall guarantee a higher PRB utilization and less MCS downgrading if DL Scheduler Low Buffer Optimization is activated.

---

### 3.29.23.0-66 R&amp;D Parameters rdSinglePfMetricPerUeThreshold (ID: 11193927)

R&D Parameters
Threshold of total number active CCs within a cellgroup beyond which a single PF metric will be used for each UE in DRB traffic class. The single PF metric will be used for creating the CS2 list per carrier

value range: [0, 2560]

default value: [Before CB012734-D-UPD001] 0 [CB012734-D-UPD001] If the default value is set to 0, then it shall be updated with nbActiveCarriersThreshold [End CB012734-D-UPD001]

Unit: none

Online modifable: No

Step size: 1

Used in: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26820\_replaced([11175784](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kultG_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

### 3.29.23.0-75 R&amp;D Parameters rdEnableTdIcic (ID: 11194010)

**3.29.23.0-75.0-1**  (ID: `11194015`)

R&D Parameters
This parameter activates TD-ICIC for a cell. When TD-ICIC is activated, then certain resource allocation rules shall be followed for high and normal performing UEs in the first DL slot after an UL slot in a frame strucutre. The resource allocation rules are specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29945\_replaced([11179332](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku5PFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

value range: 0,1

default value: 0 (disabled)

Unit: boolean

Online modifiable: Yes

step size: 1

Used in: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29945\_replaced([11179332](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku5PFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4500\_replaced([11179300](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku4oDfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

### 3.29.23.0-76 R&amp;D Parameters rdFirstDlSlot (ID: 11194020)

**3.29.23.0-76.0-1**  (ID: `11194025`)

R&D Parameters
This parameter is a bitmap in which each bit represents a slot in the frame. Depending on the status of the bit, the gNB-DU shall apply certain resource allocations restrictions to high and normal performing UEs.  The resource allocation rules are specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29945\_replaced([11179332](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku5PFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

value range: 0x00000,..,0xfffff

default value: 0x8421 (in Hex)

Unit: bitmap

Online modifiable: Yes

step size: 1

Used in: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29945\_replaced([11179332](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku5PFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Note: It is recommended that when rdEnableTdIcic [5G\_UP\_ALG\_30165\_replaced([11194010](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvx_5vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))] is enabled, then only the bits corresponding to the DL slot after an UL slot can be set to 1 in rdFirstDlSlot.

---

### 3.29.23.0-77 R&amp;D Parameters rdResourceUtilizationThresholdFirstSlot (ID: 11194030)

**3.29.23.0-77.0-1**  (ID: `11194034`)

R&D Parameters
This parameter denotes a percentage of available FD resources. If the sum of FD resource allocations of normal performing UEs is greater than or equal to this parameter in the first DL slot after an UL slot in a frame structure, then high performing UEs will not be allocated in that slot.

value range: 0,1,...,999,1000

default value: 100

Unit: Percentage

Online modifiable: Yes

step size: 1

Used in: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29945\_replaced([11179332](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku5PFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

### 3.29.23.0-78 R&amp;D Parameters rdResourceUtilizationThresholdOtherSlots (ID: 11194040)

**3.29.23.0-78.0-1**  (ID: `11194045`)

R&D Parameters
This parameter denotes a percentage of available FD resources. If the sum of FD resource allocations of high performing UEs is greater than or equal to this parameter in the any DL slot (except the first DL slot after an UL slot) in a frame structure, then normal performing UEs will not be allocated in that slot.

value range: 0,1,...,999,1000

default value: 100

Unit: Percentage

Online modifiable: Yes

step size: 1

Used in: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29945\_replaced([11179332](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku5PFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Note: When rdEnableTdIcic [5G\_UP\_ALG\_30165\_replaced([11194010](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvx_5vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))] is enabled, a very small value of this parameter can block small buffer UEs in all slots except the first DL slot after an UL slot.

---

### 3.29.23.0-79 R&amp;D Parameters rdRbgLimitedSlot (ID: 11194051)

**3.29.23.0-79.0-1**  (ID: `11194054`)

R&D Parameters
This parameter is a bitmap in which each bit represents a slot in the frame. If the bit is set to 1, then the limit imposed by dlInterferenceAvoidance.rbgLimit (rbgLimit in the structure dlInterferenceAvoidance) shall be applicable for the corresponding slot.

value range: 0x00000,..,0xfffff

default value: 0xfffff (in Hex) (enabled for all slots in the frame)

Unit: bitmap

Online modifiable: Yes

step size: 1

Used in: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8194\_replaced([11182952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvGqe_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10409\_replaced([11182991](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvHRg_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Note: Changing the default value is only recommended for Korean customers

### 3.29.23.0-83 R&amp;D Parameters rdLowBufRgWeightAmplifierDL (ID: 11194091)

**3.29.23.0-83.0-1**  (ID: `11194095`)

R&D Parameters
This R&D parameters is used in enhanced SVC algorithm when PI control is enabled to increase the chance that DRBs of a low buffer RG get scheduled, so that the RG can get its target share when enough traffic will be available.

Value range: 1...10^6

Default value: 10^4

Step size: 1

Unit: N/A

Online modificable: Yes

Used in: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23508\_replaced([11189878](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvgTGfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Owner: dariush.soleymani@nokia.com

### 3.29.23.0-88 R&amp;D Parameters rdNbrUEsInCS1ListSchedulingWeightDL (ID: 11194141)

**3.29.23.0-88.0-1**  (ID: `11194146`)

R&D Parameters
[Before CB012238-A-UPD001]The number of UEs in CS1 list is used in scheduling weight calculation for QoS fairness slice aware scheduler at each slot. If this value is set as 0, then all of UEs in CS1 list shall be used.

Value range: [0,50]

Default value: 0

Unit: -

Online modifiable: Yes

Step Size: 1

Performance impact: Avoid high CPU load impact by setting a proper value.

Used in: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_33082\_replaced([11189507](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvfsDPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Trigger for deletion: Performance is verified later in the field test

Note: Max. value 50 is the max number of UEs in the CS1 list.[End CB012238-A-UPD001]

### 3.29.23.0-89 R&amp;D Parameters rdMcsThresholdDl (ID: 11194152)

**3.29.23.0-89.0-1**  (ID: `11194157`)

R&D Parameters
The R&D parameter defines the MCS threshold to select large buffer traffic UEs. The UEs whose MCS is greater than or equal to this R&D value can be selected as the large buffer traffic UEs.

Default value: 4

Unit: -

Online modifiable: Yes

Step size: 1

### 3.29.23.0-90 R&amp;D Parameters rdRankThresholdDl (ID: 11194162)

**3.29.23.0-90.0-1**  (ID: `11194168`)

R&D Parameters
The R&D parameter defines the Rank threshold to select large buffer traffic UEs. The UEs whose Rank is higher than or equal to this R&D value can be selected as the large buffer traffic UEs. Note that range of rdRankThresholdDl is 0…3 so when set to 1 it means UE must have Rank2 or higher to be considered as high buffer UE.

Value range: [0,3]

Default value: 1

Unit: -

Online modifiable: Yes

Step size: 1

Performance impact: Improve cell T-put by scheduling large buffer traffic UEs

Used in: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4178\_replaced([11174242](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuaG5_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Trigger for deletion: Performance is verified later in the field test

### 3.29.23.0-97 R&amp;D Parameters rdEpicAllowanceFairness (ID: 12528070)

**3.29.23.0-97.0-1**  (ID: `12528071`)

R&D Parameters
The R&D parameter defines the fairness in the token distribution between slot when under EIRP control.  
If this parameter is set to 1, tokens will be distributed evenly between slots.  
If this parameter is set to 0, tokens will all be available in the first slot.

Value range: [0,1]

Default value: 0.8

Unit: float

Online modifiable: Yes

Step size: 0.01

Performance impact: Mitigate token starvation in slots under EIRP control

Used in: [12526294](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-_HiABrIEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

Trigger for deletion: Performance is confirmed in field test

**3.29.23.0-99.0-1**  (ID: `12528081`)

R&D Parameters
The R&D parameter defines how the power reduction factor affects the token allocation in slots under EIRP control. The higher the value, the smaller the number of tokens distributed per slot.  
If this parameter is set to 0, the available tokens should be made equal to the allowance instead.

Value range: [0,10]

Default value: 3.0

Unit: dB

Online modifiable: Yes

Step size: 0.1

Performance impact: Reduce the number of token provided per slot when under EIRP control

Used in: [12526294](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-_HiABrIEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

Trigger for deletion: Performance is confirmed in field test

Default value: 10^-4

Unit: Fractional share of total available BW resources (Percent/100)

### 3.29.23.0-108 R&amp;D Parameters rdPrbNumForSsbIM (ID: 12731387)

**3.29.23.0-108.0-1**  (ID: `12731388`)

R&D Parameters
The R&D parameter defines the PRB number of SSB interference mitigation. This value is required to use the default value unless with special request. Any value much larger that the default value may result in some corner cases. Also this value shall be less than the cell bandwidth size for downlink. If (cRbStartForSsbIM + rdPrbNumForSsbIM) > BWP size, only the (BWP size - cRbStartForSsbIM) PRBs are available for muting and the final muted PRBs are dependent on feature algorithm. In case the value result in some unexpected issue, this value shall be reset to default value or configured to a proper value.

Value range: 1…100

Default value: 20

Unit: -

Online modifiable: No

Step Size: 1

---

### 3.29.23.0-109 R&amp;D Parameters rdPeriodForSsbIM (ID: 12731398)

**3.29.23.0-109.0-1**  (ID: `12731399`)

R&D Parameters
The R&D parameter defines the time period of SSB interference mitigation in millisecond. This value shall reflect the outdoor cells' SSB period. The default value is 20 milliseconds, which is the default SSB period. This value is required to use the default value unless with special request.

Value range: 20…80

Default value: 20

Unit: ms

Online modifiable: No

Step Size: 10

---

### 3.29.23.0-110 R&amp;D Parameters rdProhibitTimerForSsbIM (ID: 12731408)

**3.29.23.0-110.0-1**  (ID: `12731409`)

R&D Parameters
The R&D parameter defines the time length, during which time period the muted PRBs cannot be unmuted or reused, even if the detected BLER falls below the BLER threshold of unmuting. This is to avoid ping-pong between PRB muting and unmuting. This value is suggested to be set to a multiple of [12731398: rdPeriodForSsbIM](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_n1IKkHNPEfCRE7eh4Ndkrw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

Value range: 20…100

Default value: 20

Unit: SSB period time, refer to [12731398: rdPeriodForSsbIM](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_n1IKkHNPEfCRE7eh4Ndkrw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

Online modifiable: No

Step Size: 1

Value range: 10… 100

Default value: 10

Unit: NA

Online modifiable: No

Step Size: 10

Specified in: [13282360](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_JIL4ZMrAEfCYBIz6acpPHw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

### 3.29.23.0-115 R&amp;D Parameters rdSuspendDLBuffMonitFddPercent (ID: 13282541)

**3.29.23.0-115.0-1**  (ID: `13282542`)

R&D Parameters
This parameter defines the load thresholds for the activation and deactivation of a countermeasure to protect gNB-DU from overload. While the countermeasure is active gNB-DU shall for a FDD cell, suspend “DL buffer monitoring for throughput-based IRAT handover” and when the countermeasure is deactivated gNB-DU shall resume “DL buffer monitoring for throughput-based IRAT handover”. The 3 least significant decimal digits define the deactivation threshold and the next 3 more significant decimal digits define the activation threshold. The threshold values are percentages of the RT severity metric l2PsRtCellLevelSeverityMetric ([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) in DL. When the parameter is set to 0, the countermeasure is never activated due to high load.

Note: If there are leading zeros in the specified default value, then the leading zero(s) shall be removed from the default parameter value.

Value range:  0…100 in every 3 digits tuple  
Default value:  80075  
Step size: 1 within every 3 digits tuple.  
Unit: %  
Online modifiable: No  
Type: Control  
Performance Impact: -  
Used in: [13282370](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2O3zkcrAEfCYBIz6acpPHw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)  
Trigger for deletion: Never

---

### 3.29.23.0-116 R&amp;D Parameters rdSuspendDLBuffMonitTddPercent (ID: 13282544)

**3.29.23.0-116.0-1**  (ID: `13282545`)

R&D Parameters
This parameter defines the load thresholds for the activation and deactivation of a countermeasure to protect gNB-DU from overload. While the countermeasure is active gNB-DU shall for a TDD cell, suspend “DL buffer monitoring for throughput-based IRAT handover”  and when the countermeasure is deactivated gNB-DU shall resume “DL buffer monitoring for throughput-based IRAT handover”. The 3 least significant decimal digits define the deactivation threshold and the next 3 more significant decimal digits define the activation threshold. The threshold values are percentages of the RT severity metric l2PsRtCellLevelSeverityMetric ([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) in DL. When the parameter is set to 0, the countermeasure is never activated due to high load.

Note: If there are leading zeros in the specified default value, then the leading zero(s) shall be removed from the default parameter value.

Value range:  0…100 in every 3 digits tuple  
Default value:  76070  
Step size: 1 within every 3 digits tuple.  
Unit: %  
Online modifiable: No  
Type: Control  
Performance Impact: -  
Used in: [13282370](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2O3zkcrAEfCYBIz6acpPHw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)  
Trigger for deletion: Never

Default value:  0.05  
Step size: 0.01  
Unit: NA  
Online modifiable: No  
Performance Impact: -

Note: In SW implementation, this parameter is defined as an integer value (\*100). Hence, any change in this parameter shall be done accordingly.
